authors_text: John Irvin Alora,Mattia Cenedese,Edward Schmerling,George Haller,Marco Pavone
title: Data-Driven Spectral Submanifold Reduction for Nonlinear Optimal Control of High-Dimensional Robots
title_zh: 用于高维机器人非线性最优控制的数据驱动谱子流形缩减
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, Submission to International Conference for Robotics and Automation 2023
comments: 9 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, Submission to International Conference for Robotics and Automation 2023
abstract: Modeling and control of high-dimensional, nonlinear robotic systems remains a challenging task. While various model- and learning-based approaches have been proposed to address these challenges, they broadly lack generalizability to different control tasks and rarely preserve the structure of the dynamics. In this work, we propose a new, data-driven approach for extracting low-dimensional models from data using Spectral Submanifold Reduction (SSMR). In contrast to other data-driven methods which fit dynamical models to training trajectories, we identify the dynamics on generic, low-dimensional attractors embedded in the full phase space of the robotic system. This allows us to obtain computationally-tractable models for control which preserve the system's dominant dynamics and better track trajectories radically different from the training data. We demonstrate the superior performance and generalizability of SSMR in dynamic trajectory tracking tasks vis-a-vis the state of the art, including Koopman operator-based approaches.
summary: Modeling and control of high-dimensional, nonlinear robotic systems remains a challenging task. While various model- and learning-based approaches have been proposed to address these challenges, they broadly lack generalizability to different control tasks and rarely preserve the structure of the dynamics. In this work, we propose a new, data-driven approach for extracting low-dimensional models from data using Spectral Submanifold Reduction (SSMR). In contrast to other data-driven methods which fit dynamical models to training trajectories, we identify the dynamics on generic, low-dimensional attractors embedded in the full phase space of the robotic system. This allows us to obtain computationally-tractable models for control which preserve the system's dominant dynamics and better track trajectories radically different from the training data. We demonstrate the superior performance and generalizability of SSMR in dynamic trajectory tracking tasks vis-a-vis the state of the art, including Koopman operator-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 高维非线性机器人系统的建模和控制仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。尽管已经提出了各种基于模型和学习的方法来应对这些挑战，但它们普遍缺乏对不同控制任务的通用性，并且很少保留动态结构。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的数据驱动方法，用于使用谱子流形缩减（SSMR）从数据中提取低维模型。与其他将动力学模型拟合到训练轨迹的数据驱动方法相比，我们识别了嵌入机器人系统全相空间中的通用低维吸引子的动力学。这使我们能够获得计算上易于处理的控制模型，从而保留系统的主导动态并更好地跟踪与训练数据完全不同的轨迹。我们展示了 SSMR 在动态轨迹跟踪任务中相对于最先进技术（包括基于 Koopman 算子的方法）的卓越性能和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动的谱子流形约简（SSMR）方法，用于从高维机器人系统的数据中提取低维模型，以实现非线性最优控制。
AI.motivation: 现有模型和学习方法在处理高维非线性机器人系统时，难以泛化到不同控制任务，且很少保留动力学结构，导致对训练数据外的轨迹跟踪效果差。
AI.method: 通过识别嵌入在机器人系统完整相空间中的通用低维吸引子上的动力学，而非直接拟合训练轨迹的动态模型，实现计算可行的控制模型。
AI.result: 在动态轨迹跟踪任务中，SSMR相比基于Koopman算子的方法等现有技术表现出更优的性能和泛化能力，能更准确地跟踪与训练数据差异较大的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: SSMR通过保留系统主导动力学的低维吸引子建模，为高维机器人系统的非线性控制提供了更高效且通用的解决方案。

While various model- and learning-based approaches have been proposed to address these challenges, they broadly lack generalizability to different control tasks and rarely preserve the structure of the dynamics. In this work, we propose a new, data-driven approach for extracting low-dimensional models from data using Spectral Submanifold Reduction (SSMR). authors_text: Cuong N. Nguyen,Lam Si Tung Ho,Vu Dinh,Tal Hassner,Cuong V. Nguyen
title: Generalization Bounds for Deep Transfer Learning Using Majority Predictor Accuracy
title_zh: 使用多数预测器精度的深度迁移学习的泛化界限
comment: 5 pages, Paper published at the International Symposium on Information Theory and Its Applications (ISITA 2022)
comments: 5 pages, Paper published at the International Symposium on Information Theory and Its Applications (ISITA 2022)
abstract: We analyze new generalization bounds for deep learning models trained by transfer learning from a source to a target task. Our bounds utilize a quantity called the majority predictor accuracy, which can be computed efficiently from data. We show that our theory is useful in practice since it implies that the majority predictor accuracy can be used as a transferability measure, a fact that is also validated by our experiments.
summary: We analyze new generalization bounds for deep learning models trained by transfer learning from a source to a target task. Our bounds utilize a quantity called the majority predictor accuracy, which can be computed efficiently from data. We show that our theory is useful in practice since it implies that the majority predictor accuracy can be used as a transferability measure, a fact that is also validated by our experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们分析了通过从源任务到目标任务的迁移学习训练的深度学习模型的新泛化界限。我们的界限利用了一个称为多数预测准确率的量，它可以根据数据有效地计算出来。我们证明了我们的理论在实践中是有用的，因为它意味着多数预测器的准确性可以用作可转移性度量，这一事实也得到了我们的实验的验证。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了深度迁移学习的泛化界限，并提出利用多数预测器准确率作为迁移能力的度量指标。
AI.motivation: 迁移学习的泛化能力缺乏理论保证，现有方法难以有效评估源任务与目标任务之间的迁移可行性。
AI.method: 通过理论推导建立基于多数预测器准确率的泛化界限，并在实际实验中验证该指标作为迁移能力度量的有效性。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验均表明，多数预测器准确率能有效反映迁移学习效果，且计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为迁移学习提供了新的理论分析框架，并提出了可高效计算的迁移能力评估指标。

authors_text: Shuaixin Li,Bin Tian,Zhu Xiaozhou,Gui Jianjun,Yao Wen,Guangyun Li
title: InTEn-LOAM: Intensity and Temporal Enhanced LiDAR Odometry and Mapping
title_zh: InTEn-LOAM：强度和时间增强型激光雷达里程计和测绘
abstract: Traditional LiDAR odometry (LO) systems mainly leverage geometric information obtained from the traversed surroundings to register laser scans and estimate LiDAR ego-motion, while it may be unreliable in dynamic or unstructured environments. This paper proposes InTEn-LOAM, a low-drift and robust LiDAR odometry and mapping method that fully exploits implicit information of laser sweeps (i.e., geometric, intensity, and temporal characteristics). Scanned points are projected to cylindrical images, which facilitate the efficient and adaptive extraction of various types of features, i.e., ground, beam, facade, and reflector. We propose a novel intensity-based points registration algorithm and incorporate it into the LiDAR odometry, enabling the LO system to jointly estimate the LiDAR ego-motion using both geometric and intensity feature points. To eliminate the interference of dynamic objects, we propose a temporal-based dynamic object removal approach to filter them out before map update. Moreover, the local map is organized and downsampled using a temporal-related voxel grid filter to maintain the similarity between the current scan and the static local map. Extensive experiments are conducted on both simulated and real-world datasets. The results show that the proposed method achieves similar or better accuracy w.r.t the state-of-the-arts in normal driving scenarios and outperforms geometric-based LO in unstructured environments.
summary: Traditional LiDAR odometry (LO) systems mainly leverage geometric information obtained from the traversed surroundings to register laser scans and estimate LiDAR ego-motion, while it may be unreliable in dynamic or unstructured environments. This paper proposes InTEn-LOAM, a low-drift and robust LiDAR odometry and mapping method that fully exploits implicit information of laser sweeps (i.e., geometric, intensity, and temporal characteristics). Scanned points are projected to cylindrical images, which facilitate the efficient and adaptive extraction of various types of features, i.e., ground, beam, facade, and reflector. We propose a novel intensity-based points registration algorithm and incorporate it into the LiDAR odometry, enabling the LO system to jointly estimate the LiDAR ego-motion using both geometric and intensity feature points. To eliminate the interference of dynamic objects, we propose a temporal-based dynamic object removal approach to filter them out before map update. Moreover, the local map is organized and downsampled using a temporal-related voxel grid filter to maintain the similarity between the current scan and the static local map. Extensive experiments are conducted on both simulated and real-world datasets. The results show that the proposed method achieves similar or better accuracy w.r.t the state-of-the-arts in normal driving scenarios and outperforms geometric-based LO in unstructured environments.
abstract_zh: 传统的激光雷达里程计（LO）系统主要利用从周围环境中获得的几何信息来记录激光扫描并估计激光雷达自运动，而在动态或非结构化环境中可能不可靠。本文提出了 InTEn-LOAM，这是一种低漂移、鲁棒的 LiDAR 测距和绘图方法，充分利用激光扫描的隐式信息（即几何、强度和时间特征）。扫描点被投影到圆柱形图像，这有助于高效、自适应地提取各种类型的特征，即地面、梁、立面和反射器。我们提出了一种新颖的基于强度的点配准算法，并将其合并到 LiDAR 里程计中，使 LO 系统能够使用几何特征点和强度特征点联合估计 LiDAR 自运动。为了消除动态对象的干扰，我们提出了一种基于时间的动态对象去除方法，在地图更新之前将其过滤掉。此外，使用时间相关的体素网格滤波器对局部图进行组织和下采样，以保持当前扫描和静态局部图之间的相似性。在模拟和现实数据集上进行了大量的实验。结果表明，所提出的方法在正常驾驶场景中实现了与现有技术相似或更好的精度，并且在非结构化环境中优于基于几何的 LO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InTEn-LOAM方法，通过融合激光雷达点云的强度、几何和时序信息，提升动态或非结构化环境下的激光雷达里程计与建图精度。
AI.motivation: 传统激光雷达里程计依赖几何信息，在动态或非结构化环境中易失效，需引入强度与时序信息增强系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将点云投影至圆柱图像提取多类型特征，设计强度引导的点云配准算法，结合时序滤波剔除动态物体并优化局部地图结构。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据集上表现优于现有方法，尤其在非结构化环境中定位漂移显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 融合强度与时序信息可有效提升激光雷达里程计在复杂环境下的精度与稳定性。

result: 在仿真与真实数据集上表现优于现有方法，尤其在非结构化环境中定位漂移显著降低。
conclusion: 融合强度与时序信息可有效提升激光雷达里程计在复杂环境下的精度与稳定性。
search_text: InTEn-LOAM: Intensity and Temporal Enhanced LiDAR Odometry and Mapping InTEn-LOAM：强度和时间增强型激光雷达里程计和测绘 Traditional LiDAR odometry (LO) systems mainly leverage geometric information obtained from the traversed surroundings to register laser scans and estimate LiDAR ego-motion, while it may be unreliable in dynamic or unstructured environments. This paper proposes InTEn-LOAM, a low-drift and robust LiDAR odometry and mapping method that fully exploits implicit information of laser sweeps (i.e., geometric, intensity, and temporal characteristics). Scanned points are projected to cylindrical images, which facilitate the efficient and adaptive extraction of various types of features, i.e., ground, beam, facade, and reflector. We propose a novel intensity-based points registration algorithm and incorporate it into the LiDAR odometry, enabling the LO system to jointly estimate the LiDAR ego-motion using both geometric and intensity feature points. To eliminate the interference of dynamic objects, we propose a temporal-based dynamic object removal approach to filter them out before map update. Moreover, the local map is organized and downsampled using a temporal-related voxel grid filter to maintain the similarity between the current scan and the static local map. Extensive experiments are conducted on both simulated and real-world datasets. The results show that the proposed method achieves similar or better accuracy w.r.t the state-of-the-arts in normal driving scenarios and outperforms geometric-based LO in unstructured environments. 传统的激光雷达里程计（LO）系统主要利用从周围环境中获得的几何信息来记录激光扫描并估计激光雷达自运动，而在动态或非结构化环境中可能不可靠。本文提出了 InTEn-LOAM，这是一种低漂移、鲁棒的 LiDAR 测距和绘图方法，充分利用激光扫描的隐式信息（即几何、强度和时间特征）。扫描点被投影到圆柱形图像，这有助于高效、自适应地提取各种类型的特征，即地面、梁、立面和反射器。我们提出了一种新颖的基于强度的点配准算法，并将其合并到 LiDAR 里程计中，使 LO 系统能够使用几何特征点和强度特征点联合估计 LiDAR 自运动。为了消除动态对象的干扰，我们提出了一种基于时间的动态对象去除方法，在地图更新之前将其过滤掉。此外，使用时间相关的体素网格滤波器对局部图进行组织和下采样，以保持当前扫描和静态局部图之间的相似性。在模拟和现实数据集上进行了大量的实验。结果表明，所提出的方法在正常驾驶场景中实现了与现有技术相似或更好的精度，并且在非结构化环境中优于基于几何的 LO。 本文提出InTEn-LOAM方法，通过融合激光雷达点云的强度、几何和时序信息，提升动态或非结构化环境下的激光雷达里程计与建图精度。 Shuaixin Li,Bin Tian,Zhu Xiaozhou,Gui Jianjun,Yao Wen,Guangyun Li cs.RO

authors_text: Anwaar Ulhaq,Naveed Akhtar,Ganna Pogrebna,Ajmal Mian
title: Vision Transformers for Action Recognition: A Survey
title_zh: 用于动作识别的视觉转换器：一项调查
comment: 15 Figures and 5 Tables
comments: 15 Figures and 5 Tables
abstract: Vision transformers are emerging as a powerful tool to solve computer vision problems. Recent techniques have also proven the efficacy of transformers beyond the image domain to solve numerous video-related tasks. Among those, human action recognition is receiving special attention from the research community due to its widespread applications. This article provides the first comprehensive survey of vision transformer techniques for action recognition. We analyze and summarize the existing and emerging literature in this direction while highlighting the popular trends in adapting transformers for action recognition. Due to their specialized application, we collectively refer to these methods as ``action transformers''. Our literature review provides suitable taxonomies for action transformers based on their architecture, modality, and intended objective. Within the context of action transformers, we explore the techniques to encode spatio-temporal data, dimensionality reduction, frame patch and spatio-temporal cube construction, and various representation methods. We also investigate the optimization of spatio-temporal attention in transformer layers to handle longer sequences, typically by reducing the number of tokens in a single attention operation. Moreover, we also investigate different network learning strategies, such as self-supervised and zero-shot learning, along with their associated losses for transformer-based action recognition. This survey also summarizes the progress towards gaining grounds on evaluation metric scores on important benchmarks with action transformers. Finally, it provides a discussion on the challenges, outlook, and future avenues for this research direction.

We also investigate the optimization of spatio-temporal attention in transformer layers to handle longer sequences, typically by reducing the number of tokens in a single attention operation. Moreover, we also investigate different network learning strategies, such as self-supervised and zero-shot learning, along with their associated losses for transformer-based action recognition. This survey also summarizes the progress towards gaining grounds on evaluation metric scores on important benchmarks with action transformers. Finally, it provides a discussion on the challenges, outlook, and future avenues for this research direction.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器正在成为解决计算机视觉问题的强大工具。最近的技术还证明了 Transformer 在图像领域之外解决众多视频相关任务的功效。其中，人类动作识别由于其广泛的应用而受到研究界的特别关注。本文首次全面概述了用于动作识别的视觉变换技术。我们分析和总结了这个方向的现有和新兴文献，同时强调了采用变压器进行动作识别的流行趋势。由于其特殊的应用，我们将这些方法统称为“动作转换器”。我们的文献综述根据动作变压器的架构、模式和预期目标为动作变压器提供了合适的分类法。在动作变压器的背景下，我们探索了编码时空数据、降维、帧补丁和时空立方体构造以及各种表示方法的技术。我们还研究了变压器层中时空注意力的优化以处理更长的序列，通常是通过减少单个注意力操作中的标记数量。此外，我们还研究了不同的网络学习策略，例如自监督和零样本学习，以及它们基于变压器的动作识别的相关损失。这项调查还总结了在行动变压器重要基准的评估指标得分方面取得的进展。最后，讨论了该研究方向的挑战、前景和未来途径。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了用于动作识别的视觉变换器（Vision Transformers）技术，分析了其在该领域的应用和发展趋势。
AI.motivation: 视觉变换器在计算机视觉领域表现出色，并且在视频相关任务中也显示出潜力。由于动作识别在实际应用中非常重要，因此有必要对现有的视觉变换器方法进行系统性的综述。
AI.method: 本文通过文献综述的方法，对现有的视觉变换器技术进行了分类和总结，分析了其在动作识别任务中的架构、模态、目标等特性，并探讨了时空数据编码、维度降低、帧块与时空立方体构建、表示方法、时空注意力优化以及网络学习策略等内容。
AI.result: 本文总结了视觉变换器在动作识别任务中的最新进展，并探讨了其在重要基准数据集上的评估指标表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文讨论了当前在视觉变换器用于动作识别方面面临的挑战，并展望了该研究方向的未来发展方向。

authors_text: Feng Zhao,Ziqi Zhang,Donglin Wang
title: KSG: Knowledge and Skill Graph
title_zh: KSG：知识和技能图
comment: 5 pages, 7 figures, published to CIKM 2022
comments: 5 pages, 7 figures, published to CIKM 2022
abstract: The knowledge graph (KG) is an essential form of knowledge representation that has grown in prominence in recent years. Because it concentrates on nominal entities and their relationships, traditional knowledge graphs are static and encyclopedic in nature. On this basis, event knowledge graph (Event KG) models the temporal and spatial dynamics by text processing to facilitate downstream applications, such as question-answering, recommendation and intelligent search. Existing KG research, on the other hand, mostly focuses on text processing and static facts, ignoring the vast quantity of dynamic behavioral information included in photos, movies, and pre-trained neural networks. In addition, no effort has been done to include behavioral intelligence information into the knowledge graph for deep reinforcement learning (DRL) and robot learning. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic knowledge and skill graph (KSG), and then we develop a basic and specific KSG based on CN-DBpedia. The nodes are divided into entity and attribute nodes, with entity nodes containing the agent, environment, and skill (DRL policy or policy representation), and attribute nodes containing the entity description, pre-train network, and offline dataset. KSG can search for different agents' skills in various environments and provide transferable information for acquiring new skills. This is the first study that we are aware of that looks into dynamic KSG for skill retrieval and learning. Extensive experimental results on new skill learning show that KSG boosts new skill learning efficiency.
summary: The knowledge graph (KG) is an essential form of knowledge representation that has grown in prominence in recent years. Because it concentrates on nominal entities and their relationships, traditional knowledge graphs are static and encyclopedic in nature. On this basis, event knowledge graph (Event KG) models the temporal and spatial dynamics by text processing to facilitate downstream applications, such as question-answering, recommendation and intelligent search. Existing KG research, on the other hand, mostly focuses on text processing and static facts, ignoring the vast quantity of dynamic behavioral information included in photos, movies, and pre-trained neural networks. In addition, no effort has been done to include behavioral intelligence information into the knowledge graph for deep reinforcement learning (DRL) and robot learning. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic knowledge and skill graph (KSG), and then we develop a basic and specific KSG based on CN-DBpedia. The nodes are divided into entity and attribute nodes, with entity nodes containing the agent, environment, and skill (DRL policy or policy representation), and attribute nodes containing the entity description, pre-train network, and offline dataset. KSG can search for different agents' skills in various environments and provide transferable information for acquiring new skills. This is the first study that we are aware of that looks into dynamic KSG for skill retrieval and learning. Extensive experimental results on new skill learning show that KSG boosts new skill learning efficiency.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）是知识表示的一种重要形式，近年来日益受到重视。由于传统知识图谱专注于名义实体及其关系，因此本质上是静态的、百科全书式的。在此基础上，事件知识图谱（Event KG）通过文本处理对时空动态进行建模，以方便下游应用，如问答、推荐、智能搜索等。另一方面，现有的知识图谱研究主要关注文本处理和静态事实，忽略了照片、电影和预训练神经网络中包含的大量动态行为信息。此外，还没有努力将行为智能信息纳入深度强化学习（DRL）和机器人学习的知识图谱中。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的动态知识和技能图（KSG），然后我们基于 CN-DBpedia 开发了一个基本且特定的 KSG。节点分为实体节点和属性节点，实体节点包含代理、环境和技能（DRL策略或策略表示），属性节点包含实体描述、预训练网络和离线数据集。 KSG可以搜索不同环境下不同座席的技能，并为获取新技能提供可迁移的信息。据我们所知，这是第一项研究动态 KSG 用于技能检索和学习的研究。大量新技能学习实验结果表明，KSG 提高了新技能学习效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态知识与技能图谱（KSG），用于技能检索与学习，提升新技能获取效率。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱静态且忽略图像、视频等动态行为信息及预训练网络中的行为智能，难以支持强化学习与机器人学习。
AI.method: 基于CN-DBpedia构建KSG，节点分为实体（代理、环境、技能）和属性（描述、预训练网络、数据集），实现跨环境技能检索与知识迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明KSG显著提升新技能学习效率，验证了动态图谱在技能迁移中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: KSG首次将动态行为信息整合至知识图谱，为强化学习与机器人学习提供可转移的技能检索框架。

search_text: KSG: Knowledge and Skill Graph KSG：知识和技能图 The knowledge graph (KG) is an essential form of knowledge representation that has grown in prominence in recent years. Because it concentrates on nominal entities and their relationships, traditional knowledge graphs are static and encyclopedic in nature. On this basis, event knowledge graph (Event KG) models the temporal and spatial dynamics by text processing to facilitate downstream applications, such as question-answering, recommendation and intelligent search. Existing KG research, on the other hand, mostly focuses on text processing and static facts, ignoring the vast quantity of dynamic behavioral information included in photos, movies, and pre-trained neural networks. In addition, no effort has been done to include behavioral intelligence information into the knowledge graph for deep reinforcement learning (DRL) and robot learning. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic knowledge and skill graph (KSG), and then we develop a basic and specific KSG based on CN-DBpedia. The nodes are divided into entity and attribute nodes, with entity nodes containing the agent, environment, and skill (DRL policy or policy representation), and attribute nodes containing the entity description, pre-train network, and offline dataset. KSG can search for different agents' skills in various environments and provide transferable information for acquiring new skills. This is the first study that we are aware of that looks into dynamic KSG for skill retrieval and learning. Extensive experimental results on new skill learning show that KSG boosts new skill learning efficiency. 知识图（KG）是知识表示的一种重要形式，近年来日益受到重视。由于传统知识图谱专注于名义实体及其关系，因此本质上是静态的、百科全书式的。在此基础上，事件知识图谱（Event KG）通过文本处理对时空动态进行建模，以方便下游应用，如问答、推荐、智能搜索等。另一方面，现有的知识图谱研究主要关注文本处理和静态事实，忽略了照片、电影和预训练神经网络中包含的大量动态行为信息。此外，还没有努力将行为智能信息纳入深度强化学习（DRL）和机器人学习的知识图谱中。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的动态知识和技能图（KSG），然后我们基于 CN-DBpedia 开发了一个基本且特定的 KSG。节点分为实体节点和属性节点，实体节点包含代理、环境和技能（DRL策略或策略表示），属性节点包含实体描述、预训练网络和离线数据集。 KSG可以搜索不同环境下不同座席的技能，并为获取新技能提供可迁移的信息。据我们所知，这是第一项研究动态 KSG 用于技能检索和学习的研究。大量新技能学习实验结果表明，KSG 提高了新技能学习效率。 本文提出一种动态知识与技能图谱（KSG），用于技能检索与学习，提升新技能获取效率。 Feng Zhao,Ziqi Zhang,Donglin Wang cs.AI

authors_text: Varsha Pendyala
title: Sample Complexity of an Adversarial Attack on UCB-based Best-arm Identification Policy
title_zh: 基于 UCB 的最佳臂识别策略的对抗性攻击的样本复杂性
abstract: In this work I study the problem of adversarial perturbations to rewards, in a Multi-armed bandit (MAB) setting. Specifically, I focus on an adversarial attack to a UCB type best-arm identification policy applied to a stochastic MAB. The UCB attack presented in [1] results in pulling a target arm K very often. I used the attack model of [1] to derive the sample complexity required for selecting target arm K as the best arm. I have proved that the stopping condition of UCB based best-arm identification algorithm given in [2], can be achieved by the target arm K in T rounds, where T depends only on the total number of arms and $σ$ parameter of $σ^2-$ sub-Gaussian random rewards of the arms.
summary: In this work I study the problem of adversarial perturbations to rewards, in a Multi-armed bandit (MAB) setting. Specifically, I focus on an adversarial attack to a UCB type best-arm identification policy applied to a stochastic MAB. The UCB attack presented in [1] results in pulling a target arm K very often. I used the attack model of [1] to derive the sample complexity required for selecting target arm K as the best arm. I have proved that the stopping condition of UCB based best-arm identification algorithm given in [2], can be achieved by the target arm K in T rounds, where T depends only on the total number of arms and $σ$ parameter of $σ^2-$ sub-Gaussian random rewards of the arms.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我研究了多臂老虎机（MAB）环境中奖励的对抗性扰动问题。具体来说，我重点关注对应用于随机 MAB 的 UCB 类型最佳臂识别策略的对抗性攻击。 [1] 中提出的 UCB 攻击会导致经常拉动目标臂 K。我使用[1]的攻击模型来推导选择目标臂 K 作为最佳臂所需的样本复杂度。我已经证明，[2]中给出的基于UCB的最佳臂识别算法的停止条件，可以通过T轮中的目标臂K来实现，其中T仅取决于臂的总数和臂的$σ^2-$亚高斯随机奖励的$σ$参数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多臂老虎机（MAB）设置中，对抗性扰动对基于UCB的最佳臂识别策略的样本复杂度影响。
AI.motivation: 理解对抗性攻击如何通过扰动奖励机制，操纵基于UCB的最佳臂识别算法，从而以较低的样本复杂度使目标臂被误判为最佳臂。
AI.method: 采用文献[1]的攻击模型，分析UCB算法的停止条件，并推导目标臂在T轮内被选为最佳臂所需的样本复杂度，该复杂度仅依赖于臂的数量和奖励的σ参数。
AI.result: 证明目标臂K可在T轮内满足UCB算法的停止条件，其中T仅由臂的总数和σ²-子高斯奖励的σ参数决定。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性攻击可通过精心设计的扰动，在有限样本下使目标臂被误判为最佳臂，揭示了UCB类算法在对抗环境中的脆弱性。

authors_text: Varsha Pendyala,Jihye Choi
title: Concept-Based Explanations for Tabular Data
title_zh: 表格数据基于概念的解释
abstract: The interpretability of machine learning models has been an essential area of research for the safe deployment of machine learning systems. One particular approach is to attribute model decisions to high-level concepts that humans can understand. However, such concept-based explainability for Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) has been studied mostly on image domain. In this paper, we extend TCAV, the concept attribution approach, to tabular learning, by providing an idea on how to define concepts over tabular data. On a synthetic dataset with ground-truth concept explanations and a real-world dataset, we show the validity of our method in generating interpretability results that match the human-level intuitions. On top of this, we propose a notion of fairness based on TCAV that quantifies what layer of DNN has learned representations that lead to biased predictions of the model. Also, we empirically demonstrate the relation of TCAV-based fairness to a group fairness notion, Demographic Parity.
summary: The interpretability of machine learning models has been an essential area of research for the safe deployment of machine learning systems. One particular approach is to attribute model decisions to high-level concepts that humans can understand. However, such concept-based explainability for Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) has been studied mostly on image domain. In this paper, we extend TCAV, the concept attribution approach, to tabular learning, by providing an idea on how to define concepts over tabular data. On a synthetic dataset with ground-truth concept explanations and a real-world dataset, we show the validity of our method in generating interpretability results that match the human-level intuitions. On top of this, we propose a notion of fairness based on TCAV that quantifies what layer of DNN has learned representations that lead to biased predictions of the model. Also, we empirically demonstrate the relation of TCAV-based fairness to a group fairness notion, Demographic Parity.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型的可解释性一直是机器学习系统安全部署的重要研究领域。一种特殊的方法是将模型决策归因于人类可以理解的高级概念。然而，这种基于概念的深度神经网络（DNN）的可解释性主要在图像领域进行研究。在本文中，我们通过提供如何在表格数据上定义概念的想法，将概念归因方法 TCAV 扩展到表格学习。在具有真实概念解释和真实世界数据集的合成数据集上，我们展示了我们的方法在生成与人类直觉相匹配的可解释性结果方面的有效性。除此之外，我们提出了一种基于 TCAV 的公平概念，该概念量化了 DNN 的哪一层学习到的表示会导致模型的预测出现偏差。此外，我们还凭经验证明了基于 TCAV 的公平性与群体公平性概念“人口平等”的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文将基于概念的解释方法TCAV扩展到表格数据领域，旨在提高深度神经网络（DNN）在表格数据上的可解释性，并提出基于TCAV的公平性度量方法。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型的可解释性对安全部署至关重要，但现有概念解释方法主要集中在图像领域，缺乏针对表格数据的有效方案，且需解决DNN中的公平性问题。
AI.method: 通过定义表格数据的概念表示，扩展TCAV方法以生成可解释性结果；并提出基于TCAV的公平性度量，量化DNN各层对模型偏见的影响，验证其与人口统计公平性（Demographic Parity）的关系。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性，生成的解释符合人类直觉；并通过实证分析展示了TCAV公平性与人口统计公平性的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功将概念解释扩展到表格数据领域，同时为DNN的公平性分析提供了新视角，有助于提升模型的透明度和公平性。

authors_text: Zhikai Li,Mengjuan Chen,Junrui Xiao,Qingyi Gu
title: PSAQ-ViT V2: Towards Accurate and General Data-Free Quantization for Vision Transformers
title_zh: PSAQ-ViT V2：为视觉变压器实现准确且通用的无数据量化
comment: Accepted by TNNLS 2023
comments: Accepted by TNNLS 2023
abstract: Data-free quantization can potentially address data privacy and security concerns in model compression, and thus has been widely investigated. Recently, PSAQ-ViT designs a relative value metric, patch similarity, to generate data from pre-trained vision transformers (ViTs), achieving the first attempt at data-free quantization for ViTs. In this paper, we propose PSAQ-ViT V2, a more accurate and general data-free quantization framework for ViTs, built on top of PSAQ-ViT. More specifically, following the patch similarity metric in PSAQ-ViT, we introduce an adaptive teacher-student strategy, which facilitates the constant cyclic evolution of the generated samples and the quantized model (student) in a competitive and interactive fashion under the supervision of the full-precision model (teacher), thus significantly improving the accuracy of the quantized model. Moreover, without the auxiliary category guidance, we employ the task- and model-independent prior information, making the general-purpose scheme compatible with a broad range of vision tasks and models. Extensive experiments are conducted on various models on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks, and PSAQ-ViT V2, with the naive quantization strategy and without access to real-world data, consistently achieves competitive results, showing potential as a powerful baseline on data-free quantization for ViTs. For instance, with Swin-S as the (backbone) model, 8-bit quantization reaches 82.13 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, 50.9 box AP and 44.1 mask AP on COCO, and 47.2 mIoU on ADE20K. We hope that accurate and general PSAQ-ViT V2 can serve as a potential and practice solution in real-world applications involving sensitive data. Code is released and merged at: https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT.

Moreover, without the auxiliary category guidance, we employ the task- and model-independent prior information, making the general-purpose scheme compatible with a broad range of vision tasks and models. Extensive experiments are conducted on various models on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks, and PSAQ-ViT V2, with the naive quantization strategy and without access to real-world data, consistently achieves competitive results, showing potential as a powerful baseline on data-free quantization for ViTs. For instance, with Swin-S as the (backbone) model, 8-bit quantization reaches 82.13 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, 50.9 box AP and 44.1 mask AP on COCO, and 47.2 mIoU on ADE20K. We hope that accurate and general PSAQ-ViT V2 can serve as a potential and practice solution in real-world applications involving sensitive data. Code is released and merged at: https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT.
abstract_zh: 无数据量化可以潜在地解决模型压缩中的数据隐私和安全问题，因此已得到广泛研究。最近，PSAQ-ViT设计了一种相对价值度量——补丁相似度，从预先训练的视觉变换器（ViT）生成数据，实现了ViT无数据量化的首次尝试。在本文中，我们提出了 PSAQ-ViT V2，这是一种更准确、更通用的 ViT 量化框架，建立在 PSAQ-ViT 之上。更具体地说，遵循PSAQ-ViT中的补丁相似性度量，我们引入了一种自适应的师生策略，该策略促进生成的样本和量化模型（学生）在全精度模型（教师）的监督下以竞争和交互的方式不断循环进化，从而显着提高量化模型的准确性。此外，在没有辅助类别指导的情况下，我们采用与任务和模型无关的先验信息，使通用方案与广泛的视觉任务和模型兼容。在图像分类、目标检测和语义分割任务的各种模型上进行了大量实验，PSAQ-ViT V2 采用朴素的量化策略，无需访问真实世界的数据，始终取得有竞争力的结果，显示出作为 ViT 无数据量化的强大基线的潜力。例如，以 Swin-S 作为（骨干）模型，8 位量化在 ImageNet 上达到 82.13 top-1 精度，在 COCO 上达到 50.9 box AP 和 44.1 mask AP，在 ADE20K 上达到 47.2 mIoU。我们希望准确且通用的 PSAQ-ViT V2 能够成为涉及敏感数据的实际应用中的潜在和实践解决方案。代码发布并合并于：https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PSAQ-ViT V2框架，在无需真实数据的情况下实现对视觉Transformer（ViT）的高精度量化。
AI.motivation: 数据隐私问题促使研究数据免量化方法，但现有ViT量化方法存在精度不足和任务适配性差的问题。
AI.method: 基于PSAQ-ViT的patch相似性指标，引入自适应师生策略，通过全精度模型（教师）监督生成样本与量化模型（学生）的循环演化，并利用任务无关先验信息提升通用性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、COCO和ADE20K等任务中，使用Swin-S骨干网络的8位量化模型分别达到82.13% top-1精度、50.9 box AP、44.1 mask AP和47.2 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: PSAQ-ViT V2为敏感数据场景下的ViT模型压缩提供了高精度且通用的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: PSAQ-ViT V2: Towards Accurate and General Data-Free Quantization for Vision Transformers PSAQ-ViT V2：为视觉变压器实现准确且通用的无数据量化 Data-free quantization can potentially address data privacy and security concerns in model compression, and thus has been widely investigated. Recently, PSAQ-ViT designs a relative value metric, patch similarity, to generate data from pre-trained vision transformers (ViTs), achieving the first attempt at data-free quantization for ViTs. In this paper, we propose PSAQ-ViT V2, a more accurate and general data-free quantization framework for ViTs, built on top of PSAQ-ViT. More specifically, following the patch similarity metric in PSAQ-ViT, we introduce an adaptive teacher-student strategy, which facilitates the constant cyclic evolution of the generated samples and the quantized model (student) in a competitive and interactive fashion under the supervision of the full-precision model (teacher), thus significantly improving the accuracy of the quantized model. Moreover, without the auxiliary category guidance, we employ the task- and model-independent prior information, making the general-purpose scheme compatible with a broad range of vision tasks and models. Extensive experiments are conducted on various models on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks, and PSAQ-ViT V2, with the naive quantization strategy and without access to real-world data, consistently achieves competitive results, showing potential as a powerful baseline on data-free quantization for ViTs. For instance, with Swin-S as the (backbone) model, 8-bit quantization reaches 82.13 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, 50.9 box AP and 44.1 mask AP on COCO, and 47.2 mIoU on ADE20K. We hope that accurate and general PSAQ-ViT V2 can serve as a potential and practice solution in real-world applications involving sensitive data. Code is released and merged at: https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT. 无数据量化可以潜在地解决模型压缩中的数据隐私和安全问题，因此已得到广泛研究。最近，PSAQ-ViT设计了一种相对价值度量——补丁相似度，从预先训练的视觉变换器（ViT）生成数据，实现了ViT无数据量化的首次尝试。在本文中，我们提出了 PSAQ-ViT V2，这是一种更准确、更通用的 ViT 量化框架，建立在 PSAQ-ViT 之上。更具体地说，遵循PSAQ-ViT中的补丁相似性度量，我们引入了一种自适应的师生策略，该策略促进生成的样本和量化模型（学生）在全精度模型（教师）的监督下以竞争和交互的方式不断循环进化，从而显着提高量化模型的准确性。此外，在没有辅助类别指导的情况下，我们采用与任务和模型无关的先验信息，使通用方案与广泛的视觉任务和模型兼容。在图像分类、目标检测和语义分割任务的各种模型上进行了大量实验，PSAQ-ViT V2 采用朴素的量化策略，无需访问真实世界的数据，始终取得有竞争力的结果，显示出作为 ViT 无数据量化的强大基线的潜力。例如，以 Swin-S 作为（骨干）模型，8 位量化在 ImageNet 上达到 82.13 top-1 精度，在 COCO 上达到 50.9 box AP 和 44.1 mask AP，在 ADE20K 上达到 47.2 mIoU。我们希望准确且通用的 PSAQ-ViT V2 能够成为涉及敏感数据的实际应用中的潜在和实践解决方案。代码发布并合并于：https://github.com/zkkli/PSAQ-ViT。 本文提出PSAQ-ViT V2框架，在无需真实数据的情况下实现对视觉Transformer（ViT）的高精度量化。 Zhikai Li,Mengjuan Chen,Junrui Xiao,Qingyi Gu cs.CV

authors_text: Yinan Yang,Yu Wang,Ying Ji,Heng Qi,Jien Kato
title: One-shot Network Pruning at Initialization with Discriminative Image Patches
title_zh: 初始化时使用判别性图像补丁进行一次性网络修剪
comment: BMVC 2022
comments: BMVC 2022
abstract: One-shot Network Pruning at Initialization (OPaI) is an effective method to decrease network pruning costs. Recently, there is a growing belief that data is unnecessary in OPaI. However, we obtain an opposite conclusion by ablation experiments in two representative OPaI methods, SNIP and GraSP. Specifically, we find that informative data is crucial to enhancing pruning performance. In this paper, we propose two novel methods, Discriminative One-shot Network Pruning (DOP) and Super Stitching, to prune the network by high-level visual discriminative image patches. Our contributions are as follows. (1) Extensive experiments reveal that OPaI is data-dependent. (2) Super Stitching performs significantly better than the original OPaI method on benchmark ImageNet, especially in a highly compressed model.
summary: One-shot Network Pruning at Initialization (OPaI) is an effective method to decrease network pruning costs. Recently, there is a growing belief that data is unnecessary in OPaI. However, we obtain an opposite conclusion by ablation experiments in two representative OPaI methods, SNIP and GraSP. Specifically, we find that informative data is crucial to enhancing pruning performance. In this paper, we propose two novel methods, Discriminative One-shot Network Pruning (DOP) and Super Stitching, to prune the network by high-level visual discriminative image patches. Our contributions are as follows. (1) Extensive experiments reveal that OPaI is data-dependent. (2) Super Stitching performs significantly better than the original OPaI method on benchmark ImageNet, especially in a highly compressed model.
abstract_zh: 初始化时的一次性网络剪枝（OPaI）是一种降低网络剪枝成本的有效方法。最近，人们越来越相信 OPaI 中不需要数据。然而，我们通过两种代表性 OPaI 方法 SNIP 和 GraSP 的消融实验得到了相反的结论。具体来说，我们发现信息数据对于提高修剪性能至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了两种新颖的方法，即判别式一次性网络修剪（DOP）和超级缝合，通过高级视觉判别图像块来修剪网络。我们的贡献如下。 (1) 大量实验表明 OPaI 具有数据依赖性。 (2) Super Stitching 在基准 ImageNet 上的表现明显优于原始 OPaI 方法，尤其是在高度压缩的模型中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用判别性图像块进行初始化的一次性网络剪枝方法，挑战了无需数据的现有观点。
AI.motivation: 现有研究认为一次性网络剪枝（OPaI）无需数据，但作者通过消融实验证明数据对提升剪枝效果至关重要，因此提出新方法以更高效利用数据。
AI.method: 提出两种新方法：基于判别性图像块的DOP和Super Stitching，通过高层视觉特征指导剪枝决策。
AI.result: 实验表明OPaI依赖数据，Super Stitching在ImageNet基准测试中显著优于原有方法，尤其在高度压缩模型中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 数据对OPaI性能至关重要，所提方法通过判别性图像块有效提升了剪枝效果，为网络压缩提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shanshan Zhong,Wushao Wen,Jinghui Qin
title: Switchable Self-attention Module
title_zh: 可切换自注意力模块
comment: Work in progress
comments: Work in progress
abstract: Attention mechanism has gained great success in vision recognition. Many works are devoted to improving the effectiveness of attention mechanism, which finely design the structure of the attention operator. These works need lots of experiments to pick out the optimal settings when scenarios change, which consumes a lot of time and computational resources. In addition, a neural network often contains many network layers, and most studies often use the same attention module to enhance different network layers, which hinders the further improvement of the performance of the self-attention mechanism. To address the above problems, we propose a self-attention module SEM. Based on the input information of the attention module and alternative attention operators, SEM can automatically decide to select and integrate attention operators to compute attention maps. The effectiveness of SEM is demonstrated by extensive experiments on widely used benchmark datasets and popular self-attention networks.
summary: Attention mechanism has gained great success in vision recognition. Many works are devoted to improving the effectiveness of attention mechanism, which finely design the structure of the attention operator. These works need lots of experiments to pick out the optimal settings when scenarios change, which consumes a lot of time and computational resources. In addition, a neural network often contains many network layers, and most studies often use the same attention module to enhance different network layers, which hinders the further improvement of the performance of the self-attention mechanism. To address the above problems, we propose a self-attention module SEM. Based on the input information of the attention module and alternative attention operators, SEM can automatically decide to select and integrate attention operators to compute attention maps. The effectiveness of SEM is demonstrated by extensive experiments on widely used benchmark datasets and popular self-attention networks.
abstract_zh: 注意力机制在视觉识别中取得了巨大的成功。许多工作致力于提高注意力机制的有效性，精细地设计了注意力算子的结构。这些工作需要大量的实验来在场景变化时找出最佳设置，这会消耗大量的时间和计算资源。此外，一个神经网络往往包含许多网络层，大多数研究往往使用相同的注意力模块来增强不同的网络层，这阻碍了自注意力机制性能的进一步提高。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了自注意力模块SEM。根据注意力模块和替代注意力算子的输入信息，SEM可以自动决定选择和集成注意力算子来计算注意力图。在广泛使用的基准数据集和流行的自注意力网络上进行的大量实验证明了 SEM 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可切换的自注意力模块SEM，通过自动选择和集成不同的注意力算子来提升视觉识别任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制需大量实验调整参数且不同网络层使用相同模块，导致效率低下和性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计SEM模块，根据输入特征和候选注意力算子动态选择并融合最优算子生成注意力图。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和主流自注意力网络中验证，SEM显著提升了模型性能且减少了调参成本。
AI.conclusion: SEM通过动态算子选择机制有效解决了注意力模块的场景适应性和层间差异性问题。

motivation: 现有注意力机制需大量实验调整参数且不同网络层使用相同模块，导致效率低下和性能瓶颈。

result: 在多个基准数据集和主流自注意力网络中验证，SEM显著提升了模型性能且减少了调参成本。
conclusion: SEM通过动态算子选择机制有效解决了注意力模块的场景适应性和层间差异性问题。
search_text: Switchable Self-attention Module 可切换自注意力模块 Attention mechanism has gained great success in vision recognition. Many works are devoted to improving the effectiveness of attention mechanism, which finely design the structure of the attention operator. These works need lots of experiments to pick out the optimal settings when scenarios change, which consumes a lot of time and computational resources. In addition, a neural network often contains many network layers, and most studies often use the same attention module to enhance different network layers, which hinders the further improvement of the performance of the self-attention mechanism. To address the above problems, we propose a self-attention module SEM. Based on the input information of the attention module and alternative attention operators, SEM can automatically decide to select and integrate attention operators to compute attention maps. The effectiveness of SEM is demonstrated by extensive experiments on widely used benchmark datasets and popular self-attention networks. 注意力机制在视觉识别中取得了巨大的成功。许多工作致力于提高注意力机制的有效性，精细地设计了注意力算子的结构。这些工作需要大量的实验来在场景变化时找出最佳设置，这会消耗大量的时间和计算资源。此外，一个神经网络往往包含许多网络层，大多数研究往往使用相同的注意力模块来增强不同的网络层，这阻碍了自注意力机制性能的进一步提高。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了自注意力模块SEM。根据注意力模块和替代注意力算子的输入信息，SEM可以自动决定选择和集成注意力算子来计算注意力图。在广泛使用的基准数据集和流行的自注意力网络上进行的大量实验证明了 SEM 的有效性。 本文提出一种可切换的自注意力模块SEM，通过自动选择和集成不同的注意力算子来提升视觉识别任务的性能。 Shanshan Zhong,Wushao Wen,Jinghui Qin cs.CV

authors_text: Zhuangfei Hu,Xinda Li,David P. Woodruff,Hongyang Zhang,Shufan Zhang
title: Recovery from Non-Decomposable Distance Oracles
title_zh: 从不可分解的远程预言中恢复
comment: This work has been presented at conference The 14th Innovations in Theoretical Computer Science (ITCS 2023) and accepted for publishing in the journal IEEE Transactions on Information Theory
comments: This work has been presented at conference The 14th Innovations in Theoretical Computer Science (ITCS 2023) and accepted for publishing in the journal IEEE Transactions on Information Theory
abstract: A line of work has looked at the problem of recovering an input from distance queries. In this setting, there is an unknown sequence $s \in \{0,1\}^{\leq n}$, and one chooses a set of queries $y \in \{0,1\}^{\mathcal{O}(n)}$ and receives $d(s,y)$ for a distance function $d$. The goal is to make as few queries as possible to recover $s$. Although this problem is well-studied for decomposable distances, i.e., distances of the form $d(s,y) = \sum_{i=1}^n f(s_i, y_i)$ for some function $f$, which includes the important cases of Hamming distance, $\ell_p$-norms, and $M$-estimators, to the best of our knowledge this problem has not been studied for non-decomposable distances, for which there are important special cases such as edit distance, dynamic time warping (DTW), Frechet distance, earth mover's distance, and so on. We initiate the study and develop a general framework for such distances. Interestingly, for some distances such as DTW or Frechet, exact recovery of the sequence $s$ is provably impossible, and so we show by allowing the characters in $y$ to be drawn from a slightly larger alphabet this then becomes possible. In a number of cases we obtain optimal or near-optimal query complexity. We also study the role of adaptivity for a number of different distance functions. One motivation for understanding non-adaptivity is that the query sequence can be fixed and the distances of the input to the queries provide a non-linear embedding of the input, which can be used in downstream applications involving, e.g., neural networks for natural language processing.

In this setting, there is an unknown sequence $s \in \{0,1\}^{\leq n}$, and one chooses a set of queries $y \in \{0,1\}^{\mathcal{O}(n)}$ and receives $d(s,y)$ for a distance function $d$. The goal is to make as few queries as possible to recover $s$. Although this problem is well-studied for decomposable distances, i.e., distances of the form $d(s,y) = \sum_{i=1}^n f(s_i, y_i)$ for some function $f$, which includes the important cases of Hamming distance, $\ell_p$-norms, and $M$-estimators, to the best of our knowledge this problem has not been studied for non-decomposable distances, for which there are important special cases such as edit distance, dynamic time warping (DTW), Frechet distance, earth mover's distance, and so on. We initiate the study and develop a general framework for such distances. Interestingly, for some distances such as DTW or Frechet, exact recovery of the sequence $s$ is provably impossible, and so we show by allowing the characters in $y$ to be drawn from a slightly larger alphabet this then becomes possible. In a number of cases we obtain optimal or near-optimal query complexity. We also study the role of adaptivity for a number of different distance functions. One motivation for understanding non-adaptivity is that the query sequence can be fixed and the distances of the input to the queries provide a non-linear embedding of the input, which can be used in downstream applications involving, e.g., neural networks for natural language processing.
abstract_zh: 一系列工作研究了从距离查询恢复输入的问题。在此设置中，存在未知序列 $s \in \{0,1\}^{\leq n}$，并且选择一组查询 $y \in \{0,1\}^{\mathcal{O}(n)}$ 并接收距离函数 $d$ 的 $d(s,y)$。目标是通过尽可能少的查询来恢复 $s$。尽管这个问题针对可分解距离进行了充分研究，即对于某些函数 $f$，形式为 $d(s,y) = \sum_{i=1}^n f(s_i, y_i)$ 的距离，其中包括汉明距离、$\ell_p$-范数和 $M$-估计量的重要情况，但据我们所知，这个问题尚未针对不可分解距离进行研究，其中还有一些重要的特殊情况，例如编辑距离、动态时间扭曲 (DTW)、Frechet 距离、推土机距离等。我们启动了这项研究并为此类距离制定了一个总体框架。有趣的是，对于某些距离（例如 DTW 或 Frechet），序列 $s$ 的精确恢复显然是不可能的，因此我们通过允许从稍大的字母表中绘制 $y$ 中的字符来证明这成为可能。在许多情况下，我们获得最佳或接近最佳的查询复杂性。我们还研究了适应性对于许多不同距离函数的作用。理解非自适应性的一个动机是查询序列可以是固定的，并且输入到查询的距离提供了输入的非线性嵌入，这可以用于涉及例如用于自然语言处理的神经网络的下游应用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过距离查询从非分解距离函数中恢复未知序列，提出针对非分解距离（如DTW、Frechet距离）的通用恢复框架。
AI.motivation: 传统研究聚焦于可分解距离（如汉明距离），但实际应用中存在大量非分解距离函数，且其恢复问题尚未被系统研究，需探索更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建适用于非分解距离的恢复框架，通过扩展查询字符的字母表解决部分距离的精确恢复难题，并分析不同距离函数的自适应性影响。
AI.result: 在多种非分解距离场景下实现最优或接近最优查询复杂度，证明部分距离（如DTW）在扩展字母表后可实现恢复，揭示自适应性对效率的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非分解距离恢复问题奠定理论基础，提出通用方法并展示其在自然语言处理等下游任务中的潜在应用价值。

authors_text: Dasharadhan Mahalingam,Nilanjan Chakraborty
title: Human-Guided Planning for Complex Manipulation Tasks Using the Screw Geometry of Motion
title_zh: 使用螺杆运动几何形状进行复杂操作任务的人工引导规划
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel method of motion planning for performing complex manipulation tasks by using human demonstration and exploiting the screw geometry of motion. We consider complex manipulation tasks where there are constraints on the motion of the end effector of the robot. Examples of such tasks include opening a door, opening a drawer, transferring granular material from one container to another with a spoon, and loading dishes to a dishwasher. Our approach consists of two steps: First, using the fact that a motion in the task space of the robot can be approximated by using a sequence of constant screw motions, we segment a human demonstration into a sequence of constant screw motions. Second, we use the segmented screws to generate motion plans via screw-linear interpolation for other instances of the same task. The use of screw segmentation allows us to capture the invariants of the demonstrations in a coordinate-free fashion, thus allowing us to plan for different task instances from just one example. We present extensive experimental results on a variety of manipulation scenarios showing that our method can be used across a wide range of manipulation tasks.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel method of motion planning for performing complex manipulation tasks by using human demonstration and exploiting the screw geometry of motion. We consider complex manipulation tasks where there are constraints on the motion of the end effector of the robot. Examples of such tasks include opening a door, opening a drawer, transferring granular material from one container to another with a spoon, and loading dishes to a dishwasher. Our approach consists of two steps: First, using the fact that a motion in the task space of the robot can be approximated by using a sequence of constant screw motions, we segment a human demonstration into a sequence of constant screw motions. Second, we use the segmented screws to generate motion plans via screw-linear interpolation for other instances of the same task. The use of screw segmentation allows us to capture the invariants of the demonstrations in a coordinate-free fashion, thus allowing us to plan for different task instances from just one example. We present extensive experimental results on a variety of manipulation scenarios showing that our method can be used across a wide range of manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的运动规划方法，通过使用人体演示和利用运动的螺杆几何形状来执行复杂的操作任务。我们考虑复杂的操纵任务，其中机器人末端执行器的运动受到限制。此类任务的示例包括打开门、打开抽屉、用勺子将颗粒材料从一个容器转移到另一个容器以及将碗碟装入洗碗机。我们的方法包括两个步骤：首先，利用机器人任务空间中的运动可以通过使用一系列恒定螺旋运动来近似的事实，我们将人类演示分割为一系列恒定螺旋运动。其次，我们使用分段螺杆通过螺杆线性插值为同一任务的其他实例生成运动计划。螺旋分割的使用使我们能够以一种无坐标的方式捕获演示的不变量，从而使我们能够从一个示例中规划不同的任务实例。我们在各种操作场景中提供了广泛的实验结果，表明我们的方法可以用于广泛的操作任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人类示范和螺旋几何的复杂操作任务运动规划方法，通过分割示范为恒定螺旋运动并进行插值生成新任务的运动计划。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理具有末端执行器运动约束的复杂操作任务，且难以从单个示例中泛化到不同任务实例。
AI.method: 分两步：1）将人类示范分割为恒定螺旋运动序列；2）通过螺旋线性插值生成其他任务实例的运动计划，利用坐标无关的螺旋分割捕捉示范不变量。
AI.result: 在多种操作场景（开门、转移颗粒物等）的实验表明，该方法能有效生成符合约束的运动计划并适用于不同任务实例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过螺旋几何建模实现了复杂操作任务的高效规划，能够从单个示范中泛化到不同场景，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Human-Guided Planning for Complex Manipulation Tasks Using the Screw Geometry of Motion 使用螺杆运动几何形状进行复杂操作任务的人工引导规划 In this paper, we present a novel method of motion planning for performing complex manipulation tasks by using human demonstration and exploiting the screw geometry of motion. We consider complex manipulation tasks where there are constraints on the motion of the end effector of the robot. Examples of such tasks include opening a door, opening a drawer, transferring granular material from one container to another with a spoon, and loading dishes to a dishwasher. Our approach consists of two steps: First, using the fact that a motion in the task space of the robot can be approximated by using a sequence of constant screw motions, we segment a human demonstration into a sequence of constant screw motions. Second, we use the segmented screws to generate motion plans via screw-linear interpolation for other instances of the same task. The use of screw segmentation allows us to capture the invariants of the demonstrations in a coordinate-free fashion, thus allowing us to plan for different task instances from just one example. We present extensive experimental results on a variety of manipulation scenarios showing that our method can be used across a wide range of manipulation tasks. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的运动规划方法，通过使用人体演示和利用运动的螺杆几何形状来执行复杂的操作任务。我们考虑复杂的操纵任务，其中机器人末端执行器的运动受到限制。此类任务的示例包括打开门、打开抽屉、用勺子将颗粒材料从一个容器转移到另一个容器以及将碗碟装入洗碗机。我们的方法包括两个步骤：首先，利用机器人任务空间中的运动可以通过使用一系列恒定螺旋运动来近似的事实，我们将人类演示分割为一系列恒定螺旋运动。其次，我们使用分段螺杆通过螺杆线性插值为同一任务的其他实例生成运动计划。螺旋分割的使用使我们能够以一种无坐标的方式捕获演示的不变量，从而使我们能够从一个示例中规划不同的任务实例。我们在各种操作场景中提供了广泛的实验结果，表明我们的方法可以用于广泛的操作任务。 本文提出一种基于人类示范和螺旋几何的复杂操作任务运动规划方法，通过分割示范为恒定螺旋运动并进行插值生成新任务的运动计划。 Dasharadhan Mahalingam,Nilanjan Chakraborty cs.RO

authors_text: Mengyang Li,Fengguang Su,Ou Wu,Ji Zhang
title: Class-Level Logit Perturbation
title_zh: 类级 Logit 扰动
abstract: Features, logits, and labels are the three primary data when a sample passes through a deep neural network. Feature perturbation and label perturbation receive increasing attention in recent years. They have been proven to be useful in various deep learning approaches. For example, (adversarial) feature perturbation can improve the robustness or even generalization capability of learned models. However, limited studies have explicitly explored for the perturbation of logit vectors. This work discusses several existing methods related to class-level logit perturbation. A unified viewpoint between positive/negative data augmentation and loss variations incurred by logit perturbation is established. A theoretical analysis is provided to illuminate why class-level logit perturbation is useful. Accordingly, new methodologies are proposed to explicitly learn to perturb logits for both single-label and multi-label classification tasks. Extensive experiments on benchmark image classification data sets and their long-tail versions indicated the competitive performance of our learning method. As it only perturbs on logit, it can be used as a plug-in to fuse with any existing classification algorithms. All the codes are available at https://github.com/limengyang1992/lpl.
summary: Features, logits, and labels are the three primary data when a sample passes through a deep neural network. Feature perturbation and label perturbation receive increasing attention in recent years. They have been proven to be useful in various deep learning approaches. For example, (adversarial) feature perturbation can improve the robustness or even generalization capability of learned models. However, limited studies have explicitly explored for the perturbation of logit vectors. This work discusses several existing methods related to class-level logit perturbation. A unified viewpoint between positive/negative data augmentation and loss variations incurred by logit perturbation is established. A theoretical analysis is provided to illuminate why class-level logit perturbation is useful. Accordingly, new methodologies are proposed to explicitly learn to perturb logits for both single-label and multi-label classification tasks. Extensive experiments on benchmark image classification data sets and their long-tail versions indicated the competitive performance of our learning method. As it only perturbs on logit, it can be used as a plug-in to fuse with any existing classification algorithms. All the codes are available at https://github.com/limengyang1992/lpl.
abstract_zh: 特征、逻辑和标签是样本通过深度神经网络时的三个主要数据。近年来，特征扰动和标签扰动受到越来越多的关注。它们已被证明在各种深度学习方法中很有用。例如，（对抗性）特征扰动可以提高学习模型的鲁棒性甚至泛化能力。然而，明确探索 Logit 向量扰动的研究有限。这项工作讨论了与类级 Logit 扰动相关的几种现有方法。建立了正/负数据增强和 Logit 扰动引起的损失变化之间的统一观点。提供了理论分析来阐明为什么类级别的 Logit 扰动是有用的。因此，提出了新的方法来明确学习扰乱单标签和多标签分类任务的逻辑。对基准图像分类数据集及其长尾版本的大量实验表明了我们的学习方法的竞争性能。由于它只干扰 logit，因此它可以用作插件来与任何现有的分类算法融合。所有代码均可在 https://github.com/limengyang1992/lpl 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究类级别logit扰动方法，旨在提升分类任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注特征和标签扰动，而logit扰动研究不足，本文旨在探索其有效性并提出新方法。
AI.method: 通过统一正负数据增强与logit扰动损失变化的观点，提出显式学习扰动logits的新方法，适用于单标签和多标签分类。
AI.result: 在基准图像分类数据集及其长尾版本上表现出色，且可作为插件融合到现有分类算法中。
AI.conclusion: 类级别logit扰动有效提升模型性能，且方法具有通用性，适用于不同分类任务。

authors_text: Aos Mulahuwaish,Manish Osti,Kevin Gyorick,Majdi Maabreh,Ajay Gupta,Basheer Qolomany
title: CovidMis20: COVID-19 Misinformation Detection System on Twitter Tweets using Deep Learning Models
title_zh: CovidMis20：使用深度学习模型的 Twitter 推文上的 COVID-19 错误信息检测系统
abstract: Online news and information sources are convenient and accessible ways to learn about current issues. For instance, more than 300 million people engage with posts on Twitter globally, which provides the possibility to disseminate misleading information. There are numerous cases where violent crimes have been committed due to fake news. This research presents the CovidMis20 dataset (COVID-19 Misinformation 2020 dataset), which consists of 1,375,592 tweets collected from February to July 2020. CovidMis20 can be automatically updated to fetch the latest news and is publicly available at: https://github.com/everythingguy/CovidMis20. This research was conducted using Bi-LSTM deep learning and an ensemble CNN+Bi-GRU for fake news detection. The results showed that, with testing accuracy of 92.23% and 90.56%, respectively, the ensemble CNN+Bi-GRU model consistently provided higher accuracy than the Bi-LSTM model.
summary: Online news and information sources are convenient and accessible ways to learn about current issues. For instance, more than 300 million people engage with posts on Twitter globally, which provides the possibility to disseminate misleading information. There are numerous cases where violent crimes have been committed due to fake news. This research presents the CovidMis20 dataset (COVID-19 Misinformation 2020 dataset), which consists of 1,375,592 tweets collected from February to July 2020. CovidMis20 can be automatically updated to fetch the latest news and is publicly available at: https://github.com/everythingguy/CovidMis20. This research was conducted using Bi-LSTM deep learning and an ensemble CNN+Bi-GRU for fake news detection. The results showed that, with testing accuracy of 92.23% and 90.56%, respectively, the ensemble CNN+Bi-GRU model consistently provided higher accuracy than the Bi-LSTM model.
abstract_zh: 在线新闻和信息源是了解当前问题的便捷且易于获取的方式。例如，全球有超过 3 亿人在 Twitter 上发布帖子，这为传播误导性信息提供了可能性。因假新闻而实施暴力犯罪的案例不胜枚举。这项研究提出了 CovidMis20 数据集（2020 年 COVID-19 错误信息数据集），其中包含 2020 年 2 月至 7 月收集的 1,375,592 条推文。CovidMis20 可以自动更新以获取最新新闻，并可在以下网址公开获取：https://github.com/everythingguy/CovidMis20。这项研究使用 Bi-LSTM 深度学习和 CNN+Bi-GRU 进行假新闻检测。结果表明，集成 CNN+Bi-GRU 模型的测试准确率分别为 92.23% 和 90.56%，始终比 Bi-LSTM 模型提供更高的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的Twitter新冠虚假信息检测系统，并构建了可自动更新的CovidMis20数据集。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上的虚假信息可能引发严重社会危害，需建立自动检测系统以应对新冠疫情期间的谣言传播。
AI.method: 采用Bi-LSTM深度学习模型和集成CNN+Bi-GRU混合模型进行虚假新闻检测。
AI.result: Bi-LSTM模型测试准确率达92.23%，集成CNN+Bi-GRU模型达90.56%，前者表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 集成模型在检测效果上具有优势，CovidMis20数据集为后续研究提供了公开可用的资源。

authors_text: Osman Asif Malik,Yiming Xu,Nuojin Cheng,Stephen Becker,Alireza Doostan,Akil Narayan
title: Fast algorithms for least square problems with Kronecker lower subsets
title_zh: 克罗内克下子集最小二乘问题的快速算法
comment: 23 pages, 4 figures
comments: 23 pages, 4 figures
abstract: While leverage score sampling provides powerful tools for approximating solutions to large least squares problems, the cost of computing exact scores and sampling often prohibits practical application. This paper addresses this challenge by developing a new and efficient algorithm for exact leverage score sampling applicable to matrices that are lower column subsets of Kronecker product matrices. We synthesize relevant approximation guarantees and detail the algorithm that specifically leverages this structural property for computational efficiency. Through numerical examples, we demonstrate that utilizing efficiently computed exact leverage scores via our methods significantly reduces approximation errors, as compared to established approximate leverage score sampling strategies when applied to this important class of structured matrices.
summary: While leverage score sampling provides powerful tools for approximating solutions to large least squares problems, the cost of computing exact scores and sampling often prohibits practical application. This paper addresses this challenge by developing a new and efficient algorithm for exact leverage score sampling applicable to matrices that are lower column subsets of Kronecker product matrices. We synthesize relevant approximation guarantees and detail the algorithm that specifically leverages this structural property for computational efficiency. Through numerical examples, we demonstrate that utilizing efficiently computed exact leverage scores via our methods significantly reduces approximation errors, as compared to established approximate leverage score sampling strategies when applied to this important class of structured matrices.
abstract_zh: 虽然杠杆分数抽样为大型最小二乘问题的近似解决方案提供了强大的工具，但计算精确分数和抽样的成本通常会阻碍实际应用。本文通过开发一种新的高效算法来解决这一挑战，该算法用于精确杠杆分数采样，适用于克罗内克乘积矩阵的较低列子集的矩阵。我们综合了相关的近似保证，并详细介绍了专门利用这种结构特性来提高计算效率的算法。通过数值示例，我们证明，与应用于此类重要的结构化矩阵时建立的近似杠杆分数采样策略相比，通过我们的方法利用有效计算的精确杠杆分数可显着减少近似误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Kronecker积矩阵下子集的高效精确杠杆得分采样算法，用于解决大规模最小二乘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有杠杆得分采样方法在计算精确得分时成本过高，限制了其在实际应用中的效率，尤其针对结构化矩阵缺乏针对性优化。
AI.method: 利用Kronecker积矩阵的结构特性，设计高效算法直接计算其下子集的精确杠杆得分，结合近似保证理论提升计算效率。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法相比传统近似策略显著降低了最小二乘问题的近似误差，验证了算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 针对结构化矩阵的精确杠杆得分采样方法在保持精度的同时提升了计算效率，为大规模问题提供了可行的解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 针对结构化矩阵的精确杠杆得分采样方法在保持精度的同时提升了计算效率，为大规模问题提供了可行的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Kronecker积矩阵下子集的高效精确杠杆得分采样算法，用于解决大规模最小二乘问题。
motivation: 现有杠杆得分采样方法在计算精确得分时成本过高，限制了其在实际应用中的效率，尤其针对结构化矩阵缺乏针对性优化。
method: 利用Kronecker积矩阵的结构特性，设计高效算法直接计算其下子集的精确杠杆得分，结合近似保证理论提升计算效率。
result: 数值实验表明，该方法相比传统近似策略显著降低了最小二乘问题的近似误差，验证了算法的有效性。
conclusion: 针对结构化矩阵的精确杠杆得分采样方法在保持精度的同时提升了计算效率，为大规模问题提供了可行的解决方案。
search_text: Fast algorithms for least square problems with Kronecker lower subsets 克罗内克下子集最小二乘问题的快速算法 While leverage score sampling provides powerful tools for approximating solutions to large least squares problems, the cost of computing exact scores and sampling often prohibits practical application. This paper addresses this challenge by developing a new and efficient algorithm for exact leverage score sampling applicable to matrices that are lower column subsets of Kronecker product matrices. We synthesize relevant approximation guarantees and detail the algorithm that specifically leverages this structural property for computational efficiency. Through numerical examples, we demonstrate that utilizing efficiently computed exact leverage scores via our methods significantly reduces approximation errors, as compared to established approximate leverage score sampling strategies when applied to this important class of structured matrices. 虽然杠杆分数抽样为大型最小二乘问题的近似解决方案提供了强大的工具，但计算精确分数和抽样的成本通常会阻碍实际应用。本文通过开发一种新的高效算法来解决这一挑战，该算法用于精确杠杆分数采样，适用于克罗内克乘积矩阵的较低列子集的矩阵。我们综合了相关的近似保证，并详细介绍了专门利用这种结构特性来提高计算效率的算法。通过数值示例，我们证明，与应用于此类重要的结构化矩阵时建立的近似杠杆分数采样策略相比，通过我们的方法利用有效计算的精确杠杆分数可显着减少近似误差。 本文提出了一种针对Kronecker积矩阵下子集的高效精确杠杆得分采样算法，用于解决大规模最小二乘问题。 Osman Asif Malik,Yiming Xu,Nuojin Cheng,Stephen Becker,Alireza Doostan,Akil Narayan math.NA,cs.DS

authors_text: Soumyendu Sarkar,Vineet Gundecha,Sahand Ghorbanpour,Alexander Shmakov,Ashwin Ramesh Babu,Alexandre Pichard,Mathieu Cocho
title: Skip Training for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Controller for Industrial Wave Energy Converters
title_zh: 跳过工业波浪能转换器多智能体强化学习控制器的训练
comment: 2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE) August 20-24, 2022
comments: 2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE) August 20-24, 2022
abstract: Recent Wave Energy Converters (WEC) are equipped with multiple legs and generators to maximize energy generation. Traditional controllers have shown limitations to capture complex wave patterns and the controllers must efficiently maximize the energy capture. This paper introduces a Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning controller (MARL), which outperforms the traditionally used spring damper controller. Our initial studies show that the complex nature of problems makes it hard for training to converge. Hence, we propose a novel skip training approach which enables the MARL training to overcome performance saturation and converge to more optimum controllers compared to default MARL training, boosting power generation. We also present another novel hybrid training initialization (STHTI) approach, where the individual agents of the MARL controllers can be initially trained against the baseline Spring Damper (SD) controller individually and then be trained one agent at a time or all together in future iterations to accelerate convergence. We achieved double-digit gains in energy efficiency over the baseline Spring Damper controller with the proposed MARL controllers using the Asynchronous Advantage Actor-Critic (A3C) algorithm.
summary: Recent Wave Energy Converters (WEC) are equipped with multiple legs and generators to maximize energy generation. Traditional controllers have shown limitations to capture complex wave patterns and the controllers must efficiently maximize the energy capture. This paper introduces a Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning controller (MARL), which outperforms the traditionally used spring damper controller. Our initial studies show that the complex nature of problems makes it hard for training to converge. Hence, we propose a novel skip training approach which enables the MARL training to overcome performance saturation and converge to more optimum controllers compared to default MARL training, boosting power generation. We also present another novel hybrid training initialization (STHTI) approach, where the individual agents of the MARL controllers can be initially trained against the baseline Spring Damper (SD) controller individually and then be trained one agent at a time or all together in future iterations to accelerate convergence. We achieved double-digit gains in energy efficiency over the baseline Spring Damper controller with the proposed MARL controllers using the Asynchronous Advantage Actor-Critic (A3C) algorithm.
abstract_zh: 最近的波浪能转换器（WEC）配备了多个支架和发电机，以最大限度地提高发电量。传统控制器在捕获复杂波形方面存在局限性，并且控制器必须有效地最大化能量捕获。本文介绍了一种多智能体强化学习控制器（MARL），其性能优于传统使用的弹簧阻尼器控制器。我们的初步研究表明，问题的复杂性使得训练很难收敛。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的跳跃训练方法，与默认的 MARL 训练相比，该方法使 MARL 训练能够克服性能饱和并收敛到更优化的控制器，从而提高发电量。我们还提出了另一种新颖的混合训练初始化（STHTI）方法，其中 MARL 控制器的各个代理最初可以针对基线弹簧阻尼器（SD）控制器单独进行训练，然后在未来的迭代中一次训练一个代理或一起训练以加速收敛。与使用异步优势 Actor-Critic (A3C) 算法的建议 MARL 控制器相比，我们在基准弹簧阻尼器控制器上实现了两位数的能源效率提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的工业波能转换器控制器，通过引入跳过训练和混合训练初始化方法提升能量捕获效率。
AI.motivation: 传统弹簧阻尼控制器难以应对复杂波浪模式，需开发更高效的控制器以最大化能量捕获。
AI.method: 采用异步优势演员评论家（A3C）算法，结合跳过训练（Skip Training）和混合训练初始化（STHTI）方法，分阶段训练MARL控制器。
AI.result: 所提方法在能量效率上较基准弹簧阻尼控制器实现双位数提升，且加速了训练收敛。
AI.conclusion: 跳过训练与混合初始化策略有效解决了MARL训练收敛难题，显著提升了波能转换器的能源效率。

authors_text: Hongzhe Yu,Yongxin Chen
title: A Gaussian variational inference approach to motion planning
title_zh: 运动规划的高斯变分推理方法
abstract: We propose a Gaussian variational inference framework for the motion planning problem. In this framework, motion planning is formulated as an optimization over the distribution of the trajectories to approximate the desired trajectory distribution by a tractable Gaussian distribution. Equivalently, the proposed framework can be viewed as a standard motion planning with an entropy regularization. Thus, the solution obtained is a transition from an optimal deterministic solution to a stochastic one, and the proposed framework can recover the deterministic solution by controlling the level of stochasticity. To solve this optimization, we adopt the natural gradient descent scheme. The sparsity structure of the proposed formulation induced by factorized objective functions is further leveraged to improve the scalability of the algorithm. We evaluate our method on several robot systems in simulated environments, and show that it achieves collision avoidance with smooth trajectories, and meanwhile brings robustness to the deterministic baseline results, especially in challenging environments and tasks.
summary: We propose a Gaussian variational inference framework for the motion planning problem. In this framework, motion planning is formulated as an optimization over the distribution of the trajectories to approximate the desired trajectory distribution by a tractable Gaussian distribution. Equivalently, the proposed framework can be viewed as a standard motion planning with an entropy regularization. Thus, the solution obtained is a transition from an optimal deterministic solution to a stochastic one, and the proposed framework can recover the deterministic solution by controlling the level of stochasticity. To solve this optimization, we adopt the natural gradient descent scheme. The sparsity structure of the proposed formulation induced by factorized objective functions is further leveraged to improve the scalability of the algorithm. We evaluate our method on several robot systems in simulated environments, and show that it achieves collision avoidance with smooth trajectories, and meanwhile brings robustness to the deterministic baseline results, especially in challenging environments and tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于运动规划问题的高斯变分推理框架。在此框架中，运动规划被表述为对轨迹分布的优化，以通过易于处理的高斯分布来近似所需的轨迹分布。同样，所提出的框架可以被视为具有熵正则化的标准运动规划。因此，获得的解决方案是从最优确定性解决方案到随机解决方案的转变，并且所提出的框架可以通过控制随机性水平来恢复确定性解决方案。为了解决这个优化问题，我们采用自然梯度下降方案。进一步利用因式分解目标函数引起的所提出公式的稀疏结构来提高算法的可扩展性。我们在模拟环境中的多个机器人系统上评估了我们的方法，并表明它实现了平滑轨迹的碰撞避免，同时为确定性基线结果带来了鲁棒性，特别是在具有挑战性的环境和任务中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯变分推断的运动规划框架，通过优化轨迹分布来近似目标分布，并利用熵正则化实现从确定性到随机性的过渡。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划方法在复杂环境中鲁棒性不足，且难以处理不确定性。本文旨在通过引入随机性提升规划的鲁棒性，同时保持轨迹平滑性。
AI.method: 将运动规划建模为轨迹分布的优化问题，采用高斯分布近似目标分布，并结合自然梯度下降法求解。通过分解目标函数的稀疏性结构提升算法可扩展性。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中验证了方法的有效性，实验表明其能实现避障与平滑轨迹生成，并在复杂场景中显著提升确定性基线方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过平衡确定性与随机性，为运动规划提供了可扩展且鲁棒的解决方案，尤其适用于高挑战性环境与任务。

authors_text: Achin Jain,Kibok Lee,Gurumurthy Swaminathan,Hao Yang,Bernt Schiele,Avinash Ravichandran,Onkar Dabeer
title: ComplETR: Reducing the cost of annotations for object detection in dense scenes with vision transformers
title_zh: ComplETE：使用视觉转换器降低密集场景中对象检测的注释成本
abstract: Annotating bounding boxes for object detection is expensive, time-consuming, and error-prone. In this work, we propose a DETR based framework called ComplETR that is designed to explicitly complete missing annotations in partially annotated dense scene datasets. This reduces the need to annotate every object instance in the scene thereby reducing annotation cost. ComplETR augments object queries in DETR decoder with patch information of objects in the image. Combined with a matching loss, it can effectively find objects that are similar to the input patch and complete the missing annotations. We show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art methods such as Soft Sampling and Unbiased Teacher by itself, while at the same time can be used in conjunction with these methods to further improve their performance. Our framework is also agnostic to the choice of the downstream object detectors; we show performance improvement for several popular detectors such as Faster R-CNN, Cascade R-CNN, CenterNet2, and Deformable DETR on multiple dense scene datasets.
summary: Annotating bounding boxes for object detection is expensive, time-consuming, and error-prone. In this work, we propose a DETR based framework called ComplETR that is designed to explicitly complete missing annotations in partially annotated dense scene datasets. This reduces the need to annotate every object instance in the scene thereby reducing annotation cost. ComplETR augments object queries in DETR decoder with patch information of objects in the image. Combined with a matching loss, it can effectively find objects that are similar to the input patch and complete the missing annotations. We show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art methods such as Soft Sampling and Unbiased Teacher by itself, while at the same time can be used in conjunction with these methods to further improve their performance. Our framework is also agnostic to the choice of the downstream object detectors; we show performance improvement for several popular detectors such as Faster R-CNN, Cascade R-CNN, CenterNet2, and Deformable DETR on multiple dense scene datasets.
abstract_zh: 注释用于对象检测的边界框是昂贵、耗时且容易出错的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个名为 ComplETR 的基于 DETR 的框架，该框架旨在显式地完成部分注释的密集场景数据集中缺失的注释。这减少了注释场景中每个对象实例的需要，从而降低了注释成本。 ComplETR 使用图像中对象的补丁信息增强 DETR 解码器中的对象查询。结合匹配损失，它可以有效地找到与输入补丁相似的对象并完成缺失的注释。我们表明，我们的框架本身优于软采样和无偏教师等最先进的方法，同时可以与这些方法结合使用以进一步提高其性能。我们的框架对于下游目标检测器的选择也是不可知的；我们展示了几种流行检测器（例如 Faster R-CNN、Cascade R-CNN、CenterNet2 和 Deformable DETR）在多个密集场景数据集上的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ComplETR框架，通过补全密集场景数据集中缺失的标注，降低目标检测的标注成本。
AI.motivation: 目标检测的标注工作耗时耗力且容易出错，尤其在密集场景中需标注所有物体实例，成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于DETR架构，通过向解码器的物体查询添加图像块信息，并结合匹配损失，有效识别与输入块相似的物体以补全缺失标注。
AI.result: ComplETR在多个密集场景数据集上优于现有方法（如Soft Sampling、Unbiased Teacher），且可与这些方法结合进一步提升性能，适用于多种主流检测器。
AI.conclusion: ComplETR通过高效补全标注显著降低人工成本，同时保持检测性能，为密集场景的目标检测提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Junbin Zhang,Pei-Hsuan Tsai,Meng-Hsun Tsai
title: Semantic2Graph: Graph-based Multi-modal Feature Fusion for Action Segmentation in Videos
title_zh: Semantic2Graph：基于图的多模态特征融合，用于视频中的动作分割
comment: 13 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables. Published on Applied Intelligence
comments: 13 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables. Published on Applied Intelligence
abstract: Video action segmentation have been widely applied in many fields. Most previous studies employed video-based vision models for this purpose. However, they often rely on a large receptive field, LSTM or Transformer methods to capture long-term dependencies within videos, leading to significant computational resource requirements. To address this challenge, graph-based model was proposed. However, previous graph-based models are less accurate. Hence, this study introduces a graph-structured approach named Semantic2Graph, to model long-term dependencies in videos, thereby reducing computational costs and raise the accuracy. We construct a graph structure of video at the frame-level. Temporal edges are utilized to model the temporal relations and action order within videos. Additionally, we have designed positive and negative semantic edges, accompanied by corresponding edge weights, to capture both long-term and short-term semantic relationships in video actions. Node attributes encompass a rich set of multi-modal features extracted from video content, graph structures, and label text, encompassing visual, structural, and semantic cues. To synthesize this multi-modal information effectively, we employ a graph neural network (GNN) model to fuse multi-modal features for node action label classification. Experimental results demonstrate that Semantic2Graph outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of performance, particularly on benchmark datasets such as GTEA and 50Salads. Multiple ablation experiments further validate the effectiveness of semantic features in enhancing model performance. Notably, the inclusion of semantic edges in Semantic2Graph allows for the cost-effective capture of long-term dependencies, affirming its utility in addressing the challenges posed by computational resource constraints in video-based vision models.

However, they often rely on a large receptive field, LSTM or Transformer methods to capture long-term dependencies within videos, leading to significant computational resource requirements. To address this challenge, graph-based model was proposed. However, previous graph-based models are less accurate. Hence, this study introduces a graph-structured approach named Semantic2Graph, to model long-term dependencies in videos, thereby reducing computational costs and raise the accuracy. We construct a graph structure of video at the frame-level. Temporal edges are utilized to model the temporal relations and action order within videos. Additionally, we have designed positive and negative semantic edges, accompanied by corresponding edge weights, to capture both long-term and short-term semantic relationships in video actions. Node attributes encompass a rich set of multi-modal features extracted from video content, graph structures, and label text, encompassing visual, structural, and semantic cues. To synthesize this multi-modal information effectively, we employ a graph neural network (GNN) model to fuse multi-modal features for node action label classification. Experimental results demonstrate that Semantic2Graph outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of performance, particularly on benchmark datasets such as GTEA and 50Salads. Multiple ablation experiments further validate the effectiveness of semantic features in enhancing model performance. Notably, the inclusion of semantic edges in Semantic2Graph allows for the cost-effective capture of long-term dependencies, affirming its utility in addressing the challenges posed by computational resource constraints in video-based vision models.
abstract_zh: 视频动作分割已广泛应用于许多领域。之前的大多数研究都采用基于视频的视觉模型来实现此目的。然而，它们通常依赖于较大的感受野、LSTM 或 Transformer 方法来捕获视频中的长期依赖性，从而导致大量的计算资源需求。为了应对这一挑战，提出了基于图的模型。然而，以前基于图的模型不太准确。因此，本研究引入了一种名为 Semantic2Graph 的图结构方法来对视频中的长期依赖关系进行建模，从而降低计算成本并提高准确性。我们在帧级别构建视频的图结构。时间边缘用于对视频内的时间关系和动作顺序进行建模。此外，我们还设计了正语义边缘和负语义边缘，并附有相应的边缘权重，以捕获视频动作中的长期和短期语义关系。节点属性包含从视频内容、图形结构和标签文本中提取的一组丰富的多模式特征，包括视觉、结构和语义线索。为了有效地综合这种多模态信息，我们采用图神经网络（GNN）模型来融合多模态特征以进行节点动作标签分类。实验结果表明，Semantic2Graph 在性能方面优于最先进的方法，特别是在 GTEA 和 50Salads 等基准数据集上。多次消融实验进一步验证了语义特征在增强模型性能方面的有效性。值得注意的是，Semantic2Graph 中包含的语义边缘允许以经济有效的方式捕获长期依赖性，证实了其在解决基于视频的视觉模型中计算资源限制所带来的挑战方面的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图结构的多模态特征融合方法Semantic2Graph，用于视频动作分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统视频动作分割方法依赖大感受野或Transformer/LSTM模型，计算成本高且精度不足；现有图模型在准确性上仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 构建帧级图结构，通过时序边建模时间关系，设计正负语义边捕捉长短期语义关联，融合视觉、结构和语义多模态特征，并采用图神经网络进行节点分类。
AI.result: 在GTEA和50Salads等基准数据集上优于现有方法，消融实验验证了语义边对性能提升的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Semantic2Graph通过低成本图结构有效捕捉长时依赖，为视频视觉模型的计算资源约束问题提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Ingrid Navarro,Jean Oh
title: Social-PatteRNN: Socially-Aware Trajectory Prediction Guided by Motion Patterns
title_zh: Social-PatteRNN：运动模式引导的社交感知轨迹预测
abstract: As robots across domains start collaborating with humans in shared environments, algorithms that enable them to reason over human intent are important to achieve safe interplay. In our work, we study human intent through the problem of predicting trajectories in dynamic environments. We explore domains where navigation guidelines are relatively strictly defined but not clearly marked in their physical environments. We hypothesize that within these domains, agents tend to exhibit short-term motion patterns that reveal context information related to the agent's general direction, intermediate goals and rules of motion, e.g., social behavior. From this intuition, we propose Social-PatteRNN, an algorithm for recurrent, multi-modal trajectory prediction that exploits motion patterns to encode the aforesaid contexts. Our approach guides long-term trajectory prediction by learning to predict short-term motion patterns. It then extracts sub-goal information from the patterns and aggregates it as social context. We assess our approach across three domains: humans crowds, humans in sports and manned aircraft in terminal airspace, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
summary: As robots across domains start collaborating with humans in shared environments, algorithms that enable them to reason over human intent are important to achieve safe interplay. In our work, we study human intent through the problem of predicting trajectories in dynamic environments. We explore domains where navigation guidelines are relatively strictly defined but not clearly marked in their physical environments. We hypothesize that within these domains, agents tend to exhibit short-term motion patterns that reveal context information related to the agent's general direction, intermediate goals and rules of motion, e.g., social behavior. From this intuition, we propose Social-PatteRNN, an algorithm for recurrent, multi-modal trajectory prediction that exploits motion patterns to encode the aforesaid contexts. Our approach guides long-term trajectory prediction by learning to predict short-term motion patterns. It then extracts sub-goal information from the patterns and aggregates it as social context. We assess our approach across three domains: humans crowds, humans in sports and manned aircraft in terminal airspace, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 随着跨领域的机器人开始在共享环境中与人类协作，使它们能够推理人类意图的算法对于实现安全交互非常重要。在我们的工作中，我们通过预测动态环境中的轨迹问题来研究人类意图。我们探索导航指南定义相对严格但在物理环境中没有明确标记的领域。我们假设在这些领域内，智能体倾向于表现出短期运动模式，这些模式揭示了与智能体的总体方向、中间目标和运动规则（例如社会行为）相关的上下文信息。根据这种直觉，我们提出了 Social-PatteRNN，一种用于循环、多模态轨迹预测的算法，利用运动模式对上述上下文进行编码。我们的方法通过学习预测短期运动模式来指导长期轨迹预测。然后，它从模式中提取子目标信息并将其聚合为社会背景。我们在三个领域评估我们的方法：人群、体育运动中的人和航站楼空域的有人驾驶飞机，以实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Social-PatteRNN算法，通过分析短时运动模式实现社会感知的多模态轨迹预测，应用于动态环境中的人类及航空器轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人与人类在共享环境中的协作需求增加，需要预测人类意图以确保安全交互。现有导航规则在物理环境中常未明确标记，需通过短时运动模式捕捉社会行为等上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出Social-PatteRNN模型，通过学习预测短时运动模式提取子目标信息，聚合为社会上下文指导长期轨迹预测，实现多模态轨迹生成。
AI.result: 在人群、体育场景及航空器三个领域测试，均取得优于现有方法的预测性能，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了基于运动模式的社会感知轨迹预测有效性，为复杂动态环境中的智能体交互提供了新思路。
