search_text: Social-PatteRNN: Socially-Aware Trajectory Prediction Guided by Motion Patterns Social-PatteRNN：运动模式引导的社交感知轨迹预测 As robots across domains start collaborating with humans in shared environments, algorithms that enable them to reason over human intent are important to achieve safe interplay. In our work, we study human intent through the problem of predicting trajectories in dynamic environments. We explore domains where navigation guidelines are relatively strictly defined but not clearly marked in their physical environments. We hypothesize that within these domains, agents tend to exhibit short-term motion patterns that reveal context information related to the agent's general direction, intermediate goals and rules of motion, e.g., social behavior. From this intuition, we propose Social-PatteRNN, an algorithm for recurrent, multi-modal trajectory prediction that exploits motion patterns to encode the aforesaid contexts. Our approach guides long-term trajectory prediction by learning to predict short-term motion patterns. It then extracts sub-goal information from the patterns and aggregates it as social context. We assess our approach across three domains: humans crowds, humans in sports and manned aircraft in terminal airspace, achieving state-of-the-art performance. 随着跨领域的机器人开始在共享环境中与人类协作，使它们能够推理人类意图的算法对于实现安全交互非常重要。在我们的工作中，我们通过预测动态环境中的轨迹问题来研究人类意图。我们探索导航指南定义相对严格但在物理环境中没有明确标记的领域。我们假设在这些领域内，智能体倾向于表现出短期运动模式，这些模式揭示了与智能体的总体方向、中间目标和运动规则（例如社会行为）相关的上下文信息。根据这种直觉，我们提出了 Social-PatteRNN，一种用于循环、多模态轨迹预测的算法，利用运动模式对上述上下文进行编码。我们的方法通过学习预测短期运动模式来指导长期轨迹预测。然后，它从模式中提取子目标信息并将其聚合为社会背景。我们在三个领域评估我们的方法：人群、体育运动中的人和航站楼空域的有人驾驶飞机，以实现最先进的性能。 本文提出Social-PatteRNN算法，通过分析短时运动模式实现社会感知的多模态轨迹预测，应用于动态环境中的人类及航空器轨迹预测。 Ingrid Navarro,Jean Oh cs.RO

authors_text: Elijah Pelofske,Georg Hahn,Hristo N. Djidjev
title: Noise Dynamics of Quantum Annealers: Estimating the Effective Noise Using Idle Qubits
title_zh: 量子退火器的噪声动力学：使用空闲量子位估计有效噪声
comment: mber:LA-UR-22-27371
comments: mber:LA-UR-22-27371
abstract: Quantum annealing is a type of analog computation that aims to use quantum mechanical fluctuations in search of optimal solutions of QUBO (quadratic unconstrained binary optimization) or, equivalently, Ising problems. Since NP-hard problems can in general be mapped to Ising and QUBO formulations, the quantum annealing paradigm has the potential to help solve various NP-hard problems. Current quantum annealers, such as those manufactured by D-Wave Systems, Inc., have various practical limitations including the size (number of qubits) of the problem that can be solved, the qubit connectivity, and error due to the environment or system calibration, which can reduce the quality of the solutions. Typically, for an arbitrary problem instance, the corresponding QUBO (or Ising) structure will not natively embed onto the available qubit architecture on the quantum chip. Thus, in these cases, a minor embedding of the problem structure onto the device is necessary. However, minor embeddings on these devices do not always make use of the full sparse chip hardware graph, and a large portion of the available qubits stay unused during quantum annealing. In this work, we embed a disjoint random QUBO on the unused parts of the chip alongside the QUBO to be solved, which acts as an indicator of the solution quality of the device over time. Using experiments on three different D-Wave quantum annealers, we demonstrate that (i) long term trends in solution quality exist on the D-Wave device, and (ii) the unused qubits can be used to measure the current level of noise of the quantum system.
summary: Quantum annealing is a type of analog computation that aims to use quantum mechanical fluctuations in search of optimal solutions of QUBO (quadratic unconstrained binary optimization) or, equivalently, Ising problems. Since NP-hard problems can in general be mapped to Ising and QUBO formulations, the quantum annealing paradigm has the potential to help solve various NP-hard problems. Current quantum annealers, such as those manufactured by D-Wave Systems, Inc., have various practical limitations including the size (number of qubits) of the problem that can be solved, the qubit connectivity, and error due to the environment or system calibration, which can reduce the quality of the solutions. Typically, for an arbitrary problem instance, the corresponding QUBO (or Ising) structure will not natively embed onto the available qubit architecture on the quantum chip. Thus, in these cases, a minor embedding of the problem structure onto the device is necessary. However, minor embeddings on these devices do not always make use of the full sparse chip hardware graph, and a large portion of the available qubits stay unused during quantum annealing. In this work, we embed a disjoint random QUBO on the unused parts of the chip alongside the QUBO to be solved, which acts as an indicator of the solution quality of the device over time. Using experiments on three different D-Wave quantum annealers, we demonstrate that (i) long term trends in solution quality exist on the D-Wave device, and (ii) the unused qubits can be used to measure the current level of noise of the quantum system.
abstract_zh: 量子退火是一种模拟计算，旨在利用量子力学涨落来搜索 QUBO（二次无约束二元优化）或等效的伊辛问题的最优解。由于 NP 难问题通常可以映射到 Ising 和 QUBO 公式，因此量子退火范式有可能帮助解决各种 NP 难问题。当前的量子退火器，例如 D-Wave Systems, Inc. 制造的量子退火器，具有各种实际限制，包括可解决问题的大小（量子位数量）、量子位连接性以及环境或系统校准引起的误差，这些误差可能会降低解决方案的质量。通常，对于任意问题实例，相应的 QUBO（或 Ising）结构不会本地嵌入到量子芯片上可用的量子位架构上。因此，在这些情况下，有必要将问题结构少量嵌入到设备上。然而，这些设备上的少量嵌入并不总是利用完整的稀疏芯片硬件图，并且大部分可用量子位在量子退火期间保持未使用状态。在这项工作中，我们在芯片未使用的部分嵌入了一个不相交的随机 QUBO，与待求解的 QUBO 一起，作为设备随时间的解决方案质量的指标。通过在三种不同的 D-Wave 量子退火器上进行实验，我们证明了 (i) D-Wave 器件上存在解决方案质量的长期趋势，以及 (ii) 未使用的量子位可用于测量量子系统的当前噪声水平。

AI.tldr: 本文通过利用量子退火设备中未使用的qubit来估计量子系统的有效噪声水平，从而分析量子退火器的噪声动态。
AI.motivation: 当前量子退火设备（如D-Wave）存在环境噪声和校准误差等问题，导致解的质量下降。未使用的qubit可能提供额外信息以评估系统噪声。
AI.method: 在解决目标QUBO问题的同时，在芯片未使用的部分嵌入随机QUBO问题，通过监测其解的质量变化来表征噪声动态。
AI.result: 实验发现D-Wave设备存在长期解质量趋势，并验证了未使用qubit可有效测量当前噪声水平。
AI.conclusion: 利用闲置qubit可作为量子系统噪声的实时指标，为评估设备可靠性及优化误差缓解策略提供新方法。

authors_text: Varun Agrawal,Sylvain Bertrand,Robert Griffin,Frank Dellaert
title: Proprioceptive State Estimation of Legged Robots with Kinematic Chain Modeling
title_zh: 基于运动链建模的腿式机器人本体感觉状态估计
comment: Published in Humanoids 2022
comments: Published in Humanoids 2022
abstract: Legged robot locomotion is a challenging task due to a myriad of sub-problems, such as the hybrid dynamics of foot contact and the effects of the desired gait on the terrain. Accurate and efficient state estimation of the floating base and the feet joints can help alleviate much of these issues by providing feedback information to robot controllers. Current state estimation methods are highly reliant on a conjunction of visual and inertial measurements to provide real-time estimates, thus being handicapped in perceptually poor environments. In this work, we show that by leveraging the kinematic chain model of the robot via a factor graph formulation, we can perform state estimation of the base and the leg joints using primarily proprioceptive inertial data. We perform state estimation using a combination of preintegrated IMU measurements, forward kinematic computations, and contact detections in a factor-graph based framework, allowing our state estimate to be constrained by the robot model. Experimental results in simulation and on hardware show that our approach out-performs current proprioceptive state estimation methods by 27% on average, while being generalizable to a variety of legged robot platforms. We demonstrate our results both quantitatively and qualitatively on a wide variety of trajectories.
summary: Legged robot locomotion is a challenging task due to a myriad of sub-problems, such as the hybrid dynamics of foot contact and the effects of the desired gait on the terrain. Accurate and efficient state estimation of the floating base and the feet joints can help alleviate much of these issues by providing feedback information to robot controllers. Current state estimation methods are highly reliant on a conjunction of visual and inertial measurements to provide real-time estimates, thus being handicapped in perceptually poor environments. In this work, we show that by leveraging the kinematic chain model of the robot via a factor graph formulation, we can perform state estimation of the base and the leg joints using primarily proprioceptive inertial data. We perform state estimation using a combination of preintegrated IMU measurements, forward kinematic computations, and contact detections in a factor-graph based framework, allowing our state estimate to be constrained by the robot model. Experimental results in simulation and on hardware show that our approach out-performs current proprioceptive state estimation methods by 27% on average, while being generalizable to a variety of legged robot platforms. We demonstrate our results both quantitatively and qualitatively on a wide variety of trajectories.
abstract_zh: 由于存在无数的子问题，例如足部接触的混合动力学以及所需步态对地形的影响，腿式机器人的运动是一项具有挑战性的任务。浮动底座和脚关节的准确有效的状态估计可以通过向机器人控制器提供反馈信息来帮助缓解大部分问题。当前的状态估计方法高度依赖视觉和惯性测量的结合来提供实时估计，因此在感知较差的环境中受到限制。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过因子图公式利用机器人的运动链模型，我们可以主要使用本体感觉惯性数据对底座和腿部关节进行状态估计。我们在基于因子图的框架中结合预集成的 IMU 测量、正向运动学计算和接触检测来执行状态估计，从而使我们的状态估计受到机器人模型的约束。仿真和硬件实验结果表明，我们的方法平均比当前本体感觉状态估计方法高 27%，同时可推广到各种腿式机器人平台。我们在各种轨迹上定量和定性地展示了我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于运动学链模型的足式机器人本体状态估计方法，主要利用本体感觉惯性数据进行状态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有足式机器人状态估计方法依赖视觉和惯性测量单元（IMU）数据，在感知条件差的环境中表现不佳，需寻找更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过因子图框架结合预积分IMU测量、正向运动学计算和接触检测，利用机器人运动学链模型约束状态估计。
AI.result: 仿真和硬件实验表明，该方法平均比现有本体感觉状态估计方法提升27%，且适用于多种足式机器人平台。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过运动学链建模有效提升了足式机器人在复杂环境下的状态估计精度和泛化能力。

search_text: Proprioceptive State Estimation of Legged Robots with Kinematic Chain Modeling 基于运动链建模的腿式机器人本体感觉状态估计 Legged robot locomotion is a challenging task due to a myriad of sub-problems, such as the hybrid dynamics of foot contact and the effects of the desired gait on the terrain. Accurate and efficient state estimation of the floating base and the feet joints can help alleviate much of these issues by providing feedback information to robot controllers. Current state estimation methods are highly reliant on a conjunction of visual and inertial measurements to provide real-time estimates, thus being handicapped in perceptually poor environments. In this work, we show that by leveraging the kinematic chain model of the robot via a factor graph formulation, we can perform state estimation of the base and the leg joints using primarily proprioceptive inertial data. We perform state estimation using a combination of preintegrated IMU measurements, forward kinematic computations, and contact detections in a factor-graph based framework, allowing our state estimate to be constrained by the robot model. Experimental results in simulation and on hardware show that our approach out-performs current proprioceptive state estimation methods by 27% on average, while being generalizable to a variety of legged robot platforms. We demonstrate our results both quantitatively and qualitatively on a wide variety of trajectories. 由于存在无数的子问题，例如足部接触的混合动力学以及所需步态对地形的影响，腿式机器人的运动是一项具有挑战性的任务。浮动底座和脚关节的准确有效的状态估计可以通过向机器人控制器提供反馈信息来帮助缓解大部分问题。当前的状态估计方法高度依赖视觉和惯性测量的结合来提供实时估计，因此在感知较差的环境中受到限制。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过因子图公式利用机器人的运动链模型，我们可以主要使用本体感觉惯性数据对底座和腿部关节进行状态估计。我们在基于因子图的框架中结合预集成的 IMU 测量、正向运动学计算和接触检测来执行状态估计，从而使我们的状态估计受到机器人模型的约束。仿真和硬件实验结果表明，我们的方法平均比当前本体感觉状态估计方法高 27%，同时可推广到各种腿式机器人平台。我们在各种轨迹上定量和定性地展示了我们的结果。 本文提出了一种基于运动学链模型的足式机器人本体状态估计方法，主要利用本体感觉惯性数据进行状态估计。 Varun Agrawal,Sylvain Bertrand,Robert Griffin,Frank Dellaert cs.RO

authors_text: Jihoon Sohn,Mingyu Derek Ma,Muhao Chen
title: Bending the Future: Autoregressive Modeling of Temporal Knowledge Graphs in Curvature-Variable Hyperbolic Spaces
title_zh: 弯曲未来：曲率变量双曲空间中时间知识图的自回归建模
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures, In the 4th Conference on Automated Knowledge Base Construction (AKBC) 2022
comments: 11 pages, 2 figures, In the 4th Conference on Automated Knowledge Base Construction (AKBC) 2022
abstract: Recently there is an increasing scholarly interest in time-varying knowledge graphs, or temporal knowledge graphs (TKG). Previous research suggests diverse approaches to TKG reasoning that uses historical information. However, less attention has been given to the hierarchies within such information at different timestamps. Given that TKG is a sequence of knowledge graphs based on time, the chronology in the sequence derives hierarchies between the graphs. Furthermore, each knowledge graph has its hierarchical level which may differ from one another. To address these hierarchical characteristics in TKG, we propose HyperVC, which utilizes hyperbolic space that better encodes the hierarchies than Euclidean space. The chronological hierarchies between knowledge graphs at different timestamps are represented by embedding the knowledge graphs as vectors in a common hyperbolic space. Additionally, diverse hierarchical levels of knowledge graphs are represented by adjusting the curvatures of hyperbolic embeddings of their entities and relations. Experiments on four benchmark datasets show substantial improvements, especially on the datasets with higher hierarchical levels.
summary: Recently there is an increasing scholarly interest in time-varying knowledge graphs, or temporal knowledge graphs (TKG). Previous research suggests diverse approaches to TKG reasoning that uses historical information. However, less attention has been given to the hierarchies within such information at different timestamps. Given that TKG is a sequence of knowledge graphs based on time, the chronology in the sequence derives hierarchies between the graphs. Furthermore, each knowledge graph has its hierarchical level which may differ from one another. To address these hierarchical characteristics in TKG, we propose HyperVC, which utilizes hyperbolic space that better encodes the hierarchies than Euclidean space. The chronological hierarchies between knowledge graphs at different timestamps are represented by embedding the knowledge graphs as vectors in a common hyperbolic space. Additionally, diverse hierarchical levels of knowledge graphs are represented by adjusting the curvatures of hyperbolic embeddings of their entities and relations. Experiments on four benchmark datasets show substantial improvements, especially on the datasets with higher hierarchical levels.
abstract_zh: 最近，学术界对时变知识图或时态知识图（TKG）越来越感兴趣。先前的研究提出了使用历史信息进行 TKG 推理的多种方法。然而，人们对不同时间戳的此类信息中的层次结构的关注较少。鉴于 TKG 是基于时间的知识图序列，序列中的时间顺序推导出图之间的层次结构。此外，每个知识图都有其可能彼此不同的层次结构。为了解决 TKG 中的这些层次结构特征，我们提出了 HyperVC，它利用双曲空间比欧几里得空间更好地编码层次结构。通过将知识图作为向量嵌入到公共双曲空间中来表示不同时间戳的知识图之间的时间层次结构。此外，通过调整实体和关系的双曲嵌入的曲率来表示不同层次的知识图。对四个基准数据集的实验显示出显着的改进，特别是在具有更高层次级别的数据集上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperVC方法，在可变曲率双曲空间中对时间知识图谱进行自回归建模，以更有效地捕捉其层次结构特征。
AI.motivation: 现有时间知识图谱研究未能充分关注不同时刻数据间的层次结构差异及知识图自身层次级别的变化特性。
AI.method: 通过将知识图嵌入共享双曲空间表示时间序列层次关系，并动态调整实体和关系的双曲嵌入曲率以编码不同层次级别。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上实现显著性能提升，尤其在层次结构复杂的数据集上效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间建模能有效处理时间知识图谱的层次特性，为该领域研究提供新方向。

authors_text: William Chen,Siyi Hu,Rajat Talak,Luca Carlone
title: Leveraging Large (Visual) Language Models for Robot 3D Scene Understanding
title_zh: 利用大型（视觉）语言模型进行机器人 3D 场景理解
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.04585
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.04585
abstract: Abstract semantic 3D scene understanding is a problem of critical importance in robotics. As robots still lack the common-sense knowledge about household objects and locations of an average human, we investigate the use of pre-trained language models to impart common sense for scene understanding. We introduce and compare a wide range of scene classification paradigms that leverage language only (zero-shot, embedding-based, and structured-language) or vision and language (zero-shot and fine-tuned). We find that the best approaches in both categories yield $\sim 70\%$ room classification accuracy, exceeding the performance of pure-vision and graph classifiers. We also find such methods demonstrate notable generalization and transfer capabilities stemming from their use of language.
summary: Abstract semantic 3D scene understanding is a problem of critical importance in robotics. As robots still lack the common-sense knowledge about household objects and locations of an average human, we investigate the use of pre-trained language models to impart common sense for scene understanding. We introduce and compare a wide range of scene classification paradigms that leverage language only (zero-shot, embedding-based, and structured-language) or vision and language (zero-shot and fine-tuned). We find that the best approaches in both categories yield $\sim 70\%$ room classification accuracy, exceeding the performance of pure-vision and graph classifiers. We also find such methods demonstrate notable generalization and transfer capabilities stemming from their use of language.
abstract_zh: 抽象语义 3D 场景理解是机器人技术中至关重要的问题。由于机器人仍然缺乏关于普通人的家庭物品和位置的常识知识，我们研究使用预先训练的语言模型来传授场景理解的常识。我们介绍并比较了各种仅利用语言（零样本、基于嵌入和结构化语言）或视觉和语言（零样本和微调）的场景分类范例。我们发现这两个类别中的最佳方法都能产生 $\sim 70\%$ 房间分类精度，超过了纯视觉和图形分类器的性能。我们还发现这些方法表现出源自其语言使用的显着泛化和迁移能力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用大语言模型（包括视觉语言模型）提升机器人对3D场景的理解能力，特别是在房间分类任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 机器人缺乏人类对家庭物品和空间布局的常识知识，导致3D场景理解能力不足，需借助预训练语言模型补充常识信息。
AI.method: 比较了纯语言方法（零样本、嵌入式、结构化语言）和视觉-语言联合方法（零样本、微调）等多种场景分类范式，基于预训练语言模型实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 最佳方法在房间分类任务中达到约70%准确率，显著优于纯视觉和图分类方法，且表现出良好的跨场景泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型能有效增强机器人场景理解，结合视觉信息的方法效果更优，未来可进一步优化模型融合策略以提升性能。

We also find such methods demonstrate notable generalization and transfer capabilities stemming from their use of language. 抽象语义 3D 场景理解是机器人技术中至关重要的问题。由于机器人仍然缺乏关于普通人的家庭物品和位置的常识知识，我们研究使用预先训练的语言模型来传授场景理解的常识。我们介绍并比较了各种仅利用语言（零样本、基于嵌入和结构化语言）或视觉和语言（零样本和微调）的场景分类范例。我们发现这两个类别中的最佳方法都能产生 $\sim 70\%$ 房间分类精度，超过了纯视觉和图形分类器的性能。我们还发现这些方法表现出源自其语言使用的显着泛化和迁移能力。 本文研究如何利用大语言模型（包括视觉语言模型）提升机器人对3D场景的理解能力，特别是在房间分类任务中的应用。 William Chen,Siyi Hu,Rajat Talak,Luca Carlone cs.RO,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Wei Zhang,Yu Bao
title: SENDER: SEmi-Nonlinear Deep Efficient Reconstructor for Extraction Canonical, Meta, and Sub Functional Connectivity in the Human Brain
title_zh: SENDER：半非线性深度高效重构器，用于提取人脑中的规范、元和子功能连接
comment: 28 pages, 6 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.10264, arXiv:2205.10374
comments: 28 pages, 6 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.10264, arXiv:2205.10374
abstract: Deep Linear and Nonlinear learning methods have already been vital machine learning methods for investigating the hierarchical features such as functional connectivity in the human brain via functional Magnetic Resonance signals; however, there are three major shortcomings: 1). For deep linear learning methods, although the identified hierarchy of functional connectivity is easily explainable, it is challenging to reveal more hierarchical functional connectivity; 2). For deep nonlinear learning methods, although non-fully connected architecture reduces the complexity of neural network structures that are easy to optimize and not vulnerable to overfitting, the functional connectivity hierarchy is difficult to explain; 3). Importantly, it is challenging for Deep Linear/Nonlinear methods to detect meta and sub-functional connectivity even in the shallow layers; 4). Like most conventional Deep Nonlinear Methods, such as Deep Neural Networks, the hyperparameters must be tuned manually, which is time-consuming. Thus, in this work, we propose a novel deep hybrid learning method named SEmi-Nonlinear Deep Efficient Reconstruction (SENDER), to overcome the aforementioned shortcomings: 1). SENDER utilizes a multiple-layer stacked structure for the linear learning methods to detect the canonical functional connectivity; 2). SENDER implements a non-fully connected architecture conducted for the nonlinear learning methods to reveal the meta-functional connectivity through shallow and deeper layers; 3). SENDER incorporates the proposed background components to extract the sub-functional connectivity; 4). SENDER adopts a novel rank reduction operator to implement the hyperparameters tuning automatically. To further validate the effectiveness, we compared SENDER with four peer methodologies using real functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging data for the human brain.

For deep linear learning methods, although the identified hierarchy of functional connectivity is easily explainable, it is challenging to reveal more hierarchical functional connectivity; 2). For deep nonlinear learning methods, although non-fully connected architecture reduces the complexity of neural network structures that are easy to optimize and not vulnerable to overfitting, the functional connectivity hierarchy is difficult to explain; 3). Importantly, it is challenging for Deep Linear/Nonlinear methods to detect meta and sub-functional connectivity even in the shallow layers; 4). Like most conventional Deep Nonlinear Methods, such as Deep Neural Networks, the hyperparameters must be tuned manually, which is time-consuming. Thus, in this work, we propose a novel deep hybrid learning method named SEmi-Nonlinear Deep Efficient Reconstruction (SENDER), to overcome the aforementioned shortcomings: 1). SENDER utilizes a multiple-layer stacked structure for the linear learning methods to detect the canonical functional connectivity; 2). SENDER implements a non-fully connected architecture conducted for the nonlinear learning methods to reveal the meta-functional connectivity through shallow and deeper layers; 3). SENDER incorporates the proposed background components to extract the sub-functional connectivity; 4). SENDER adopts a novel rank reduction operator to implement the hyperparameters tuning automatically. To further validate the effectiveness, we compared SENDER with four peer methodologies using real functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging data for the human brain.
abstract_zh: 深度线性和非线性学习方法已经成为重要的机器学习方法，用于研究分层特征，例如通过功能磁共振信号实现人脑的功能连接；然而，存在三个主要缺点：1）。对于深度线性学习方法，虽然识别的功能连接层次很容易解释，但揭示更多层次的功能连接具有挑战性； 2）。对于深度非线性学习方法来说，虽然非全连接架构降低了神经网络结构的复杂性，易于优化且不易过拟合，但功能连接层次结构难以解释； 3）。重要的是，深度线性/非线性方法即使在浅层中检测元和子功能连接也具有挑战性； 4）。与大多数传统的深度非线性方法（例如深度神经网络）一样，必须手动调整超参数，这非常耗时。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 SEmi-非线性深度高效重建（SENDER）的新型深度混合学习方法，以克服上述缺点：1）。 SENDER利用多层堆叠结构的线性学习方法来检测规范功能连接； 2）。 SENDER 实现了一种针对非线性学习方法的非全连接架构，通过浅层和深层揭示元功能连接； 3）。 SENDER合并了所提出的背景组件来提取子功能连接； 4）。 SENDER采用新颖的降级算子来自动实现超参数调整。为了进一步验证其有效性，我们使用人脑的真实功能磁共振成像数据将 SENDER 与四种同行方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SENDER的半非线性深度高效重建方法，用于提取人类大脑的典型功能连接、元功能连接和子功能连接。
AI.motivation: 现有深度线性/非线性方法在揭示大脑功能连接层次结构、检测元/子功能连接及自动调参方面存在显著不足。
AI.method: SENDER采用多层堆叠结构检测典型功能连接，非全连接架构揭示元功能连接，引入背景组件提取子功能连接，并通过秩约减算子实现自动超参数调优。
AI.result: 通过真实fMRI数据验证，SENDER在功能连接分析任务中优于四种现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SENDER通过混合架构和自动调参机制，有效解决了传统深度学习方法在脑功能连接分析中的关键缺陷。

authors_text: Wufei Ma,Angtian Wang,Alan Yuille,Adam Kortylewski
title: Robust Category-Level 6D Pose Estimation with Coarse-to-Fine Rendering of Neural Features
title_zh: 具有从粗到细的神经特征渲染的鲁棒类别级 6D 姿势估计
comment: ef:ECCV 2022
comments: ef:ECCV 2022
abstract: We consider the problem of category-level 6D pose estimation from a single RGB image. Our approach represents an object category as a cuboid mesh and learns a generative model of the neural feature activations at each mesh vertex to perform pose estimation through differentiable rendering. A common problem of rendering-based approaches is that they rely on bounding box proposals, which do not convey information about the 3D rotation of the object and are not reliable when objects are partially occluded. Instead, we introduce a coarse-to-fine optimization strategy that utilizes the rendering process to estimate a sparse set of 6D object proposals, which are subsequently refined with gradient-based optimization. The key to enabling the convergence of our approach is a neural feature representation that is trained to be scale- and rotation-invariant using contrastive learning. Our experiments demonstrate an enhanced category-level 6D pose estimation performance compared to prior work, particularly under strong partial occlusion.
summary: We consider the problem of category-level 6D pose estimation from a single RGB image. Our approach represents an object category as a cuboid mesh and learns a generative model of the neural feature activations at each mesh vertex to perform pose estimation through differentiable rendering. A common problem of rendering-based approaches is that they rely on bounding box proposals, which do not convey information about the 3D rotation of the object and are not reliable when objects are partially occluded. Instead, we introduce a coarse-to-fine optimization strategy that utilizes the rendering process to estimate a sparse set of 6D object proposals, which are subsequently refined with gradient-based optimization. The key to enabling the convergence of our approach is a neural feature representation that is trained to be scale- and rotation-invariant using contrastive learning. Our experiments demonstrate an enhanced category-level 6D pose estimation performance compared to prior work, particularly under strong partial occlusion.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑从单个 RGB 图像进行类别级 6D 姿态估计的问题。我们的方法将对象类别表示为长方体网格，并学习每个网格顶点的神经特征激活的生成模型，以通过可微渲染执行姿势估计。基于渲染的方法的一个常见问题是它们依赖于边界框建议，而边界框建议不传达有关对象 3D 旋转的信息，并且当对象部分被遮挡时并不可靠。相反，我们引入了一种从粗到细的优化策略，该策略利用渲染过程来估计一组稀疏的 6D 对象建议，随后通过基于梯度的优化进行细化。实现我们方法收敛的关键是使用对比学习将神经特征表示训练为尺度和旋转不变。我们的实验证明了与之前的工作相比，类别级 6D 姿态估计性能得到了增强，特别是在强部分遮挡的情况下。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经特征粗到细渲染的鲁棒类别级6D姿态估计方法
AI.motivation: 传统渲染方法依赖边界框提案无法处理物体旋转和部分遮挡问题，需更鲁棒的6D姿态估计方案
AI.method: 使用立方体网格表示物体类别，通过可微渲染学习神经特征激活生成模型，并采用粗到细优化策略结合对比学习训练的尺度旋转不变特征
AI.result: 在强部分遮挡场景下相比现有方法取得更优的类别级6D姿态估计性能
AI.conclusion: 通过神经特征表示与优化策略结合，有效提升了复杂场景下的姿态估计鲁棒性

authors_text: Kheeran K. Naidu,Vihan Shah
title: Space Optimal Vertex Cover in Dynamic Streams
title_zh: 动态流中的空间最优顶点覆盖
abstract: We optimally resolve the space complexity for the problem of finding an $α$-approximate minimum vertex cover ($α$MVC) in dynamic graph streams. We give a randomised algorithm for $α$MVC which uses $O(n^2/α^2)$ bits of space matching Dark and Konrad's lower bound [CCC 2020] up to constant factors. By computing a random greedy matching, we identify `easy' instances of the problem which can trivially be solved by returning the entire vertex set. The remaining `hard' instances, then have sparse induced subgraphs which we exploit to get our space savings and solve $α$MVC. Achieving this type of optimality result is crucial for providing a complete understanding of a problem, and it has been gaining interest within the dynamic graph streaming community. For connectivity, Nelson and Yu [SODA 2019] improved the lower bound showing that $Ω(n \log^3 n)$ bits of space is necessary while Ahn, Guha, and McGregor [SODA 2012] have shown that $O(n \log^3 n)$ bits is sufficient. For finding an $α$-approximate maximum matching, the upper bound was improved by Assadi and Shah [ITCS 2022] showing that $O(n^2/α^3)$ bits is sufficient while Dark and Konrad [CCC 2020] have shown that $Ω(n^2/α^3)$ bits is necessary. The space complexity, however, remains unresolved for many other dynamic graph streaming problems where further improvements can still be made. \end{abstract}
summary: We optimally resolve the space complexity for the problem of finding an $α$-approximate minimum vertex cover ($α$MVC) in dynamic graph streams. We give a randomised algorithm for $α$MVC which uses $O(n^2/α^2)$ bits of space matching Dark and Konrad's lower bound [CCC 2020] up to constant factors. By computing a random greedy matching, we identify `easy' instances of the problem which can trivially be solved by returning the entire vertex set. The remaining `hard' instances, then have sparse induced subgraphs which we exploit to get our space savings and solve $α$MVC. Achieving this type of optimality result is crucial for providing a complete understanding of a problem, and it has been gaining interest within the dynamic graph streaming community. For connectivity, Nelson and Yu [SODA 2019] improved the lower bound showing that $Ω(n \log^3 n)$ bits of space is necessary while Ahn, Guha, and McGregor [SODA 2012] have shown that $O(n \log^3 n)$ bits is sufficient. For finding an $α$-approximate maximum matching, the upper bound was improved by Assadi and Shah [ITCS 2022] showing that $O(n^2/α^3)$ bits is sufficient while Dark and Konrad [CCC 2020] have shown that $Ω(n^2/α^3)$ bits is necessary. The space complexity, however, remains unresolved for many other dynamic graph streaming problems where further improvements can still be made. \end{abstract}
abstract_zh: 我们最优地解决了在动态图流中找到$α$近似最小顶点覆盖（$α$MVC）问题的空间复杂度。我们给出了 $α$MVC 的随机算法，该算法使用 $O(n^2/α^2)$ 位空间匹配 Dark 和 Konrad 的下界 [CCC 2020] 直至常数因子。通过计算随机贪婪匹配，我们识别出问题的“简单”实例，可以通过返回整个顶点集轻松解决该问题。剩下的“硬”实例则具有稀疏的归纳子图，我们利用这些子图来节省空间并解决 $α$MVC 问题。实现这种类型的最优结果对于提供对问题的完整理解至关重要，并且它在动态图流社区中引起了人们的兴趣。对于连接性，Nelson 和 Yu [SODA 2019] 改进了下限，表明 $Ω(n \log^3 n)$ 位空间是必要的，而 Ahn、Guha 和 McGregor [SODA 2012] 表明 $O(n \log^3 n)$ 位空间就足够了。为了找到 $α$ 近似最大匹配，Assadi 和 Shah [ITCS 2022] 改进了上限，表明 $O(n^2/α^3)$ 位就足够了，而 Dark 和 Konrad [CCC 2020] 表明 $Ω(n^2/α^3)$ 位是必要的。然而，许多其他动态图流问题的空间复杂度仍未得到解决，仍可以进行进一步的改进。 \结束{摘要}

search_text: Space Optimal Vertex Cover in Dynamic Streams 动态流中的空间最优顶点覆盖 We optimally resolve the space complexity for the problem of finding an $α$-approximate minimum vertex cover ($α$MVC) in dynamic graph streams. We give a randomised algorithm for $α$MVC which uses $O(n^2/α^2)$ bits of space matching Dark and Konrad's lower bound [CCC 2020] up to constant factors. By computing a random greedy matching, we identify `easy' instances of the problem which can trivially be solved by returning the entire vertex set. The remaining `hard' instances, then have sparse induced subgraphs which we exploit to get our space savings and solve $α$MVC. Achieving this type of optimality result is crucial for providing a complete understanding of a problem, and it has been gaining interest within the dynamic graph streaming community. For connectivity, Nelson and Yu [SODA 2019] improved the lower bound showing that $Ω(n \log^3 n)$ bits of space is necessary while Ahn, Guha, and McGregor [SODA 2012] have shown that $O(n \log^3 n)$ bits is sufficient. For finding an $α$-approximate maximum matching, the upper bound was improved by Assadi and Shah [ITCS 2022] showing that $O(n^2/α^3)$ bits is sufficient while Dark and Konrad [CCC 2020] have shown that $Ω(n^2/α^3)$ bits is necessary. The space complexity, however, remains unresolved for many other dynamic graph streaming problems where further improvements can still be made. \end{abstract} 我们最优地解决了在动态图流中找到$α$近似最小顶点覆盖（$α$MVC）问题的空间复杂度。我们给出了 $α$MVC 的随机算法，该算法使用 $O(n^2/α^2)$ 位空间匹配 Dark 和 Konrad 的下界 [CCC 2020] 直至常数因子。通过计算随机贪婪匹配，我们识别出问题的“简单”实例，可以通过返回整个顶点集轻松解决该问题。剩下的“硬”实例则具有稀疏的归纳子图，我们利用这些子图来节省空间并解决 $α$MVC 问题。实现这种类型的最优结果对于提供对问题的完整理解至关重要，并且它在动态图流社区中引起了人们的兴趣。对于连接性，Nelson 和 Yu [SODA 2019] 改进了下限，表明 $Ω(n \log^3 n)$ 位空间是必要的，而 Ahn、Guha 和 McGregor [SODA 2012] 表明 $O(n \log^3 n)$ 位空间就足够了。为了找到 $α$ 近似最大匹配，Assadi 和 Shah [ITCS 2022] 改进了上限，表明 $O(n^2/α^3)$ 位就足够了，而 Dark 和 Konrad [CCC 2020] 表明 $Ω(n^2/α^3)$ 位是必要的。然而，许多其他动态图流问题的空间复杂度仍未得到解决，仍可以进行进一步的改进。 \结束{摘要} 本文解决了动态图流中寻找α近似最小顶点覆盖（αMVC）问题的空间复杂度，提出了一种随机化算法，其空间复杂度达到下界。 Kheeran K. authors_text: Raghuvansh R. Saxena,Santhoshini Velusamy,S. Matthew Weinberg
title: An Improved Lower Bound for Matroid Intersection Prophet Inequalities
title_zh: 拟阵交集预言不等式的改进下界
abstract: We consider prophet inequalities subject to feasibility constraints that are the intersection of $q$ matroids. The best-known algorithms achieve a $Θ(q)$-approximation, even when restricted to instances that are the intersection of $q$ partition matroids, and with i.i.d.~Bernoulli random variables. The previous best-known lower bound is $Θ(\sqrt{q})$ due to a simple construction of [Kleinberg-Weinberg STOC 2012] (which uses i.i.d.~Bernoulli random variables, and writes the construction as the intersection of partition matroids). We establish an improved lower bound of $q^{1/2+Ω(1/\log \log q)}$ by writing the construction of [Kleinberg-Weinberg STOC 2012] as the intersection of asymptotically fewer partition matroids. We accomplish this via an improved upper bound on the product dimension of a graph with $p^p$ disjoint cliques of size $p$, using recent techniques developed in [Alon-Alweiss European Journal of Combinatorics 2020].
summary: We consider prophet inequalities subject to feasibility constraints that are the intersection of $q$ matroids. The best-known algorithms achieve a $Θ(q)$-approximation, even when restricted to instances that are the intersection of $q$ partition matroids, and with i.i.d.~Bernoulli random variables. The previous best-known lower bound is $Θ(\sqrt{q})$ due to a simple construction of [Kleinberg-Weinberg STOC 2012] (which uses i.i.d.~Bernoulli random variables, and writes the construction as the intersection of partition matroids). We establish an improved lower bound of $q^{1/2+Ω(1/\log \log q)}$ by writing the construction of [Kleinberg-Weinberg STOC 2012] as the intersection of asymptotically fewer partition matroids. We accomplish this via an improved upper bound on the product dimension of a graph with $p^p$ disjoint cliques of size $p$, using recent techniques developed in [Alon-Alweiss European Journal of Combinatorics 2020].
abstract_zh: 我们认为先知不等式受到可行性约束，即 $q$ 拟阵的交集。即使仅限于 $q$ 分区拟阵的交集实例以及 i.i.d.~Bernoulli 随机变量，最著名的算法也能实现 $θ(q)$ 近似。由于 [Kleinberg-Weinberg STOC 2012] 的简单构造（使用 i.i.d.~Bernoulli 随机变量，并将该构造写为分区拟阵的交集），先前最著名的下界是 $θ(\sqrt{q})$。我们通过将 [Kleinberg-Weinberg STOC 2012] 的构造写为渐近较少分区拟阵的交集，建立了 $q^{1/2+Ω(1/\log \log q)}$ 的改进下界。我们使用 [Alon-Alweiss 欧洲组合学杂志 2020] 中开发的最新技术，通过改进具有 $p^p$ 大小为 $p$ 的不相交团的图的乘积维度上限来实现这一目标。

AI.tldr: 研究相交拟阵约束下的 prophet 不等式下界问题
AI.motivation: 已有的 prophet 不等式算法在 q 个拟阵相交约束下达到 Θ(q) 近似比，但已知下界仅为 Θ(√q)，两者之间存在较大差距，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过改进图中 p^p 个不相交 p 团的产品维数上界，利用 Alon-Alweiss 2020 的近期技术，将 Kleinberg-Weinberg 构造写成渐近更少的划分拟阵的交集。
AI.result: 将下界从 Θ(√q) 提升至 q^{1/2+Ω(1/ log log q)}。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进产品维数上界，证明了 prophet 不等式在拟阵相交约束下的下界可以严格大于 √q，缩小了与上界之间的差距。

authors_text: Sanjay Haresh,Xiaohao Sun,Hanxiao Jiang,Angel X. Chang,Manolis Savva
title: Articulated 3D Human-Object Interactions from RGB Videos: An Empirical Analysis of Approaches and Challenges
title_zh: RGB 视频中的清晰 3D 人机交互：方法和挑战的实证分析
abstract: Human-object interactions with articulated objects are common in everyday life. Despite much progress in single-view 3D reconstruction, it is still challenging to infer an articulated 3D object model from an RGB video showing a person manipulating the object. We canonicalize the task of articulated 3D human-object interaction reconstruction from RGB video, and carry out a systematic benchmark of five families of methods for this task: 3D plane estimation, 3D cuboid estimation, CAD model fitting, implicit field fitting, and free-form mesh fitting. Our experiments show that all methods struggle to obtain high accuracy results even when provided ground truth information about the observed objects. We identify key factors which make the task challenging and suggest directions for future work on this challenging 3D computer vision task. Short video summary at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tAlKBojZwc
summary: Human-object interactions with articulated objects are common in everyday life. Despite much progress in single-view 3D reconstruction, it is still challenging to infer an articulated 3D object model from an RGB video showing a person manipulating the object. We canonicalize the task of articulated 3D human-object interaction reconstruction from RGB video, and carry out a systematic benchmark of five families of methods for this task: 3D plane estimation, 3D cuboid estimation, CAD model fitting, implicit field fitting, and free-form mesh fitting. Our experiments show that all methods struggle to obtain high accuracy results even when provided ground truth information about the observed objects. We identify key factors which make the task challenging and suggest directions for future work on this challenging 3D computer vision task. Short video summary at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tAlKBojZwc
abstract_zh: 人与铰接物体的交互在日常生活中很常见。尽管单视图 3D 重建取得了很大进展，但从显示人操纵对象的 RGB 视频中推断出铰接的 3D 对象模型仍然具有挑战性。我们规范化了从 RGB 视频进行关节式 3D 人机交互重建的任务，并针对该任务对五种方法进行了系统基准测试：3D 平面估计、3D 长方体估计、CAD 模型拟合、隐式场拟合和自由形式网格拟合。我们的实验表明，即使提供了有关观察对象的地面真实信息，所有方法都难以获得高精度结果。我们确定了使任务具有挑战性的关键因素，并为这项具有挑战性的 3D 计算机视觉任务的未来工作提出了方向。短视频摘要：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tAlKBojZwc

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了从RGB视频重建可变形3D人-物交互的五类方法，分析其挑战与性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 日常交互中可变形物体的3D重建存在显著挑战，现有方法尚未能有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 对3D平面估计、立方体估计、CAD模型拟合、隐式场拟合和自由形网格拟合五类方法进行系统基准测试。
AI.result: 所有方法在真实数据下均难以达到高精度，揭示了姿态估计、遮挡处理和几何复杂性等关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需突破物理约束建模与多模态数据融合等方向以提升可变形物体的3D重建能力。

method: 对3D平面估计、立方体估计、CAD模型拟合、隐式场拟合和自由形网格拟合五类方法进行系统基准测试。
result: 所有方法在真实数据下均难以达到高精度，揭示了姿态估计、遮挡处理和几何复杂性等关键挑战。
conclusion: 需突破物理约束建模与多模态数据融合等方向以提升可变形物体的3D重建能力。
search_text: Articulated 3D Human-Object Interactions from RGB Videos: An Empirical Analysis of Approaches and Challenges RGB 视频中的清晰 3D 人机交互：方法和挑战的实证分析 Human-object interactions with articulated objects are common in everyday life. Despite much progress in single-view 3D reconstruction, it is still challenging to infer an articulated 3D object model from an RGB video showing a person manipulating the object. We canonicalize the task of articulated 3D human-object interaction reconstruction from RGB video, and carry out a systematic benchmark of five families of methods for this task: 3D plane estimation, 3D cuboid estimation, CAD model fitting, implicit field fitting, and free-form mesh fitting. Our experiments show that all methods struggle to obtain high accuracy results even when provided ground truth information about the observed objects. We identify key factors which make the task challenging and suggest directions for future work on this challenging 3D computer vision task. Short video summary at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tAlKBojZwc 人与铰接物体的交互在日常生活中很常见。尽管单视图 3D 重建取得了很大进展，但从显示人操纵对象的 RGB 视频中推断出铰接的 3D 对象模型仍然具有挑战性。我们规范化了从 RGB 视频进行关节式 3D 人机交互重建的任务，并针对该任务对五种方法进行了系统基准测试：3D 平面估计、3D 长方体估计、CAD 模型拟合、隐式场拟合和自由形式网格拟合。我们的实验表明，即使提供了有关观察对象的地面真实信息，所有方法都难以获得高精度结果。我们确定了使任务具有挑战性的关键因素，并为这项具有挑战性的 3D 计算机视觉任务的未来工作提出了方向。短视频摘要：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tAlKBojZwc 本文系统评估了从RGB视频重建可变形3D人-物交互的五类方法，分析其挑战与性能瓶颈。 Sanjay Haresh,Xiaohao Sun,Hanxiao Jiang,Angel X. Chang,Manolis Savva cs.CV

authors_text: Yufei Huang,Mohsen Jafari,Peter Jin
title: Driving Safety Prediction and Safe Route Mapping Using In-vehicle and Roadside Data
title_zh: 使用车内和路边数据进行驾驶安全预测和安全路线绘制
comment: 12 pages, 19 figures, 9 tables
comments: 12 pages, 19 figures, 9 tables
abstract: Risk assessment of roadways is commonly practiced based on historical crash data. Information on driver behaviors and real-time traffic situations is sometimes missing. In this paper, the Safe Route Mapping (SRM) model, a methodology for developing dynamic risk heat maps of roadways, is extended to consider driver behaviors when making predictions. An Android App is designed to gather drivers' information and upload it to a server. On the server, facial recognition extracts drivers' data, such as facial landmarks, gaze directions, and emotions. The driver's drowsiness and distraction are detected, and driving performance is evaluated. Meanwhile, dynamic traffic information is captured by a roadside camera and uploaded to the same server. A longitudinal-scanline-based arterial traffic video analytics is applied to recognize vehicles from the video to build speed and trajectory profiles. Based on these data, a LightGBM model is introduced to predict conflict indices for drivers in the next one or two seconds. Then, multiple data sources, including historical crash counts and predicted traffic conflict indicators, are combined using a Fuzzy logic model to calculate risk scores for road segments. The proposed SRM model is illustrated using data collected from an actual traffic intersection and a driving simulation platform. The prediction results show that the model is accurate, and the added driver behavior features will improve the model's performance. Finally, risk heat maps are generated for visualization purposes. The authorities can use the dynamic heat map to designate safe corridors and dispatch law enforcement and drivers for early warning and trip planning.
summary: Risk assessment of roadways is commonly practiced based on historical crash data. Information on driver behaviors and real-time traffic situations is sometimes missing. In this paper, the Safe Route Mapping (SRM) model, a methodology for developing dynamic risk heat maps of roadways, is extended to consider driver behaviors when making predictions. An Android App is designed to gather drivers' information and upload it to a server. On the server, facial recognition extracts drivers' data, such as facial landmarks, gaze directions, and emotions. The driver's drowsiness and distraction are detected, and driving performance is evaluated. Meanwhile, dynamic traffic information is captured by a roadside camera and uploaded to the same server. A longitudinal-scanline-based arterial traffic video analytics is applied to recognize vehicles from the video to build speed and trajectory profiles. Based on these data, a LightGBM model is introduced to predict conflict indices for drivers in the next one or two seconds. Then, multiple data sources, including historical crash counts and predicted traffic conflict indicators, are combined using a Fuzzy logic model to calculate risk scores for road segments. The proposed SRM model is illustrated using data collected from an actual traffic intersection and a driving simulation platform. The prediction results show that the model is accurate, and the added driver behavior features will improve the model's performance. Finally, risk heat maps are generated for visualization purposes. The authorities can use the dynamic heat map to designate safe corridors and dispatch law enforcement and drivers for early warning and trip planning.
abstract_zh: 道路风险评估通常基于历史事故数据进行。有时会丢失有关驾驶员行为和实时交通状况的信息。在本文中，安全路线图（SRM）模型是一种开发道路动态风险热图的方法，它被扩展为在进行预测时考虑驾驶员的行为。 Android 应用程序旨在收集驾驶员信息并将其上传到服务器。在服务器上，面部识别提取驾驶员的数据，例如面部标志、注视方向和情绪。检测驾驶员的困倦和分心情况，并评估驾驶表现。同时，路边摄像头捕捉动态交通信息并上传到同一服务器。基于纵向扫描线的干线交通视频分析用于从视频中识别车辆，以构建速度和轨迹曲线。基于这些数据，引入 LightGBM 模型来预测驾驶员在接下来的一两秒内的冲突指数。然后，使用模糊逻辑模型组合多个数据源，包括历史碰撞计数和预测交通冲突指标，以计算路段的风险评分。使用从实际交通路口和驾驶模拟平台收集的数据来说明所提出的 SRM 模型。预测结果表明模型是准确的，并且添加的驾驶员行为特征将提高模型的性能。最后，生成风险热图以用于可视化目的。当局可以使用动态热图来指定安全走廊，并派遣执法人员和司机进行预警和出行规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合车载与路边数据的动态风险热图模型，用于预测驾驶安全并绘制安全路线。
AI.motivation: 传统道路风险评估依赖历史事故数据，缺乏实时驾驶行为和交通状况信息，导致风险评估不全面。
AI.method: 通过Android应用采集驾驶员面部特征、注意力状态等行为数据，结合路边摄像头实时交通视频分析，利用LightGBM预测冲突指数，并通过模糊逻辑模型整合历史事故数据与预测指标生成路段风险评分。
AI.result: 模型预测结果准确，驾驶员行为特征的加入显著提升性能，生成的动态热图可辅助交通管理部门规划安全路线并预警。
AI.conclusion: 融合驾驶行为与实时交通数据的SRM模型能有效提升道路风险评估精度，为智能交通管理提供新方法。

authors_text: Zhenishbek Zhakypov,Yimeng Qin,Allison Okamura
title: Hoxels: Fully 3-D Printed Soft Multi-Modal & Multi-Contact Haptic Voxel Displays for Enriched Tactile Information Transfer
title_zh: Hoxels：全 3D 打印软多模式和多接触触觉体素显示器，用于丰富的触觉信息传输
comment: The extended abstract paper was presented in the LEVERAGING ADVANCEMENTS IN SMART MATERIALS SCIENCE: SOFT ROBOTS GAINING NEW ABILITIES THROUGH SMART AND FUNCTIONAL MATERIALS workshop at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
comments: The extended abstract paper was presented in the LEVERAGING ADVANCEMENTS IN SMART MATERIALS SCIENCE: SOFT ROBOTS GAINING NEW ABILITIES THROUGH SMART AND FUNCTIONAL MATERIALS workshop at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
abstract: Wrist-worn haptic interfaces can deliver a wide range of tactile cues for communication of information and interaction with virtual objects. Unlike fingertips, the wrist and forearm provide a considerably large area of skin that allows the placement of multiple haptic actuators as a display for enriching tactile information transfer with minimal encumbrance. Existing multi-degree-of-freedom (DoF) wrist-worn devices employ traditional rigid robotic mechanisms and electric motors that limit their versatility, miniaturization, distribution, and assembly. Alternative solutions based on soft elastomeric actuator arrays constitute only 1-DoF haptic pixels. Higher-DoF prototypes produce a single interaction point and require complex manual assembly processes, such as molding and gluing several parts. These approaches limit the construction of high-DoF compact haptic displays, repeatability, and customizability. Here we present a novel, fully 3D-printed, soft, wearable haptic display for increasing tactile information transfer on the wrist and forearm with 3-DoF haptic voxels, called hoxels. Our initial prototype comprises two hoxels that provide skin shear, pressure, twist, stretch, squeeze, and other arbitrary stimuli. Each hoxel generates force up to 1.6 N in the x and y-axes and up to 20 N in the z-axis. Our method enables the rapid fabrication of versatile and forceful haptic displays.
summary: Wrist-worn haptic interfaces can deliver a wide range of tactile cues for communication of information and interaction with virtual objects. Unlike fingertips, the wrist and forearm provide a considerably large area of skin that allows the placement of multiple haptic actuators as a display for enriching tactile information transfer with minimal encumbrance. Existing multi-degree-of-freedom (DoF) wrist-worn devices employ traditional rigid robotic mechanisms and electric motors that limit their versatility, miniaturization, distribution, and assembly. Alternative solutions based on soft elastomeric actuator arrays constitute only 1-DoF haptic pixels. Higher-DoF prototypes produce a single interaction point and require complex manual assembly processes, such as molding and gluing several parts. These approaches limit the construction of high-DoF compact haptic displays, repeatability, and customizability. Here we present a novel, fully 3D-printed, soft, wearable haptic display for increasing tactile information transfer on the wrist and forearm with 3-DoF haptic voxels, called hoxels. Our initial prototype comprises two hoxels that provide skin shear, pressure, twist, stretch, squeeze, and other arbitrary stimuli. Each hoxel generates force up to 1.6 N in the x and y-axes and up to 20 N in the z-axis. Our method enables the rapid fabrication of versatile and forceful haptic displays.
abstract_zh: 腕戴式触觉界面可以提供广泛的触觉提示，用于信息通信和与虚拟对象的交互。与指尖不同，手腕和前臂提供了相当大的皮肤区域，允许放置多个触觉执行器作为显示器，以最小的阻碍丰富触觉信息传输。现有的多自由度 (DoF) 腕戴设备采用传统的刚性机器人机构和电动机，限制了其多功能性、小型化、分发和组装。基于软弹性致动器阵列的替代解决方案仅构成 1-DoF 触觉像素。高自由度原型产生单个交互点，并且需要复杂的手动组装过程，例如成型和粘合多个零件。这些方法限制了高自由度紧凑型触觉显示器的构造、可重复性和可定制性。在这里，我们展示了一种新颖的、完全 3D 打印的、柔软的、可穿戴触觉显示器，用于通过 3-DoF 触觉体素（称为 hoxels）增加手腕和前臂上的触觉信息传输。我们最初的原型包括两个 Hoxel，它们提供皮肤剪切、压力、扭曲、拉伸、挤压和其他任意刺激。每个 Hoxel 在 x 和 y 轴上产生高达 1.6 N 的力，在 z 轴上产生高达 20 N 的力。我们的方法能够快速制造多功能且强大的触觉显示器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Hoxels的全3D打印软体多模态触觉像素显示装置，用于增强手腕和前臂的触觉信息传递。
AI.motivation: 现有手腕可穿戴触觉设备受限于传统刚性机械结构和单一自由度，难以实现高自由度、模块化和可定制的触觉反馈。
AI.method: 采用全3D打印技术制造软体弹性体致动器阵列，设计具有3自由度的模块化触觉像素（Hoxels），通过多模态刺激（剪切、压力、扭转等）实现复杂触觉反馈。
AI.result: 原型装置包含两个Hoxels，可产生最大1.6N（x/y轴）和20N（z轴）的力，支持快速制造和个性化配置。
AI.conclusion: Hoxels为高自由度、可穿戴触觉显示提供了软体机器人新范式，显著提升了触觉信息传递的丰富性和实用性。

search_text: Hoxels: Fully 3-D Printed Soft Multi-Modal & Multi-Contact Haptic Voxel Displays for Enriched Tactile Information Transfer Hoxels：全 3D 打印软多模式和多接触触觉体素显示器，用于丰富的触觉信息传输 Wrist-worn haptic interfaces can deliver a wide range of tactile cues for communication of information and interaction with virtual objects. Unlike fingertips, the wrist and forearm provide a considerably large area of skin that allows the placement of multiple haptic actuators as a display for enriching tactile information transfer with minimal encumbrance. Existing multi-degree-of-freedom (DoF) wrist-worn devices employ traditional rigid robotic mechanisms and electric motors that limit their versatility, miniaturization, distribution, and assembly. Alternative solutions based on soft elastomeric actuator arrays constitute only 1-DoF haptic pixels. Higher-DoF prototypes produce a single interaction point and require complex manual assembly processes, such as molding and gluing several parts. These approaches limit the construction of high-DoF compact haptic displays, repeatability, and customizability. Here we present a novel, fully 3D-printed, soft, wearable haptic display for increasing tactile information transfer on the wrist and forearm with 3-DoF haptic voxels, called hoxels. Our initial prototype comprises two hoxels that provide skin shear, pressure, twist, stretch, squeeze, and other arbitrary stimuli. Each hoxel generates force up to 1.6 N in the x and y-axes and up to 20 N in the z-axis. Our method enables the rapid fabrication of versatile and forceful haptic displays. 腕戴式触觉界面可以提供广泛的触觉提示，用于信息通信和与虚拟对象的交互。与指尖不同，手腕和前臂提供了相当大的皮肤区域，允许放置多个触觉执行器作为显示器，以最小的阻碍丰富触觉信息传输。现有的多自由度 (DoF) 腕戴设备采用传统的刚性机器人机构和电动机，限制了其多功能性、小型化、分发和组装。基于软弹性致动器阵列的替代解决方案仅构成 1-DoF 触觉像素。高自由度原型产生单个交互点，并且需要复杂的手动组装过程，例如成型和粘合多个零件。这些方法限制了高自由度紧凑型触觉显示器的构造、可重复性和可定制性。在这里，我们展示了一种新颖的、完全 3D 打印的、柔软的、可穿戴触觉显示器，用于通过 3-DoF 触觉体素（称为 hoxels）增加手腕和前臂上的触觉信息传输。我们最初的原型包括两个 Hoxel，它们提供皮肤剪切、压力、扭曲、拉伸、挤压和其他任意刺激。每个 Hoxel 在 x 和 y 轴上产生高达 1.6 N 的力，在 z 轴上产生高达 20 N 的力。我们的方法能够快速制造多功能且强大的触觉显示器。 本文提出一种名为Hoxels的全3D打印软体多模态触觉像素显示装置，用于增强手腕和前臂的触觉信息传递。 Zhenishbek Zhakypov,Yimeng Qin,Allison Okamura cs.RO

authors_text: Xinyue Wang,Konrad Paul Kording
title: Learning domain-specific causal discovery from time series
title_zh: 从时间序列中学习特定领域的因果发现
comment: 16 main pages, 7 figures. Accepted by TMLR
comments: 16 main pages, 7 figures. Accepted by TMLR
abstract: Causal discovery (CD) from time-varying data is important in neuroscience, medicine, and machine learning. Techniques for CD encompass randomized experiments, which are generally unbiased but expensive, and algorithms such as Granger causality, conditional-independence-based, structural-equation-based, and score-based methods that are only accurate under strong assumptions made by human designers. However, as demonstrated in other areas of machine learning, human expertise is often not entirely accurate and tends to be outperformed in domains with abundant data. In this study, we examine whether we can enhance domain-specific causal discovery for time series using a data-driven approach. Our findings indicate that this procedure significantly outperforms human-designed, domain-agnostic causal discovery methods, such as Mutual Information, VAR-LiNGAM, and Granger Causality on the MOS 6502 microprocessor, the NetSim fMRI dataset, and the Dream3 gene dataset. We argue that, when feasible, the causality field should consider a supervised approach in which domain-specific CD procedures are learned from extensive datasets with known causal relationships, rather than being designed by human specialists. Our findings promise a new approach toward improving CD in neural and medical data and for the broader machine learning community.
summary: Causal discovery (CD) from time-varying data is important in neuroscience, medicine, and machine learning. Techniques for CD encompass randomized experiments, which are generally unbiased but expensive, and algorithms such as Granger causality, conditional-independence-based, structural-equation-based, and score-based methods that are only accurate under strong assumptions made by human designers. However, as demonstrated in other areas of machine learning, human expertise is often not entirely accurate and tends to be outperformed in domains with abundant data. In this study, we examine whether we can enhance domain-specific causal discovery for time series using a data-driven approach. Our findings indicate that this procedure significantly outperforms human-designed, domain-agnostic causal discovery methods, such as Mutual Information, VAR-LiNGAM, and Granger Causality on the MOS 6502 microprocessor, the NetSim fMRI dataset, and the Dream3 gene dataset. We argue that, when feasible, the causality field should consider a supervised approach in which domain-specific CD procedures are learned from extensive datasets with known causal relationships, rather than being designed by human specialists. Our findings promise a new approach toward improving CD in neural and medical data and for the broader machine learning community.
abstract_zh: 从时变数据中发现因果关系 (CD) 在神经科学、医学和机器学习中非常重要。 CD 技术包括随机实验（通常是无偏但昂贵的）以及格兰杰因果关系、基于条件独立、基于结构方程和基于评分的方法等算法，这些方法只有在人类设计者做出的强有力的假设下才准确。然而，正如机器学习其他领域所证明的那样，人类的专业知识通常并不完全准确，并且在数据丰富的领域往往表现不佳。在这项研究中，我们研究是否可以使用数据驱动的方法增强时间序列的特定领域因果发现。我们的研究结果表明，该过程明显优于人工设计的、与领域无关的因果发现方法，例如 MOS 6502 微处理器上的互信息、VAR-LiNGAM 和格兰杰因果关系、NetSim fMRI 数据集和 Dream3 基因数据集。我们认为，在可行的情况下，因果关系领域应该考虑一种监督方法，其中特定领域的 CD 程序是从具有已知因果关系的广泛数据集中学习的，而不是由人类专家设计。我们的研究结果有望为改善神经和医学数据以及更广泛的机器学习社区的 CD 提供一种新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的方法，用于改进时间序列的领域特定因果发现。
AI.motivation: 传统因果发现方法依赖人工设计的强假设，可能在数据丰富的领域中不够准确，而数据驱动方法有望超越人类专家设计的通用方法。
AI.method: 采用监督学习方法，从包含已知因果关系的大量数据集中学习领域特定的因果发现过程。
AI.result: 在MOS 6502、NetSim fMRI和Dream3基因数据集上，该方法显著优于Mutual Information、VAR-LiNGAM和Granger Causality等传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 建议因果发现领域优先使用监督学习方法，从已知因果关系的数据中学习领域特定模型，以提升神经科学和医学数据的分析效果。

authors_text: J. Fernandes,J. Sá Silva,A. Rodrigues,S. Sinche,F. Boavida
title: Automatically Assessing Students Performance with Smartphone Data
title_zh: 使用智能手机数据自动评估学生的表现
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. 16 pages, 4 figures, 15 tables, 13 main pages and 3 appendix pages
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. 16 pages, 4 figures, 15 tables, 13 main pages and 3 appendix pages
abstract: As the number of smart devices that surround us increases, so do the opportunities to create smart socially-aware systems. In this context, mobile devices can be used to collect data about students and to better understand how their day-to-day routines can influence their academic performance. Moreover, the Covid-19 pandemic led to new challenges and difficulties, also for students, with considerable impact on their lifestyle. In this paper we present a dataset collected using a smartphone application (ISABELA), which include passive data (e.g., activity and location) as well as self-reported data from questionnaires. We present several tests with different machine learning models, in order to classify students' performance. These tests were carried out using different time windows, showing that weekly time windows lead to better prediction and classification results than monthly time windows. Furthermore, it is shown that the created models can predict student performance even with data collected from different contexts, namely before and during the Covid-19 pandemic. SVMs, XGBoost and AdaBoost-SAMME with Random Forest were found to be the best algorithms, showing an accuracy greater than 78%. Additionally, we propose a pipeline that uses a decision level median voting algorithm to further improve the models' performance, by using historic data from the students to further improve the prediction. Using this pipeline, it is possible to further increase the performance of the models, with some of them obtaining an accuracy greater than 90%.
summary: As the number of smart devices that surround us increases, so do the opportunities to create smart socially-aware systems. In this context, mobile devices can be used to collect data about students and to better understand how their day-to-day routines can influence their academic performance. Moreover, the Covid-19 pandemic led to new challenges and difficulties, also for students, with considerable impact on their lifestyle. In this paper we present a dataset collected using a smartphone application (ISABELA), which include passive data (e.g., activity and location) as well as self-reported data from questionnaires. We present several tests with different machine learning models, in order to classify students' performance. These tests were carried out using different time windows, showing that weekly time windows lead to better prediction and classification results than monthly time windows. Furthermore, it is shown that the created models can predict student performance even with data collected from different contexts, namely before and during the Covid-19 pandemic. SVMs, XGBoost and AdaBoost-SAMME with Random Forest were found to be the best algorithms, showing an accuracy greater than 78%. Additionally, we propose a pipeline that uses a decision level median voting algorithm to further improve the models' performance, by using historic data from the students to further improve the prediction. Using this pipeline, it is possible to further increase the performance of the models, with some of them obtaining an accuracy greater than 90%.
abstract_zh: 随着我们周围智能设备数量的增加，创建智能社交感知系统的机会也在增加。在这种情况下，移动设备可用于收集有关学生的数据，并更好地了解他们的日常生活如何影响他们的学业成绩。此外，Covid-19大流行给学生带来了新的挑战和困难，对他们的生活方式产生了相当大的影响。在本文中，我们提出了使用智能手机应用程序（ISABELA）收集的数据集，其中包括被动数据（例如活动和位置）以及问卷中的自我报告数据。我们使用不同的机器学习模型进行了多项测试，以便对学生的表现进行分类。这些测试是使用不同的时间窗口进行的，表明每周时间窗口比每月时间窗口带来更好的预测和分类结果。此外，研究表明，即使使用从不同背景（即 Covid-19 大流行之前和期间）收集的数据，所创建的模型也可以预测学生的表现。 SVM、XGBoost 和带有随机森林的 AdaBoost-SAMME 被发现是最好的算法，准确率超过 78%。此外，我们提出了一种使用决策级中值投票算法的管道，通过使用学生的历史数据来进一步改进预测，从而进一步提高模型的性能。使用这个管道，可以进一步提高模型的性能，其中一些模型的准确率超过 90%。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过智能手机数据自动评估学生学业表现，利用机器学习模型分析学生日常行为与学术成绩的关系。
AI.motivation: 随着智能设备普及及新冠疫情对学习方式的影响，需探索通过学生日常行为数据预测学业表现的新方法。
AI.method: 开发ISABELA应用收集学生被动数据（活动、位置）与自报数据，采用SVM、XGBoost等算法构建模型，并提出基于历史数据的决策级中位数投票管道优化预测。
AI.result: 周级时间窗口优于月级，模型准确率超78%，部分模型经管道优化后达90%以上，且能跨疫情前后不同场景预测。
AI.conclusion: 智能手机数据结合机器学习可有效评估学生表现，提出的优化管道显著提升模型鲁棒性与预测精度。

Additionally, we propose a pipeline that uses a decision level median voting algorithm to further improve the models' performance, by using historic data from the students to further improve the prediction. Fernandes,J. Sá Silva,A. Rodrigues,S. Sinche,F. Boavida cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Zixiang Zhou,Xiangchen Zhao,Yu Wang,Panqu Wang,Hassan Foroosh
title: CenterFormer: Center-based Transformer for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: CenterFormer：用于 3D 对象检测的基于中心的 Transformer
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022 (oral)
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022 (oral)
abstract: Query-based transformer has shown great potential in constructing long-range attention in many image-domain tasks, but has rarely been considered in LiDAR-based 3D object detection due to the overwhelming size of the point cloud data. In this paper, we propose CenterFormer, a center-based transformer network for 3D object detection. CenterFormer first uses a center heatmap to select center candidates on top of a standard voxel-based point cloud encoder. It then uses the feature of the center candidate as the query embedding in the transformer. To further aggregate features from multiple frames, we design an approach to fuse features through cross-attention. Lastly, regression heads are added to predict the bounding box on the output center feature representation. Our design reduces the convergence difficulty and computational complexity of the transformer structure. The results show significant improvements over the strong baseline of anchor-free object detection networks. CenterFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance for a single model on the Waymo Open Dataset, with 73.7% mAPH on the validation set and 75.6% mAPH on the test set, significantly outperforming all previously published CNN and transformer-based methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/TuSimple/centerformer
summary: Query-based transformer has shown great potential in constructing long-range attention in many image-domain tasks, but has rarely been considered in LiDAR-based 3D object detection due to the overwhelming size of the point cloud data. In this paper, we propose CenterFormer, a center-based transformer network for 3D object detection. CenterFormer first uses a center heatmap to select center candidates on top of a standard voxel-based point cloud encoder. It then uses the feature of the center candidate as the query embedding in the transformer. To further aggregate features from multiple frames, we design an approach to fuse features through cross-attention. Lastly, regression heads are added to predict the bounding box on the output center feature representation. Our design reduces the convergence difficulty and computational complexity of the transformer structure. The results show significant improvements over the strong baseline of anchor-free object detection networks. CenterFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance for a single model on the Waymo Open Dataset, with 73.7% mAPH on the validation set and 75.6% mAPH on the test set, significantly outperforming all previously published CNN and transformer-based methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/TuSimple/centerformer
abstract_zh: 基于查询的 Transformer 在许多图像域任务中构建远程注意力方面表现出了巨大的潜力，但由于点云数据的巨大规模，在基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测中很少被考虑。在本文中，我们提出了 CenterFormer，一种用于 3D 对象检测的基于中心的 Transformer 网络。 CenterFormer 首先使用中心热图在标准的基于体素的点云编码器上选择中心候选。然后，它使用中心候选的特征作为变压器中的查询嵌入。为了进一步聚合多个帧的特征，我们设计了一种通过交叉注意力融合特征的方法。最后，添加回归头来预测输出中心特征表示上的边界框。我们的设计降低了变压器结构的收敛难度和计算复杂度。结果表明，与无锚对象检测网络的强大基线相比，有显着改进。 CenterFormer 在 Waymo 开放数据集上的单个模型实现了最先进的性能，验证集上的 mAPH 为 73.7%，测试集上的 mAPH 为 75.6%，显着优于之前发布的所有 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/TuSimple/centerformer 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出CenterFormer，一种基于中心点的Transformer网络，用于改进LiDAR点云数据的3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 基于查询的Transformer在图像任务中表现优异，但因点云数据量庞大，尚未广泛应用于LiDAR-based 3D目标检测。
AI.method: 通过中心热图筛选候选中心点，将其特征作为Transformer的查询嵌入，并设计跨帧特征融合方法，最后通过回归头预测边界框。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset上达到73.7%（验证集）和75.6%（测试集）的mAPH，超越所有现有CNN和Transformer方法。
AI.conclusion: CenterFormer通过简化Transformer结构和优化特征融合，显著提升了3D目标检测性能，成为当前最优单模型方案。

authors_text: Karine Tung,Steven De La Torre,Mohamed El Mistiri,Rebecca Braga De Braganca,Eric Hekler,Misha Pavel,Daniel Rivera,Pedja Klasnja,Donna Spruijt-Metz,Benjamin M. Marlin
title: BayesLDM: A Domain-Specific Language for Probabilistic Modeling of Longitudinal Data
title_zh: BayesLDM：用于纵向数据概率建模的特定领域语言
comment: Accepted at IEEE/ACM international conference on Connected Health: Applications, Systems and Engineering Technologies (CHASE) 2022
comments: Accepted at IEEE/ACM international conference on Connected Health: Applications, Systems and Engineering Technologies (CHASE) 2022
abstract: In this paper we present BayesLDM, a system for Bayesian longitudinal data modeling consisting of a high-level modeling language with specific features for modeling complex multivariate time series data coupled with a compiler that can produce optimized probabilistic program code for performing inference in the specified model. BayesLDM supports modeling of Bayesian network models with a specific focus on the efficient, declarative specification of dynamic Bayesian Networks (DBNs). The BayesLDM compiler combines a model specification with inspection of available data and outputs code for performing Bayesian inference for unknown model parameters while simultaneously handling missing data. These capabilities have the potential to significantly accelerate iterative modeling workflows in domains that involve the analysis of complex longitudinal data by abstracting away the process of producing computationally efficient probabilistic inference code. We describe the BayesLDM system components, evaluate the efficiency of representation and inference optimizations and provide an illustrative example of the application of the system to analyzing heterogeneous and partially observed mobile health data.
summary: In this paper we present BayesLDM, a system for Bayesian longitudinal data modeling consisting of a high-level modeling language with specific features for modeling complex multivariate time series data coupled with a compiler that can produce optimized probabilistic program code for performing inference in the specified model. BayesLDM supports modeling of Bayesian network models with a specific focus on the efficient, declarative specification of dynamic Bayesian Networks (DBNs). The BayesLDM compiler combines a model specification with inspection of available data and outputs code for performing Bayesian inference for unknown model parameters while simultaneously handling missing data. These capabilities have the potential to significantly accelerate iterative modeling workflows in domains that involve the analysis of complex longitudinal data by abstracting away the process of producing computationally efficient probabilistic inference code. We describe the BayesLDM system components, evaluate the efficiency of representation and inference optimizations and provide an illustrative example of the application of the system to analyzing heterogeneous and partially observed mobile health data.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 BayesLDM，这是一种用于贝叶斯纵向数据建模的系统，由具有用于对复杂多元时间序列数据进行建模的特定功能的高级建模语言以及可以生成用于在指定模型中执行推理的优化概率程序代码的编译器组成。 BayesLDM 支持贝叶斯网络模型的建模，特别关注动态贝叶斯网络 (DBN) 的高效、声明性规范。 BayesLDM 编译器将模型规范与可用数据检查相结合，并输出代码，用于对未知模型参数执行贝叶斯推理，同时处理丢失的数据。这些功能有可能通过抽象生成计算高效的概率推理代码的过程来显着加速涉及复杂纵向数据分析的领域中的迭代建模工作流程。我们描述了 BayesLDM 系统组件，评估了表示和推理优化的效率，并提供了应用该系统来分析异构和部分观察的移动健康数据的说明性示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BayesLDM系统，通过领域特定语言和编译器实现纵向数据的贝叶斯建模与高效推断。
AI.motivation: 现有方法处理复杂纵向数据时面临建模效率低、推断代码编写复杂及缺失数据处理困难等问题，需自动化工具加速分析流程。
AI.method: 设计包含声明式建模语言的BayesLDM系统，结合编译器将模型规范转化为优化的贝叶斯推断代码，支持动态贝叶斯网络与缺失数据处理。
AI.result: 验证了BayesLDM在表示效率与推断优化上的有效性，并通过移动健康数据案例展示了其处理异构与部分观测数据的能力。
AI.conclusion: BayesLDM通过抽象化推断代码生成，显著提升复杂纵向数据建模效率，为相关领域提供实用工具支持。

BayesLDM supports modeling of Bayesian network models with a specific focus on the efficient, declarative specification of dynamic Bayesian Networks (DBNs). The BayesLDM compiler combines a model specification with inspection of available data and outputs code for performing Bayesian inference for unknown model parameters while simultaneously handling missing data. These capabilities have the potential to significantly accelerate iterative modeling workflows in domains that involve the analysis of complex longitudinal data by abstracting away the process of producing computationally efficient probabilistic inference code. We describe the BayesLDM system components, evaluate the efficiency of representation and inference optimizations and provide an illustrative example of the application of the system to analyzing heterogeneous and partially observed mobile health data. 在本文中，我们提出了 BayesLDM，这是一种用于贝叶斯纵向数据建模的系统，由具有用于对复杂多元时间序列数据进行建模的特定功能的高级建模语言以及可以生成用于在指定模型中执行推理的优化概率程序代码的编译器组成。 BayesLDM 支持贝叶斯网络模型的建模，特别关注动态贝叶斯网络 (DBN) 的高效、声明性规范。 BayesLDM 编译器将模型规范与可用数据检查相结合，并输出代码，用于对未知模型参数执行贝叶斯推理，同时处理丢失的数据。这些功能有可能通过抽象生成计算高效的概率推理代码的过程来显着加速涉及复杂纵向数据分析的领域中的迭代建模工作流程。我们描述了 BayesLDM 系统组件，评估了表示和推理优化的效率，并提供了应用该系统来分析异构和部分观察的移动健康数据的说明性示例。 本文提出BayesLDM系统，通过领域特定语言和编译器实现纵向数据的贝叶斯建模与高效推断。 Karine Tung,Steven De La Torre,Mohamed El Mistiri,Rebecca Braga De Braganca,Eric Hekler,Misha Pavel,Daniel Rivera,Pedja Klasnja,Donna Spruijt-Metz,Benjamin M. Marlin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Joshua Ott,Sung-Kyun Kim,Amanda Bouman,Oriana Peltzer,Mamoru Sobue,Harrison Delecki,Mykel J. Kochenderfer,Joel Burdick,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi
title: Risk-aware Meta-level Decision Making for Exploration Under Uncertainty
title_zh: 不确定性下探索的风险意识元级决策
comment: IEEE International Conference on Control, Decision and Information Technologies
comments: IEEE International Conference on Control, Decision and Information Technologies
abstract: Robotic exploration of unknown environments is fundamentally a problem of decision making under uncertainty where the robot must account for uncertainty in sensor measurements, localization, action execution, as well as many other factors. For large-scale exploration applications, autonomous systems must overcome the challenges of sequentially deciding which areas of the environment are valuable to explore while safely evaluating the risks associated with obstacles and hazardous terrain. In this work, we propose a risk-aware meta-level decision making framework to balance the tradeoffs associated with local and global exploration. Meta-level decision making builds upon classical hierarchical coverage planners by switching between local and global policies with the overall objective of selecting the policy that is most likely to maximize reward in a stochastic environment. We use information about the environment history, traversability risk, and kinodynamic constraints to reason about the probability of successful policy execution to switch between local and global policies. We have validated our solution in both simulation and on a variety of large-scale real world hardware tests. Our results show that by balancing local and global exploration we are able to significantly explore large-scale environments more efficiently.
summary: Robotic exploration of unknown environments is fundamentally a problem of decision making under uncertainty where the robot must account for uncertainty in sensor measurements, localization, action execution, as well as many other factors. For large-scale exploration applications, autonomous systems must overcome the challenges of sequentially deciding which areas of the environment are valuable to explore while safely evaluating the risks associated with obstacles and hazardous terrain. In this work, we propose a risk-aware meta-level decision making framework to balance the tradeoffs associated with local and global exploration. Meta-level decision making builds upon classical hierarchical coverage planners by switching between local and global policies with the overall objective of selecting the policy that is most likely to maximize reward in a stochastic environment. We use information about the environment history, traversability risk, and kinodynamic constraints to reason about the probability of successful policy execution to switch between local and global policies. We have validated our solution in both simulation and on a variety of large-scale real world hardware tests. Our results show that by balancing local and global exploration we are able to significantly explore large-scale environments more efficiently.
abstract_zh: 机器人对未知环境的探索从根本上来说是一个不确定性下的决策问题，机器人必须考虑传感器测量、定位、动作执行以及许多其他因素的不确定性。对于大规模勘探应用，自主系统必须克服以下挑战：依次决定哪些环境区域值得探索，同时安全评估与障碍物和危险地形相关的风险。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个具有风险意识的元级决策框架，以平衡与本地和全球探索相关的权衡。元级决策建立在经典的分层覆盖规划器的基础上，通过在本地和全局策略之间切换，总体目标是选择最有可能在随机环境中最大化回报的策略。我们使用有关环境历史、可遍历性风险和运动动力学约束的信息来推断成功执行策略以在本地和全局策略之间切换的概率。我们已经在模拟和各种大规模现实世界硬件测试中验证了我们的解决方案。我们的结果表明，通过平衡本地和全球探索，我们能够更有效地探索大规模环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种风险感知的元决策框架，用于在不确定性环境下平衡局部与全局探索策略，以提高大规模环境探索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模环境探索时，难以有效权衡局部探索与全局规划的策略选择，同时需应对障碍物和危险地形的风险。
AI.method: 基于经典分层覆盖规划器，设计元决策框架动态切换局部与全局策略，结合环境历史、可穿越风险及运动约束评估策略执行成功率。
AI.result: 仿真与多场景实物测试表明，该方法能显著提升大规模未知环境的探索效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过风险感知的元决策机制，有效协调局部与全局探索目标，为复杂环境下的自主机器人探索提供可行方案。

search_text: Risk-aware Meta-level Decision Making for Exploration Under Uncertainty 不确定性下探索的风险意识元级决策 Robotic exploration of unknown environments is fundamentally a problem of decision making under uncertainty where the robot must account for uncertainty in sensor measurements, localization, action execution, as well as many other factors. For large-scale exploration applications, autonomous systems must overcome the challenges of sequentially deciding which areas of the environment are valuable to explore while safely evaluating the risks associated with obstacles and hazardous terrain. In this work, we propose a risk-aware meta-level decision making framework to balance the tradeoffs associated with local and global exploration. Meta-level decision making builds upon classical hierarchical coverage planners by switching between local and global policies with the overall objective of selecting the policy that is most likely to maximize reward in a stochastic environment. We use information about the environment history, traversability risk, and kinodynamic constraints to reason about the probability of successful policy execution to switch between local and global policies. We have validated our solution in both simulation and on a variety of large-scale real world hardware tests. Our results show that by balancing local and global exploration we are able to significantly explore large-scale environments more efficiently. 机器人对未知环境的探索从根本上来说是一个不确定性下的决策问题，机器人必须考虑传感器测量、定位、动作执行以及许多其他因素的不确定性。对于大规模勘探应用，自主系统必须克服以下挑战：依次决定哪些环境区域值得探索，同时安全评估与障碍物和危险地形相关的风险。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个具有风险意识的元级决策框架，以平衡与本地和全球探索相关的权衡。元级决策建立在经典的分层覆盖规划器的基础上，通过在本地和全局策略之间切换，总体目标是选择最有可能在随机环境中最大化回报的策略。我们使用有关环境历史、可遍历性风险和运动动力学约束的信息来推断成功执行策略以在本地和全局策略之间切换的概率。我们已经在模拟和各种大规模现实世界硬件测试中验证了我们的解决方案。我们的结果表明，通过平衡本地和全球探索，我们能够更有效地探索大规模环境。 本文提出一种风险感知的元决策框架，用于在不确定性环境下平衡局部与全局探索策略，以提高大规模环境探索效率。 Joshua Ott,Sung-Kyun Kim,Amanda Bouman,Oriana Peltzer,Mamoru Sobue,Harrison Delecki,Mykel J. authors_text: Mikel K. Ngueajio,Gloria Washington,Danda B. Rawat,Yolande Ngueabou
title: Intrusion Detection Systems Using Support Vector Machines on the KDDCUP'99 and NSL-KDD Datasets: A Comprehensive Survey
title_zh: 在 KDDCUP'99 和 NSL-KDD 数据集上使用支持向量机的入侵检测系统：综合调查
comment: ef:Proceedings of SAI intelligent systems conference, IntelliSys 2022, Intelligent Systems and Applications, pages 609 to 629
comments: ef:Proceedings of SAI intelligent systems conference, IntelliSys 2022, Intelligent Systems and Applications, pages 609 to 629
abstract: With the growing rates of cyber-attacks and cyber espionage, the need for better and more powerful intrusion detection systems (IDS) is even more warranted nowadays. The basic task of an IDS is to act as the first line of defense, in detecting attacks on the internet. As intrusion tactics from intruders become more sophisticated and difficult to detect, researchers have started to apply novel Machine Learning (ML) techniques to effectively detect intruders and hence preserve internet users' information and overall trust in the entire internet network security. Over the last decade, there has been an explosion of research on intrusion detection techniques based on ML and Deep Learning (DL) architectures on various cyber security-based datasets such as the DARPA, KDDCUP'99, NSL-KDD, CAIDA, CTU-13, UNSW-NB15. In this research, we review contemporary literature and provide a comprehensive survey of different types of intrusion detection technique that applies Support Vector Machines (SVMs) algorithms as a classifier. We focus only on studies that have been evaluated on the two most widely used datasets in cybersecurity namely: the KDDCUP'99 and the NSL-KDD datasets. We provide a summary of each method, identifying the role of the SVMs classifier, and all other algorithms involved in the studies. Furthermore, we present a critical review of each method, in tabular form, highlighting the performance measures, strengths, and limitations of each of the methods surveyed.

We focus only on studies that have been evaluated on the two most widely used datasets in cybersecurity namely: the KDDCUP'99 and the NSL-KDD datasets. abstract_zh: 随着网络攻击和网络间谍活动的不断增长，现在更加需要更好、更强大的入侵检测系统 (IDS)。 IDS 的基本任务是充当第一道防线，检测互联网上的攻击。随着入侵者的入侵策略变得更加复杂和难以检测，研究人员开始应用新颖的机器学习（ML）技术来有效检测入侵者，从而保护互联网用户的信息和对整个互联网网络安全的整体信任。在过去的十年中，基于 ML 和深度学习 (DL) 架构的入侵检测技术研究出现了爆炸式增长，这些技术基于各种基于网络安全的数据集，例如 DARPA、KDDCUP'99、NSL-KDD、CAIDA、CTU-13、UNSW-NB15。在这项研究中，我们回顾了当代文献，并对应用支持向量机 (SVM) 算法作为分类器的不同类型的入侵检测技术进行了全面的调查。我们仅关注对网络安全中两个最广泛使用的数据集（KDDCUP'99 和 NSL-KDD 数据集）进行评估的研究。我们提供了每种方法的摘要，确定了支持向量机分类器的作用，以及研究中涉及的所有其他算法。此外，我们以表格形式对每种方法进行了严格审查，强调了每种调查方法的性能指标、优点和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于支持向量机（SVM）在KDDCUP'99和NSL-KDD数据集上的入侵检测系统研究。
AI.motivation: 随着网络攻击日益复杂，传统检测方法难以应对，需借助机器学习技术如SVM提升入侵检测能力以保障网络安全。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，总结使用SVM作为分类器的入侵检测技术，分析其在两个主流数据集上的应用，并以表格形式对比各方法的性能、优势与局限。
AI.result: 系统梳理了SVM在入侵检测中的分类角色及其他算法的使用情况，通过表格呈现不同方法的性能指标、技术特点及存在的不足。
AI.conclusion: SVM在入侵检测中表现稳定，但需结合其他算法优化以应对新型攻击，未来研究可探索更高效的特征选择与模型融合策略。

authors_text: Sanjay Kariyappa,Chuan Guo,Kiwan Maeng,Wenjie Xiong,G. Edward Suh,Moinuddin K Qureshi,Hsien-Hsin S. Lee
title: Cocktail Party Attack: Breaking Aggregation-Based Privacy in Federated Learning using Independent Component Analysis
title_zh: 鸡尾酒会攻击：使用独立成分分析打破联邦学习中基于聚合的隐私
abstract: Federated learning (FL) aims to perform privacy-preserving machine learning on distributed data held by multiple data owners. To this end, FL requires the data owners to perform training locally and share the gradient updates (instead of the private inputs) with the central server, which are then securely aggregated over multiple data owners. Although aggregation by itself does not provably offer privacy protection, prior work showed that it may suffice if the batch size is sufficiently large. In this paper, we propose the Cocktail Party Attack (CPA) that, contrary to prior belief, is able to recover the private inputs from gradients aggregated over a very large batch size. CPA leverages the crucial insight that aggregate gradients from a fully connected layer is a linear combination of its inputs, which leads us to frame gradient inversion as a blind source separation (BSS) problem (informally called the cocktail party problem). We adapt independent component analysis (ICA)--a classic solution to the BSS problem--to recover private inputs for fully-connected and convolutional networks, and show that CPA significantly outperforms prior gradient inversion attacks, scales to ImageNet-sized inputs, and works on large batch sizes of up to 1024.
summary: Federated learning (FL) aims to perform privacy-preserving machine learning on distributed data held by multiple data owners. To this end, FL requires the data owners to perform training locally and share the gradient updates (instead of the private inputs) with the central server, which are then securely aggregated over multiple data owners. Although aggregation by itself does not provably offer privacy protection, prior work showed that it may suffice if the batch size is sufficiently large. In this paper, we propose the Cocktail Party Attack (CPA) that, contrary to prior belief, is able to recover the private inputs from gradients aggregated over a very large batch size. CPA leverages the crucial insight that aggregate gradients from a fully connected layer is a linear combination of its inputs, which leads us to frame gradient inversion as a blind source separation (BSS) problem (informally called the cocktail party problem). We adapt independent component analysis (ICA)--a classic solution to the BSS problem--to recover private inputs for fully-connected and convolutional networks, and show that CPA significantly outperforms prior gradient inversion attacks, scales to ImageNet-sized inputs, and works on large batch sizes of up to 1024.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）旨在对多个数据所有者持有的分布式数据执行保护隐私的机器学习。为此，FL 要求数据所有者在本地执行训练，并与中央服务器共享梯度更新（而不是私有输入），然后将其安全地聚合到多个数据所有者。尽管聚合本身并不能证明可以提供隐私保护，但之前的工作表明，如果批量大小足够大，聚合就足够了。在本文中，我们提出了鸡尾酒会攻击（CPA），与之前的看法相反，它能够从非常大的批量大小上聚合的梯度中恢复私有输入。 CPA 利用了一个重要的见解，即来自全连接层的聚合梯度是其输入的线性组合，这使我们将梯度反演视为盲源分离 (BSS) 问题（非正式地称为鸡尾酒会问题）。我们采用独立分量分析 (ICA)（BSS 问题的经典解决方案）来恢复全连接和卷积网络的私有输入，并表明 CPA 显着优于先前的梯度反转攻击，可扩展到 ImageNet 大小的输入，并且适用于高达 1024 的大批量。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用独立成分分析的鸡尾酒会攻击，从联邦学习中的聚合梯度中恢复私有输入，挑战现有隐私保护机制。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习的聚合机制在大批次下仍存在隐私泄露风险，需新的攻击方法验证其安全性。
AI.method: 将聚合梯度视为线性组合，利用独立成分分析（ICA）进行盲源分离，恢复私有输入数据。
AI.result: CPA在ImageNet规模数据和大批次（1024）下表现优异，显著优于现有梯度反演攻击。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习的聚合隐私保护存在漏洞，需更安全的机制防止此类攻击。
