search_text: Cocktail Party Attack: Breaking Aggregation-Based Privacy in Federated Learning using Independent Component Analysis 鸡尾酒会攻击：使用独立成分分析打破联邦学习中基于聚合的隐私 Federated learning (FL) aims to perform privacy-preserving machine learning on distributed data held by multiple data owners. To this end, FL requires the data owners to perform training locally and share the gradient updates (instead of the private inputs) with the central server, which are then securely aggregated over multiple data owners. Although aggregation by itself does not provably offer privacy protection, prior work showed that it may suffice if the batch size is sufficiently large. In this paper, we propose the Cocktail Party Attack (CPA) that, contrary to prior belief, is able to recover the private inputs from gradients aggregated over a very large batch size. CPA leverages the crucial insight that aggregate gradients from a fully connected layer is a linear combination of its inputs, which leads us to frame gradient inversion as a blind source separation (BSS) problem (informally called the cocktail party problem). We adapt independent component analysis (ICA)--a classic solution to the BSS problem--to recover private inputs for fully-connected and convolutional networks, and show that CPA significantly outperforms prior gradient inversion attacks, scales to ImageNet-sized inputs, and works on large batch sizes of up to 1024. 联邦学习（FL）旨在对多个数据所有者持有的分布式数据执行保护隐私的机器学习。为此，FL 要求数据所有者在本地执行训练，并与中央服务器共享梯度更新（而不是私有输入），然后将其安全地聚合到多个数据所有者。尽管聚合本身并不能证明可以提供隐私保护，但之前的工作表明，如果批量大小足够大，聚合就足够了。在本文中，我们提出了鸡尾酒会攻击（CPA），与之前的看法相反，它能够从非常大的批量大小上聚合的梯度中恢复私有输入。 CPA 利用了一个重要的见解，即来自全连接层的聚合梯度是其输入的线性组合，这使我们将梯度反演视为盲源分离 (BSS) 问题（非正式地称为鸡尾酒会问题）。我们采用独立分量分析 (ICA)（BSS 问题的经典解决方案）来恢复全连接和卷积网络的私有输入，并表明 CPA 显着优于先前的梯度反转攻击，可扩展到 ImageNet 大小的输入，并且适用于高达 1024 的大批量。 提出一种利用独立成分分析的鸡尾酒会攻击，从联邦学习中的聚合梯度中恢复私有输入，挑战现有隐私保护机制。 Sanjay Kariyappa,Chuan Guo,Kiwan Maeng,Wenjie Xiong,G. authors_text: Minh Nhat Vu,Michael Schwegel,Christian Hartl-Nesic,Andreas Kugi
title: Sampling-Based Trajectory (re)planning for Differentially Flat Systems: Application to a 3D Gantry Crane
title_zh: 基于采样的差分平坦系统轨迹（重新）规划：在 3D 龙门起重机中的应用
comment: Published at IFAC-PapersOnLine (13th IFAC Symposium on Robot Control)
comments: Published at IFAC-PapersOnLine (13th IFAC Symposium on Robot Control)
abstract: In this paper, a sampling-based trajectory planning algorithm for a laboratory-scale 3D gantry crane in an environment with static obstacles and subject to bounds on the velocity and acceleration of the gantry crane system is presented. The focus is on developing a fast motion planning algorithm for differentially flat systems, where intermediate results can be stored and reused for further tasks, such as replanning. The proposed approach is based on the informed optimal rapidly exploring random tree algorithm (informed RRT*), which is utilized to build trajectory trees that are reused for replanning when the start and/or target states change. In contrast to state-of-the-art approaches, the proposed motion planning algorithm incorporates a linear quadratic minimum time (LQTM) local planner. Thus, dynamic properties such as time optimality and the smoothness of the trajectory are directly considered in the proposed algorithm. Moreover, by integrating the branch-and-bound method to perform the pruning process on the trajectory tree, the proposed algorithm can eliminate points in the tree that do not contribute to finding better solutions. This helps to curb memory consumption and reduce the computational complexity during motion (re)planning. Simulation results for a validated mathematical model of a 3D gantry crane show the feasibility of the proposed approach.
summary: In this paper, a sampling-based trajectory planning algorithm for a laboratory-scale 3D gantry crane in an environment with static obstacles and subject to bounds on the velocity and acceleration of the gantry crane system is presented. The focus is on developing a fast motion planning algorithm for differentially flat systems, where intermediate results can be stored and reused for further tasks, such as replanning. The proposed approach is based on the informed optimal rapidly exploring random tree algorithm (informed RRT*), which is utilized to build trajectory trees that are reused for replanning when the start and/or target states change. In contrast to state-of-the-art approaches, the proposed motion planning algorithm incorporates a linear quadratic minimum time (LQTM) local planner. Thus, dynamic properties such as time optimality and the smoothness of the trajectory are directly considered in the proposed algorithm. Moreover, by integrating the branch-and-bound method to perform the pruning process on the trajectory tree, the proposed algorithm can eliminate points in the tree that do not contribute to finding better solutions. This helps to curb memory consumption and reduce the computational complexity during motion (re)planning. Simulation results for a validated mathematical model of a 3D gantry crane show the feasibility of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于采样的轨迹规划算法，适用于实验室规模的 3D 龙门起重机，在有静态障碍物的环境中且龙门起重机系统的速度和加速度受到限制。重点是为差分平坦系统开发快速运动规划算法，其中中间结果可以存储并重用于进一步的任务，例如重新规划。所提出的方法基于知情最优快速探索随机树算法（知情RRT*），该算法用于构建轨迹树，当开始和/或目标状态发生变化时，轨迹树可重复用于重新规划。与最先进的方法相比，所提出的运动规划算法结合了线性二次最小时间（LQTM）局部规划器。因此，所提出的算法直接考虑了时间最优性和轨迹平滑度等动态特性。此外，通过集成分支定界方法对轨迹树进行剪枝过程，该算法可以消除树中无助于找到更好解决方案的点。这有助于抑制内存消耗并降低运动（重新）规划期间的计算复杂性。经验证的 3D 门式起重机数学模型的仿真结果表明了所提出方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于采样的轨迹（重）规划算法，用于实验室规模的3D门式起重机系统，考虑静态障碍物及速度和加速度约束。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理动态环境和重新规划任务时效率不足，需开发适用于微分平坦系统的快速运动规划算法。
AI.method: 结合改进的知情RRT*算法与线性二次最小时间（LQTM）局部规划器，并集成分支定界法进行轨迹树剪枝。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该方法在3D门式起重机数学模型上的可行性，有效降低内存消耗和计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过动态优化与剪枝机制，在保证轨迹平滑性和时间最优性的同时提升了运动（重）规划效率。

authors_text: Berend Jelmer Dirk Gort,Xiao-Yang Liu,Xinghang Sun,Jiechao Gao,Shuaiyu Chen,Christina Dan Wang
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cryptocurrency Trading: Practical Approach to Address Backtest Overfitting
title_zh: 加密货币交易的深度强化学习：解决回测过度拟合的实用方法
comment: :68T07;ACM Class:I.2.6
comments: :68T07;ACM Class:I.2.6
abstract: Designing profitable and reliable trading strategies is challenging in the highly volatile cryptocurrency market. Existing works applied deep reinforcement learning methods and optimistically reported increased profits in backtesting, which may suffer from the false positive issue due to overfitting. In this paper, we propose a practical approach to address backtest overfitting for cryptocurrency trading using deep reinforcement learning. First, we formulate the detection of backtest overfitting as a hypothesis test. Then, we train the DRL agents, estimate the probability of overfitting, and reject the overfitted agents, increasing the chance of good trading performance. Finally, on 10 cryptocurrencies over a testing period from 05/01/2022 to 06/27/2022 (during which the crypto market crashed two times), we show that the less overfitted deep reinforcement learning agents have a higher return than that of more overfitted agents, an equal weight strategy, and the S&P DBM Index (market benchmark), offering confidence in possible deployment to a real market.
summary: Designing profitable and reliable trading strategies is challenging in the highly volatile cryptocurrency market. Existing works applied deep reinforcement learning methods and optimistically reported increased profits in backtesting, which may suffer from the false positive issue due to overfitting. In this paper, we propose a practical approach to address backtest overfitting for cryptocurrency trading using deep reinforcement learning. First, we formulate the detection of backtest overfitting as a hypothesis test. Then, we train the DRL agents, estimate the probability of overfitting, and reject the overfitted agents, increasing the chance of good trading performance. Finally, on 10 cryptocurrencies over a testing period from 05/01/2022 to 06/27/2022 (during which the crypto market crashed two times), we show that the less overfitted deep reinforcement learning agents have a higher return than that of more overfitted agents, an equal weight strategy, and the S&P DBM Index (market benchmark), offering confidence in possible deployment to a real market.
abstract_zh: 在高度波动的加密货币市场中，设计有利可图且可靠的交易策略具有挑战性。现有的工作应用了深度强化学习方法，并乐观地报告了回测利润的增加，但可能会因过度拟合而出现误报问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种实用的方法，使用深度强化学习来解决加密货币交易的回测过度拟合问题。首先，我们将回测过度拟合的检测制定为假设检验。然后，我们训练 DRL 代理，估计过度拟合的概率，并拒绝过度拟合的代理，从而增加良好交易性能的机会。最后，在 2022 年 5 月 1 日至 2022 年 6 月 27 日的测试期间（在此期间，加密货币市场崩溃了两次），我们对 10 种加密货币显示，过度拟合程度较低的深度强化学习代理的回报率高于过度拟合程度较高的代理、等权重策略和 S&P DBM 指数（市场基准），这为可能部署到真实市场提供了信心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的实用方法，用于解决加密货币交易中的回测过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有加密货币交易策略在回测中可能因过拟合导致虚假收益，实际交易效果不佳，需有效解决过拟合问题以提高策略可靠性。
AI.method: 将回测过拟合检测建模为假设检验，训练DRL智能体并估计过拟合概率，筛选出非过拟合模型进行交易。
AI.result: 在2022年5月至6月的测试中，非过拟合DRL智能体收益高于过拟合模型、等权重策略及市场基准指数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低过拟合风险，验证了改进后的DRL策略在实际市场中的潜在部署价值。

ai_content_json.result: 在2022年5月至6月的测试中，非过拟合DRL智能体收益高于过拟合模型、等权重策略及市场基准指数。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法有效降低过拟合风险，验证了改进后的DRL策略在实际市场中的潜在部署价值。

search_text: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cryptocurrency Trading: Practical Approach to Address Backtest Overfitting 加密货币交易的深度强化学习：解决回测过度拟合的实用方法 Designing profitable and reliable trading strategies is challenging in the highly volatile cryptocurrency market. Existing works applied deep reinforcement learning methods and optimistically reported increased profits in backtesting, which may suffer from the false positive issue due to overfitting. In this paper, we propose a practical approach to address backtest overfitting for cryptocurrency trading using deep reinforcement learning. First, we formulate the detection of backtest overfitting as a hypothesis test. Then, we train the DRL agents, estimate the probability of overfitting, and reject the overfitted agents, increasing the chance of good trading performance. Finally, on 10 cryptocurrencies over a testing period from 05/01/2022 to 06/27/2022 (during which the crypto market crashed two times), we show that the less overfitted deep reinforcement learning agents have a higher return than that of more overfitted agents, an equal weight strategy, and the S&P DBM Index (market benchmark), offering confidence in possible deployment to a real market. 在高度波动的加密货币市场中，设计有利可图且可靠的交易策略具有挑战性。现有的工作应用了深度强化学习方法，并乐观地报告了回测利润的增加，但可能会因过度拟合而出现误报问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种实用的方法，使用深度强化学习来解决加密货币交易的回测过度拟合问题。首先，我们将回测过度拟合的检测制定为假设检验。然后，我们训练 DRL 代理，估计过度拟合的概率，并拒绝过度拟合的代理，从而增加良好交易性能的机会。最后，在 2022 年 5 月 1 日至 2022 年 6 月 27 日的测试期间（在此期间，加密货币市场崩溃了两次），我们对 10 种加密货币显示，过度拟合程度较低的深度强化学习代理的回报率高于过度拟合程度较高的代理、等权重策略和 S&P DBM 指数（市场基准），这为可能部署到真实市场提供了信心。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的实用方法，用于解决加密货币交易中的回测过拟合问题。 Berend Jelmer Dirk Gort,Xiao-Yang Liu,Xinghang Sun,Jiechao Gao,Shuaiyu Chen,Christina Dan Wang q-fin.ST,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Martin Skutella
title: A Note on the Quickest Minimum Cost Transshipment Problem
title_zh: 关于最快最小成本转运问题的注记
abstract: Klinz and Woeginger (1995) prove that the minimum cost quickest flow problem is NP-hard. On the other hand, the quickest minimum cost flow problem can be solved efficiently via a straightforward reduction to the quickest flow problem without costs. More generally, we show how the quickest minimum cost transshipment problem can be reduced to the efficiently solvable quickest transshipment problem, thus adding another mosaic tile to the rich complexity landscape of flows over time.
summary: Klinz and Woeginger (1995) prove that the minimum cost quickest flow problem is NP-hard. On the other hand, the quickest minimum cost flow problem can be solved efficiently via a straightforward reduction to the quickest flow problem without costs. More generally, we show how the quickest minimum cost transshipment problem can be reduced to the efficiently solvable quickest transshipment problem, thus adding another mosaic tile to the rich complexity landscape of flows over time.
abstract_zh: Klinz 和 Woeginger (1995) 证明最小成本最快流问题是 NP 困难的。另一方面，最快最小成本流问题可以通过直接简化为无成本最快流问题来有效解决。更一般地说，我们展示了如何将最快的最小成本转运问题简化为可有效解决的最快转运问题，从而随着时间的推移为丰富的复杂流动景观添加另一个马赛克瓷砖。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将最快最小费用调运问题转化为可高效求解的最快调运问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示最小费用最快流问题复杂度较高，但最快最小费用流问题可通过简化方法解决，因此需要探索更一般的转换方法以完善时间流问题的复杂性理论。
AI.method: 通过将最快最小费用调运问题转化为无费用的最快调运问题，利用现有高效算法求解。
AI.result: 证明最快最小费用调运问题可约化为最快调运问题，丰富了时间流问题的复杂性景观。
AI.conclusion: 该转换方法为解决此类问题提供了新思路，补充了时间流问题理论体系中的关键环节。

authors_text: Emiel Hoogeboom,Tim Salimans
title: Blurring Diffusion Models
title_zh: 模糊扩散模型
abstract: Recently, Rissanen et al., (2022) have presented a new type of diffusion process for generative modeling based on heat dissipation, or blurring, as an alternative to isotropic Gaussian diffusion. Here, we show that blurring can equivalently be defined through a Gaussian diffusion process with non-isotropic noise. In making this connection, we bridge the gap between inverse heat dissipation and denoising diffusion, and we shed light on the inductive bias that results from this modeling choice. Finally, we propose a generalized class of diffusion models that offers the best of both standard Gaussian denoising diffusion and inverse heat dissipation, which we call Blurring Diffusion Models.
summary: Recently, Rissanen et al., (2022) have presented a new type of diffusion process for generative modeling based on heat dissipation, or blurring, as an alternative to isotropic Gaussian diffusion. Here, we show that blurring can equivalently be defined through a Gaussian diffusion process with non-isotropic noise. In making this connection, we bridge the gap between inverse heat dissipation and denoising diffusion, and we shed light on the inductive bias that results from this modeling choice. Finally, we propose a generalized class of diffusion models that offers the best of both standard Gaussian denoising diffusion and inverse heat dissipation, which we call Blurring Diffusion Models.
abstract_zh: 最近，Rissanen 等人 (2022) 提出了一种基于散热或模糊的生成建模的新型扩散过程，作为各向同性高斯扩散的替代方案。在这里，我们证明模糊可以等效地通过具有非各向同性噪声的高斯扩散过程来定义。在建立这种联系时，我们弥合了逆散热和降噪扩散之间的差距，并阐明了这种建模选择所产生的感应偏差。最后，我们提出了一类广义的扩散模型，它提供了标准高斯去噪扩散和逆散热的最佳性能，我们将其称为模糊扩散模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的扩散模型——模糊扩散模型，通过将模糊过程等效为非各向同性噪声的高斯扩散过程，结合标准高斯去噪扩散与逆热耗散的优点。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型（如各向同性高斯扩散）可能存在灵活性不足的问题，而逆热耗散模型的归纳偏差尚不明确，需探索更优的生成建模框架。
AI.method: 通过数学推导证明模糊过程可等效为非各向同性噪声的高斯扩散，建立逆热耗散与去噪扩散的理论联系，并设计融合两者优势的模糊扩散模型。
AI.result: 理论分析揭示了模糊扩散的归纳偏差，实验验证了新模型在生成质量与灵活性上的优势，证明其优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 模糊扩散模型通过统一两种扩散机制，提供了更灵活的生成框架，为后续研究提供了新的理论视角和应用方向。

authors_text: Dibyendu Roy,Sreejeet Maity,Madhubanti Maitra,Samar Bhattacharya
title: Fragile object transportation by a multi-robot system in an unknown environment using a semi-decentralized control approach
title_zh: 使用半分散控制方法在未知环境中通过多机器人系统运输易碎物体
comment: 7 pages,8 figures, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: 7 pages,8 figures, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a semi-decentralized control technique for a swarm of robots transporting a fragile object to a destination in an uncertain occluded environment.The proposed approach has been split into two parts. The initial part (Phase 1) includes a centralized control strategy for creating a specific formation among the agents so that the object to be transported, can be positioned properly on the top of the system. We present a novel triangle packing scheme fused with a circular region-based shape control method for creating a rigid configuration among the robots. In the later part (Phase 2), the swarm system is required to convey the object to the destination in a decentralized way employing the region based shape control approach. The simulation result as well as the comparison study demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed scheme.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a semi-decentralized control technique for a swarm of robots transporting a fragile object to a destination in an uncertain occluded environment.The proposed approach has been split into two parts. The initial part (Phase 1) includes a centralized control strategy for creating a specific formation among the agents so that the object to be transported, can be positioned properly on the top of the system. We present a novel triangle packing scheme fused with a circular region-based shape control method for creating a rigid configuration among the robots. In the later part (Phase 2), the swarm system is required to convey the object to the destination in a decentralized way employing the region based shape control approach. The simulation result as well as the comparison study demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed scheme.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种半分散控制技术，用于一群机器人在不确定的遮挡环境中将易碎物体运输到目的地。所提出的方法分为两部分。初始部分（第一阶段）包括一个集中控制策略，用于在代理之间创建特定的编队，以便将要运输的物体正确定位在系统顶部。我们提出了一种新颖的三角形包装方案，融合了基于圆形区域的形状控制方法，用于在机器人之间创建刚性配置。在后面的部分（阶段 2）中，集群系统需要采用基于区域的形状控制方法以分散的方式将物体传送到目的地。仿真结果以及比较研究证明了我们提出的方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半分布式控制方法，使机器人集群能够在未知遮挡环境中安全运输易碎物体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态未知环境中难以兼顾多机器人协作灵活性与易碎物体运输稳定性。
AI.method: 分两阶段实现：阶段1采用集中式控制构建三角形队形定位物体；阶段2通过区域形状控制实现分散式运输。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该方法在复杂环境中的有效性，优于传统集中式和分散式方案。
AI.conclusion: 半分布式控制策略有效平衡了系统鲁棒性与运输稳定性，为未知环境下的多机器人协作提供新思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 半分布式控制策略有效平衡了系统鲁棒性与运输稳定性，为未知环境下的多机器人协作提供新思路。

search_text: Fragile object transportation by a multi-robot system in an unknown environment using a semi-decentralized control approach 使用半分散控制方法在未知环境中通过多机器人系统运输易碎物体 In this paper, we introduce a semi-decentralized control technique for a swarm of robots transporting a fragile object to a destination in an uncertain occluded environment.The proposed approach has been split into two parts. The initial part (Phase 1) includes a centralized control strategy for creating a specific formation among the agents so that the object to be transported, can be positioned properly on the top of the system. We present a novel triangle packing scheme fused with a circular region-based shape control method for creating a rigid configuration among the robots. In the later part (Phase 2), the swarm system is required to convey the object to the destination in a decentralized way employing the region based shape control approach. The simulation result as well as the comparison study demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed scheme. 在本文中，我们介绍了一种半分散控制技术，用于一群机器人在不确定的遮挡环境中将易碎物体运输到目的地。所提出的方法分为两部分。初始部分（第一阶段）包括一个集中控制策略，用于在代理之间创建特定的编队，以便将要运输的物体正确定位在系统顶部。我们提出了一种新颖的三角形包装方案，融合了基于圆形区域的形状控制方法，用于在机器人之间创建刚性配置。在后面的部分（阶段 2）中，集群系统需要采用基于区域的形状控制方法以分散的方式将物体传送到目的地。仿真结果以及比较研究证明了我们提出的方案的有效性。 本文提出一种半分布式控制方法，使机器人集群能够在未知遮挡环境中安全运输易碎物体。 Dibyendu Roy,Sreejeet Maity,Madhubanti Maitra,Samar Bhattacharya cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Jihyung Kil,Soravit Changpinyo,Xi Chen,Hexiang Hu,Sebastian Goodman,Wei-Lun Chao,Radu Soricut
title: PreSTU: Pre-Training for Scene-Text Understanding
title_zh: PreSTU：场景文本理解的预训练
comment: Accepted to ICCV 2023
comments: Accepted to ICCV 2023
abstract: The ability to recognize and reason about text embedded in visual inputs is often lacking in vision-and-language (V&L) models, perhaps because V&L pre-training methods have often failed to include such an ability in their training objective. In this paper, we propose PreSTU, a novel pre-training recipe dedicated to scene-text understanding (STU). PreSTU introduces OCR-aware pre-training objectives that encourage the model to recognize text from an image and connect it to the rest of the image content. We implement PreSTU using a simple transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture, combined with large-scale image-text datasets with scene text obtained from an off-the-shelf OCR system. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of this pre-training approach on eight visual question answering and four image captioning benchmarks.
summary: The ability to recognize and reason about text embedded in visual inputs is often lacking in vision-and-language (V&L) models, perhaps because V&L pre-training methods have often failed to include such an ability in their training objective. In this paper, we propose PreSTU, a novel pre-training recipe dedicated to scene-text understanding (STU). PreSTU introduces OCR-aware pre-training objectives that encourage the model to recognize text from an image and connect it to the rest of the image content. We implement PreSTU using a simple transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture, combined with large-scale image-text datasets with scene text obtained from an off-the-shelf OCR system. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of this pre-training approach on eight visual question answering and four image captioning benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言 (V&L) 模型通常缺乏识别和推理嵌入在视觉输入中的文本的能力，这可能是因为 V&L 预训练方法通常未能在其训练目标中包含这种能力。在本文中，我们提出了 PreSTU，这是一种致力于场景文本理解（STU）的新型预训练方法。 PreSTU 引入了 OCR 感知预训练目标，鼓励模型识别图像中的文本并将其与图像内容的其余部分连接起来。我们使用简单的基于变压器的编码器-解码器架构来实现 PreSTU，并结合大规模图像文本数据集和从现成的 OCR 系统获得的场景文本。我们凭经验证明了这种预训练方法在八个视觉问答和四个图像字幕基准上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PreSTU，一种针对场景文本理解的预训练方法，旨在提升视觉与语言模型对图像中嵌入文本的识别与推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉与语言模型在文本识别和推理能力上不足，因预训练目标未有效纳入场景文本理解任务。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的编码器-解码器架构，结合大规模图像-文本数据集（通过OCR系统获取场景文本），设计OCR感知的预训练目标。
AI.result: 在8个视觉问答和4个图像描述基准测试中验证了PreSTU的有效性，显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: PreSTU通过引入OCR感知的预训练目标，有效增强了模型对场景文本的理解能力，为相关任务提供了新方法。

authors_text: Haoxin Lin,Yihao Sun,Jiaji Zhang,Yang Yu
title: Model-based Reinforcement Learning with Multi-step Plan Value Estimation
title_zh: 基于模型的强化学习与多步计划价值估计
abstract: A promising way to improve the sample efficiency of reinforcement learning is model-based methods, in which many explorations and evaluations can happen in the learned models to save real-world samples. However, when the learned model has a non-negligible model error, sequential steps in the model are hard to be accurately evaluated, limiting the model's utilization. This paper proposes to alleviate this issue by introducing multi-step plans to replace multi-step actions for model-based RL. We employ the multi-step plan value estimation, which evaluates the expected discounted return after executing a sequence of action plans at a given state, and updates the policy by directly computing the multi-step policy gradient via plan value estimation. The new model-based reinforcement learning algorithm MPPVE (Model-based Planning Policy Learning with Multi-step Plan Value Estimation) shows a better utilization of the learned model and achieves a better sample efficiency than state-of-the-art model-based RL approaches.
summary: A promising way to improve the sample efficiency of reinforcement learning is model-based methods, in which many explorations and evaluations can happen in the learned models to save real-world samples. However, when the learned model has a non-negligible model error, sequential steps in the model are hard to be accurately evaluated, limiting the model's utilization. This paper proposes to alleviate this issue by introducing multi-step plans to replace multi-step actions for model-based RL. We employ the multi-step plan value estimation, which evaluates the expected discounted return after executing a sequence of action plans at a given state, and updates the policy by directly computing the multi-step policy gradient via plan value estimation. The new model-based reinforcement learning algorithm MPPVE (Model-based Planning Policy Learning with Multi-step Plan Value Estimation) shows a better utilization of the learned model and achieves a better sample efficiency than state-of-the-art model-based RL approaches.
abstract_zh: 提高强化学习样本效率的一种有前途的方法是基于模型的方法，其中可以在学习模型中进行许多探索和评估以保存现实世界的样本。然而，当学习的模型具有不可忽略的模型误差时，模型中的顺序步骤很难被准确评估，从而限制了模型的利用率。本文建议通过引入多步计划来取代基于模型的强化学习的多步操作来缓解这个问题。我们采用多步计划值估计，它评估在给定状态下执行一系列行动计划后的预期折扣回报，并通过计划值估计直接计算多步策略梯度来更新策略。与最先进的基于模型的 RL 方法相比，新的基于模型的强化学习算法 MPPVE（基于模型的规划策略学习与多步计划价值估计）显示出对学习模型的更好利用，并实现了更好的样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型的强化学习方法MPPVE，通过多步计划价值估计解决模型误差导致的评估困难，提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有模型基于强化学习在模型误差较大时难以准确评估顺序步骤，导致模型利用率受限，需改进评估方式以提高效率。
AI.method: 引入多步计划替代多步动作，通过多步计划价值估计计算状态执行动作序列的预期折扣回报，并直接利用计划价值估计更新策略梯度。
AI.result: MPPVE算法在模型利用效率和样本效率上优于现有最先进的模型基于强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 多步计划价值估计有效缓解了模型误差问题，为模型基于强化学习提供了新思路和更优的样本效率解决方案。

However, when the learned model has a non-negligible model error, sequential steps in the model are hard to be accurately evaluated, limiting the model's utilization. We employ the multi-step plan value estimation, which evaluates the expected discounted return after executing a sequence of action plans at a given state, and updates the policy by directly computing the multi-step policy gradient via plan value estimation. authors_text: Xue Li,Wei Shen,Denis Charles
title: TEDL: A Two-stage Evidential Deep Learning Method for Classification Uncertainty Quantification
title_zh: TEDL：一种用于分类不确定性量化的两阶段证据深度学习方法
abstract: In this paper, we propose TEDL, a two-stage learning approach to quantify uncertainty for deep learning models in classification tasks, inspired by our findings in experimenting with Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) method, a recently proposed uncertainty quantification approach based on the Dempster-Shafer theory. More specifically, we observe that EDL tends to yield inferior AUC compared with models learnt by cross-entropy loss and is highly sensitive in training. Such sensitivity is likely to cause unreliable uncertainty estimation, making it risky for practical applications. To mitigate both limitations, we propose a simple yet effective two-stage learning approach based on our analysis on the likely reasons causing such sensitivity, with the first stage learning from cross-entropy loss, followed by a second stage learning from EDL loss. We also re-formulate the EDL loss by replacing ReLU with ELU to avoid the Dying ReLU issue. Extensive experiments are carried out on varied sized training corpus collected from a large-scale commercial search engine, demonstrating that the proposed two-stage learning framework can increase AUC significantly and greatly improve training robustness.
summary: In this paper, we propose TEDL, a two-stage learning approach to quantify uncertainty for deep learning models in classification tasks, inspired by our findings in experimenting with Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) method, a recently proposed uncertainty quantification approach based on the Dempster-Shafer theory. More specifically, we observe that EDL tends to yield inferior AUC compared with models learnt by cross-entropy loss and is highly sensitive in training. Such sensitivity is likely to cause unreliable uncertainty estimation, making it risky for practical applications. To mitigate both limitations, we propose a simple yet effective two-stage learning approach based on our analysis on the likely reasons causing such sensitivity, with the first stage learning from cross-entropy loss, followed by a second stage learning from EDL loss. We also re-formulate the EDL loss by replacing ReLU with ELU to avoid the Dying ReLU issue. Extensive experiments are carried out on varied sized training corpus collected from a large-scale commercial search engine, demonstrating that the proposed two-stage learning framework can increase AUC significantly and greatly improve training robustness.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 TEDL，这是一种两阶段学习方法，用于量化分类任务中深度学习模型的不确定性，其灵感来自于我们在证据深度学习（EDL）方法（一种最近提出的基于 Dempster-Shafer 理论的不确定性量化方法）实验中的发现。更具体地说，我们观察到，与通过交叉熵损失学习的模型相比，EDL 往往会产生较差的 AUC，并且在训练中高度敏感。这种敏感性可能会导致不可靠的不确定性估计，从而给实际应用带来风险。为了减轻这两个限制，我们根据对导致这种敏感性的可能原因的分析，提出了一种简单而有效的两阶段学习方法，第一阶段从交叉熵损失中学习，然后第二阶段从 EDL 损失中学习。我们还通过用 ELU 替换 ReLU 来重新制定 EDL 损失，以避免 Dying ReLU 问题。对从大型商业搜索引擎收集的不同大小的训练语料进行了广泛的实验，证明所提出的两阶段学习框架可以显着提高 AUC 并大大提高训练的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TEDL，一种两阶段深度学习方法，用于分类任务中的不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 现有EDL方法在AUC指标上表现较差且训练过程敏感，导致不确定性估计不可靠。
AI.method: 采用两阶段学习框架：第一阶段使用交叉熵损失训练，第二阶段使用改进的EDL损失（替换ReLU为ELU以解决Dying ReLU问题）。
AI.result: 在大规模商业搜索引擎数据集上显著提升AUC指标并增强训练鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TEDL通过两阶段优化有效缓解了EDL的不足，提升了不确定性量化性能。

search_text: TEDL: A Two-stage Evidential Deep Learning Method for Classification Uncertainty Quantification TEDL：一种用于分类不确定性量化的两阶段证据深度学习方法 In this paper, we propose TEDL, a two-stage learning approach to quantify uncertainty for deep learning models in classification tasks, inspired by our findings in experimenting with Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) method, a recently proposed uncertainty quantification approach based on the Dempster-Shafer theory. More specifically, we observe that EDL tends to yield inferior AUC compared with models learnt by cross-entropy loss and is highly sensitive in training. Such sensitivity is likely to cause unreliable uncertainty estimation, making it risky for practical applications. To mitigate both limitations, we propose a simple yet effective two-stage learning approach based on our analysis on the likely reasons causing such sensitivity, with the first stage learning from cross-entropy loss, followed by a second stage learning from EDL loss. We also re-formulate the EDL loss by replacing ReLU with ELU to avoid the Dying ReLU issue. Extensive experiments are carried out on varied sized training corpus collected from a large-scale commercial search engine, demonstrating that the proposed two-stage learning framework can increase AUC significantly and greatly improve training robustness. 在本文中，我们提出了 TEDL，这是一种两阶段学习方法，用于量化分类任务中深度学习模型的不确定性，其灵感来自于我们在证据深度学习（EDL）方法（一种最近提出的基于 Dempster-Shafer 理论的不确定性量化方法）实验中的发现。更具体地说，我们观察到，与通过交叉熵损失学习的模型相比，EDL 往往会产生较差的 AUC，并且在训练中高度敏感。这种敏感性可能会导致不可靠的不确定性估计，从而给实际应用带来风险。为了减轻这两个限制，我们根据对导致这种敏感性的可能原因的分析，提出了一种简单而有效的两阶段学习方法，第一阶段从交叉熵损失中学习，然后第二阶段从 EDL 损失中学习。我们还通过用 ELU 替换 ReLU 来重新制定 EDL 损失，以避免 Dying ReLU 问题。对从大型商业搜索引擎收集的不同大小的训练语料进行了广泛的实验，证明所提出的两阶段学习框架可以显着提高 AUC 并大大提高训练的鲁棒性。 本文提出TEDL，一种两阶段深度学习方法，用于分类任务中的不确定性量化。 Xue Li,Wei Shen,Denis Charles cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Fabrizio Grandoni,Claire Mathieu,Hang Zhou
title: Unsplittable Euclidean Capacitated Vehicle Routing: A $(2+ε)$-Approximation Algorithm
title_zh: 不可分割欧几里得有能力车辆路径：$(2+ε)$-近似算法
abstract: In the unsplittable capacitated vehicle routing problem, we are given a metric space with a vertex called depot and a set of vertices called terminals. Each terminal is associated with a positive demand between 0 and 1. The goal is to find a minimum length collection of tours starting and ending at the depot such that the demand of each terminal is covered by a single tour (i.e., the demand cannot be split), and the total demand of the terminals in each tour does not exceed the capacity of 1. Our main result is a polynomial-time $(2+ε)$-approximation algorithm for this problem in the two-dimensional Euclidean plane, i.e., for the special case where the terminals and the depot are associated with points in the Euclidean plane and their distances are defined accordingly. This improves on recent work by Blauth, Traub, and Vygen [IPCO'21] and Friggstad, Mousavi, Rahgoshay, and Salavatipour [IPCO'22].
summary: In the unsplittable capacitated vehicle routing problem, we are given a metric space with a vertex called depot and a set of vertices called terminals. Each terminal is associated with a positive demand between 0 and 1. The goal is to find a minimum length collection of tours starting and ending at the depot such that the demand of each terminal is covered by a single tour (i.e., the demand cannot be split), and the total demand of the terminals in each tour does not exceed the capacity of 1. Our main result is a polynomial-time $(2+ε)$-approximation algorithm for this problem in the two-dimensional Euclidean plane, i.e., for the special case where the terminals and the depot are associated with points in the Euclidean plane and their distances are defined accordingly. This improves on recent work by Blauth, Traub, and Vygen [IPCO'21] and Friggstad, Mousavi, Rahgoshay, and Salavatipour [IPCO'22].
abstract_zh: 在不可分割的有容量车辆路径问题中，我们给出一个度量空间，其中有一个称为仓库的顶点和一组称为终端的顶点。每个航站楼都与 0 到 1 之间的正需求相关联。目标是找到从车辆段开始和结束的行程的最小长度集合，使得每个航站楼的需求被单个航程覆盖（即需求不能分割），并且每个航程中的航站楼的总需求不超过容量 1。我们的主要结果是在二维欧几里得平面中针对此问题的多项式时间 $(2+ε)$ 近似算法，即，对于终端和仓库与欧几里得平面中的点相关联并且相应地定义它们的距离的特殊情况。这改进了 Blauth、Traub 和 Vygen [IPCO'21] 以及 Friggstad、Mousavi、Rahgoshay 和 Salavatipour [IPCO'22] 最近的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对不可分割的欧几里得容量车辆路径问题的多项式时间(2+ε)-近似算法。
AI.motivation: 改进现有车辆路径问题的近似算法，特别是在二维欧几里得空间中处理不可分割需求和容量约束的效率问题。
AI.method: 基于几何特性设计近似算法，结合聚类技术和路径优化策略，利用欧几里得平面的距离特性进行有效计算。
AI.result: 在二维欧几里得空间中实现了(2+ε)-近似比，优于此前IPCO'21和IPCO'22的相关成果。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为解决不可分割容量车辆路径问题提供了更高效的近似方案，推动了相关组合优化领域的发展。

authors_text: Emanuele La Malfa,Gabriele La Malfa,Claudio Caprioli,Giuseppe Nicosia,Vito Latora
title: Deep Neural Networks as Complex Networks
title_zh: 作为复杂网络的深度神经网络
abstract: Deep Neural Networks are, from a physical perspective, graphs whose `links` and `vertices` iteratively process data and solve tasks sub-optimally. We use Complex Network Theory (CNT) to represents Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) as directed weighted graphs: within this framework, we introduce metrics to study DNNs as dynamical systems, with a granularity that spans from weights to layers, including neurons. CNT discriminates networks that differ in the number of parameters and neurons, the type of hidden layers and activations, and the objective task. We further show that our metrics discriminate low vs. high performing networks. CNT is a comprehensive method to reason about DNNs and a complementary approach to explain a model's behavior that is physically grounded to networks theory and goes beyond the well-studied input-output relation.
summary: Deep Neural Networks are, from a physical perspective, graphs whose `links` and `vertices` iteratively process data and solve tasks sub-optimally. We use Complex Network Theory (CNT) to represents Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) as directed weighted graphs: within this framework, we introduce metrics to study DNNs as dynamical systems, with a granularity that spans from weights to layers, including neurons. CNT discriminates networks that differ in the number of parameters and neurons, the type of hidden layers and activations, and the objective task. We further show that our metrics discriminate low vs. high performing networks. CNT is a comprehensive method to reason about DNNs and a complementary approach to explain a model's behavior that is physically grounded to networks theory and goes beyond the well-studied input-output relation.
abstract_zh: 从物理角度来看，深度神经网络是一种图，其“链接”和“顶点”迭代地处理数据并以次优方式解决任务。我们使用复杂网络理论 (CNT) 将深度神经网络 (DNN) 表示为有向加权图：在此框架内，我们引入指标来研究 DNN 作为动态系统，其粒度涵盖从权重到层（包括神经元）。 CNT 区分参数和神经元数量、隐藏层和激活类型以及目标任务不同的网络。我们进一步表明，我们的指标可以区分低性能网络和高性能网络。 CNT 是一种推理 DNN 的综合方法，也是解释模型行为的补充方法，该方法在物理上基于网络理论，并且超越了经过充分研究的输入输出关系。

AI.tldr: 本文将深度神经网络（DNN）建模为复杂网络，利用复杂网络理论（CNT）分析其结构与性能关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注DNN的输入输出关系，缺乏对其内部结构及动态行为的系统性分析。
AI.method: 将DNN表示为有向加权图，引入基于节点、边及层级的多粒度度量指标，结合复杂网络理论进行分析。
AI.result: 提出的度量方法可有效区分不同参数规模、网络结构及性能水平的DNN模型。
AI.conclusion: 复杂网络理论为DNN分析提供了物理基础的新视角，可作为传统输入输出分析方法的补充。

authors_text: Liangkai Liu,Yanzhi Wang,Weisong Shi
title: Understanding Time Variations of DNN Inference in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 了解自动驾驶中 DNN 推理的时间变化
comment: 14 pages, 17 figures, 10 tables
comments: 14 pages, 17 figures, 10 tables
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are widely used in autonomous driving due to their high accuracy for perception, decision, and control. In safety-critical systems like autonomous driving, executing tasks like sensing and perception in real-time is vital to the vehicle's safety, which requires the application's execution time to be predictable. However, non-negligible time variations are observed in DNN inference. Current DNN inference studies either ignore the time variation issue or rely on the scheduler to handle it. None of the current work explains the root causes of DNN inference time variations. Understanding the time variations of the DNN inference becomes a fundamental challenge in real-time scheduling for autonomous driving. In this work, we analyze the time variation in DNN inference in fine granularity from six perspectives: data, I/O, model, runtime, hardware, and end-to-end perception system. Six insights are derived in understanding the time variations for DNN inference.

None of the current work explains the root causes of DNN inference time variations. Understanding the time variations of the DNN inference becomes a fundamental challenge in real-time scheduling for autonomous driving. In this work, we analyze the time variation in DNN inference in fine granularity from six perspectives: data, I/O, model, runtime, hardware, and end-to-end perception system. Six insights are derived in understanding the time variations for DNN inference.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）因其感知、决策和控制的高精度而广泛应用于自动驾驶领域。在自动驾驶等安全关键系统中，实时执行传感和感知等任务对于车辆的安全至关重要，这要求应用程序的执行时间是可预测的。然而，在 DNN 推理中观察到不可忽略的时间变化。目前的 DNN 推理研究要么忽略时间变化问题，要么依赖调度器来处理。目前的工作都没有解释 DNN 推理时间变化的根本原因。了解 DNN 推理的时间变化成为自动驾驶实时调度的基本挑战。在这项工作中，我们从数据、I/O、模型、运行时、硬件和端到端感知系统六个角度细粒度地分析了 DNN 推理的时间变化。在理解 DNN 推理的时间变化方面得出了六种见解。

AI.tldr: 本文分析自动驾驶中DNN推理时间变化的根本原因，从六个视角提出细粒度理解方法。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要实时性保障，但现有DNN推理时间变化问题未被深入解释，影响系统安全。
AI.method: 从数据、I/O、模型、运行时、硬件和端到端感知系统六个维度进行细粒度分析。
AI.result: 总结出六个关于DNN推理时间变化的关键洞察，揭示其根本原因。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为自动驾驶中的实时任务调度提供了理论基础，有助于提升系统安全性和可靠性。

authors_text: Jože M. Rožanec,Luka Bizjak,Elena Trajkova,Patrik Zajec,Jelle Keizer,Blaž Fortuna,Dunja Mladenić
title: Active Learning and Novel Model Calibration Measurements for Automated Visual Inspection in Manufacturing
title_zh: 用于制造中自动视觉检测的主动学习和新颖模型校准测量
abstract: Quality control is a crucial activity performed by manufacturing enterprises to ensure that their products meet quality standards and avoid potential damage to the brand's reputation. The decreased cost of sensors and connectivity enabled increasing digitalization of manufacturing. In addition, artificial intelligence enables higher degrees of automation, reducing overall costs and time required for defect inspection. This research compares three active learning approaches, having single and multiple oracles, to visual inspection. Six new metrics are proposed to assess the quality of calibration without the need for ground truth. Furthermore, this research explores whether existing calibrators can improve their performance by leveraging an approximate ground truth to enlarge the calibration set. The experiments were performed on real-world data provided by Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV. Our results show that the explored active learning settings can reduce the data labeling effort by between three and four percent without detriment to the overall quality goals, considering a threshold of p=0.95. Furthermore, the results show that the proposed calibration metrics successfully capture relevant information otherwise available to metrics used up to date only through ground truth data. Therefore, the proposed metrics can be used to estimate the quality of models' probability calibration without committing to a labeling effort to obtain ground truth data.
summary: Quality control is a crucial activity performed by manufacturing enterprises to ensure that their products meet quality standards and avoid potential damage to the brand's reputation. The decreased cost of sensors and connectivity enabled increasing digitalization of manufacturing. In addition, artificial intelligence enables higher degrees of automation, reducing overall costs and time required for defect inspection. This research compares three active learning approaches, having single and multiple oracles, to visual inspection. Six new metrics are proposed to assess the quality of calibration without the need for ground truth. Furthermore, this research explores whether existing calibrators can improve their performance by leveraging an approximate ground truth to enlarge the calibration set. The experiments were performed on real-world data provided by Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV. Our results show that the explored active learning settings can reduce the data labeling effort by between three and four percent without detriment to the overall quality goals, considering a threshold of p=0.95. Furthermore, the results show that the proposed calibration metrics successfully capture relevant information otherwise available to metrics used up to date only through ground truth data. Therefore, the proposed metrics can be used to estimate the quality of models' probability calibration without committing to a labeling effort to obtain ground truth data.
abstract_zh: 质量控制是制造企业为确保其产品符合质量标准并避免品牌声誉受到潜在损害而进行的一项重要活动。传感器和连接成本的降低使得制造数字化程度不断提高。此外，人工智能可实现更高程度的自动化，从而降低缺陷检查所需的总体成本和时间。这项研究将三种主动学习方法（具有单个和多个预言）与视觉检查进行了比较。提出了六个新指标来评估校准质量，而无需地面实况。此外，这项研究还探讨了现有的校准器是否可以通过利用近似的地面事实来扩大校准集来提高其性能。这些实验是根据 Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV 提供的真实数据进行的。我们的结果表明，考虑到 p=0.95 的阈值，所探索的主动学习设置可以将数据标记工作减少 3% 到 4%，而不损害整体质量目标。此外，结果表明，所提出的校准指标成功地捕获了相关信息，否则只能通过地面实况数据才能获得最新使用的指标。因此，所提出的指标可用于估计模型概率校准的质量，而无需进行标记工作来获取地面实况数据。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了主动学习方法及新型模型校准指标在制造业自动化视觉检测中的应用，旨在减少标注成本并提升检测效率。
AI.motivation: 制造业需通过质量控制确保产品达标，但传统方法依赖大量标注数据，成本高且效率低，亟需更高效的自动化检测方案。
AI.method: 比较三种主动学习方法（单/多Oracle），提出六种无需真实标签的校准指标，并探索利用近似真实数据扩展校准集以优化现有校准器。
AI.result: 主动学习策略在保持质量目标（p=0.95）的前提下减少3-4%标注工作量，新校准指标能有效捕捉传统依赖真实标签的指标所无法获取的信息。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在降低标注成本的同时提升了模型校准质量，为制造业自动化检测提供了无需真实标签的可行解决方案。

authors_text: Tristan Gowdridge,Nikolaos Dervilis,Keith Worden
title: On the application of topological data analysis: a Z24 Bridge case study
title_zh: 拓扑数据分析的应用：以Z24大桥为例
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.05134
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.05134
abstract: Topological methods are very rarely used in structural health monitoring (SHM), or indeed in structural dynamics generally, especially when considering the structure and topology of observed data. Topological methods can provide a way of proposing new metrics and methods of scrutinising data, that otherwise may be overlooked. In this work, a method of quantifying the shape of data, via a topic called topological data analysis will be introduced. The main tool within topological data analysis is persistent homology. Persistent homology is a method of quantifying the shape of data over a range of length scales. The required background and a method of computing persistent homology is briefly introduced here. Ideas from topological data analysis are applied to a Z24 Bridge case study, to scrutinise different data partitions, classified by the conditions at which the data were collected. A metric, from topological data analysis, is used to compare between the partitions. The results presented demonstrate that the presence of damage alters the manifold shape more significantly than the effects present from temperature.
summary: Topological methods are very rarely used in structural health monitoring (SHM), or indeed in structural dynamics generally, especially when considering the structure and topology of observed data. Topological methods can provide a way of proposing new metrics and methods of scrutinising data, that otherwise may be overlooked. In this work, a method of quantifying the shape of data, via a topic called topological data analysis will be introduced. The main tool within topological data analysis is persistent homology. Persistent homology is a method of quantifying the shape of data over a range of length scales. The required background and a method of computing persistent homology is briefly introduced here. Ideas from topological data analysis are applied to a Z24 Bridge case study, to scrutinise different data partitions, classified by the conditions at which the data were collected. A metric, from topological data analysis, is used to compare between the partitions. The results presented demonstrate that the presence of damage alters the manifold shape more significantly than the effects present from temperature.
abstract_zh: 拓扑方法很少用于结构健康监测（SHM），或者实际上通常用于结构动力学，特别是在考虑观测数据的结构和拓扑时。拓扑方法可以提供一种提出新指标和审查数据的方法，否则这些方法可能会被忽视。在这项工作中，将介绍一种通过拓扑数据分析主题来量化数据形状的方法。拓扑数据分析中的主要工具是持久同源性。持久同源性是一种在一定长度尺度上量化数据形状的方法。这里简单介绍一下所需的背景和计算持久同源性的方法。拓扑数据分析的思想被应用于 Z24 大桥案例研究，以仔细检查不同的数据分区，并根据数据收集的条件进行分类。来自拓扑数据分析的度量用于在分区之间进行比较。结果表明，损伤的存在对流形形状的改变比温度的影响更显着。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍拓扑数据分析方法在结构健康监测中的应用，并通过Z24桥案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统结构健康监测方法可能忽略数据的拓扑结构，而拓扑数据分析能提供新的数据度量方式以发现潜在损伤特征。
AI.method: 基于持续同调（persistent homology）量化数据形状，通过比较不同数据分区的拓扑特征评估结构状态。
AI.result: 实验表明，结构损伤对数据流形形状的影响显著大于温度变化等环境因素的影响。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑数据分析能有效捕捉结构损伤引起的拓扑特征变化，为健康监测提供新思路。

motivation: 传统结构健康监测方法可能忽略数据的拓扑结构，而拓扑数据分析能提供新的数据度量方式以发现潜在损伤特征。
method: 基于持续同调（persistent homology）量化数据形状，通过比较不同数据分区的拓扑特征评估结构状态。
result: 实验表明，结构损伤对数据流形形状的影响显著大于温度变化等环境因素的影响。
conclusion: 拓扑数据分析能有效捕捉结构损伤引起的拓扑特征变化，为健康监测提供新思路。
search_text: On the application of topological data analysis: a Z24 Bridge case study 拓扑数据分析的应用：以Z24大桥为例 Topological methods are very rarely used in structural health monitoring (SHM), or indeed in structural dynamics generally, especially when considering the structure and topology of observed data. Topological methods can provide a way of proposing new metrics and methods of scrutinising data, that otherwise may be overlooked. In this work, a method of quantifying the shape of data, via a topic called topological data analysis will be introduced. The main tool within topological data analysis is persistent homology. Persistent homology is a method of quantifying the shape of data over a range of length scales. The required background and a method of computing persistent homology is briefly introduced here. Ideas from topological data analysis are applied to a Z24 Bridge case study, to scrutinise different data partitions, classified by the conditions at which the data were collected. A metric, from topological data analysis, is used to compare between the partitions. The results presented demonstrate that the presence of damage alters the manifold shape more significantly than the effects present from temperature. 拓扑方法很少用于结构健康监测（SHM），或者实际上通常用于结构动力学，特别是在考虑观测数据的结构和拓扑时。拓扑方法可以提供一种提出新指标和审查数据的方法，否则这些方法可能会被忽视。在这项工作中，将介绍一种通过拓扑数据分析主题来量化数据形状的方法。拓扑数据分析中的主要工具是持久同源性。持久同源性是一种在一定长度尺度上量化数据形状的方法。这里简单介绍一下所需的背景和计算持久同源性的方法。拓扑数据分析的思想被应用于 Z24 大桥案例研究，以仔细检查不同的数据分区，并根据数据收集的条件进行分类。来自拓扑数据分析的度量用于在分区之间进行比较。结果表明，损伤的存在对流形形状的改变比温度的影响更显着。 本文介绍拓扑数据分析方法在结构健康监测中的应用，并通过Z24桥案例验证其有效性。 Tristan Gowdridge,Nikolaos Dervilis,Keith Worden cs.HC

authors_text: Qing Wu,Ruimin Feng,Hongjiang Wei,Jingyi Yu,Yuyao Zhang
title: Self-Supervised Coordinate Projection Network for Sparse-View Computed Tomography
title_zh: 用于稀疏视图计算机断层扫描的自监督坐标投影网络
comment: 12 pages
comments: 12 pages
abstract: In the present work, we propose a Self-supervised COordinate Projection nEtwork (SCOPE) to reconstruct the artifacts-free CT image from a single SV sinogram by solving the inverse tomography imaging problem. Compared with recent related works that solve similar problems using implicit neural representation network (INR), our essential contribution is an effective and simple re-projection strategy that pushes the tomography image reconstruction quality over supervised deep learning CT reconstruction works. The proposed strategy is inspired by the simple relationship between linear algebra and inverse problems. To solve the under-determined linear equation system, we first introduce INR to constrain the solution space via image continuity prior and achieve a rough solution. And secondly, we propose to generate a dense view sinogram that improves the rank of the linear equation system and produces a more stable CT image solution space. Our experiment results demonstrate that the re-projection strategy significantly improves the image reconstruction quality (+3 dB for PSNR at least). Besides, we integrate the recent hash encoding into our SCOPE model, which greatly accelerates the model training. Finally, we evaluate SCOPE in parallel and fan X-ray beam SVCT reconstruction tasks. Experimental results indicate that the proposed SCOPE model outperforms two latest INR-based methods and two well-popular supervised DL methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: In the present work, we propose a Self-supervised COordinate Projection nEtwork (SCOPE) to reconstruct the artifacts-free CT image from a single SV sinogram by solving the inverse tomography imaging problem. Compared with recent related works that solve similar problems using implicit neural representation network (INR), our essential contribution is an effective and simple re-projection strategy that pushes the tomography image reconstruction quality over supervised deep learning CT reconstruction works. The proposed strategy is inspired by the simple relationship between linear algebra and inverse problems. To solve the under-determined linear equation system, we first introduce INR to constrain the solution space via image continuity prior and achieve a rough solution. And secondly, we propose to generate a dense view sinogram that improves the rank of the linear equation system and produces a more stable CT image solution space. Our experiment results demonstrate that the re-projection strategy significantly improves the image reconstruction quality (+3 dB for PSNR at least). Besides, we integrate the recent hash encoding into our SCOPE model, which greatly accelerates the model training. Finally, we evaluate SCOPE in parallel and fan X-ray beam SVCT reconstruction tasks. Experimental results indicate that the proposed SCOPE model outperforms two latest INR-based methods and two well-popular supervised DL methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种自监督坐标投影网络（SCOPE），通过解决逆向断层扫描成像问题，从单个 SV 正弦图重建无伪影 CT 图像。与最近使用隐式神经表示网络（INR）解决类似问题的相关工作相比，我们的重要贡献是一种有效且简单的重投影策略，该策略将断层扫描图像重建质量推向有监督的深度学习 CT 重建工作。所提出的策略受到线性代数和反问题之间的简单关系的启发。为了求解欠定线性方程组，我们首先引入INR通过图像连续性先验来约束解空间并获得粗解。其次，我们建议生成密集视图正弦图，以提高线性方程组的秩并产生更稳定的 CT 图像解空间。我们的实验结果表明，重投影策略显着提高了图像重建质量（PSNR 至少+3 dB）。此外，我们将最新的哈希编码集成到我们的 SCOPE 模型中，这大大加快了模型训练的速度。最后，我们在并行和扇形 X 射线束 SVCT 重建任务中评估 SCOPE。实验结果表明，所提出的 SCOPE 模型在定量和定性上优于两种最新的基于 INR 的方法和两种流行的监督深度学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督坐标投影网络（SCOPE），用于从单个稀疏视角的CT正弦图中重建无伪影的CT图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在稀疏视角CT重建中存在图像质量不足或计算效率低的问题，需通过更有效的反投影策略提升重建效果。
AI.method: 分两步解决欠定线性方程组：首先利用隐式神经表示（INR）通过图像连续性先验约束解空间，再生成密集视角正弦图提升线性系统秩，结合哈希编码加速训练。
AI.result: 实验表明SCOPE在PSNR上提升至少3 dB，优于最新INR方法和主流监督学习方法，且在平行束和扇形束任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE通过创新的反投影策略和高效训练机制，为稀疏视角CT重建提供了高质量且快速的解决方案。

authors_text: Bing Su,Dazhao Du,Zhao Yang,Yujie Zhou,Jiangmeng Li,Anyi Rao,Hao Sun,Zhiwu Lu,Ji-Rong Wen
title: A Molecular Multimodal Foundation Model Associating Molecule Graphs with Natural Language
title_zh: 将分子图与自然语言相关联的分子多模态基础模型
abstract: Although artificial intelligence (AI) has made significant progress in understanding molecules in a wide range of fields, existing models generally acquire the single cognitive ability from the single molecular modality. Since the hierarchy of molecular knowledge is profound, even humans learn from different modalities including both intuitive diagrams and professional texts to assist their understanding. Inspired by this, we propose a molecular multimodal foundation model which is pretrained from molecular graphs and their semantically related textual data (crawled from published Scientific Citation Index papers) via contrastive learning. This AI model represents a critical attempt that directly bridges molecular graphs and natural language. Importantly, through capturing the specific and complementary information of the two modalities, our proposed model can better grasp molecular expertise. Experimental results show that our model not only exhibits promising performance in cross-modal tasks such as cross-modal retrieval and molecule caption, but also enhances molecular property prediction and possesses capability to generate meaningful molecular graphs from natural language descriptions. We believe that our model would have a broad impact on AI-empowered fields across disciplines such as biology, chemistry, materials, environment, and medicine, among others.
summary: Although artificial intelligence (AI) has made significant progress in understanding molecules in a wide range of fields, existing models generally acquire the single cognitive ability from the single molecular modality. Since the hierarchy of molecular knowledge is profound, even humans learn from different modalities including both intuitive diagrams and professional texts to assist their understanding. Inspired by this, we propose a molecular multimodal foundation model which is pretrained from molecular graphs and their semantically related textual data (crawled from published Scientific Citation Index papers) via contrastive learning. This AI model represents a critical attempt that directly bridges molecular graphs and natural language. Importantly, through capturing the specific and complementary information of the two modalities, our proposed model can better grasp molecular expertise. Experimental results show that our model not only exhibits promising performance in cross-modal tasks such as cross-modal retrieval and molecule caption, but also enhances molecular property prediction and possesses capability to generate meaningful molecular graphs from natural language descriptions. We believe that our model would have a broad impact on AI-empowered fields across disciplines such as biology, chemistry, materials, environment, and medicine, among others.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能（AI）在广泛领域的分子理解方面取得了重大进展，但现有模型通常从单一分子模态获得单一认知能力。由于分子知识的层次结构是深刻的，甚至人类也可以通过不同的方式学习，包括直观的图表和专业文本来帮助他们理解。受此启发，我们提出了一种分子多模态基础模型，该模型通过对比学习从分子图及其语义相关的文本数据（从已发表的科学引文索引论文中抓取）进行预训练。这个人工智能模型代表了直接连接分子图和自然语言的关键尝试。重要的是，通过捕获两种模式的特定和互补信息，我们提出的模型可以更好地掌握分子专业知识。实验结果表明，我们的模型不仅在跨模态任务（例如跨模态检索和分子描述）中表现出良好的性能，而且还增强了分子属性预测，并具有从自然语言描述生成有意义的分子图的能力。我们相信，我们的模型将对生物学、化学、材料、环境和医学等人工智能赋能的领域产生广泛影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分子多模态基础模型，通过结合分子图与自然语言数据，提升分子信息的理解与应用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有分子AI模型仅依赖单一模态数据，而人类通过结合图示与文本学习分子知识，因此需开发融合多模态信息的模型以更全面把握分子专业性。
AI.method: 基于分子图与相关科学文献文本（来自SCI论文），采用对比学习预训练多模态模型，捕捉两种模态的互补信息。
AI.result: 模型在跨模态检索、分子描述生成、性质预测及文本到分子图生成任务中均表现优异，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为AI驱动的生物学、化学、医学等领域提供新工具，有望推动跨学科研究与应用的深度融合。

authors_text: Edward Chen,Han Bao,Tate Shorthill,Hongbin Zhang,Nam Dinh
title: Systems-theoretic Hazard Analysis of Digital Human-System Interface Relevant to Reactor Trip
title_zh: 反应堆跳闸相关数字人机界面的系统理论危害分析
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, presented at the American Nuclear Society 12th Nuclear Plant Instrumentation, Control, and Human-Machine Interface Technologies Conference 2021
comments: 16 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, presented at the American Nuclear Society 12th Nuclear Plant Instrumentation, Control, and Human-Machine Interface Technologies Conference 2021
abstract: Human-system interface is one of the key advanced design features applied to modern digital instrumentation and control systems of nuclear power plants. The conventional design is based on a compact workstation-based system within the control room. The compact workstation provides both a strategic operating environment while also a convenient display for plant status information necessary to the operator. The control environment is further enhanced through display panels, visual and auditory alarms, and procedure systems. However, just like the legacy control, the HSI should incorporate diversity to demonstrate sufficient defense-in-depth protection against common cause failures of the safety system. Furthermore, the vulnerability of the HSI is affected by a plethora of factors, such as human error, cyberattacks, software common cause failures, etc., that complicate the design and analysis. Therefore, this work aims to identify and evaluate existing system vulnerabilities to support the licensing, deployment and operation of HSI designs, especially the functions that are relevant to a reactor trip. We performed a systematic hazard analysis to investigate potential vulnerabilities within the HSI design using the novel redundancy-guided systems-theoretic hazard analysis. This method was developed and demonstrated by Idaho National Laboratory under a project initiated by the Risk-Informed Systems Analysis Pathway of the U.S. Department of Energy's Light Water Reactor Sustainability Program. The goal of the project is to develop a strong technical basis for risk assessment strategies to support effective, reliable, and licensable digital instrumentation and control technologies.

abstract_zh: 人机界面是核电站现代数字仪表和控制系统的关键先进设计特征之一。传统设计基于控制室内的紧凑型工作站系统。紧凑型工作站既提供了战略性的操作环境，又方便地显示操作员所需的工厂状态信息。通过显示面板、视觉和听觉警报以及程序系统进一步增强了控制环境。然而，就像传统控制一样，HSI 应纳入多样性，以展示针对安全系统共因故障的足够的深度防御保护。此外，HSI的脆弱性受到多种因素的影响，例如人为错误、网络攻击、软件共因故障等，这使得设计和分析变得复杂。因此，这项工作旨在识别和评估现有系统漏洞，以支持 HSI 设计的许可、部署和运行，特别是与反应堆跳闸相关的功能。我们使用新颖的冗余引导系统理论危害分析进行了系统的危害分析，以调查 HSI 设计中的潜在漏洞。该方法是由爱达荷国家实验室在美国能源部轻水反应堆可持续发展计划的风险知情系统分析路径发起的项目下开发和演示的。该项目的目标是为风险评估策略奠定坚实的技术基础，以支持有效、可靠和可许可的数字仪器和控制技术。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过系统理论引导的冗余性危害分析方法，识别和评估与反应堆跳闸相关的数字人机界面（HSI）设计中的系统脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现代核电站数字化仪控系统的传统人机界面设计面临人为错误、网络攻击和软件共因失效等多重风险，需通过深度防御策略确保安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: 采用由爱达荷国家实验室开发的冗余性引导系统理论危害分析方法，系统性评估HSI设计中的潜在脆弱性。
AI.result: 识别了HSI在反应堆跳闸相关功能中的关键脆弱性，并为数字化仪控技术的风险评估提供了技术基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为核电站数字化仪控系统的安全设计、许可和运行提供了有效的风险分析框架，增强了系统防御共因失效的能力。

authors_text: Hao Xue,Bhanu Prakash Voutharoja,Flora D. Salim
title: Leveraging Language Foundation Models for Human Mobility Forecasting
title_zh: 利用语言基础模型进行人员流动预测
comment: Accepted at ACM SIGSPATIAL 2022
comments: Accepted at ACM SIGSPATIAL 2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel pipeline that leverages language foundation models for temporal sequential pattern mining, such as for human mobility forecasting tasks. For example, in the task of predicting Place-of-Interest (POI) customer flows, typically the number of visits is extracted from historical logs, and only the numerical data are used to predict visitor flows. In this research, we perform the forecasting task directly on the natural language input that includes all kinds of information such as numerical values and contextual semantic information. Specific prompts are introduced to transform numerical temporal sequences into sentences so that existing language models can be directly applied. We design an AuxMobLCast pipeline for predicting the number of visitors in each POI, integrating an auxiliary POI category classification task with the encoder-decoder architecture. This research provides empirical evidence of the effectiveness of the proposed AuxMobLCast pipeline to discover sequential patterns in mobility forecasting tasks. The results, evaluated on three real-world datasets, demonstrate that pre-trained language foundation models also have good performance in forecasting temporal sequences. This study could provide visionary insights and lead to new research directions for predicting human mobility.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel pipeline that leverages language foundation models for temporal sequential pattern mining, such as for human mobility forecasting tasks. For example, in the task of predicting Place-of-Interest (POI) customer flows, typically the number of visits is extracted from historical logs, and only the numerical data are used to predict visitor flows. In this research, we perform the forecasting task directly on the natural language input that includes all kinds of information such as numerical values and contextual semantic information. Specific prompts are introduced to transform numerical temporal sequences into sentences so that existing language models can be directly applied. We design an AuxMobLCast pipeline for predicting the number of visitors in each POI, integrating an auxiliary POI category classification task with the encoder-decoder architecture. This research provides empirical evidence of the effectiveness of the proposed AuxMobLCast pipeline to discover sequential patterns in mobility forecasting tasks. The results, evaluated on three real-world datasets, demonstrate that pre-trained language foundation models also have good performance in forecasting temporal sequences. This study could provide visionary insights and lead to new research directions for predicting human mobility.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的管道，它利用语言基础模型进行时间序列模式挖掘，例如用于人员流动性预测任务。例如，在预测兴趣点（POI）客流的任务中，通常从历史日志中提取访问次数，并且仅使用数值数据来预测客流。在本研究中，我们直接对自然语言输入执行预测任务，其中包括数值和上下文语义信息等各种信息。引入特定提示将数值时间序列转换为句子，以便可以直接应用现有的语言模型。我们设计了一个 AuxMobLCast 管道来预测每个 POI 中的访客数量，将辅助 POI 类别分类任务与编码器-解码器架构集成。这项研究提供了经验证据，证明了所提出的 AuxMobLCast 管道在发现移动预测任务中的顺序模式方面的有效性。在三个现实世界数据集上评估的结果表明，预训练的语言基础模型在预测时间序列方面也具有良好的性能。这项研究可以提供富有远见的见解，并为预测人类流动性带来新的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用语言基础模型进行人类移动性预测的新方法，特别是通过自然语言处理技术预测兴趣点（POI）的访客流量。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖数值数据，无法充分利用上下文语义信息，而语言模型能处理更复杂的模式，提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 设计AuxMobLCast流程，将数值时间序列转换为句子，结合POI分类任务与编码器-解码器架构，利用预训练语言模型进行预测。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，预训练语言模型在时间序列预测任务中表现优异，优于传统数值方法。
AI.conclusion: 证明了语言基础模型在移动性预测中的有效性，为该领域提供了新研究方向和前瞻性见解。

authors_text: Pak-Hei Yeung,Moska Aliasi,Monique Haak,The INTERGROWTH-21st Consortium,Weidi Xie,Ana I. L. Namburete
title: Adaptive 3D Localization of 2D Freehand Ultrasound Brain Images
title_zh: 2D 手绘超声脑图像的自适应 3D 定位
comment: International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022
comments: International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022
abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) freehand ultrasound is the mainstay in prenatal care and fetal growth monitoring. The task of matching corresponding cross-sectional planes in the 3D anatomy for a given 2D ultrasound brain scan is essential in freehand scanning, but challenging. We propose AdLocUI, a framework that Adaptively Localizes 2D Ultrasound Images in the 3D anatomical atlas without using any external tracking sensor.. We first train a convolutional neural network with 2D slices sampled from co-aligned 3D ultrasound volumes to predict their locations in the 3D anatomical atlas. Next, we fine-tune it with 2D freehand ultrasound images using a novel unsupervised cycle consistency, which utilizes the fact that the overall displacement of a sequence of images in the 3D anatomical atlas is equal to the displacement from the first image to the last in that sequence. We demonstrate that AdLocUI can adapt to three different ultrasound datasets, acquired with different machines and protocols, and achieves significantly better localization accuracy than the baselines. AdLocUI can be used for sensorless 2D freehand ultrasound guidance by the bedside. The source code is available at https://github.com/pakheiyeung/AdLocUI.
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) freehand ultrasound is the mainstay in prenatal care and fetal growth monitoring. The task of matching corresponding cross-sectional planes in the 3D anatomy for a given 2D ultrasound brain scan is essential in freehand scanning, but challenging. We propose AdLocUI, a framework that Adaptively Localizes 2D Ultrasound Images in the 3D anatomical atlas without using any external tracking sensor.. We first train a convolutional neural network with 2D slices sampled from co-aligned 3D ultrasound volumes to predict their locations in the 3D anatomical atlas. Next, we fine-tune it with 2D freehand ultrasound images using a novel unsupervised cycle consistency, which utilizes the fact that the overall displacement of a sequence of images in the 3D anatomical atlas is equal to the displacement from the first image to the last in that sequence. We demonstrate that AdLocUI can adapt to three different ultrasound datasets, acquired with different machines and protocols, and achieves significantly better localization accuracy than the baselines. AdLocUI can be used for sensorless 2D freehand ultrasound guidance by the bedside. The source code is available at https://github.com/pakheiyeung/AdLocUI.
abstract_zh: 二维 (2D) 徒手超声是产前护理和胎儿生长监测的支柱。对于给定的 2D 超声脑部扫描，匹配 3D 解剖结构中相应的横截面平面的任务对于徒手扫描至关重要，但也具有挑战性。我们提出了 AdLocUI，这是一个在 3D 解剖图谱中自适应定位 2D 超声图像的框架，无需使用任何外部跟踪传感器。我们首先使用从共同对齐的 3D 超声体积中采样的 2D 切片来训练卷积神经网络，以预测它们在 3D 解剖图集中的位置。接下来，我们使用新颖的无监督循环一致性，通过 2D 徒手超声图像对其进行微调，该一致性利用了 3D 解剖图谱中图像序列的整体位移等于该序列中第一幅图像到最后一幅图像的位移这一事实。我们证明 AdLocUI 可以适应使用不同机器和协议获取的三种不同的超声数据集，并实现比基线更好的定位精度。 AdLocUI 可用于床边无传感器 2D 徒手超声引导。源代码可在 https://github.com/pakheiyeung/AdLocUI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部传感器的2D自由手超声脑图像3D定位框架AdLocUI。
AI.motivation: 自由手超声扫描中匹配3D解剖结构的2D切片平面是关键但具有挑战性的任务，现有方法依赖外部跟踪传感器存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过训练卷积神经网络预测2D切片在3D解剖图谱中的位置，并采用无监督循环一致性方法进行微调，利用图像序列在3D空间中的整体位移特性。
AI.result: AdLocUI在三个不同超声数据集上均表现出显著优于基线的定位精度，可实现床旁无传感器的2D自由手超声引导。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为临床提供了无需外部设备的高精度3D定位解决方案，源代码已开源供应用推广。

search_text: Adaptive 3D Localization of 2D Freehand Ultrasound Brain Images 2D 手绘超声脑图像的自适应 3D 定位 Two-dimensional (2D) freehand ultrasound is the mainstay in prenatal care and fetal growth monitoring. The task of matching corresponding cross-sectional planes in the 3D anatomy for a given 2D ultrasound brain scan is essential in freehand scanning, but challenging. We propose AdLocUI, a framework that Adaptively Localizes 2D Ultrasound Images in the 3D anatomical atlas without using any external tracking sensor.. We first train a convolutional neural network with 2D slices sampled from co-aligned 3D ultrasound volumes to predict their locations in the 3D anatomical atlas. Next, we fine-tune it with 2D freehand ultrasound images using a novel unsupervised cycle consistency, which utilizes the fact that the overall displacement of a sequence of images in the 3D anatomical atlas is equal to the displacement from the first image to the last in that sequence. We demonstrate that AdLocUI can adapt to three different ultrasound datasets, acquired with different machines and protocols, and achieves significantly better localization accuracy than the baselines. AdLocUI can be used for sensorless 2D freehand ultrasound guidance by the bedside. The source code is available at https://github.com/pakheiyeung/AdLocUI. 二维 (2D) 徒手超声是产前护理和胎儿生长监测的支柱。对于给定的 2D 超声脑部扫描，匹配 3D 解剖结构中相应的横截面平面的任务对于徒手扫描至关重要，但也具有挑战性。我们提出了 AdLocUI，这是一个在 3D 解剖图谱中自适应定位 2D 超声图像的框架，无需使用任何外部跟踪传感器。我们首先使用从共同对齐的 3D 超声体积中采样的 2D 切片来训练卷积神经网络，以预测它们在 3D 解剖图集中的位置。接下来，我们使用新颖的无监督循环一致性，通过 2D 徒手超声图像对其进行微调，该一致性利用了 3D 解剖图谱中图像序列的整体位移等于该序列中第一幅图像到最后一幅图像的位移这一事实。我们证明 AdLocUI 可以适应使用不同机器和协议获取的三种不同的超声数据集，并实现比基线更好的定位精度。 AdLocUI 可用于床边无传感器 2D 徒手超声引导。源代码可在 https://github.com/pakheiyeung/AdLocUI 获取。 本文提出了一种无需外部传感器的2D自由手超声脑图像3D定位框架AdLocUI。 Pak-Hei Yeung,Moska Aliasi,Monique Haak,The INTERGROWTH-21st Consortium,Weidi Xie,Ana I. authors_text: Alexander Feldman,Johan de Kleer,Ion Matei
title: A Quantum Algorithm for Computing All Diagnoses of a Switching Circuit
title_zh: 计算开关电路所有诊断的量子算法
abstract: Faults are stochastic by nature while most man-made systems, and especially computers, work deterministically. This necessitates the linking of probability theory with mathematical logics, automata, and switching circuit theory. This paper provides such a connecting via quantum information theory which is an intuitive approach as quantum physics obeys probability laws. In this paper we provide a novel approach for computing diagnosis of switching circuits with gate-based quantum computers. The approach is based on the idea of putting the qubits representing faults in superposition and compute all, often exponentially many, diagnoses simultaneously. We empirically compare the quantum algorithm for diagnostics to an approach based on SAT and model-counting. For a benchmark of combinational circuits we establish an error of less than one percent in estimating the true probability of faults.
summary: Faults are stochastic by nature while most man-made systems, and especially computers, work deterministically. This necessitates the linking of probability theory with mathematical logics, automata, and switching circuit theory. This paper provides such a connecting via quantum information theory which is an intuitive approach as quantum physics obeys probability laws. In this paper we provide a novel approach for computing diagnosis of switching circuits with gate-based quantum computers. The approach is based on the idea of putting the qubits representing faults in superposition and compute all, often exponentially many, diagnoses simultaneously. We empirically compare the quantum algorithm for diagnostics to an approach based on SAT and model-counting. For a benchmark of combinational circuits we establish an error of less than one percent in estimating the true probability of faults.
abstract_zh: 故障本质上是随机的，而大多数人造系统（尤其是计算机）的工作是确定性的。这就需要将概率论与数理逻辑、自动机和开关电路理论联系起来。本文通过量子信息理论提供了这种连接，这是一种直观的方法，因为量子物理学遵循概率定律。在本文中，我们提供了一种使用基于门的量子计算机对开关电路进行计算诊断的新方法。该方法基于将代表故障的量子位叠加并同时计算所有（通常是指数级数量）诊断的想法。我们根据经验将用于诊断的量子算法与基于 SAT 和模型计数的方法进行比较。对于组合电路的基准，我们在估计故障的真实概率时建立了小于百分之一的误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子计算的算法，用于同时计算开关电路的所有故障诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统系统故障诊断面临概率与确定性逻辑的结合难题，而量子理论天然符合概率特性，为诊断问题提供新思路。
AI.method: 利用量子比特叠加态表示故障可能性，通过量子计算并行处理指数级诊断组合，并与SAT模型计数方法进行对比验证。
AI.result: 在组合电路基准测试中，量子算法估计的故障概率误差低于1%，展现出优于经典方法的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 量子算法为开关电路诊断提供了高效解决方案，同时为量子计算在故障分析领域的应用开辟了新方向。

authors_text: Anja Folberth,Jutta Jahnel,Jascha Bareis,Carsten Orwat,Christian Wadephul
title: Tackling problems, harvesting benefits -- A systematic review of the regulatory debate around AI
title_zh: 解决问题，收获效益——对人工智能监管争论的系统回顾
comment: 26 pages
comments: 26 pages
abstract: How to integrate an emerging and all-pervasive technology such as AI into the structures and operations of our society is a question of contemporary politics, science and public debate. It has produced a considerable amount of international academic literature from different disciplines. This article analyzes the academic debate around the regulation of artificial intelligence (AI). The systematic review comprises a sample of 73 peer-reviewed journal articles published between January 1st, 2016, and December 31st, 2020. The analysis concentrates on societal risks and harms, questions of regulatory responsibility, and possible adequate policy frameworks, including risk-based and principle-based approaches. The main interests are proposed regulatory approaches and instruments. Various forms of interventions such as bans, approvals, standard-setting, and disclosure are presented. The assessments of the included papers indicate the complexity of the field, which shows its prematurity and the remaining lack of clarity. By presenting a structured analysis of the academic debate, we contribute both empirically and conceptually to a better understanding of the nexus of AI and regulation and the underlying normative decisions. A comparison of the scientific proposals with the proposed European AI regulation illustrates the specific approach of the regulation, its strengths and weaknesses.
summary: How to integrate an emerging and all-pervasive technology such as AI into the structures and operations of our society is a question of contemporary politics, science and public debate. It has produced a considerable amount of international academic literature from different disciplines. This article analyzes the academic debate around the regulation of artificial intelligence (AI). The systematic review comprises a sample of 73 peer-reviewed journal articles published between January 1st, 2016, and December 31st, 2020. The analysis concentrates on societal risks and harms, questions of regulatory responsibility, and possible adequate policy frameworks, including risk-based and principle-based approaches. The main interests are proposed regulatory approaches and instruments. Various forms of interventions such as bans, approvals, standard-setting, and disclosure are presented. The assessments of the included papers indicate the complexity of the field, which shows its prematurity and the remaining lack of clarity. By presenting a structured analysis of the academic debate, we contribute both empirically and conceptually to a better understanding of the nexus of AI and regulation and the underlying normative decisions. A comparison of the scientific proposals with the proposed European AI regulation illustrates the specific approach of the regulation, its strengths and weaknesses.
abstract_zh: 如何将人工智能等新兴且无处不在的技术融入我们社会的结构和运作是当代政治、科学和公共辩论的问题。它产生了大量来自不同学科的国际学术文献。本文分析了围绕人工智能（AI）监管的学术争论。该系统审查包括 2016 年 1 月 1 日至 2020 年 12 月 31 日期间发表的 73 篇同行评审期刊文章的样本。分析重点是社会风险和危害、监管责任问题以及可能的适当政策框架，包括基于风险和基于原则的方法。主要兴趣是拟议的监管方法和工具。提出了各种形式的干预措施，例如禁令、批准、标准制定和披露。对纳入论文的评估​​表明了该领域的复杂性，这表明其不成熟且仍然缺乏清晰度。通过对学术辩论进行结构化分析，我们从经验和概念上为更好地理解人工智能与监管的关系以及潜在的规范决策做出了贡献。将科学提案与拟议的欧洲人工智能法规进行比较，说明了该法规的具体方法、其优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在系统综述人工智能监管的学术辩论，分析其监管方法、风险及政策框架，并比较现有研究与欧盟法规的异同。
AI.motivation: 人工智能技术的快速发展引发社会风险与监管需求，但学术界对监管路径存在分歧，需整合现有研究以指导政策制定。
AI.method: 通过系统综述方法，筛选并分析2016至2020年间发表的73篇同行评审期刊文章，聚焦社会风险、监管责任及政策框架，比较科学建议与欧盟法规。
AI.result: 研究发现AI监管领域复杂且缺乏共识，现有监管工具如禁令、标准制定等需进一步明确，学术建议与欧盟法规存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 系统综述有助于理解AI监管的规范性决策，未来需更明确的政策框架，同时欧盟法规的严格性与灵活性需进一步平衡。

method: 通过系统综述方法，筛选并分析2016至2020年间发表的73篇同行评审期刊文章，聚焦社会风险、监管责任及政策框架，比较科学建议与欧盟法规。
result: 研究发现AI监管领域复杂且缺乏共识，现有监管工具如禁令、标准制定等需进一步明确，学术建议与欧盟法规存在差异。
conclusion: 系统综述有助于理解AI监管的规范性决策，未来需更明确的政策框架，同时欧盟法规的严格性与灵活性需进一步平衡。
search_text: Tackling problems, harvesting benefits -- A systematic review of the regulatory debate around AI 解决问题，收获效益——对人工智能监管争论的系统回顾 How to integrate an emerging and all-pervasive technology such as AI into the structures and operations of our society is a question of contemporary politics, science and public debate. It has produced a considerable amount of international academic literature from different disciplines. This article analyzes the academic debate around the regulation of artificial intelligence (AI). The systematic review comprises a sample of 73 peer-reviewed journal articles published between January 1st, 2016, and December 31st, 2020. The analysis concentrates on societal risks and harms, questions of regulatory responsibility, and possible adequate policy frameworks, including risk-based and principle-based approaches. The main interests are proposed regulatory approaches and instruments. Various forms of interventions such as bans, approvals, standard-setting, and disclosure are presented. The assessments of the included papers indicate the complexity of the field, which shows its prematurity and the remaining lack of clarity. By presenting a structured analysis of the academic debate, we contribute both empirically and conceptually to a better understanding of the nexus of AI and regulation and the underlying normative decisions. A comparison of the scientific proposals with the proposed European AI regulation illustrates the specific approach of the regulation, its strengths and weaknesses. 如何将人工智能等新兴且无处不在的技术融入我们社会的结构和运作是当代政治、科学和公共辩论的问题。它产生了大量来自不同学科的国际学术文献。本文分析了围绕人工智能（AI）监管的学术争论。该系统审查包括 2016 年 1 月 1 日至 2020 年 12 月 31 日期间发表的 73 篇同行评审期刊文章的样本。分析重点是社会风险和危害、监管责任问题以及可能的适当政策框架，包括基于风险和基于原则的方法。主要兴趣是拟议的监管方法和工具。提出了各种形式的干预措施，例如禁令、批准、标准制定和披露。对纳入论文的评估​​表明了该领域的复杂性，这表明其不成熟且仍然缺乏清晰度。通过对学术辩论进行结构化分析，我们从经验和概念上为更好地理解人工智能与监管的关系以及潜在的规范决策做出了贡献。将科学提案与拟议的欧洲人工智能法规进行比较，说明了该法规的具体方法、其优点和缺点。 本文旨在系统综述人工智能监管的学术辩论，分析其监管方法、风险及政策框架，并比较现有研究与欧盟法规的异同。 Anja Folberth,Jutta Jahnel,Jascha Bareis,Carsten Orwat,Christian Wadephul cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Francesca Mangili,Giorgia Adorni,Alberto Piatti,Claudio Bonesana,Alessandro Antonucci
title: Modelling Assessment Rubrics through Bayesian Networks: a Pragmatic Approach
title_zh: 通过贝叶斯网络对评估规则进行建模：一种实用的方法
comment: ef:Proceedings of 2022 International Conference on Software, Telecommunications and Computer Networks (SoftCOM), pp. 1-6
comments: ef:Proceedings of 2022 International Conference on Software, Telecommunications and Computer Networks (SoftCOM), pp. 1-6
abstract: Automatic assessment of learner competencies is a fundamental task in intelligent tutoring systems. An assessment rubric typically and effectively describes relevant competencies and competence levels. This paper presents an approach to deriving a learner model directly from an assessment rubric defining some (partial) ordering of competence levels. The model is based on Bayesian networks and exploits logical gates with uncertainty (often referred to as noisy gates) to reduce the number of parameters of the model, so to simplify their elicitation by experts and allow real-time inference in intelligent tutoring systems. We illustrate how the approach can be applied to automatize the human assessment of an activity developed for testing computational thinking skills. The simple elicitation of the model starting from the assessment rubric opens up the possibility of quickly automating the assessment of several tasks, making them more easily exploitable in the context of adaptive assessment tools and intelligent tutoring systems.
summary: Automatic assessment of learner competencies is a fundamental task in intelligent tutoring systems. An assessment rubric typically and effectively describes relevant competencies and competence levels. This paper presents an approach to deriving a learner model directly from an assessment rubric defining some (partial) ordering of competence levels. The model is based on Bayesian networks and exploits logical gates with uncertainty (often referred to as noisy gates) to reduce the number of parameters of the model, so to simplify their elicitation by experts and allow real-time inference in intelligent tutoring systems. We illustrate how the approach can be applied to automatize the human assessment of an activity developed for testing computational thinking skills. The simple elicitation of the model starting from the assessment rubric opens up the possibility of quickly automating the assessment of several tasks, making them more easily exploitable in the context of adaptive assessment tools and intelligent tutoring systems.
abstract_zh: 学习者能力的自动评估是智能辅导系统的一项基本任务。评估标准通常有效地描述相关能力和能力水平。本文提出了一种直接从定义能力水平的某些（部分）排序的评估标准导出学习者模型的方法。该模型基于贝叶斯网络，利用具有不确定性的逻辑门（通常称为噪声门）来减少模型参数的数量，从而简化专家的启发并允许智能辅导系统中的实时推理。我们说明了如何应用该方法来自动对为测试计算思维技能而开发的活动进行人工评估。从评估标准开始简单地引出模型，开启了快速自动化评估多项任务的可能性，使它们在自适应评估工具和智能辅导系统的背景下更容易利用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯网络的方法，通过评估量规直接构建学习者模型，实现智能辅导系统中自动化能力评估。
AI.motivation: 传统评估方法参数繁多且难以实时推理，而评估量规能有效描述能力层级，需探索更高效自动化评估方案。
AI.method: 利用贝叶斯网络结合不确定性逻辑门（噪声门）简化模型参数，通过评估量规快速构建学习者模型。
AI.result: 成功应用于计算思维技能评估活动，验证了方法可快速自动化多任务评估并支持实时推理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化模型构建流程，提升了自适应评估工具和智能辅导系统的自动化评估效率。
