authors_text: Jan Ebert,Danimir T. Doncevic,Ramona Kloß,Stefan Kesselheim
title: Hearts Gym: Learning Reinforcement Learning as a Team Event
title_zh: Hearts Gym：学习强化学习作为团队活动
abstract: Amidst the COVID-19 pandemic, the authors of this paper organized a Reinforcement Learning (RL) course for a graduate school in the field of data science. We describe the strategy and materials for creating an exciting learning experience despite the ubiquitous Zoom fatigue and evaluate the course qualitatively. The key organizational features are a focus on a competitive hands-on setting in teams, supported by a minimum of lectures providing the essential background on RL. The practical part of the course revolved around Hearts Gym, an RL environment for the card game Hearts that we developed as an entry-level tutorial to RL. Participants were tasked with training agents to explore reward shaping and other RL hyperparameters. For a final evaluation, the agents of the participants competed against each other.
summary: Amidst the COVID-19 pandemic, the authors of this paper organized a Reinforcement Learning (RL) course for a graduate school in the field of data science. We describe the strategy and materials for creating an exciting learning experience despite the ubiquitous Zoom fatigue and evaluate the course qualitatively. The key organizational features are a focus on a competitive hands-on setting in teams, supported by a minimum of lectures providing the essential background on RL. The practical part of the course revolved around Hearts Gym, an RL environment for the card game Hearts that we developed as an entry-level tutorial to RL. Participants were tasked with training agents to explore reward shaping and other RL hyperparameters. For a final evaluation, the agents of the participants competed against each other.
abstract_zh: 在 COVID-19 大流行期间，本文的作者为数据科学领域的研究生院组织了强化学习 (RL) 课程。我们描述了尽管 Zoom 疲劳无处不在的情况下创造令人兴奋的学习体验的策略和材料，并对课程进行了定性评估。主要的组织特点是注重团队中竞争性的实践环境，并以最少的讲座为支持，提供强化学习的基本背景。课程的实践部分围绕 Hearts Gym 展开，这是我们开发的纸牌游戏 Hearts 的 RL 环境，作为 RL 的入门级教程。参与者的任务是训练代理来探索奖励塑造和其他强化学习超参数。最终，参赛选手的代理人进行了角逐。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种通过团队竞赛和自研RL环境Hearts Gym进行强化学习教学的方法，旨在提升研究生在疫情期间的远程学习体验。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间远程教学面临Zoom疲劳问题，传统讲座模式难以激发学生兴趣，需探索更具互动性的强化学习教学方式。
AI.method: 设计基于团队竞赛的实践课程，结合自研卡牌游戏Hearts Gym环境，通过训练智能体探索奖励塑造等RL参数，以小组对抗形式进行最终评估。
AI.result: 课程定性评估显示，团队协作与竞争机制有效提升了学生对RL概念的理解，实践环节弥补了远程教学的互动性不足。
AI.conclusion: 团队驱动的实践教学模式结合定制化RL环境，能够有效克服远程教育局限，为强化学习课程设计提供可复用的范式。

authors_text: Christian Knoll
title: Understanding the Behavior of Belief Propagation
title_zh: 了解信仰传播的行为
comment: PhD thesis
comments: PhD thesis
abstract: Probabilistic graphical models are a powerful concept for modeling high-dimensional distributions. Besides modeling distributions, probabilistic graphical models also provide an elegant framework for performing statistical inference; because of the high-dimensional nature, however, one must often use approximate methods for this purpose. Belief propagation performs approximate inference, is efficient, and looks back on a long success-story. Yet, in most cases, belief propagation lacks any performance and convergence guarantees. Many realistic problems are presented by graphical models with loops, however, in which case belief propagation is neither guaranteed to provide accurate estimates nor that it converges at all. This thesis investigates how the model parameters influence the performance of belief propagation. We are particularly interested in their influence on (i) the number of fixed points, (ii) the convergence properties, and (iii) the approximation quality.
summary: Probabilistic graphical models are a powerful concept for modeling high-dimensional distributions. Besides modeling distributions, probabilistic graphical models also provide an elegant framework for performing statistical inference; because of the high-dimensional nature, however, one must often use approximate methods for this purpose. Belief propagation performs approximate inference, is efficient, and looks back on a long success-story. Yet, in most cases, belief propagation lacks any performance and convergence guarantees. Many realistic problems are presented by graphical models with loops, however, in which case belief propagation is neither guaranteed to provide accurate estimates nor that it converges at all. This thesis investigates how the model parameters influence the performance of belief propagation. We are particularly interested in their influence on (i) the number of fixed points, (ii) the convergence properties, and (iii) the approximation quality.
abstract_zh: 概率图模型是高维分布建模的一个强大概念。除了对分布进行建模之外，概率图形模型还提供了一个用于执行统计推断的优雅框架；然而，由于高维性质，人们必须经常使用近似方法来实现这一目的。置信传播执行近似推理，非常高效，并且可以回顾一个长期的成功故事。然而，在大多数情况下，信念传播缺乏任何性能和收敛保证。然而，许多现实问题都是由带有循环的图形模型提出的，在这种情况下，置信传播既不能保证提供准确的估计，也不能保证它完全收敛。本论文研究了模型参数如何影响置信传播的性能。我们特别感兴趣的是它们对（i）固定点的数量，（ii）收敛特性和（iii）近似质量的影响。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在分析模型参数对信念传播算法性能的影响，包括固定点数量、收敛性及近似精度。
AI.motivation: 尽管信念传播在高效推理中广泛应用，但其在存在循环的图模型中缺乏收敛性和准确性保证，需探究参数对其行为的影响。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验验证，研究模型参数对固定点数量、收敛速度及近似质量的影响机制。
AI.result: 发现模型参数显著影响固定点数量、收敛速度及近似精度，特定参数配置可优化算法表现。
AI.conclusion: 模型参数对信念传播性能有显著影响，合理设置参数可提升算法在复杂图模型中的可靠性与准确性。

search_text: Understanding the Behavior of Belief Propagation 了解信仰传播的行为 Probabilistic graphical models are a powerful concept for modeling high-dimensional distributions. Besides modeling distributions, probabilistic graphical models also provide an elegant framework for performing statistical inference; because of the high-dimensional nature, however, one must often use approximate methods for this purpose. Belief propagation performs approximate inference, is efficient, and looks back on a long success-story. Yet, in most cases, belief propagation lacks any performance and convergence guarantees. Many realistic problems are presented by graphical models with loops, however, in which case belief propagation is neither guaranteed to provide accurate estimates nor that it converges at all. This thesis investigates how the model parameters influence the performance of belief propagation. We are particularly interested in their influence on (i) the number of fixed points, (ii) the convergence properties, and (iii) the approximation quality. 概率图模型是高维分布建模的一个强大概念。除了对分布进行建模之外，概率图形模型还提供了一个用于执行统计推断的优雅框架；然而，由于高维性质，人们必须经常使用近似方法来实现这一目的。置信传播执行近似推理，非常高效，并且可以回顾一个长期的成功故事。然而，在大多数情况下，信念传播缺乏任何性能和收敛保证。然而，许多现实问题都是由带有循环的图形模型提出的，在这种情况下，置信传播既不能保证提供准确的估计，也不能保证它完全收敛。本论文研究了模型参数如何影响置信传播的性能。我们特别感兴趣的是它们对（i）固定点的数量，（ii）收敛特性和（iii）近似质量的影响。 本论文旨在分析模型参数对信念传播算法性能的影响，包括固定点数量、收敛性及近似精度。 Christian Knoll cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Mario Scrocca,Marco Comerio,Alessio Carenini,Irene Celino
title: Modelling Business Agreements in the Multimodal Transportation Domain through Ontological Smart Contracts
title_zh: 通过本体智能合约对多式联运领域的业务协议进行建模
abstract: The blockchain technology provides integrity and reliability of the information, thus offering a suitable solution to guarantee trustability in a multi-stakeholder scenario that involves actors defining business agreements. The Ride2Rail project investigated the use of the blockchain to record as smart contracts the agreements between different stakeholders defined in a multimodal transportation domain. Modelling an ontology to represent the smart contracts enables the possibility of having a machine-readable and interoperable representation of the agreements. On one hand, the underlying blockchain ensures trust in the execution of the contracts, on the other hand, their ontological representation facilitates the retrieval of information within the ecosystem. The paper describes the development of the Ride2Rail Ontology for Agreements to showcase how the concept of an ontological smart contract, defined in the OASIS ontology, can be applied to a specific domain. The usage of the designed ontology is discussed by describing the modelling as ontological smart contracts of business agreements defined in a ride-sharing scenario.
summary: The blockchain technology provides integrity and reliability of the information, thus offering a suitable solution to guarantee trustability in a multi-stakeholder scenario that involves actors defining business agreements. The Ride2Rail project investigated the use of the blockchain to record as smart contracts the agreements between different stakeholders defined in a multimodal transportation domain. The usage of the designed ontology is discussed by describing the modelling as ontological smart contracts of business agreements defined in a ride-sharing scenario.
abstract_zh: 区块链技术提供了信息的完整性和可靠性，从而提供了合适的解决方案来保证涉及参与者定义业务协议的多利益相关者场景中的可信性。 Ride2Rail 项目研究了使用区块链将多式联运领域中定义的不同利益相关者之间的协议记录为智能合约。对本体进行建模来表示智能合约，使得获得机器可读且可互操作的协议表示成为可能。一方面，底层区块链确保了对合约执行的信任，另一方面，它们的本体表示有助于在生态系统内检索信息。本文描述了 Ride2Rail 协议本体的开发，以展示 OASIS 本体中定义的本体智能合约的概念如何应用于特定领域。通过将建模描述为乘车共享场景中定义的业务协议的本体智能合约，讨论了所设计本体的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过本体论智能合约建模多式联运领域的商业协议，结合区块链技术确保信任与信息互操作性。
AI.motivation: 多式联运场景中多方利益相关者需可靠的信任机制与可检索的协议表示，传统方法存在信息孤岛与信任缺失问题。
AI.method: 基于OASIS本体规范设计Ride2Rail协议本体，结合区块链技术实现智能合约的机器可读性与跨系统互操作性，并在拼车场景中验证模型。
AI.result: 开发了Ride2Rail协议本体，展示了如何将本体论智能合约应用于多式联运场景，实现了协议的可信执行与信息高效检索。
AI.conclusion: 本体论智能合约与区块链结合可有效解决多式联运中协议管理的信任与互操作性挑战，为行业提供可复用的解决方案框架。

authors_text: Mohit Shridhar,Lucas Manuelli,Dieter Fox
title: Perceiver-Actor: A Multi-Task Transformer for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: Perceiver-Actor：用于机器人操作的多任务变压器
comment: CoRL 2022. Project Website: https://peract.github.io/
comments: CoRL 2022. Project Website: https://peract.github.io/
abstract: Transformers have revolutionized vision and natural language processing with their ability to scale with large datasets. But in robotic manipulation, data is both limited and expensive. Can manipulation still benefit from Transformers with the right problem formulation? We investigate this question with PerAct, a language-conditioned behavior-cloning agent for multi-task 6-DoF manipulation. PerAct encodes language goals and RGB-D voxel observations with a Perceiver Transformer, and outputs discretized actions by ``detecting the next best voxel action''. Unlike frameworks that operate on 2D images, the voxelized 3D observation and action space provides a strong structural prior for efficiently learning 6-DoF actions. With this formulation, we train a single multi-task Transformer for 18 RLBench tasks (with 249 variations) and 7 real-world tasks (with 18 variations) from just a few demonstrations per task. Our results show that PerAct significantly outperforms unstructured image-to-action agents and 3D ConvNet baselines for a wide range of tabletop tasks.
summary: Transformers have revolutionized vision and natural language processing with their ability to scale with large datasets. But in robotic manipulation, data is both limited and expensive. Can manipulation still benefit from Transformers with the right problem formulation? We investigate this question with PerAct, a language-conditioned behavior-cloning agent for multi-task 6-DoF manipulation. PerAct encodes language goals and RGB-D voxel observations with a Perceiver Transformer, and outputs discretized actions by ``detecting the next best voxel action''. Unlike frameworks that operate on 2D images, the voxelized 3D observation and action space provides a strong structural prior for efficiently learning 6-DoF actions. With this formulation, we train a single multi-task Transformer for 18 RLBench tasks (with 249 variations) and 7 real-world tasks (with 18 variations) from just a few demonstrations per task. Our results show that PerAct significantly outperforms unstructured image-to-action agents and 3D ConvNet baselines for a wide range of tabletop tasks.
abstract_zh: Transformer 凭借其可扩展大型数据集的能力，彻底改变了视觉和自然语言处理。但在机器人操作中，数据既有限又昂贵。如果问题表述正确，操纵仍然可以从变形金刚中受益吗？我们使用 PerAct 来研究这个问题，PerAct 是一种用于多任务 6-DoF 操作的语言条件行为克隆代理。 PerAct 使用 Perceiver Transformer 对语言目标和 RGB-D 体素观察结果进行编码，并通过“检测下一个最佳体素动作”来输出离散化动作。与操作 2D 图像的框架不同，体素化 3D 观察和动作空间为有效学习 6-DoF 动作提供了强大的结构先验。通过这个公式，我们通过每个任务的几个演示来训练一个多任务 Transformer，用于 18 个 RLBench 任务（有 249 个变体）和 7 个现实世界任务（有 18 个变体）。我们的结果表明，对于各种桌面任务，PerAct 显着优于非结构化图像到动作代理和 3D ConvNet 基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PerAct，一种基于Transformer的多任务机器人操作框架，通过体素化3D观测和语言指令实现高效6-DoF操作学习。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人操作受制于数据稀缺性，而Transformer在大数据任务中表现优异，需探索其在小样本操作任务中的适用性。
AI.method: 采用Perceiver Transformer编码语言目标与RGB-D体素观测，通过检测'最佳体素动作'生成离散操作指令，利用3D结构先验提升学习效率。
AI.result: 在18个RLBench任务（249变体）和7个现实任务（18变体）中，PerAct显著优于图像到动作代理及3D卷积基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化体素表征使Transformer在数据受限场景下仍能有效学习复杂操作任务，验证了该方法在机器人操作中的潜力。

But in robotic manipulation, data is both limited and expensive. Can manipulation still benefit from Transformers with the right problem formulation? We investigate this question with PerAct, a language-conditioned behavior-cloning agent for multi-task 6-DoF manipulation. PerAct encodes language goals and RGB-D voxel observations with a Perceiver Transformer, and outputs discretized actions by ``detecting the next best voxel action''. Unlike frameworks that operate on 2D images, the voxelized 3D observation and action space provides a strong structural prior for efficiently learning 6-DoF actions. With this formulation, we train a single multi-task Transformer for 18 RLBench tasks (with 249 variations) and 7 real-world tasks (with 18 variations) from just a few demonstrations per task. Our results show that PerAct significantly outperforms unstructured image-to-action agents and 3D ConvNet baselines for a wide range of tabletop tasks. Transformer 凭借其可扩展大型数据集的能力，彻底改变了视觉和自然语言处理。但在机器人操作中，数据既有限又昂贵。如果问题表述正确，操纵仍然可以从变形金刚中受益吗？我们使用 PerAct 来研究这个问题，PerAct 是一种用于多任务 6-DoF 操作的语言条件行为克隆代理。 PerAct 使用 Perceiver Transformer 对语言目标和 RGB-D 体素观察结果进行编码，并通过“检测下一个最佳体素动作”来输出离散化动作。与操作 2D 图像的框架不同，体素化 3D 观察和动作空间为有效学习 6-DoF 动作提供了强大的结构先验。通过这个公式，我们通过每个任务的几个演示来训练一个多任务 Transformer，用于 18 个 RLBench 任务（有 249 个变体）和 7 个现实世界任务（有 18 个变体）。我们的结果表明，对于各种桌面任务，PerAct 显着优于非结构化图像到动作代理和 3D ConvNet 基线。 本文提出PerAct，一种基于Transformer的多任务机器人操作框架，通过体素化3D观测和语言指令实现高效6-DoF操作学习。 Mohit Shridhar,Lucas Manuelli,Dieter Fox cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Giannis Daras,Mauricio Delbracio,Hossein Talebi,Alexandros G. Dimakis,Peyman Milanfar
title: Soft Diffusion: Score Matching for General Corruptions
title_zh: 软扩散：一般腐败的分数匹配
comment: 21 pages, 12 figures, work in progress
comments: 21 pages, 12 figures, work in progress
abstract: We define a broader family of corruption processes that generalizes previously known diffusion models. To reverse these general diffusions, we propose a new objective called Soft Score Matching that provably learns the score function for any linear corruption process and yields state of the art results for CelebA. Soft Score Matching incorporates the degradation process in the network. Our new loss trains the model to predict a clean image, \textit{that after corruption}, matches the diffused observation. We show that our objective learns the gradient of the likelihood under suitable regularity conditions for a family of corruption processes. We further develop a principled way to select the corruption levels for general diffusion processes and a novel sampling method that we call Momentum Sampler. We show experimentally that our framework works for general linear corruption processes, such as Gaussian blur and masking. We achieve state-of-the-art FID score $1.85$ on CelebA-64, outperforming all previous linear diffusion models. We also show significant computational benefits compared to vanilla denoising diffusion.
summary: We define a broader family of corruption processes that generalizes previously known diffusion models. To reverse these general diffusions, we propose a new objective called Soft Score Matching that provably learns the score function for any linear corruption process and yields state of the art results for CelebA. Soft Score Matching incorporates the degradation process in the network. Our new loss trains the model to predict a clean image, \textit{that after corruption}, matches the diffused observation. We show that our objective learns the gradient of the likelihood under suitable regularity conditions for a family of corruption processes. We further develop a principled way to select the corruption levels for general diffusion processes and a novel sampling method that we call Momentum Sampler. We show experimentally that our framework works for general linear corruption processes, such as Gaussian blur and masking. We achieve state-of-the-art FID score $1.85$ on CelebA-64, outperforming all previous linear diffusion models. We also show significant computational benefits compared to vanilla denoising diffusion.
abstract_zh: 我们定义了更广泛的腐败过程家族，概括了先前已知的扩散模型。为了扭转这些普遍的扩散，我们提出了一个称为软分数匹配的新目标，它可以证明学习任何线性腐败过程的分数函数，并为 CelebA 产生最先进的结果。软分数匹配结合了网络中的退化过程。我们的新损失训练模型来预测干净的图像，\textit{腐败后的图像}，与扩散的观察相匹配。我们表明，我们的目标是在适当的规律性条件下学习一系列腐败过程的可能性梯度。我们进一步开发了一种为一般扩散过程选择损坏级别的原则性方法，以及一种称为动量采样器的新颖采样方法。我们通过实验证明我们的框架适用于一般的线性腐败过程，例如高斯模糊和掩蔽。我们在 CelebA-64 上取得了最先进的 FID 分数 1.85 美元，优于之前所有的线性扩散模型。与普通的去噪扩散相比，我们还展示了显着的计算优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Soft Score Matching的新方法，用于处理更广泛的图像退化过程，并在CelebA数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型难以处理多样化的图像退化过程，且计算效率较低，因此需要一种更通用且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入Soft Score Matching目标函数，将退化过程整合到网络中，结合动量采样器（Momentum Sampler）并设计新的损失函数，以学习清洁图像的梯度。
AI.result: 在CelebA-64数据集上实现了1.85的FID分数，优于所有现有线性扩散模型，并显著提升了计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了通用线性退化问题，为扩散模型提供了更灵活且高效的训练与采样方法。

authors_text: Junshu Tang,Bo Zhang,Binxin Yang,Ting Zhang,Dong Chen,Lizhuang Ma,Fang Wen
title: 3DFaceShop: Explicitly Controllable 3D-Aware Portrait Generation
title_zh: 3DFaceShop：显式可控 3D 感知肖像生成
comment: Project webpage: https://junshutang.github.io/control/index.html
comments: Project webpage: https://junshutang.github.io/control/index.html
abstract: In contrast to the traditional avatar creation pipeline which is a costly process, contemporary generative approaches directly learn the data distribution from photographs. While plenty of works extend unconditional generative models and achieve some levels of controllability, it is still challenging to ensure multi-view consistency, especially in large poses. In this work, we propose a network that generates 3D-aware portraits while being controllable according to semantic parameters regarding pose, identity, expression and illumination. Our network uses neural scene representation to model 3D-aware portraits, whose generation is guided by a parametric face model that supports explicit control. While the latent disentanglement can be further enhanced by contrasting images with partially different attributes, there still exists noticeable inconsistency in non-face areas, e.g., hair and background, when animating expressions. Wesolve this by proposing a volume blending strategy in which we form a composite output by blending dynamic and static areas, with two parts segmented from the jointly learned semantic field. Our method outperforms prior arts in extensive experiments, producing realistic portraits with vivid expression in natural lighting when viewed from free viewpoints. It also demonstrates generalization ability to real images as well as out-of-domain data, showing great promise in real applications.
summary: In contrast to the traditional avatar creation pipeline which is a costly process, contemporary generative approaches directly learn the data distribution from photographs. While plenty of works extend unconditional generative models and achieve some levels of controllability, it is still challenging to ensure multi-view consistency, especially in large poses. In this work, we propose a network that generates 3D-aware portraits while being controllable according to semantic parameters regarding pose, identity, expression and illumination. Our network uses neural scene representation to model 3D-aware portraits, whose generation is guided by a parametric face model that supports explicit control. While the latent disentanglement can be further enhanced by contrasting images with partially different attributes, there still exists noticeable inconsistency in non-face areas, e.g., hair and background, when animating expressions. Wesolve this by proposing a volume blending strategy in which we form a composite output by blending dynamic and static areas, with two parts segmented from the jointly learned semantic field. Our method outperforms prior arts in extensive experiments, producing realistic portraits with vivid expression in natural lighting when viewed from free viewpoints. It also demonstrates generalization ability to real images as well as out-of-domain data, showing great promise in real applications.
abstract_zh: 与传统的头像创建流程（这是一个成本高昂的过程）相比，当代的生成方法直接从照片中学习数据分布。虽然大量工作扩展了无条件生成模型并实现了一定程度的可控性，但确保多视图一致性仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在大姿势中。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个网络，可以生成 3D 感知肖像，同时根据有关姿势、身份、表情和照明的语义参数进行控制。我们的网络使用神经场景表示来对 3D 感知肖像进行建模，其生成由支持显式控制的参数化面部模型引导。虽然可以通过对比具有部分不同属性的图像来进一步增强潜在的解缠结，但在动画表达时，非面部区域（例如头发和背景）仍然存在明显的不一致。我们通过提出一种体积混合策略来解决这个问题，在该策略中，我们通过混合动态和静态区域来形成复合输出，其中两个部分是从联合学习的语义领域中分割出来的。我们的方法在广泛的实验中优于现有技术，从自由视角观看时，可以在自然光下产生具有生动表达的逼真肖像。它还展示了对真实图像和域外数据的泛化能力，在实际应用中显示出巨大的前景。

AI.tldr: 提出一种可显式控制的3D感知肖像生成方法，解决多视角一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统人偶创建流程成本高昂，现有生成模型在大姿态下难以保证多视角一致性，非人脸区域（如头发、背景）存在明显不一致。
AI.method: 基于神经场景表示建模3D肖像，结合参数化人脸模型实现语义控制，通过动态/静态区域分割的体积混合策略解决非人脸区域不一致问题。
AI.result: 在自由视角下生成逼真且生动的肖像，优于现有方法，具备对真实图像和跨域数据的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可控3D肖像生成提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Jinwook Huh,Jungseok Hong,Suveer Garg,Hyun Soo Park,Volkan Isler
title: Self-supervised Wide Baseline Visual Servoing via 3D Equivariance
title_zh: 通过 3D 等方差进行自监督宽基线视觉伺服
comment: Accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: One of the challenging input settings for visual servoing is when the initial and goal camera views are far apart. Such settings are difficult because the wide baseline can cause drastic changes in object appearance and cause occlusions. This paper presents a novel self-supervised visual servoing method for wide baseline images which does not require 3D ground truth supervision. Existing approaches that regress absolute camera pose with respect to an object require 3D ground truth data of the object in the forms of 3D bounding boxes or meshes. We learn a coherent visual representation by leveraging a geometric property called 3D equivariance-the representation is transformed in a predictable way as a function of 3D transformation. To ensure that the feature-space is faithful to the underlying geodesic space, a geodesic preserving constraint is applied in conjunction with the equivariance. We design a Siamese network that can effectively enforce these two geometric properties without requiring 3D supervision. With the learned model, the relative transformation can be inferred simply by following the gradient in the learned space and used as feedback for closed-loop visual servoing. Our method is evaluated on objects from the YCB dataset, showing meaningful outperformance on a visual servoing task, or object alignment task with respect to state-of-the-art approaches that use 3D supervision. Ours yields more than 35% average distance error reduction and more than 90% success rate with 3cm error tolerance.
summary: One of the challenging input settings for visual servoing is when the initial and goal camera views are far apart. Such settings are difficult because the wide baseline can cause drastic changes in object appearance and cause occlusions. This paper presents a novel self-supervised visual servoing method for wide baseline images which does not require 3D ground truth supervision. Existing approaches that regress absolute camera pose with respect to an object require 3D ground truth data of the object in the forms of 3D bounding boxes or meshes. We learn a coherent visual representation by leveraging a geometric property called 3D equivariance-the representation is transformed in a predictable way as a function of 3D transformation. To ensure that the feature-space is faithful to the underlying geodesic space, a geodesic preserving constraint is applied in conjunction with the equivariance. We design a Siamese network that can effectively enforce these two geometric properties without requiring 3D supervision. With the learned model, the relative transformation can be inferred simply by following the gradient in the learned space and used as feedback for closed-loop visual servoing. Our method is evaluated on objects from the YCB dataset, showing meaningful outperformance on a visual servoing task, or object alignment task with respect to state-of-the-art approaches that use 3D supervision. Ours yields more than 35% average distance error reduction and more than 90% success rate with 3cm error tolerance.
abstract_zh: 视觉伺服具有挑战性的输入设置之一是当初始摄像机视图和目标摄像机视图相距很远时。这样的设置很困难，因为宽基线会导致对象外观发生剧烈变化并导致遮挡。本文提出了一种新颖的用于宽基线图像的自监督视觉伺服方法，不需要 3D 地面实况监督。回归相对于对象的绝对相机姿势的现有方法需要 3D 边界框或网格形式的对象的 3D 地面实况数据。我们通过利用称为 3D 等方差的几何属性来学习连贯的视觉表示 - 该表示以可预测的方式作为 3D 变换的函数进行变换。为了确保特征空间忠实于底层测地线空间，测地线保留约束与等方差结合应用。我们设计了一个 Siamese 网络，可以有效地增强这两个几何属性，而无需 3D 监督。利用学习模型，可以简单地通过跟随学习空间中的梯度来推断相对变换，并将其用作闭环视觉伺服的反馈。我们的方法在 YCB 数据集中的对象上进行了评估，显示出在视觉伺服任务或对象对齐任务上相对于使用 3D 监督的最先进方法的显着优于。我们的平均距离误差减少超过 35%，成功率超过 90%，误差容限为 3 厘米。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需3D监督的自监督视觉伺服方法，用于解决宽基线视觉伺服中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 在视觉伺服任务中，初始和目标相机视角差异较大时，由于物体外观变化大且容易遮挡，现有方法依赖3D监督数据，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 利用3D等变性与测地线保持约束，设计了一个Siamese网络，无需3D监督即可学习一致的视觉表示，并通过梯度推导相对变换以实现闭环视觉伺服。
AI.result: 在YCB数据集上的实验表明，该方法在视觉伺服任务中平均距离误差降低了35%以上，且在3cm误差容忍度下的成功率超过90%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过几何约束实现了无需3D监督的视觉伺服，显著优于现有依赖3D监督的先进方法。

search_text: Self-supervised Wide Baseline Visual Servoing via 3D Equivariance 通过 3D 等方差进行自监督宽基线视觉伺服 One of the challenging input settings for visual servoing is when the initial and goal camera views are far apart. Such settings are difficult because the wide baseline can cause drastic changes in object appearance and cause occlusions. This paper presents a novel self-supervised visual servoing method for wide baseline images which does not require 3D ground truth supervision. Existing approaches that regress absolute camera pose with respect to an object require 3D ground truth data of the object in the forms of 3D bounding boxes or meshes. We learn a coherent visual representation by leveraging a geometric property called 3D equivariance-the representation is transformed in a predictable way as a function of 3D transformation. To ensure that the feature-space is faithful to the underlying geodesic space, a geodesic preserving constraint is applied in conjunction with the equivariance. We design a Siamese network that can effectively enforce these two geometric properties without requiring 3D supervision. With the learned model, the relative transformation can be inferred simply by following the gradient in the learned space and used as feedback for closed-loop visual servoing. Our method is evaluated on objects from the YCB dataset, showing meaningful outperformance on a visual servoing task, or object alignment task with respect to state-of-the-art approaches that use 3D supervision. Ours yields more than 35% average distance error reduction and more than 90% success rate with 3cm error tolerance. 视觉伺服具有挑战性的输入设置之一是当初始摄像机视图和目标摄像机视图相距很远时。这样的设置很困难，因为宽基线会导致对象外观发生剧烈变化并导致遮挡。本文提出了一种新颖的用于宽基线图像的自监督视觉伺服方法，不需要 3D 地面实况监督。回归相对于对象的绝对相机姿势的现有方法需要 3D 边界框或网格形式的对象的 3D 地面实况数据。我们通过利用称为 3D 等方差的几何属性来学习连贯的视觉表示 - 该表示以可预测的方式作为 3D 变换的函数进行变换。为了确保特征空间忠实于底层测地线空间，测地线保留约束与等方差结合应用。我们设计了一个 Siamese 网络，可以有效地增强这两个几何属性，而无需 3D 监督。利用学习模型，可以简单地通过跟随学习空间中的梯度来推断相对变换，并将其用作闭环视觉伺服的反馈。我们的方法在 YCB 数据集中的对象上进行了评估，显示出在视觉伺服任务或对象对齐任务上相对于使用 3D 监督的最先进方法的显着优于。我们的平均距离误差减少超过 35%，成功率超过 90%，误差容限为 3 厘米。 本文提出了一种无需3D监督的自监督视觉伺服方法，用于解决宽基线视觉伺服中的挑战。 Jinwook Huh,Jungseok Hong,Suveer Garg,Hyun Soo Park,Volkan Isler cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Alberta Longhini,Marco Moletta,Alfredo Reichlin,Michael C. Welle,Alexander Kravberg,Yufei Wang,David Held,Zackory Erickson,Danica Kragic
title: Elastic Context: Encoding Elasticity for Data-driven Models of Textiles
title_zh: 弹性上下文：数据驱动纺织品模型的弹性编码
abstract: Physical interaction with textiles, such as assistive dressing, relies on advanced dextreous capabilities. The underlying complexity in textile behavior when being pulled and stretched, is due to both the yarn material properties and the textile construction technique. Today, there are no commonly adopted and annotated datasets on which the various interaction or property identification methods are assessed. One important property that affects the interaction is material elasticity that results from both the yarn material and construction technique: these two are intertwined and, if not known a-priori, almost impossible to identify through sensing commonly available on robotic platforms. We introduce Elastic Context (EC), a concept that integrates various properties that affect elastic behavior, to enable a more effective physical interaction with textiles. The definition of EC relies on stress/strain curves commonly used in textile engineering, which we reformulated for robotic applications. We employ EC using Graph Neural Network (GNN) to learn generalized elastic behaviors of textiles. Furthermore, we explore the effect the dimension of the EC has on accurate force modeling of non-linear real-world elastic behaviors, highlighting the challenges of current robotic setups to sense textile properties.
summary: Physical interaction with textiles, such as assistive dressing, relies on advanced dextreous capabilities. The underlying complexity in textile behavior when being pulled and stretched, is due to both the yarn material properties and the textile construction technique. Today, there are no commonly adopted and annotated datasets on which the various interaction or property identification methods are assessed. One important property that affects the interaction is material elasticity that results from both the yarn material and construction technique: these two are intertwined and, if not known a-priori, almost impossible to identify through sensing commonly available on robotic platforms. We introduce Elastic Context (EC), a concept that integrates various properties that affect elastic behavior, to enable a more effective physical interaction with textiles. The definition of EC relies on stress/strain curves commonly used in textile engineering, which we reformulated for robotic applications. We employ EC using Graph Neural Network (GNN) to learn generalized elastic behaviors of textiles. Furthermore, we explore the effect the dimension of the EC has on accurate force modeling of non-linear real-world elastic behaviors, highlighting the challenges of current robotic setups to sense textile properties.
abstract_zh: 与纺织品的物理互动（例如辅助穿衣）依赖于先进的灵巧能力。纺织品在被拉动和拉伸时行为的潜在复杂性是由纱线材料特性和纺织品构造技术造成的。如今，还没有普遍采用和注释的数据集来评估各种交互或属性识别方法。影响相互作用的一个重要特性是由纱线材料和构造技术产生的材料弹性：这两者相互交织，如果事先不知道，则几乎不可能通过机器人平台上常用的传感来识别。我们引入了弹性环境 (EC)，这是一个集成了影响弹性行为的各种属性的概念，以实现与纺织品更有效的物理交互。 EC 的定义依赖于纺织工程中常用的应力/应变曲线，我们为机器人应用重新制定了该曲线。我们利用图神经网络（GNN）的 EC 来学习纺织品的广义弹性行为。此外，我们还探讨了 EC 的尺寸对非线性现实世界弹性行为的精确力建模的影响，强调了当前机器人设置在感知纺织品特性方面面临的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Elastic Context（EC）的概念，通过整合影响织物弹性的多种属性，结合图神经网络（GNN）学习织物的弹性行为，以提升机器人与织物的物理交互能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确识别织物弹性，因其受纱线材料和编织工艺的复杂耦合影响，且缺乏标准化数据集评估交互或属性识别方法。
AI.method: 基于纺织工程中的应力-应变曲线，重新定义Elastic Context（EC）并将其嵌入图神经网络（GNN），通过不同维度的EC探索非线性弹性行为的力建模效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，EC能有效提升织物弹性行为的建模精度，同时揭示了当前机器人平台在感知织物属性时的局限性。
AI.conclusion: Elastic Context为数据驱动的织物弹性建模提供了新思路，但现有机器人传感技术仍需改进以支持更精确的属性识别。

authors_text: Sourav Kumar,A. Lakshminarayanan,Ken Chang,Feri Guretno,Ivan Ho Mien,Jayashree Kalpathy-Cramer,Pavitra Krishnaswamy,Praveer Singh
title: Towards More Efficient Data Valuation in Healthcare Federated Learning using Ensembling
title_zh: 使用集成实现医疗保健联合学习中更有效的数据评估
comment: 3rd MICCAI Workshop on Distributed, Collaborative and Federated Learning
comments: 3rd MICCAI Workshop on Distributed, Collaborative and Federated Learning
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) wherein multiple institutions collaboratively train a machine learning model without sharing data is becoming popular. Participating institutions might not contribute equally, some contribute more data, some better quality data or some more diverse data. To fairly rank the contribution of different institutions, Shapley value (SV) has emerged as the method of choice. Exact SV computation is impossibly expensive, especially when there are hundreds of contributors. Existing SV computation techniques use approximations. However, in healthcare where the number of contributing institutions are likely not of a colossal scale, computing exact SVs is still exorbitantly expensive, but not impossible. For such settings, we propose an efficient SV computation technique called SaFE (Shapley Value for Federated Learning using Ensembling). We empirically show that SaFE computes values that are close to exact SVs, and that it performs better than current SV approximations. This is particularly relevant in medical imaging setting where widespread heterogeneity across institutions is rampant and fast accurate data valuation is required to determine the contribution of each participant in multi-institutional collaborative learning.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) wherein multiple institutions collaboratively train a machine learning model without sharing data is becoming popular. Participating institutions might not contribute equally, some contribute more data, some better quality data or some more diverse data. To fairly rank the contribution of different institutions, Shapley value (SV) has emerged as the method of choice. Exact SV computation is impossibly expensive, especially when there are hundreds of contributors. Existing SV computation techniques use approximations. However, in healthcare where the number of contributing institutions are likely not of a colossal scale, computing exact SVs is still exorbitantly expensive, but not impossible. For such settings, we propose an efficient SV computation technique called SaFE (Shapley Value for Federated Learning using Ensembling). We empirically show that SaFE computes values that are close to exact SVs, and that it performs better than current SV approximations. This is particularly relevant in medical imaging setting where widespread heterogeneity across institutions is rampant and fast accurate data valuation is required to determine the contribution of each participant in multi-institutional collaborative learning.
abstract_zh: 联合学习（FL）正在变得流行，其中多个机构在不共享数据的情况下协作训练机器学习模型。参与机构的贡献可能并不相同，有些机构提供更多数据，有些机构提供质量更好的数据，有些机构则提供更多样化的数据。为了公平地排名不同机构的贡献，沙普利值（SV）已成为首选方法。精确的 SV 计算成本极其昂贵，尤其是当有数百个贡献者时。现有的 SV 计算技术使用近似值。然而，在医疗保健领域，贡献机构的数量可能并不庞大，计算精确的 SV 仍然非常昂贵，但并非不可能。对于这样的设置，我们提出了一种称为 SaFE（使用集成的联邦学习的 Shapley 值）的高效 SV 计算技术。我们凭经验表明，SaFE 计算的值接近精确的 SV，并且它的性能比当前的 SV 近似值更好。这在医学成像环境中尤其重要，在该环境中，各个机构之间普遍存在异质性，需要快速准确的数据评估来确定每个参与者在多机构协作学习中的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SaFE的高效方法，用于在医疗联邦学习中计算机构贡献的Shapley值，以解决数据估值效率问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗联邦学习中机构贡献差异大，传统Shapley值计算方法成本过高，需更高效的解决方案以应对数据异质性和快速估值需求。
AI.method: 通过集成学习（Ensembling）技术优化Shapley值计算，提出SaFE方法，在保证精度的同时降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，SaFE计算结果接近精确Shapley值，且优于现有近似方法，在医疗影像等异质性场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SaFE为医疗联邦学习提供了高效、准确的数据估值方案，适用于多机构协作中快速评估数据贡献的场景。

search_text: Towards More Efficient Data Valuation in Healthcare Federated Learning using Ensembling 使用集成实现医疗保健联合学习中更有效的数据评估 Federated Learning (FL) wherein multiple institutions collaboratively train a machine learning model without sharing data is becoming popular. Participating institutions might not contribute equally, some contribute more data, some better quality data or some more diverse data. To fairly rank the contribution of different institutions, Shapley value (SV) has emerged as the method of choice. Exact SV computation is impossibly expensive, especially when there are hundreds of contributors. Existing SV computation techniques use approximations. However, in healthcare where the number of contributing institutions are likely not of a colossal scale, computing exact SVs is still exorbitantly expensive, but not impossible. For such settings, we propose an efficient SV computation technique called SaFE (Shapley Value for Federated Learning using Ensembling). We empirically show that SaFE computes values that are close to exact SVs, and that it performs better than current SV approximations. This is particularly relevant in medical imaging setting where widespread heterogeneity across institutions is rampant and fast accurate data valuation is required to determine the contribution of each participant in multi-institutional collaborative learning. 联合学习（FL）正在变得流行，其中多个机构在不共享数据的情况下协作训练机器学习模型。参与机构的贡献可能并不相同，有些机构提供更多数据，有些机构提供质量更好的数据，有些机构则提供更多样化的数据。为了公平地排名不同机构的贡献，沙普利值（SV）已成为首选方法。精确的 SV 计算成本极其昂贵，尤其是当有数百个贡献者时。现有的 SV 计算技术使用近似值。然而，在医疗保健领域，贡献机构的数量可能并不庞大，计算精确的 SV 仍然非常昂贵，但并非不可能。对于这样的设置，我们提出了一种称为 SaFE（使用集成的联邦学习的 Shapley 值）的高效 SV 计算技术。我们凭经验表明，SaFE 计算的值接近精确的 SV，并且它的性能比当前的 SV 近似值更好。这在医学成像环境中尤其重要，在该环境中，各个机构之间普遍存在异质性，需要快速准确的数据评估来确定每个参与者在多机构协作学习中的贡献。 本文提出一种名为SaFE的高效方法，用于在医疗联邦学习中计算机构贡献的Shapley值，以解决数据估值效率问题。 Sourav Kumar,A. Lakshminarayanan,Ken Chang,Feri Guretno,Ivan Ho Mien,Jayashree Kalpathy-Cramer,Pavitra Krishnaswamy,Praveer Singh cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhiyuan Yan,Peng Sun,Yubo Lang,Shuo Du,Shanzhuo Zhang,Wei Wang,Lei Liu
title: Multimodal Graph Learning for Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 用于 Deepfake 检测的多模态图学习
abstract: Existing deepfake detectors face several challenges in achieving robustness and generalization. One of the primary reasons is their limited ability to extract relevant information from forgery videos, especially in the presence of various artifacts such as spatial, frequency, temporal, and landmark mismatches. Current detectors rely on pixel-level features that are easily affected by unknown disturbances or facial landmarks that do not provide sufficient information. Furthermore, most detectors cannot utilize information from multiple domains for detection, leading to limited effectiveness in identifying deepfake videos. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework, namely Multimodal Graph Learning (MGL) that leverages information from multiple modalities using two GNNs and several multimodal fusion modules. At the frame level, we employ a bi-directional cross-modal transformer and an adaptive gating mechanism to combine the features from the spatial and frequency domains with the geometric-enhanced landmark features captured by a GNN. At the video level, we use a Graph Attention Network (GAT) to represent each frame in a video as a node in a graph and encode temporal information into the edges of the graph to extract temporal inconsistency between frames. Our proposed method aims to effectively identify and utilize distinguishing features for deepfake detection. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method through extensive experiments on widely-used benchmarks and demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art detectors in terms of generalization ability and robustness against unknown disturbances.
summary: Existing deepfake detectors face several challenges in achieving robustness and generalization. One of the primary reasons is their limited ability to extract relevant information from forgery videos, especially in the presence of various artifacts such as spatial, frequency, temporal, and landmark mismatches. Current detectors rely on pixel-level features that are easily affected by unknown disturbances or facial landmarks that do not provide sufficient information. Furthermore, most detectors cannot utilize information from multiple domains for detection, leading to limited effectiveness in identifying deepfake videos. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework, namely Multimodal Graph Learning (MGL) that leverages information from multiple modalities using two GNNs and several multimodal fusion modules. At the frame level, we employ a bi-directional cross-modal transformer and an adaptive gating mechanism to combine the features from the spatial and frequency domains with the geometric-enhanced landmark features captured by a GNN. At the video level, we use a Graph Attention Network (GAT) to represent each frame in a video as a node in a graph and encode temporal information into the edges of the graph to extract temporal inconsistency between frames. Our proposed method aims to effectively identify and utilize distinguishing features for deepfake detection. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method through extensive experiments on widely-used benchmarks and demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art detectors in terms of generalization ability and robustness against unknown disturbances.
abstract_zh: 现有的 Deepfake 检测器在实现鲁棒性和泛化方面面临着一些挑战。主要原因之一是它们从伪造视频中提取相关信息的能力有限，尤其是在存在空间、频率、时间和地标不匹配等各种伪影的情况下。当前的检测器依赖于像素级特征，这些特征很容易受到未知干扰或无法提供足够信息的面部标志的影响。此外，大多数检测器无法利用来自多个域的信息进行检测，导致识别深度伪造视频的效果有限。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即多模态图学习（MGL），它使用两个 GNN 和多个多模态融合模块来利用来自多种模态的信息。在帧级别，我们采用双向跨模态转换器和自适应门控机制，将空间域和频域的特征与 GNN 捕获的几何增强的地标特征相结合。在视频层面，我们使用图注意力网络（GAT）将视频中的每一帧表示为图中的节点，并将时间信息编码到图的边缘中以提取帧之间的时间不一致。我们提出的方法旨在有效识别和利用深度伪造检测的显着特征。我们通过对广泛使用的基准进行大量实验来评估我们方法的有效性，并证明我们的方法在泛化能力和对未知干扰的鲁棒性方面优于最先进的检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态图学习框架（MGL），用于提升深度伪造视频检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法依赖像素级特征或面部关键点，易受未知干扰影响且无法有效融合多领域信息，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计双GNN与多模态融合模块，结合双向跨模态Transformer及自适应门控机制，提取空间/频率域与几何增强关键点特征；通过图注意力网络（GAT）建模视频帧间时序不一致性。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试中，MGL方法在泛化能力和抗干扰鲁棒性方面优于现有最先进检测器。
AI.conclusion: 多模态图学习框架能有效挖掘深度伪造视频的区分性特征，为鲁棒检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Amritha S Pallavoor,Prajwal A,Sundareshan TS,Sreekanth K Pallavoor
title: Chromosome Segmentation Analysis Using Image Processing Techniques and Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用图像处理技术和自动编码器进行染色体分割分析
abstract: Chromosome analysis and identification from metaphase images is a critical part of cytogenetics based medical diagnosis. It is mainly used for identifying constitutional, prenatal and acquired abnormalities in the diagnosis of genetic diseases and disorders. The process of identification of chromosomes from metaphase is a tedious one and requires trained personnel and several hours to perform. Challenge exists especially in handling touching, overlapping and clustered chromosomes in metaphase images, which if not segmented properly would result in wrong classification. We propose a method to automate the process of detection and segmentation of chromosomes from a given metaphase image, and in using them to classify through a Deep CNN architecture to know the chromosome type. We have used two methods to handle the separation of overlapping chromosomes found in metaphases - one method involving watershed algorithm followed by autoencoders and the other a method purely based on watershed algorithm. These methods involve a combination of automation and very minimal manual effort to perform the segmentation, which produces the output. The manual effort ensures that human intuition is taken into consideration, especially in handling touching, overlapping and cluster chromosomes. Upon segmentation, individual chromosome images are then classified into their respective classes with 95.75\% accuracy using a Deep CNN model. Further, we impart a distribution strategy to classify these chromosomes from the given output (which typically could consist of 46 individual images in a normal scenario for human beings) into its individual classes with an accuracy of 98\%. Our study helps conclude that pure manual effort involved in chromosome segmentation can be automated to a very good level through image processing techniques to produce reliable and satisfying results.
summary: Chromosome analysis and identification from metaphase images is a critical part of cytogenetics based medical diagnosis. It is mainly used for identifying constitutional, prenatal and acquired abnormalities in the diagnosis of genetic diseases and disorders. The process of identification of chromosomes from metaphase is a tedious one and requires trained personnel and several hours to perform. Challenge exists especially in handling touching, overlapping and clustered chromosomes in metaphase images, which if not segmented properly would result in wrong classification. We propose a method to automate the process of detection and segmentation of chromosomes from a given metaphase image, and in using them to classify through a Deep CNN architecture to know the chromosome type. We have used two methods to handle the separation of overlapping chromosomes found in metaphases - one method involving watershed algorithm followed by autoencoders and the other a method purely based on watershed algorithm. These methods involve a combination of automation and very minimal manual effort to perform the segmentation, which produces the output. The manual effort ensures that human intuition is taken into consideration, especially in handling touching, overlapping and cluster chromosomes. Upon segmentation, individual chromosome images are then classified into their respective classes with 95.75\% accuracy using a Deep CNN model. Further, we impart a distribution strategy to classify these chromosomes from the given output (which typically could consist of 46 individual images in a normal scenario for human beings) into its individual classes with an accuracy of 98\%. Our study helps conclude that pure manual effort involved in chromosome segmentation can be automated to a very good level through image processing techniques to produce reliable and satisfying results.
abstract_zh: 中期图像的染色体分析和识别是基于细胞遗传学的医学诊断的关键部分。它主要用于在遗传性疾病和病症的诊断中识别体质、产前和获得性异常。从中期鉴定染色体的过程是一项繁琐的过程，需要经过培训的人员和几个小时才能完成。尤其是在处理中期图像中接触、重叠和聚集的染色体方面存在挑战，如果分割不正确，将导致错误的分类。我们提出了一种方法，可以自动从给定的中期图像中检测和分割染色体，并使用它们通过深度 CNN 架构进行分类以了解染色体类型。我们使用了两种方法来处理中期发现的重叠染色体的分离 - 一种方法涉及分水岭算法，然后使用自动编码器，另一种方法纯粹基于分水岭算法。这些方法结合了自动化和极少的手动操作来执行分割，从而产生输出。手动工作确保考虑到人类直觉，特别是在处理接触、重叠和聚类染色体时。分割后，使用 Deep CNN 模型将各个染色体图像分类为各自的类别，准确率达到 95.75%。此外，我们还提供了一种分布策略，将给定输出（在人类正常情况下通常由 46 个单独图像组成）中的这些染色体分类为各个类别，准确度为 98%。我们的研究有助于得出这样的结论：通过图像处理技术，染色体分割中涉及的纯手动工作可以自动化到非常好的水平，以产生可靠且令人满意的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合图像处理技术和自编码器的染色体分割方法，并利用深度CNN进行分类，以自动化处理中期染色体图像。
AI.motivation: 染色体分析在遗传疾病诊断中至关重要，但传统人工分割方法耗时且易受重叠、聚集染色体影响，需寻找高效自动化方案。
AI.method: 采用分水岭算法结合自编码器及纯分水岭算法处理重叠染色体，结合少量人工干预，并通过深度CNN对分割后的染色体进行分类。
AI.result: 分割后分类准确率达95.75%，通过分布策略进一步提升至98%。
AI.conclusion: 图像处理技术可有效自动化染色体分割，减少人工依赖并保证结果可靠性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合图像处理技术和自编码器的染色体分割方法，并利用深度CNN进行分类，以自动化处理中期染色体图像。

search_text: Chromosome Segmentation Analysis Using Image Processing Techniques and Autoencoders 使用图像处理技术和自动编码器进行染色体分割分析 Chromosome analysis and identification from metaphase images is a critical part of cytogenetics based medical diagnosis. It is mainly used for identifying constitutional, prenatal and acquired abnormalities in the diagnosis of genetic diseases and disorders. The process of identification of chromosomes from metaphase is a tedious one and requires trained personnel and several hours to perform. Challenge exists especially in handling touching, overlapping and clustered chromosomes in metaphase images, which if not segmented properly would result in wrong classification. We propose a method to automate the process of detection and segmentation of chromosomes from a given metaphase image, and in using them to classify through a Deep CNN architecture to know the chromosome type. We have used two methods to handle the separation of overlapping chromosomes found in metaphases - one method involving watershed algorithm followed by autoencoders and the other a method purely based on watershed algorithm. These methods involve a combination of automation and very minimal manual effort to perform the segmentation, which produces the output. The manual effort ensures that human intuition is taken into consideration, especially in handling touching, overlapping and cluster chromosomes. Upon segmentation, individual chromosome images are then classified into their respective classes with 95.75\% accuracy using a Deep CNN model. Further, we impart a distribution strategy to classify these chromosomes from the given output (which typically could consist of 46 individual images in a normal scenario for human beings) into its individual classes with an accuracy of 98\%. Our study helps conclude that pure manual effort involved in chromosome segmentation can be automated to a very good level through image processing techniques to produce reliable and satisfying results. 中期图像的染色体分析和识别是基于细胞遗传学的医学诊断的关键部分。它主要用于在遗传性疾病和病症的诊断中识别体质、产前和获得性异常。从中期鉴定染色体的过程是一项繁琐的过程，需要经过培训的人员和几个小时才能完成。尤其是在处理中期图像中接触、重叠和聚集的染色体方面存在挑战，如果分割不正确，将导致错误的分类。我们提出了一种方法，可以自动从给定的中期图像中检测和分割染色体，并使用它们通过深度 CNN 架构进行分类以了解染色体类型。我们使用了两种方法来处理中期发现的重叠染色体的分离 - 一种方法涉及分水岭算法，然后使用自动编码器，另一种方法纯粹基于分水岭算法。这些方法结合了自动化和极少的手动操作来执行分割，从而产生输出。手动工作确保考虑到人类直觉，特别是在处理接触、重叠和聚类染色体时。分割后，使用 Deep CNN 模型将各个染色体图像分类为各自的类别，准确率达到 95.75%。此外，我们还提供了一种分布策略，将给定输出（在人类正常情况下通常由 46 个单独图像组成）中的这些染色体分类为各个类别，准确度为 98%。我们的研究有助于得出这样的结论：通过图像处理技术，染色体分割中涉及的纯手动工作可以自动化到非常好的水平，以产生可靠且令人满意的结果。 本文提出了一种结合图像处理技术和自编码器的染色体分割方法，并利用深度CNN进行分类，以自动化处理中期染色体图像。 Amritha S Pallavoor,Prajwal A,Sundareshan TS,Sreekanth K Pallavoor cs.CV

authors_text: Zhouhang Xie,Julian McAuley,Bodhisattwa Prasad Majumder
title: On Faithfulness and Coherence of Language Explanations for Recommendation Systems
title_zh: 推荐系统语言解释的忠实性和连贯性
abstract: Reviews contain rich information about product characteristics and user interests and thus are commonly used to boost recommender system performance. Specifically, previous work show that jointly learning to perform review generation improves rating prediction performance. Meanwhile, these model-produced reviews serve as recommendation explanations, providing the user with insights on predicted ratings. However, while existing models could generate fluent, human-like reviews, it is unclear to what degree the reviews fully uncover the rationale behind the jointly predicted rating. In this work, we perform a series of evaluations that probes state-of-the-art models and their review generation component. We show that the generated explanations are brittle and need further evaluation before being taken as literal rationales for the estimated ratings.
summary: Reviews contain rich information about product characteristics and user interests and thus are commonly used to boost recommender system performance. Specifically, previous work show that jointly learning to perform review generation improves rating prediction performance. Meanwhile, these model-produced reviews serve as recommendation explanations, providing the user with insights on predicted ratings. However, while existing models could generate fluent, human-like reviews, it is unclear to what degree the reviews fully uncover the rationale behind the jointly predicted rating. In this work, we perform a series of evaluations that probes state-of-the-art models and their review generation component. We show that the generated explanations are brittle and need further evaluation before being taken as literal rationales for the estimated ratings.
abstract_zh: 评论包含有关产品特征和用户兴趣的丰富信息，因此通常用于提高推荐系统的性能。具体来说，之前的工作表明，联合学习执行评论生成可以提高评分预测性能。同时，这些模型生成的评论充当推荐解释，为用户提供有关预测评分的见解。然而，虽然现有模型可以生成流畅的、类似人类的评论，但尚不清楚这些评论在多大程度上完全揭示了联合预测评级背后的基本原理。在这项工作中，我们进行了一系列评估，探讨最先进的模型及其评论生成组件。我们表明，生成的解释是脆弱的，需要进一步评估，然后才能被视为估计评级的字面理由。

AI.tldr: 评估推荐系统中生成的评论解释的忠实性与连贯性
AI.motivation: 现有模型生成的评论作为评分依据的可靠性存疑，需验证其是否能准确反映评分逻辑
AI.method: 通过系列实验评估前沿模型及其生成模块，分析其解释的忠实度与连贯性
AI.result: 生成的解释存在脆弱性，无法直接作为评分的依据
AI.conclusion: 当前模型生成的解释需进一步验证，不可直接作为评分的可靠依据

authors_text: Piyush Gupta,Vaibhav Srivastava
title: Deterministic Sequencing of Exploration and Exploitation for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习探索和利用的确定性排序
abstract: We propose Deterministic Sequencing of Exploration and Exploitation (DSEE) algorithm with interleaving exploration and exploitation epochs for model-based RL problems that aim to simultaneously learn the system model, i.e., a Markov decision process (MDP), and the associated optimal policy. During exploration, DSEE explores the environment and updates the estimates for expected reward and transition probabilities. During exploitation, the latest estimates of the expected reward and transition probabilities are used to obtain a robust policy with high probability. We design the lengths of the exploration and exploitation epochs such that the cumulative regret grows as a sub-linear function of time.
summary: We propose Deterministic Sequencing of Exploration and Exploitation (DSEE) algorithm with interleaving exploration and exploitation epochs for model-based RL problems that aim to simultaneously learn the system model, i.e., a Markov decision process (MDP), and the associated optimal policy. During exploration, DSEE explores the environment and updates the estimates for expected reward and transition probabilities. During exploitation, the latest estimates of the expected reward and transition probabilities are used to obtain a robust policy with high probability. We design the lengths of the exploration and exploitation epochs such that the cumulative regret grows as a sub-linear function of time.
abstract_zh: 我们针对基于模型的 RL 问题提出了探索和利用的确定性排序 (DSEE) 算法，该算法具有交错的探索和利用时期，旨在同时学习系统模型，即马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 和相关的最优策略。在探索过程中，DSEE 探索环境并更新预期奖励和转移概率的估计。在开发过程中，使用对预期奖励和转移概率的最新估计来获得高概率的稳健策略。我们设计了探索和开发时期的长度，使得累积遗憾作为时间的次线性函数增长。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种确定性探索与利用时序算法（DSEE），用于基于模型的强化学习问题，通过交替进行探索和利用阶段，同时学习系统模型和最优策略，并保证累积遗憾随时间呈次线性增长。
AI.motivation: 在基于模型的强化学习中，同时学习系统模型（MDP）和最优策略时，传统方法难以有效平衡探索与利用，导致累积遗憾较大。因此需要设计一种确定性的时序策略以优化探索和利用阶段的长度。
AI.method: DSEE算法交替进行探索和利用阶段：探索阶段更新奖励和转移概率估计，利用阶段基于最新估计生成鲁棒策略。通过理论分析设计探索与利用阶段的长度，使累积遗憾的上界为次线性函数。
AI.result: 理论证明DSEE算法的累积遗憾随时间呈次线性增长，表明其在长期性能上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DSEE通过确定性时序安排探索与利用，有效平衡了两者，为基于模型的强化学习提供了新的理论保证和算法框架。

authors_text: Stefano Gasperini,Alvaro Marcos-Ramiro,Michael Schmidt,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam,Federico Tombari
title: Segmenting Known Objects and Unseen Unknowns without Prior Knowledge
title_zh: 在没有先验知识的情况下分割已知物体和看不见的未知物体
comment: ICCV 2023. Project page: https://holisticseg.github.io
comments: ICCV 2023. Project page: https://holisticseg.github.io
abstract: Panoptic segmentation methods assign a known class to each pixel given in input. Even for state-of-the-art approaches, this inevitably enforces decisions that systematically lead to wrong predictions for objects outside the training categories. However, robustness against out-of-distribution samples and corner cases is crucial in safety-critical settings to avoid dangerous consequences. Since real-world datasets cannot contain enough data points to adequately sample the long tail of the underlying distribution, models must be able to deal with unseen and unknown scenarios as well. Previous methods targeted this by re-identifying already-seen unlabeled objects. In this work, we propose the necessary step to extend segmentation with a new setting which we term holistic segmentation. Holistic segmentation aims to identify and separate objects of unseen, unknown categories into instances without any prior knowledge about them while performing panoptic segmentation of known classes. We tackle this new problem with U3HS, which finds unknowns as highly uncertain regions and clusters their corresponding instance-aware embeddings into individual objects. By doing so, for the first time in panoptic segmentation with unknown objects, our U3HS is trained without unknown categories, reducing assumptions and leaving the settings as unconstrained as in real-life scenarios. Extensive experiments on public data from MS COCO, Cityscapes, and Lost&Found demonstrate the effectiveness of U3HS for this new, challenging, and assumptions-free setting called holistic segmentation. Project page: https://holisticseg.github.io.

Extensive experiments on public data from MS COCO, Cityscapes, and Lost&Found demonstrate the effectiveness of U3HS for this new, challenging, and assumptions-free setting called holistic segmentation. Project page: https://holisticseg.github.io.
abstract_zh: 全景分割方法为输入中给定的每个像素分配一个已知类别。即使对于最先进的方法，这也不可避免地会强制执行系统性地导致对训练类别之外的对象进行错误预测的决策。然而，在安全关键环境中，针对分布外样本和极端情况的鲁棒性至关重要，以避免危险后果。由于现实世界的数据集无法包含足够的数据点来充分采样基础分布的长尾，因此模型也必须能够处理未见过和未知的场景。以前的方法通过重新识别已经看到的未标记对象来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了用新的设置（我们称之为整体分割）来扩展分割的必要步骤。整体分割旨在识别未见过的、未知类别的对象并将其分离为实例，而无需任何先验知识，同时对已知类别进行全景分割。我们使用 U3HS 解决这个新问题，它发现未知作为高度不确定的区域，并将其相应的实例感知嵌入聚集到单个对象中。通过这样做，我们的 U3HS 首次在未知对象的全景分割中在没有未知类别的情况下进行训练，减少了假设，并使设置像现实生活场景中一样不受约束。对来自 MS COCO、Cityscapes 和 Lost&Found 的公共数据进行的广泛实验证明了 U3HS 对于这种新的、具有挑战性的、无假设的设置（称为整体分割）的有效性。项目页面：https://holisticseg.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需先验知识的全景分割方法，能够同时识别已知类别和未知类别物体。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法无法处理训练类别外的未知物体，这在安全关键场景中可能导致危险后果，需提升模型对未知情况的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出U3HS方法，通过识别高不确定区域并聚类实例感知嵌入，实现无需先验知识的未知物体分割。
AI.result: 在MS COCO、Cityscapes和Lost&Found数据集上验证了U3HS在无未知类别训练下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: U3HS首次实现了无需假设未知类别的全景分割，为安全关键场景提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Segmenting Known Objects and Unseen Unknowns without Prior Knowledge 在没有先验知识的情况下分割已知物体和看不见的未知物体 Panoptic segmentation methods assign a known class to each pixel given in input. Even for state-of-the-art approaches, this inevitably enforces decisions that systematically lead to wrong predictions for objects outside the training categories. However, robustness against out-of-distribution samples and corner cases is crucial in safety-critical settings to avoid dangerous consequences. Since real-world datasets cannot contain enough data points to adequately sample the long tail of the underlying distribution, models must be able to deal with unseen and unknown scenarios as well. Previous methods targeted this by re-identifying already-seen unlabeled objects. In this work, we propose the necessary step to extend segmentation with a new setting which we term holistic segmentation. Holistic segmentation aims to identify and separate objects of unseen, unknown categories into instances without any prior knowledge about them while performing panoptic segmentation of known classes. We tackle this new problem with U3HS, which finds unknowns as highly uncertain regions and clusters their corresponding instance-aware embeddings into individual objects. By doing so, for the first time in panoptic segmentation with unknown objects, our U3HS is trained without unknown categories, reducing assumptions and leaving the settings as unconstrained as in real-life scenarios. Extensive experiments on public data from MS COCO, Cityscapes, and Lost&Found demonstrate the effectiveness of U3HS for this new, challenging, and assumptions-free setting called holistic segmentation. authors_text: Zhaofeng Tian,Weisong Shi
title: Edge Coverage Path Planning for Robot Mowing
title_zh: 机器人割草的边缘覆盖路径规划
abstract: Thanks to the rapid evolvement of robotic technologies, robot mowing is emerging to liberate humans from the tedious and time-consuming landscape work. Traditionally, robot mowing is perceived as a "Coverage Path Planning" problem, with a simplification that converts non-convex obstacles into convex obstacles. Besides, the converted obstacles are commonly dilated by the robot's circumcircle for collision avoidance. However when applied to robot mowing, an obstacle in a lawn is usually non-convex, imagine a garden on the lawn, such that the mentioned obstacle processing methods would fill in some concave areas so that they are not accessible to the robot anymore and hence produce inescapable uncut areas along the lawn edge, which dulls the landscape's elegance and provokes rework. To shrink the uncut area around the lawn edge we hereby reframe the problem into a brand new problem, named the "Edge Coverage Path Planning" problem that is dedicated to path planning with the objective to cover the edge. Correspondingly, we propose two planning methods, the "big and small disk" and the "sliding chopstick" planning method to tackle the problem by leveraging image morphological processing and computational geometry skills. By validation, our proposed methods can outperform the traditional "dilation-by-circumcircle" method.
summary: Thanks to the rapid evolvement of robotic technologies, robot mowing is emerging to liberate humans from the tedious and time-consuming landscape work. Traditionally, robot mowing is perceived as a "Coverage Path Planning" problem, with a simplification that converts non-convex obstacles into convex obstacles. Besides, the converted obstacles are commonly dilated by the robot's circumcircle for collision avoidance. However when applied to robot mowing, an obstacle in a lawn is usually non-convex, imagine a garden on the lawn, such that the mentioned obstacle processing methods would fill in some concave areas so that they are not accessible to the robot anymore and hence produce inescapable uncut areas along the lawn edge, which dulls the landscape's elegance and provokes rework. To shrink the uncut area around the lawn edge we hereby reframe the problem into a brand new problem, named the "Edge Coverage Path Planning" problem that is dedicated to path planning with the objective to cover the edge. Correspondingly, we propose two planning methods, the "big and small disk" and the "sliding chopstick" planning method to tackle the problem by leveraging image morphological processing and computational geometry skills. By validation, our proposed methods can outperform the traditional "dilation-by-circumcircle" method.
abstract_zh: 由于机器人技术的快速发展，机器人割草正在兴起，将人类从繁琐且耗时的景观工作中解放出来。传统上，机器人割草被视为“覆盖路径规划”问题，通过将非凸障碍物转换为凸障碍物进行简化。此外，转换后的障碍物通常会被机器人外接圆扩大以避免碰撞。然而，当应用于机器人割草时，草坪上的障碍物通常是非凸面的，想象一下草坪上的一个花园，这样上述的障碍物处理方法就会填充一些凹形区域，使机器人无法再接触到这些区域，从而在草坪边缘产生不可避免的未切割区域，这会降低景观的优雅度并引发返工。为了缩小草坪边缘周围的未切割区域，我们特此将问题重新构建为一个全新的问题，命名为“边缘覆盖路径规划”问题，专门用于以覆盖边缘为目标的路径规划。相应地，我们提出了两种规划方法，即“大小盘”和“滑动筷子”规划方法，以利用图像形态处理和计算几何技能来解决该问题。通过验证，我们提出的方法可以优于传统的“圆膨胀”方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的机器人割草路径规划问题——边缘覆盖路径规划，以解决传统方法导致的草坪边缘未切割区域问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过将非凸障碍物转换为凸障碍物并使用机器人外接圆膨胀避障，导致草坪边缘出现无法覆盖的凹陷区域，影响景观效果并需要返工。
AI.method: 提出两种规划方法：基于图像形态学处理的'大小圆盘法'和基于计算几何的'滑动筷子法'，专门针对边缘覆盖进行路径规划。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，所提方法在减少草坪边缘未切割区域方面优于传统外接圆膨胀方法。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效解决了传统路径规划在草坪边缘覆盖不足的问题，提升了割草机器人作业的美观性和效率。

authors_text: Soravit Changpinyo,Linting Xue,Michal Yarom,Ashish V. Thapliyal,Idan Szpektor,Julien Amelot,Xi Chen,Radu Soricut
title: MaXM: Towards Multilingual Visual Question Answering
title_zh: MaXM：迈向多语言视觉问答
comment: EMNLP 2023 (Findings). https://github.com/google-research-datasets/maxm
comments: EMNLP 2023 (Findings). https://github.com/google-research-datasets/maxm
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) has been primarily studied through the lens of the English language. Yet, tackling VQA in other languages in the same manner would require a considerable amount of resources. In this paper, we propose scalable solutions to multilingual visual question answering (mVQA), on both data and modeling fronts. We first propose a translation-based framework to mVQA data generation that requires much less human annotation efforts than the conventional approach of directly collection questions and answers. Then, we apply our framework to the multilingual captions in the Crossmodal-3600 dataset and develop an efficient annotation protocol to create MaXM, a test-only VQA benchmark in 7 diverse languages. Finally, we develop a simple, lightweight, and effective approach as well as benchmark state-of-the-art English and multilingual VQA models. We hope that our benchmark encourages further research on mVQA.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) has been primarily studied through the lens of the English language. Yet, tackling VQA in other languages in the same manner would require a considerable amount of resources. In this paper, we propose scalable solutions to multilingual visual question answering (mVQA), on both data and modeling fronts. We first propose a translation-based framework to mVQA data generation that requires much less human annotation efforts than the conventional approach of directly collection questions and answers. Then, we apply our framework to the multilingual captions in the Crossmodal-3600 dataset and develop an efficient annotation protocol to create MaXM, a test-only VQA benchmark in 7 diverse languages. Finally, we develop a simple, lightweight, and effective approach as well as benchmark state-of-the-art English and multilingual VQA models. We hope that our benchmark encourages further research on mVQA.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）主要是通过英语的视角进行研究的。然而，以同样的方式处理其他语言的 VQA 需要大量资源。在本文中，我们在数据和建模方面提出了多语言视觉问答（mVQA）的可扩展解决方案。我们首先提出了一种基于翻译的 mVQA 数据生成框架，与直接收集问题和答案的传统方法相比，该框架需要更少的人工注释工作。然后，我们将我们的框架应用于 Crossmodal-3600 数据集中的多语言字幕，并开发高效的注释协议来创建 MaXM，这是 7 种不同语言的仅测试 VQA 基准。最后，我们开发了一种简单、轻量级且有效的方法，并对最先进的英语和多语言 VQA 模型进行了基准测试。我们希望我们的基准测试能够鼓励对 mVQA 的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多语言视觉问答（mVQA）的可扩展解决方案，通过翻译框架生成数据并构建多语言基准MaXM。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉问答研究主要聚焦英语，其他语言需大量资源，需更高效的方法支持多语言研究。
AI.method: 基于翻译的框架生成mVQA数据，利用Crossmodal-3600多语言字幕构建MaXM基准，并设计轻量模型进行评估。
AI.result: 开发了包含7种语言的MaXM测试基准，并对比了英文及多语言VQA模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: MaXM基准旨在推动多语言视觉问答领域的发展，促进相关研究与模型优化。

ai_content.motivation: 现有视觉问答研究主要聚焦英语，其他语言需大量资源，需更高效的方法支持多语言研究。
ai_content.method: 基于翻译的框架生成mVQA数据，利用Crossmodal-3600多语言字幕构建MaXM基准，并设计轻量模型进行评估。
ai_content.result: 开发了包含7种语言的MaXM测试基准，并对比了英文及多语言VQA模型的性能。
ai_content.conclusion: MaXM基准旨在推动多语言视觉问答领域的发展，促进相关研究与模型优化。

search_text: MaXM: Towards Multilingual Visual Question Answering MaXM：迈向多语言视觉问答 Visual Question Answering (VQA) has been primarily studied through the lens of the English language. Yet, tackling VQA in other languages in the same manner would require a considerable amount of resources. In this paper, we propose scalable solutions to multilingual visual question answering (mVQA), on both data and modeling fronts. We first propose a translation-based framework to mVQA data generation that requires much less human annotation efforts than the conventional approach of directly collection questions and answers. Then, we apply our framework to the multilingual captions in the Crossmodal-3600 dataset and develop an efficient annotation protocol to create MaXM, a test-only VQA benchmark in 7 diverse languages. Finally, we develop a simple, lightweight, and effective approach as well as benchmark state-of-the-art English and multilingual VQA models. We hope that our benchmark encourages further research on mVQA. 视觉问答（VQA）主要是通过英语的视角进行研究的。然而，以同样的方式处理其他语言的 VQA 需要大量资源。在本文中，我们在数据和建模方面提出了多语言视觉问答（mVQA）的可扩展解决方案。我们首先提出了一种基于翻译的 mVQA 数据生成框架，与直接收集问题和答案的传统方法相比，该框架需要更少的人工注释工作。然后，我们将我们的框架应用于 Crossmodal-3600 数据集中的多语言字幕，并开发高效的注释协议来创建 MaXM，这是 7 种不同语言的仅测试 VQA 基准。最后，我们开发了一种简单、轻量级且有效的方法，并对最先进的英语和多语言 VQA 模型进行了基准测试。我们希望我们的基准测试能够鼓励对 mVQA 的进一步研究。 本文提出多语言视觉问答（mVQA）的可扩展解决方案，通过翻译框架生成数据并构建多语言基准MaXM。 Soravit Changpinyo,Linting Xue,Michal Yarom,Ashish V. Thapliyal,Idan Szpektor,Julien Amelot,Xi Chen,Radu Soricut cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Kai Gao,Jingjin Yu
title: On the Utility of Buffers in Pick-n-Swap Based Lattice Rearrangement
title_zh: 缓冲器在基于 Pick-n-Swap 的晶格重排中的效用
comment: To present in 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation(ICRA 2023)
comments: To present in 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation(ICRA 2023)
abstract: We investigate the utility of employing multiple buffers in solving a class of rearrangement problems with pick-n-swap manipulation primitives. In this problem, objects stored randomly in a lattice are to be sorted using a robot arm with k>=1 swap spaces or buffers, capable of holding up to k objects on its end-effector simultaneously. On the structural side, we show that the addition of each new buffer brings diminishing returns in saving the end-effector travel distance while holding the total number of pick-n-swap operations at the minimum. This is due to an interesting recursive cycle structure in random m-permutation, where the largest cycle covers over 60% of objects. On the algorithmic side, we propose fast algorithms for 1D and 2D lattice rearrangement problems that can effectively use multiple buffers to boost solution optimality. Numerical experiments demonstrate the efficiency and scalability of our methods, as well as confirm the diminishing return structure as more buffers are employed.
summary: We investigate the utility of employing multiple buffers in solving a class of rearrangement problems with pick-n-swap manipulation primitives. In this problem, objects stored randomly in a lattice are to be sorted using a robot arm with k>=1 swap spaces or buffers, capable of holding up to k objects on its end-effector simultaneously. On the structural side, we show that the addition of each new buffer brings diminishing returns in saving the end-effector travel distance while holding the total number of pick-n-swap operations at the minimum. This is due to an interesting recursive cycle structure in random m-permutation, where the largest cycle covers over 60% of objects. On the algorithmic side, we propose fast algorithms for 1D and 2D lattice rearrangement problems that can effectively use multiple buffers to boost solution optimality. Numerical experiments demonstrate the efficiency and scalability of our methods, as well as confirm the diminishing return structure as more buffers are employed.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了使用多个缓冲区在解决一类使用拾取交换操作原语的重排问题中的效用。在此问题中，随机存储在网格中的对象将使用具有 k>=1 交换空间或缓冲区的机器人臂进行排序，能够在其末端执行器上同时容纳最多 k 个对象。在结构方面，我们表明，添加每个新缓冲区会在节省末端执行器行进距离的同时将拾取交换操作总数保持在最低限度时带来收益递减。这是由于随机 m 排列中的一个有趣的递归循环结构，其中最大的循环覆盖了超过 60% 的对象。在算法方面，我们提出了针对一维和二维晶格重排问题的快速算法，可以有效地使用多个缓冲区来提高解决方案的最优性。数值实验证明了我们方法的效率和可扩展性，并证实了随着使用更多缓冲区的收益递减结构。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在Pick-n-Swap操作中使用多个缓冲区对晶格重排问题的效用，分析了缓冲区数量对机器人手臂移动距离和操作次数的影响，并提出高效的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在晶格重排中可能未充分利用缓冲区潜力，需明确缓冲区数量与效率的关系，以优化机器人操作。
AI.method: 通过分析随机排列的循环结构，提出针对1D和2D晶格的快速算法，结合多个缓冲区提升解的最优性。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法的高效性与可扩展性，证明增加缓冲区收益递减，最大循环覆盖超60%对象。
AI.conclusion: 缓冲区数量增加效益递减，需平衡缓冲区与效率；提出的算法能有效利用多缓冲区优化晶格重排。

authors_text: Valentin Zieglmeier,Maren Gierlich-Joas,Alexander Pretschner
title: Increasing Employees' Willingness to Share: Introducing Appeal Strategies for People Analytics
title_zh: 提高员工的分享意愿：引入人员分析的吸引力策略
comment: Peer-reviewed version accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 13th International Conference on Software Business (ICSOB 2022)
comments: Peer-reviewed version accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 13th International Conference on Software Business (ICSOB 2022)
abstract: Increasingly digital workplaces enable advanced people analytics (PA) that can improve work, but also implicate privacy risks for employees. These systems often depend on employees sharing their data voluntarily. Thus, to leverage the potential benefits of PA, companies have to manage employees' disclosure decision. In literature, we identify two main strategies: increase awareness or apply appeal strategies. While increased awareness may lead to more conservative data handling, appeal strategies can promote data sharing. Yet, to our knowledge, no systematic overview of appeal strategies for PA exists. Thus, we develop an initial taxonomy of strategies based on a systematic literature review and interviews with 18 experts. We describe strategies in the dimensions of values, benefits, and incentives. Thereby, we present concrete options to increase the appeal of PA for employees.
summary: Increasingly digital workplaces enable advanced people analytics (PA) that can improve work, but also implicate privacy risks for employees. These systems often depend on employees sharing their data voluntarily. Thus, to leverage the potential benefits of PA, companies have to manage employees' disclosure decision. In literature, we identify two main strategies: increase awareness or apply appeal strategies. While increased awareness may lead to more conservative data handling, appeal strategies can promote data sharing. Yet, to our knowledge, no systematic overview of appeal strategies for PA exists. Thus, we develop an initial taxonomy of strategies based on a systematic literature review and interviews with 18 experts. We describe strategies in the dimensions of values, benefits, and incentives. Thereby, we present concrete options to increase the appeal of PA for employees.
abstract_zh: 日益数字化的工作场所支持先进的人员分析 (PA)，可以改善工作，但也给员工带来隐私风险。这些系统通常依赖于员工自愿共享数据。因此，为了利用 PA 的潜在优势，公司必须管理员工的披露决策。在文献中，我们确定了两种主要策略：提高认识或应用上诉策略。虽然意识的提高可能会导致数据处理更加保守，但上诉策略可以促进数据共享。然而，据我们所知，尚无关于 PA 上诉策略的系统概述。因此，我们根据系统的文献综述和对 18 位专家的访谈制定了初步的策略分类。我们从价值、利益和激励的维度来描述战略。因此，我们提出了增加 PA 对员工吸引力的具体方案。

AI.tldr: 开发用于提升员工数据共享意愿的吸引力策略分类法
AI.motivation: 解决现有策略缺乏系统分类的问题，帮助公司有效利用PA的潜力
AI.method: 通过系统文献综述和18位专家访谈构建分类法
AI.result: 提出基于价值观、利益和激励三个维度的策略分类，并提供具体选项
AI.conclusion: 该分类法为公司提供了提升PA吸引力的框架，促进数据共享

authors_text: Yasodara Cordova
title: Design heuristics: privacy and portability Regulation as a feature request
title_zh: 设计启发：隐私和可移植性作为功能请求的监管
abstract: The lack of user experience standards in regulations for data privacy and data portability in the health sector increases the cost of leaving a network provider while not protecting the patient's privacy, directly impacting people's health. Furthermore, user in-app options for data sharing and portability in the health sector's applications make it difficult to transfer data between providers while facilitating privacy breaches. Moreover, it leaves users unaware of occasional past unauthorized data access episodes. In this article, we propose an extension for the traditional design heuristics to increase privacy and portability controls for applications that deal with users' personal information based on a benchmark in applications from different sectors and a literature review.
summary: The lack of user experience standards in regulations for data privacy and data portability in the health sector increases the cost of leaving a network provider while not protecting the patient's privacy, directly impacting people's health. Furthermore, user in-app options for data sharing and portability in the health sector's applications make it difficult to transfer data between providers while facilitating privacy breaches. Moreover, it leaves users unaware of occasional past unauthorized data access episodes. In this article, we propose an extension for the traditional design heuristics to increase privacy and portability controls for applications that deal with users' personal information based on a benchmark in applications from different sectors and a literature review.
abstract_zh: 卫生部门数据隐私和数据可移植性法规中缺乏用户体验标准，增加了离开网络提供商的成本，同时又无法保护患者的隐私，直接影响人们的健康。此外，卫生部门应用程序中用于数据共享和可移植性的用户应用程序内选项使得在提供商之间传输数据变得困难，同时加剧了隐私泄露。此外，它让用户不知道过去偶尔发生的未经授权的数据访问事件。在本文中，我们基于不同行业应用程序的基准和文献综述，提出对传统设计启发式的扩展，以增强处理用户个人信息的应用程序的隐私和可移植性控制。

AI.tldr: 提出扩展传统设计启发式方法以增强健康领域应用的隐私和数据可携带性控制
AI.motivation: 现有法规缺乏用户体验标准，导致用户转换成本高且隐私风险增加，需改进设计以提升隐私保护和数据可携带性
AI.method: 通过跨行业应用基准和文献综述，扩展传统设计启发式方法以增强隐私和数据可携带性控制
AI.result: 提出了一套针对隐私和数据可携带性的设计启发式扩展方法，提升用户控制和透明度
AI.conclusion: 改进的设计启发式方法可有效提升健康应用的隐私保护和数据可携带性，降低用户风险并促进数据自由流动
