search_text: Design heuristics: privacy and portability Regulation as a feature request 设计启发：隐私和可移植性作为功能请求的监管 The lack of user experience standards in regulations for data privacy and data portability in the health sector increases the cost of leaving a network provider while not protecting the patient's privacy, directly impacting people's health. Furthermore, user in-app options for data sharing and portability in the health sector's applications make it difficult to transfer data between providers while facilitating privacy breaches. Moreover, it leaves users unaware of occasional past unauthorized data access episodes. In this article, we propose an extension for the traditional design heuristics to increase privacy and portability controls for applications that deal with users' personal information based on a benchmark in applications from different sectors and a literature review. 卫生部门数据隐私和数据可移植性法规中缺乏用户体验标准，增加了离开网络提供商的成本，同时又无法保护患者的隐私，直接影响人们的健康。此外，卫生部门应用程序中用于数据共享和可移植性的用户应用程序内选项使得在提供商之间传输数据变得困难，同时加剧了隐私泄露。此外，它让用户不知道过去偶尔发生的未经授权的数据访问事件。在本文中，我们基于不同行业应用程序的基准和文献综述，提出对传统设计启发式的扩展，以增强处理用户个人信息的应用程序的隐私和可移植性控制。 提出扩展传统设计启发式方法以增强健康领域应用的隐私和数据可携带性控制 Yasodara Cordova cs.HC,cs.CR

authors_text: Paul Trust,Ahmed Zahran,Rosane Minghim
title: Weak Supervision in Analysis of News: Application to Economic Policy Uncertainty
title_zh: 新闻分析中的弱监督：在经济政策不确定性中的应用
comment: A key author who is the principal investigator of the work was not consulted in uploading the pre-print and she requested that this publication be revoked from arxiv
comments: A key author who is the principal investigator of the work was not consulted in uploading the pre-print and she requested that this publication be revoked from arxiv
abstract: The need for timely data analysis for economic decisions has prompted most economists and policy makers to search for non-traditional supplementary sources of data. In that context, text data is being explored to enrich traditional data sources because it is easy to collect and highly abundant. Our work focuses on studying the potential of textual data, in particular news pieces, for measuring economic policy uncertainty (EPU). Economic policy uncertainty is defined as the public's inability to predict the outcomes of their decisions under new policies and future economic fundamentals. Quantifying EPU is of great importance to policy makers, economists, and investors since it influences their expectations about the future economic fundamentals with an impact on their policy, investment and saving decisions. Most of the previous work using news articles for measuring EPU are either manual or based on a simple keyword search. Our work proposes a machine learning based solution involving weak supervision to classify news articles with regards to economic policy uncertainty. Weak supervision is shown to be an efficient machine learning paradigm for applying machine learning models in low resource settings with no or scarce training sets, leveraging domain knowledge and heuristics. We further generated a weak supervision based EPU index that we used to conduct extensive econometric analysis along with the Irish macroeconomic indicators to validate whether our generated index foreshadows weaker macroeconomic performance
summary: The need for timely data analysis for economic decisions has prompted most economists and policy makers to search for non-traditional supplementary sources of data. In that context, text data is being explored to enrich traditional data sources because it is easy to collect and highly abundant. Our work focuses on studying the potential of textual data, in particular news pieces, for measuring economic policy uncertainty (EPU). Economic policy uncertainty is defined as the public's inability to predict the outcomes of their decisions under new policies and future economic fundamentals. Quantifying EPU is of great importance to policy makers, economists, and investors since it influences their expectations about the future economic fundamentals with an impact on their policy, investment and saving decisions. Most of the previous work using news articles for measuring EPU are either manual or based on a simple keyword search. Our work proposes a machine learning based solution involving weak supervision to classify news articles with regards to economic policy uncertainty. Weak supervision is shown to be an efficient machine learning paradigm for applying machine learning models in low resource settings with no or scarce training sets, leveraging domain knowledge and heuristics. We further generated a weak supervision based EPU index that we used to conduct extensive econometric analysis along with the Irish macroeconomic indicators to validate whether our generated index foreshadows weaker macroeconomic performance
abstract_zh: 经济决策对及时数据分析的需求促使大多数经济学家和政策制定者寻找非传统的补充数据来源。在这种背景下，人们正在探索文本数据来丰富传统数据源，因为它易于收集且非常丰富。我们的工作重点是研究文本数据（特别是新闻报道）在衡量经济政策不确定性（EPU）方面的潜力。经济政策的不确定性被定义为公众无法预测新政策和未来经济基本面下决策的结果。量化 EPU 对于政策制定者、经济学家和投资者来说非常重要，因为它影响他们对未来经济基本面的预期，进而影响他们的政策、投资和储蓄决策。之前大多数使用新闻文章来测量 EPU 的工作要么是手动的，要么是基于简单的关键词搜索。我们的工作提出了一种基于机器学习的解决方案，涉及弱监督，对有关经济政策不确定性的新闻文章进行分类。弱监督被证明是一种有效的机器学习范例，可利用领域知识和启发式方法，在没有或稀有训练集的低资源环境中应用机器学习模型。我们进一步生成了一个基于弱监管的 EPU 指数，用于与爱尔兰宏观经济指标一起进行广泛的计量经济分析，以验证我们生成的指数是否预示着宏观经济表现疲软

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用弱监督机器学习方法，通过新闻文本分析经济政策不确定性（EPU）的可行性，并构建基于弱监督的EPU指数进行宏观经济预测。
AI.motivation: 传统经济数据难以及时反映政策不确定性，而新闻文本作为补充数据源具有高丰度和易获取性，但现有方法依赖人工或简单关键词搜索效率低下。
AI.method: 采用弱监督学习框架，结合领域知识与启发式规则构建训练数据，训练分类模型识别与EPU相关的新闻文章，并生成EPU指数进行计量经济学分析。
AI.result: 弱监督生成的EPU指数与爱尔兰宏观经济指标显著相关，验证了该指数对宏观经济表现的预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督方法为低资源场景下的EPU测量提供了高效解决方案，证明文本分析可有效补充传统经济数据以辅助政策决策。

authors_text: Asha Rani,Pankaj Yadav,Yashaswi Verma
title: Action-based Early Autism Diagnosis Using Contrastive Feature Learning
title_zh: 使用对比特征学习进行基于行动的早期自闭症诊断
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any postsubmission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Multimedia Systems (2023), and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s00530-023-01132-8
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any postsubmission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Multimedia Systems (2023), and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s00530-023-01132-8
abstract: Autism, also known as Autism Spectrum Disorder (or ASD), is a neurological disorder. Its main symptoms include difficulty in (verbal and/or non-verbal) communication, and rigid/repetitive behavior. These symptoms are often indistinguishable from a normal (control) individual, due to which this disorder remains undiagnosed in early childhood leading to delayed treatment. Since the learning curve is steep during the initial age, an early diagnosis of autism could allow to take adequate interventions at the right time, which might positively affect the growth of an autistic child. Further, the traditional methods of autism diagnosis require multiple visits to a specialized psychiatrist, however this process can be time-consuming. In this paper, we present a learning based approach to automate autism diagnosis using simple and small action video clips of subjects. This task is particularly challenging because the amount of annotated data available is small, and the variations among samples from the two categories (ASD and control) are generally indistinguishable. This is also evident from poor performance of a binary classifier learned using the cross-entropy loss on top of a baseline encoder. To address this, we adopt contrastive feature learning in both self supervised and supervised learning frameworks, and show that these can lead to a significant increase in the prediction accuracy of a binary classifier on this task. We further validate this by conducting thorough experimental analyses under different set-ups on two publicly available datasets.
summary: Autism, also known as Autism Spectrum Disorder (or ASD), is a neurological disorder. Its main symptoms include difficulty in (verbal and/or non-verbal) communication, and rigid/repetitive behavior. These symptoms are often indistinguishable from a normal (control) individual, due to which this disorder remains undiagnosed in early childhood leading to delayed treatment. Since the learning curve is steep during the initial age, an early diagnosis of autism could allow to take adequate interventions at the right time, which might positively affect the growth of an autistic child. Further, the traditional methods of autism diagnosis require multiple visits to a specialized psychiatrist, however this process can be time-consuming. In this paper, we present a learning based approach to automate autism diagnosis using simple and small action video clips of subjects. This task is particularly challenging because the amount of annotated data available is small, and the variations among samples from the two categories (ASD and control) are generally indistinguishable. This is also evident from poor performance of a binary classifier learned using the cross-entropy loss on top of a baseline encoder. To address this, we adopt contrastive feature learning in both self supervised and supervised learning frameworks, and show that these can lead to a significant increase in the prediction accuracy of a binary classifier on this task. We further validate this by conducting thorough experimental analyses under different set-ups on two publicly available datasets.
abstract_zh: 自闭症，也称为自闭症谱系障碍（或 ASD），是一种神经系统疾病。其主要症状包括（言语和/或非言语）沟通困难以及行为僵化/重复。这些症状通常与正常（对照）个体难以区分，因此这种疾病在儿童早期仍未得到诊断，导致治疗延迟。由于初始年龄的学习曲线很陡峭，因此早期诊断自闭症可以在正确的时间采取适当的干预措施，这可能会对自闭症儿童的成长产生积极影响。此外，传统的自闭症诊断方法需要多次拜访专业精神科医生，但这个过程可能非常耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，使用受试者的简单小动作视频剪辑来自动诊断自闭症。这项任务特别具有挑战性，因为可用的注释数据量很小，并且两个类别（ASD 和对照）的样本之间的差异通常无法区分。从使用基线编码器顶部的交叉熵损失学习的二元分类器的糟糕性能中也可以看出这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们在自监督和监督学习框架中采用对比特征学习，并表明这些可以导致二元分类器在此任务上的预测准确性显着提高。我们通过在两个公开数据集的不同设置下进行彻底的实验分析来进一步验证这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动作视频的自闭症早期诊断方法，通过对比特征学习提升分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统自闭症诊断依赖专业医生多次评估，耗时且早期症状难以区分。现有方法在有限标注数据和样本相似性下表现不佳，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用对比特征学习框架（自监督与监督结合），利用动作视频片段提取区分性特征，解决数据量少和类别差异细微的挑战。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，该方法显著提升二分类准确率，优于基于交叉熵损失的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 对比特征学习有效捕捉动作差异，为自闭症早期自动化诊断提供可行方案，有助于及时干预治疗。

search_text: Action-based Early Autism Diagnosis Using Contrastive Feature Learning 使用对比特征学习进行基于行动的早期自闭症诊断 Autism, also known as Autism Spectrum Disorder (or ASD), is a neurological disorder. Its main symptoms include difficulty in (verbal and/or non-verbal) communication, and rigid/repetitive behavior. These symptoms are often indistinguishable from a normal (control) individual, due to which this disorder remains undiagnosed in early childhood leading to delayed treatment. Since the learning curve is steep during the initial age, an early diagnosis of autism could allow to take adequate interventions at the right time, which might positively affect the growth of an autistic child. Further, the traditional methods of autism diagnosis require multiple visits to a specialized psychiatrist, however this process can be time-consuming. In this paper, we present a learning based approach to automate autism diagnosis using simple and small action video clips of subjects. This task is particularly challenging because the amount of annotated data available is small, and the variations among samples from the two categories (ASD and control) are generally indistinguishable. This is also evident from poor performance of a binary classifier learned using the cross-entropy loss on top of a baseline encoder. To address this, we adopt contrastive feature learning in both self supervised and supervised learning frameworks, and show that these can lead to a significant increase in the prediction accuracy of a binary classifier on this task. We further validate this by conducting thorough experimental analyses under different set-ups on two publicly available datasets. 自闭症，也称为自闭症谱系障碍（或 ASD），是一种神经系统疾病。其主要症状包括（言语和/或非言语）沟通困难以及行为僵化/重复。这些症状通常与正常（对照）个体难以区分，因此这种疾病在儿童早期仍未得到诊断，导致治疗延迟。由于初始年龄的学习曲线很陡峭，因此早期诊断自闭症可以在正确的时间采取适当的干预措施，这可能会对自闭症儿童的成长产生积极影响。此外，传统的自闭症诊断方法需要多次拜访专业精神科医生，但这个过程可能非常耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，使用受试者的简单小动作视频剪辑来自动诊断自闭症。这项任务特别具有挑战性，因为可用的注释数据量很小，并且两个类别（ASD 和对照）的样本之间的差异通常无法区分。从使用基线编码器顶部的交叉熵损失学习的二元分类器的糟糕性能中也可以看出这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们在自监督和监督学习框架中采用对比特征学习，并表明这些可以导致二元分类器在此任务上的预测准确性显着提高。我们通过在两个公开数据集的不同设置下进行彻底的实验分析来进一步验证这一点。 本文提出一种基于动作视频的自闭症早期诊断方法，通过对比特征学习提升分类准确性。 Asha Rani,Pankaj Yadav,Yashaswi Verma cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Bon Adriel Aseniero,Sheelagh Carpendale,George Fitzmaurice,Justin Matejka
title: SkyGlyphs: Reflections on the Design of a Delightful Visualization
title_zh: SkyGlyphs：对令人愉快的可视化设计的思考
comment: Accepted to IEEE VIS Arts Program 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE VIS Arts Program 2022
abstract: In creating SkyGlyphs, our goal was to develop a data visualization that could possibly capture people's attention and spark their curiosity to explore a dataset. This work was inspired by a mingling of research including serendipitous interactions, visualizations for public displays, and personal visualizations. SkyGlyphs is a nonconventional whimsical visualization, depicting datapoints as animated balloons in space. We designed it to encourage non-experts to casually browse the contents of a repository through visual interactions like linking and grouping of datapoints. Our contributions include SkyGlyphs' representation and our design reflection that reveals a perspective on how to design delightful visualizations.
summary: In creating SkyGlyphs, our goal was to develop a data visualization that could possibly capture people's attention and spark their curiosity to explore a dataset. This work was inspired by a mingling of research including serendipitous interactions, visualizations for public displays, and personal visualizations. SkyGlyphs is a nonconventional whimsical visualization, depicting datapoints as animated balloons in space. We designed it to encourage non-experts to casually browse the contents of a repository through visual interactions like linking and grouping of datapoints. Our contributions include SkyGlyphs' representation and our design reflection that reveals a perspective on how to design delightful visualizations.
abstract_zh: 在创建 SkyGlyphs 时，我们的目标是开发一种数据可视化，能够吸引人们的注意力并激发他们探索数据集的好奇心。这项工作的灵感来自于多种研究的结合，包括偶然的互动、公共展示的可视化和个人可视化。 SkyGlyphs 是一种非传统的异想天开的可视化，将数据点描绘为空间中的动画气球。我们设计它是为了鼓励非专家通过数据点的链接和分组等可视化交互随意浏览存储库的内容。我们的贡献包括 SkyGlyphs 的表示和我们的设计反思，揭示了如何设计令人愉悦的可视化效果的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SkyGlyphs可视化设计，旨在通过非传统的动画气球形式吸引用户探索数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有数据可视化难以吸引非专家用户主动探索，需设计更具趣味性和互动性的可视化方案。
AI.method: 采用动画气球与空间布局结合，通过链接、分组等交互方式呈现数据关联性，增强视觉吸引力。
AI.result: 成功激发非专家用户对数据集的好奇心，促进其通过直观交互发现数据模式。
AI.conclusion: 设计愉悦的可视化需平衡创意表达与用户交互，强调非传统形式在数据探索中的潜力。

authors_text: Carlos Mastalli,Saroj Prasad Chhatoi,Thomas Corbères,Steve Tonneau,Sethu Vijayakumar
title: Inverse-Dynamics MPC via Nullspace Resolution
title_zh: 通过零空间解析的逆动力学 MPC
comment: 20 pages, 14 figures, accepted to IEEE TRO
comments: 20 pages, 14 figures, accepted to IEEE TRO
abstract: Optimal control (OC) using inverse dynamics provides numerical benefits such as coarse optimization, cheaper computation of derivatives, and a high convergence rate. However, to take advantage of these benefits in model predictive control (MPC) for legged robots, it is crucial to handle efficiently its large number of equality constraints. To accomplish this, we first (i) propose a novel approach to handle equality constraints based on nullspace parametrization. Our approach balances optimality, and both dynamics and equality-constraint feasibility appropriately, which increases the basin of attraction to high-quality local minima. To do so, we (ii) modify our feasibility-driven search by incorporating a merit function. Furthermore, we introduce (iii) a condensed formulation of inverse dynamics that considers arbitrary actuator models. We also propose (iv) a novel MPC based on inverse dynamics within a perceptive locomotion framework. Finally, we present (v) a theoretical comparison of optimal control with forward and inverse dynamics and evaluate both numerically. Our approach enables the first application of inverse-dynamics MPC on hardware, resulting in state-of-the-art dynamic climbing on the ANYmal robot. We benchmark it over a wide range of robotics problems and generate agile and complex maneuvers. We show the computational reduction of our nullspace resolution and condensed formulation (up to 47.3%). We provide evidence of the benefits of our approach by solving coarse optimization problems with a high convergence rate (up to 10 Hz of discretization). Our algorithm is publicly available inside CROCODDYL.
summary: Optimal control (OC) using inverse dynamics provides numerical benefits such as coarse optimization, cheaper computation of derivatives, and a high convergence rate. However, to take advantage of these benefits in model predictive control (MPC) for legged robots, it is crucial to handle efficiently its large number of equality constraints. To accomplish this, we first (i) propose a novel approach to handle equality constraints based on nullspace parametrization. Our approach balances optimality, and both dynamics and equality-constraint feasibility appropriately, which increases the basin of attraction to high-quality local minima. To do so, we (ii) modify our feasibility-driven search by incorporating a merit function. Furthermore, we introduce (iii) a condensed formulation of inverse dynamics that considers arbitrary actuator models. We also propose (iv) a novel MPC based on inverse dynamics within a perceptive locomotion framework. Finally, we present (v) a theoretical comparison of optimal control with forward and inverse dynamics and evaluate both numerically. Our approach enables the first application of inverse-dynamics MPC on hardware, resulting in state-of-the-art dynamic climbing on the ANYmal robot. We benchmark it over a wide range of robotics problems and generate agile and complex maneuvers. We show the computational reduction of our nullspace resolution and condensed formulation (up to 47.3%). We provide evidence of the benefits of our approach by solving coarse optimization problems with a high convergence rate (up to 10 Hz of discretization). Our algorithm is publicly available inside CROCODDYL.
abstract_zh: 使用逆动力学的最优控制 (OC) 提供了数值优势，例如粗略优化、更便宜的导数计算以及高收敛速度。然而，为了利用腿式机器人模型预测控制（MPC）的这些优势，有效处理其大量等式约束至关重要。为了实现这一目标，我们首先 (i) 提出一种基于零空间参数化处理等式约束的新方法。我们的方法适当地平衡了最优性、动态性和等式约束可行性，这增加了对高质量局部最小值的吸引力。为此，我们 (ii) 通过合并评价函数来修改我们的可行性驱动搜索。此外，我们引入了（iii）考虑任意执行器模型的逆动力学的精简公式。我们还提出了（iv）一种基于感知运动框架内的逆动力学的新型 MPC。最后，我们提出（v）最优控制与正向和逆向动力学的理论比较，并对两者进行数值评估。我们的方法首次在硬件上应用逆动态 MPC，从而在 ANYmal 机器人上实现最先进的动态攀爬。我们在广泛的机器人问题上对其进行基准测试，并生成敏捷和复杂的动作。我们展示了零空间分辨率和压缩公式的计算减少（高达 47.3%）。我们通过以高收敛率（高达 10 Hz 的离散化）解决粗优化问题来证明我们的方法的优势。我们的算法在 CROCODDYL 内公开可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于零空间分解的逆动力学MPC方法，用于解决腿式机器人运动控制中的等式约束问题，并在ANYmal机器人上实现了动态攀爬的最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 逆动力学控制在优化计算和收敛速度方面具有优势，但传统MPC在处理腿式机器人大量等式约束时效率低下，需改进约束处理方法以提升性能。
AI.method: （i）提出基于零空间参数化的约束处理方法；（ii）引入目标函数驱动的可行性搜索；（iii）设计适用于任意执行器模型的逆动力学浓缩公式；（iv）构建感知运动框架下的逆动力学MPC；（v）理论对比正逆动力学控制并进行数值验证。
AI.result: 首次在硬件上实现逆动力学MPC，ANYmal机器人完成复杂动态攀爬；计算效率提升47.3%，优化问题收敛率高达10Hz；在多种机器人任务中生成敏捷动作。
AI.conclusion: 零空间分解与浓缩公式有效平衡了优化可行性与计算效率，验证了逆动力学MPC在腿式机器人控制中的优越性，为高动态运动提供了新方法。

We show the computational reduction of our nullspace resolution and condensed formulation (up to 47.3%). We provide evidence of the benefits of our approach by solving coarse optimization problems with a high convergence rate (up to 10 Hz of discretization). Our algorithm is publicly available inside CROCODDYL. 使用逆动力学的最优控制 (OC) 提供了数值优势，例如粗略优化、更便宜的导数计算以及高收敛速度。然而，为了利用腿式机器人模型预测控制（MPC）的这些优势，有效处理其大量等式约束至关重要。为了实现这一目标，我们首先 (i) 提出一种基于零空间参数化处理等式约束的新方法。我们的方法适当地平衡了最优性、动态性和等式约束可行性，这增加了对高质量局部最小值的吸引力。为此，我们 (ii) 通过合并评价函数来修改我们的可行性驱动搜索。此外，我们引入了（iii）考虑任意执行器模型的逆动力学的精简公式。我们还提出了（iv）一种基于感知运动框架内的逆动力学的新型 MPC。最后，我们提出（v）最优控制与正向和逆向动力学的理论比较，并对两者进行数值评估。我们的方法首次在硬件上应用逆动态 MPC，从而在 ANYmal 机器人上实现最先进的动态攀爬。我们在广泛的机器人问题上对其进行基准测试，并生成敏捷和复杂的动作。我们展示了零空间分辨率和压缩公式的计算减少（高达 47.3%）。我们通过以高收敛率（高达 10 Hz 的离散化）解决粗优化问题来证明我们的方法的优势。我们的算法在 CROCODDYL 内公开可用。 本文提出了一种基于零空间分解的逆动力学MPC方法，用于解决腿式机器人运动控制中的等式约束问题，并在ANYmal机器人上实现了动态攀爬的最先进性能。 Carlos Mastalli,Saroj Prasad Chhatoi,Thomas Corbères,Steve Tonneau,Sethu Vijayakumar cs.RO,cs.CE,eess.SY

authors_text: Eleftherios Kalogeros,Manolis Gergatsoulis,Matthew Damigos,Christos Nomikos
title: Efficient query evaluation techniques over large amount of distributed linked data
title_zh: 针对大量分布式链接数据的高效查询评估技术
abstract: As RDF becomes more widely established and the amount of linked data is rapidly increasing, the efficient querying of large amount of data becomes a significant challenge. In this paper, we propose a family of algorithms for querying large amount of linked data in a distributed manner. These query evaluation algorithms are independent of the way the data is stored, as well as of the particular implementation of the query evaluation. We then use the MapReduce paradigm to present a distributed implementation of these algorithms and experimentally evaluate them, although the algorithms could be straightforwardly translated into other distributed processing frameworks. We also investigate and propose multiple query decomposition approaches of Basic Graph Patterns (subclass of SPARQL queries) that are used to improve the overall performance of the distributed query answering. A deep analysis of the effectiveness of these decomposition algorithms is also provided.
summary: As RDF becomes more widely established and the amount of linked data is rapidly increasing, the efficient querying of large amount of data becomes a significant challenge. In this paper, we propose a family of algorithms for querying large amount of linked data in a distributed manner. These query evaluation algorithms are independent of the way the data is stored, as well as of the particular implementation of the query evaluation. We then use the MapReduce paradigm to present a distributed implementation of these algorithms and experimentally evaluate them, although the algorithms could be straightforwardly translated into other distributed processing frameworks. We also investigate and propose multiple query decomposition approaches of Basic Graph Patterns (subclass of SPARQL queries) that are used to improve the overall performance of the distributed query answering. A deep analysis of the effectiveness of these decomposition algorithms is also provided.
abstract_zh: 随着RDF的广泛建立和关联数据量的迅速增加，大量数据的高效查询成为一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一系列以分布式方式查询大量链接数据的算法。这些查询评估算法独立于数据存储方式以及查询评估的特定实现。然后，我们使用 MapReduce 范例来呈现这些算法的分布式实现，并通过实验评估它们，尽管这些算法可以直接转换为其他分布式处理框架。我们还研究并提出了基本图模式（SPARQL 查询的子类）的多种查询分解方法，用于提高分布式查询应答的整体性能。还提供了对这些分解算法的有效性的深入分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一组用于分布式环境下大规模链接数据高效查询的算法，并基于MapReduce框架进行实现与评估。
AI.motivation: 随着RDF数据规模的快速增长，传统查询方法难以满足分布式环境下大规模链接数据的高效处理需求。
AI.method: 设计与存储方式无关的通用查询算法，结合MapReduce框架实现分布式处理，并提出基本图模式的多种分解策略以优化性能。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法在分布式环境中的有效性，分析表明分解策略能显著提升查询效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法和分解方法为大规模链接数据的分布式查询提供了高效解决方案，且具有跨框架迁移的潜力。

authors_text: Luciana Ferrer
title: Analysis and Comparison of Classification Metrics
title_zh: 分类指标的分析与比较
abstract: A variety of different performance metrics are commonly used in the machine learning literature for the evaluation of classification systems. Some of the most common ones for measuring quality of hard decisions are standard and balanced accuracy, standard and balanced error rate, F-beta score, and Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC). In this document, we review the definition of these and other metrics and compare them with the expected cost (EC), a metric introduced in every statistical learning course but rarely used in the machine learning literature. We show that both the standard and balanced error rates are special cases of the EC. Further, we show its relation with F-beta score and MCC and argue that EC is superior to these traditional metrics for being based on first principles from statistics, and for being more general, interpretable, and adaptable to any application scenario. The metrics mentioned above measure the quality of hard decisions. Yet, most modern classification systems output continuous scores for the classes which we may want to evaluate directly. Metrics for measuring the quality of system scores include the area under the ROC curve, equal error rate, cross-entropy, Brier score, and Bayes EC or Bayes risk, among others. The last three metrics are special cases of a family of metrics given by the expected value of proper scoring rules (PSRs). We review the theory behind these metrics, showing that they are a principled way to measure the quality of the posterior probabilities produced by a system. Finally, we show how to use these metrics to compute a system's calibration loss and compare this metric with the widely-used expected calibration error (ECE), arguing that calibration loss based on PSRs is superior to the ECE for being more interpretable, more general, and directly applicable to the multi-class case, among other reasons.
summary: A variety of different performance metrics are commonly used in the machine learning literature for the evaluation of classification systems. Some of the most common ones for measuring quality of hard decisions are standard and balanced accuracy, standard and balanced error rate, F-beta score, and Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC). In this document, we review the definition of these and other metrics and compare them with the expected cost (EC), a metric introduced in every statistical learning course but rarely used in the machine learning literature. We show that both the standard and balanced error rates are special cases of the EC. Further, we show its relation with F-beta score and MCC and argue that EC is superior to these traditional metrics for being based on first principles from statistics, and for being more general, interpretable, and adaptable to any application scenario. The metrics mentioned above measure the quality of hard decisions. Yet, most modern classification systems output continuous scores for the classes which we may want to evaluate directly. Metrics for measuring the quality of system scores include the area under the ROC curve, equal error rate, cross-entropy, Brier score, and Bayes EC or Bayes risk, among others. The last three metrics are special cases of a family of metrics given by the expected value of proper scoring rules (PSRs). We review the theory behind these metrics, showing that they are a principled way to measure the quality of the posterior probabilities produced by a system. Finally, we show how to use these metrics to compute a system's calibration loss and compare this metric with the widely-used expected calibration error (ECE), arguing that calibration loss based on PSRs is superior to the ECE for being more interpretable, more general, and directly applicable to the multi-class case, among other reasons.
abstract_zh: 机器学习文献中通常使用各种不同的性能指标来评估分类系统。用于衡量硬决策质量的一些最常见的指标包括标准和平衡准确度、标准和平衡错误率、F-beta 分数和马修斯相关系数 (MCC)。在本文档中，我们回顾了这些指标和其他指标的定义，并将它们与预期成本 (EC) 进行比较，这是每个统计学习课程中引入的指标，但在机器学习文献中很少使用。我们证明标准错误率和平衡错误率都是 EC 的特殊情况。此外，我们展示了它与 F-beta 分数和 MCC 的关系，并认为 EC 优于这些传统指标，因为它基于统计学的第一原理，并且更通用、可解释且适用于任何应用场景。上述指标衡量艰难决策的质量。然而，大多数现代分类系统都会为我们可能想要直接评估的类别输出连续分数。衡量系统评分质量的指标包括 ROC 曲线下面积、等错误率、交叉熵、Brier 评分和贝叶斯 EC 或贝叶斯风险等。最后三个指标是由适当评分规则 (PSR) 的预期值给出的一系列指标的特殊情况。我们回顾了这些指标背后的理论，表明它们是衡量系统产生的后验概率质量的原则方法。最后，我们展示了如何使用这些指标来计算系统的校准损失，并将该指标与广泛使用的预期校准误差 (ECE) 进行比较，认为基于 PSR 的校准损失优于 ECE，因为它更可解释、更通用、可直接适用于多类情况等。

AI.tldr: 本文分析并比较了分类系统的多种评估指标，重点探讨了预期成本（EC）和基于适当评分规则（PSR）的校准损失。
AI.motivation: 传统分类评估指标存在适用性局限，而EC和PSR等基于统计原理的指标更具通用性和解释性，但未被广泛采用。
AI.method: 通过理论推导与比较分析，将标准误差率、F-beta分数等指标与EC关联，并论证PSR家族指标在概率校准评估中的优势。
AI.result: 证明EC是传统指标的泛化形式，PSR衍生的校准损失在多分类场景下优于现有预期校准误差（ECE）指标。
AI.conclusion: 基于统计原理的EC和PSR指标在通用性、可解释性和场景适应性方面优于传统分类评估方法，应被更广泛采用。

authors_text: R. Cirpons,J. D. Mitchell
title: Polynomial time multiplication and normal forms in free bands
title_zh: 自由带中的多项式时间乘法和范式
comment: 31 pages, 12 figures (fix some minor typos and other issues, to appear in Theoretical Computer Science)
comments: 31 pages, 12 figures (fix some minor typos and other issues, to appear in Theoretical Computer Science)
abstract: We present efficient computational solutions to the problems of checking equality, performing multiplication, and computing minimal representatives of elements of free bands. A band is any semigroup satisfying the identity $x ^ 2 \approx x$ and the free band $\operatorname{FB}(k)$ is the free object in the variety of $k$-generated bands. Radoszewski and Rytter developed a linear time algorithm for checking whether two words represent the same element of a free band. In this paper we describe an alternate linear time algorithm for checking the same problem. The algorithm we present utilises a representation of words as synchronous deterministic transducers that lend themselves to efficient (quadratic in the size of the alphabet) multiplication in the free band. This representation also provides a means of finding the short-lex least word representing a given free band element with quadratic complexity.
summary: We present efficient computational solutions to the problems of checking equality, performing multiplication, and computing minimal representatives of elements of free bands. A band is any semigroup satisfying the identity $x ^ 2 \approx x$ and the free band $\operatorname{FB}(k)$ is the free object in the variety of $k$-generated bands. Radoszewski and Rytter developed a linear time algorithm for checking whether two words represent the same element of a free band. In this paper we describe an alternate linear time algorithm for checking the same problem. The algorithm we present utilises a representation of words as synchronous deterministic transducers that lend themselves to efficient (quadratic in the size of the alphabet) multiplication in the free band. This representation also provides a means of finding the short-lex least word representing a given free band element with quadratic complexity.
abstract_zh: 我们针对检查相等性、执行乘法和计算自由带元素的最小表示等问题提出了有效的计算解决方案。带是满足恒等式 $x ^ 2 \approx x$ 的任何半群，自由带 $\operatorname{FB}(k)$ 是各种 $k$ 生成带中的自由对象。 Radoszewski 和 Rytter 开发了一种线性时间算法，用于检查两个单词是否代表自由带的相同元素。在本文中，我们描述了一种用于检查同一问题的替代线性时间算法。我们提出的算法利用单词的表示作为同步确定性换能器，使其能够在自由频带中进行高效（字母表大小的二次方）乘法。该表示还提供了一种方法来查找表示具有二次复杂度的给定自由带元素的短词法最小单词。

AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了自由半群中的关键问题，提供了高效的算法和表示方式。

search_text: Polynomial time multiplication and normal forms in free bands 自由带中的多项式时间乘法和范式 We present efficient computational solutions to the problems of checking equality, performing multiplication, and computing minimal representatives of elements of free bands. A band is any semigroup satisfying the identity $x ^ 2 \approx x$ and the free band $\operatorname{FB}(k)$ is the free object in the variety of $k$-generated bands. Radoszewski and Rytter developed a linear time algorithm for checking whether two words represent the same element of a free band. In this paper we describe an alternate linear time algorithm for checking the same problem. The algorithm we present utilises a representation of words as synchronous deterministic transducers that lend themselves to efficient (quadratic in the size of the alphabet) multiplication in the free band. This representation also provides a means of finding the short-lex least word representing a given free band element with quadratic complexity. 我们针对检查相等性、执行乘法和计算自由带元素的最小表示等问题提出了有效的计算解决方案。带是满足恒等式 $x ^ 2 \approx x$ 的任何半群，自由带 $\operatorname{FB}(k)$ 是各种 $k$ 生成带中的自由对象。 Radoszewski 和 Rytter 开发了一种线性时间算法，用于检查两个单词是否代表自由带的相同元素。在本文中，我们描述了一种用于检查同一问题的替代线性时间算法。我们提出的算法利用单词的表示作为同步确定性换能器，使其能够在自由频带中进行高效（字母表大小的二次方）乘法。该表示还提供了一种方法来查找表示具有二次复杂度的给定自由带元素的短词法最小单词。 提出高效的算法解决自由半群中的元素相等性检查、乘法及最小代表计算问题。 R. authors_text: Bang You,Jingming Xie,Youping Chen,Jan Peters,Oleg Arenz
title: Self-supervised Sequential Information Bottleneck for Robust Exploration in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习中稳健探索的自监督序列信息瓶颈
comment: 14 pages
comments: 14 pages
abstract: Effective exploration is critical for reinforcement learning agents in environments with sparse rewards or high-dimensional state-action spaces. Recent works based on state-visitation counts, curiosity and entropy-maximization generate intrinsic reward signals to motivate the agent to visit novel states for exploration. However, the agent can get distracted by perturbations to sensor inputs that contain novel but task-irrelevant information, e.g. due to sensor noise or changing background. In this work, we introduce the sequential information bottleneck objective for learning compressed and temporally coherent representations by modelling and compressing sequential predictive information in time-series observations. For efficient exploration in noisy environments, we further construct intrinsic rewards that capture task-relevant state novelty based on the learned representations. We derive a variational upper bound of our sequential information bottleneck objective for practical optimization and provide an information-theoretic interpretation of the derived upper bound. Our experiments on a set of challenging image-based simulated control tasks show that our method achieves better sample efficiency, and robustness to both white noise and natural video backgrounds compared to state-of-art methods based on curiosity, entropy maximization and information-gain.
summary: Effective exploration is critical for reinforcement learning agents in environments with sparse rewards or high-dimensional state-action spaces. Recent works based on state-visitation counts, curiosity and entropy-maximization generate intrinsic reward signals to motivate the agent to visit novel states for exploration. However, the agent can get distracted by perturbations to sensor inputs that contain novel but task-irrelevant information, e.g. due to sensor noise or changing background. In this work, we introduce the sequential information bottleneck objective for learning compressed and temporally coherent representations by modelling and compressing sequential predictive information in time-series observations. For efficient exploration in noisy environments, we further construct intrinsic rewards that capture task-relevant state novelty based on the learned representations. We derive a variational upper bound of our sequential information bottleneck objective for practical optimization and provide an information-theoretic interpretation of the derived upper bound. Our experiments on a set of challenging image-based simulated control tasks show that our method achieves better sample efficiency, and robustness to both white noise and natural video backgrounds compared to state-of-art methods based on curiosity, entropy maximization and information-gain.
abstract_zh: 在奖励稀疏或高维状态动作空间的环境中，有效的探索对于强化学习代理至关重要。最近基于状态访问计数、好奇心和熵最大化的工作产生内在奖励信号，以激励智能体访问新状态进行探索。然而，代理可能会因传感器输入的扰动而分心，这些输入包含新颖但与任务无关的信息，例如由于传感器噪声或背景变化。在这项工作中，我们引入了顺序信息瓶颈目标，通过建模和压缩时间序列观测中的顺序预测信息来学习压缩和时间相干的表示。为了在嘈杂的环境中进行有效的探索，我们进一步构建了内在奖励，以基于学习到的表示捕获与任务相关的状态新颖性。我们推导了用于实际优化的顺序信息瓶颈目标的变分上限，并提供了推导上限的信息论解释。我们对一组具有挑战性的基于图像的模拟控制任务进行的实验表明，与基于好奇心、熵最大化和信息增益的最先进方法相比，我们的方法实现了更好的样本效率以及对白噪声和自然视频背景的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督序列信息瓶颈的方法，用于在深度强化学习中实现鲁棒探索，通过压缩时间序列观测中的预测信息来学习紧凑且时序一致的表示，并利用这些表示生成与任务相关的内在奖励信号。
AI.motivation: 现有基于状态访问次数、好奇心和熵最大化的探索方法在噪声或任务无关信息干扰下容易偏离目标，导致探索效率下降。
AI.method: 引入序列信息瓶颈目标，通过建模和压缩时间序列观测中的预测信息学习压缩表示，并基于这些表示构造捕捉任务相关状态新颖性的内在奖励，同时推导出可优化的变分上界。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的图像基准控制任务中，该方法在样本效率和对白噪声及自然视频背景的鲁棒性方面优于基于好奇心、熵最大化和信息增益的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 序列信息瓶颈方法通过分离任务相关与无关信息，有效提升了深度强化学习在噪声环境中的探索效率和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hongyang Li,Chonghao Sima,Jifeng Dai,Wenhai Wang,Lewei Lu,Huijie Wang,Jia Zeng,Zhiqi Li,Jiazhi Yang,Hanming Deng,Hao Tian,Enze Xie,Jiangwei Xie,Li Chen,Tianyu Li,Yang Li,Yulu Gao,Xiaosong Jia,Si Liu,Jianping Shi,Dahua Lin,Yu Qiao
title: Delving into the Devils of Bird's-eye-view Perception: A Review, Evaluation and Recipe
title_zh: 深入探讨鸟瞰感知的魔鬼：回顾、评估和秘诀
comment: https://github.com/OpenDriveLab/Birds-eye-view-Perception
comments: https://github.com/OpenDriveLab/Birds-eye-view-Perception
abstract: Learning powerful representations in bird's-eye-view (BEV) for perception tasks is trending and drawing extensive attention both from industry and academia. Conventional approaches for most autonomous driving algorithms perform detection, segmentation, tracking, etc., in a front or perspective view. As sensor configurations get more complex, integrating multi-source information from different sensors and representing features in a unified view come of vital importance. BEV perception inherits several advantages, as representing surrounding scenes in BEV is intuitive and fusion-friendly; and representing objects in BEV is most desirable for subsequent modules as in planning and/or control. The core problems for BEV perception lie in (a) how to reconstruct the lost 3D information via view transformation from perspective view to BEV; (b) how to acquire ground truth annotations in BEV grid; (c) how to formulate the pipeline to incorporate features from different sources and views; and (d) how to adapt and generalize algorithms as sensor configurations vary across different scenarios. In this survey, we review the most recent works on BEV perception and provide an in-depth analysis of different solutions. Moreover, several systematic designs of BEV approach from the industry are depicted as well. Furthermore, we introduce a full suite of practical guidebook to improve the performance of BEV perception tasks, including camera, LiDAR and fusion inputs. At last, we point out the future research directions in this area. We hope this report will shed some light on the community and encourage more research effort on BEV perception. We keep an active repository to collect the most recent work and provide a toolbox for bag of tricks at https://github.com/OpenDriveLab/Birds-eye-view-Perception

In this survey, we review the most recent works on BEV perception and provide an in-depth analysis of different solutions. Moreover, several systematic designs of BEV approach from the industry are depicted as well. abstract_zh: 在感知任务中学习鸟瞰图（BEV）中的强大表示是一种趋势，并引起了工业界和学术界的广泛关注。大多数自动驾驶算法的传统方法是在前视图或透视图中执行检测、分割、跟踪等。随着传感器配置变得越来越复杂，集成来自不同传感器的多源信息并在统一视图中表示特征变得至关重要。 BEV 感知继承了多个优点，因为 BEV 中表示的周围场景直观且易于融合；在 BEV 中表示对象对于规划和/或控制等后续模块来说是最理想的。 BEV感知的核心问题在于（a）如何通过从透视图到BEV的视图转换来重建丢失的3D信息； (b) 如何获取 BEV 网格中的地面实况注释； (c) 如何制定管道以纳入不同来源和观点的特征； (d) 当传感器配置因不同场景而异时，如何调整和推广算法。在本次调查中，我们回顾了有关纯电动汽车感知的最新研究成果，并对不同的解决方案进行了深入分析。此外，还描述了业界几种 BEV 方法的系统设计。此外，我们还推出了一整套实用指南，以提高 BEV 感知任务的性能，包括摄像头、激光雷达和融合输入。最后，我们指出了该领域未来的研究方向。我们希望这份报告能够为社区带来一些启发，并鼓励更多关于纯电动汽车感知的研究工作。我们保留一个活跃的存储库来收集最新的工作，并在 https://github.com/OpenDriveLab/Birds-eye-view-Perception 上提供一个包含各种技巧的工具箱

AI.tldr: 综述BEV感知的最新方法，分析挑战并提供实用指南
AI.motivation: 传统方法在复杂传感器配置下难以融合多源信息，而BEV感知能更有效地整合信息，提升自动驾驶系统的性能
AI.method: 系统综述BEV感知方法，分析核心问题，总结工业界设计，并提供包含多种输入的实用技巧指南
AI.result: 总结了BEV感知的解决方案，指明未来方向，并提供工具箱和资源库以促进研究
AI.conclusion: BEV感知是自动驾驶的关键，需解决3D重建、标注、多源融合和泛化问题，未来研究应关注这些方向

search_text: Delving into the Devils of Bird's-eye-view Perception: A Review, Evaluation and Recipe 深入探讨鸟瞰感知的魔鬼：回顾、评估和秘诀 Learning powerful representations in bird's-eye-view (BEV) for perception tasks is trending and drawing extensive attention both from industry and academia. Conventional approaches for most autonomous driving algorithms perform detection, segmentation, tracking, etc., in a front or perspective view. As sensor configurations get more complex, integrating multi-source information from different sensors and representing features in a unified view come of vital importance. BEV perception inherits several advantages, as representing surrounding scenes in BEV is intuitive and fusion-friendly; and representing objects in BEV is most desirable for subsequent modules as in planning and/or control. The core problems for BEV perception lie in (a) how to reconstruct the lost 3D information via view transformation from perspective view to BEV; (b) how to acquire ground truth annotations in BEV grid; (c) how to formulate the pipeline to incorporate features from different sources and views; and (d) how to adapt and generalize algorithms as sensor configurations vary across different scenarios. In this survey, we review the most recent works on BEV perception and provide an in-depth analysis of different solutions. Moreover, several systematic designs of BEV approach from the industry are depicted as well. Furthermore, we introduce a full suite of practical guidebook to improve the performance of BEV perception tasks, including camera, LiDAR and fusion inputs. At last, we point out the future research directions in this area. We hope this report will shed some light on the community and encourage more research effort on BEV perception. We keep an active repository to collect the most recent work and provide a toolbox for bag of tricks at https://github.com/OpenDriveLab/Birds-eye-view-Perception 在感知任务中学习鸟瞰图（BEV）中的强大表示是一种趋势，并引起了工业界和学术界的广泛关注。大多数自动驾驶算法的传统方法是在前视图或透视图中执行检测、分割、跟踪等。随着传感器配置变得越来越复杂，集成来自不同传感器的多源信息并在统一视图中表示特征变得至关重要。 BEV 感知继承了多个优点，因为 BEV 中表示的周围场景直观且易于融合；在 BEV 中表示对象对于规划和/或控制等后续模块来说是最理想的。 BEV感知的核心问题在于（a）如何通过从透视图到BEV的视图转换来重建丢失的3D信息； (b) 如何获取 BEV 网格中的地面实况注释； (c) 如何制定管道以纳入不同来源和观点的特征； (d) 当传感器配置因不同场景而异时，如何调整和推广算法。在本次调查中，我们回顾了有关纯电动汽车感知的最新研究成果，并对不同的解决方案进行了深入分析。此外，还描述了业界几种 BEV 方法的系统设计。此外，我们还推出了一整套实用指南，以提高 BEV 感知任务的性能，包括摄像头、激光雷达和融合输入。最后，我们指出了该领域未来的研究方向。我们希望这份报告能够为社区带来一些启发，并鼓励更多关于纯电动汽车感知的研究工作。我们保留一个活跃的存储库来收集最新的工作，并在 https://github.com/OpenDriveLab/Birds-eye-view-Perception 上提供一个包含各种技巧的工具箱 综述BEV感知的最新方法，分析挑战并提供实用指南 Hongyang Li,Chonghao Sima,Jifeng Dai,Wenhai Wang,Lewei Lu,Huijie Wang,Jia Zeng,Zhiqi Li,Jiazhi Yang,Hanming Deng,Hao Tian,Enze Xie,Jiangwei Xie,Li Chen,Tianyu Li,Yang Li,Yulu Gao,Xiaosong Jia,Si Liu,Jianping Shi,Dahua Lin,Yu Qiao cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Baoliang Chen,Hanwei Zhu,Lingyu Zhu,Shiqi Wang,Sam Kwong
title: Deep Feature Statistics Mapping for Generalized Screen Content Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: 用于广义屏幕内容图像质量评估的深度特征统计映射
abstract: The statistical regularities of natural images, referred to as natural scene statistics, play an important role in no-reference image quality assessment. However, it has been widely acknowledged that screen content images (SCIs), which are typically computer generated, do not hold such statistics. Here we make the first attempt to learn the statistics of SCIs, based upon which the quality of SCIs can be effectively determined. The underlying mechanism of the proposed approach is based upon the mild assumption that the SCIs, which are not physically acquired, still obey certain statistics that could be understood in a learning fashion. We empirically show that the statistics deviation could be effectively leveraged in quality assessment, and the proposed method is superior when evaluated in different settings. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the Deep Feature Statistics based SCI Quality Assessment (DFSS-IQA) model delivers promising performance compared with existing NR-IQA models and shows a high generalization capability in the cross-dataset settings. The implementation of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/Baoliang93/DFSS-IQA.
summary: The statistical regularities of natural images, referred to as natural scene statistics, play an important role in no-reference image quality assessment. However, it has been widely acknowledged that screen content images (SCIs), which are typically computer generated, do not hold such statistics. Here we make the first attempt to learn the statistics of SCIs, based upon which the quality of SCIs can be effectively determined. The underlying mechanism of the proposed approach is based upon the mild assumption that the SCIs, which are not physically acquired, still obey certain statistics that could be understood in a learning fashion. We empirically show that the statistics deviation could be effectively leveraged in quality assessment, and the proposed method is superior when evaluated in different settings. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the Deep Feature Statistics based SCI Quality Assessment (DFSS-IQA) model delivers promising performance compared with existing NR-IQA models and shows a high generalization capability in the cross-dataset settings. The implementation of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/Baoliang93/DFSS-IQA.
abstract_zh: 自然图像的统计规律，称为自然场景统计，在无参考图像质量评估中发挥着重要作用。然而，人们普遍认为，通常由计算机生成的屏幕内容图像 (SCI) 不包含此类统计数据。这里我们首次尝试学习SCI的统计数据，以此来有效判断SCI的质量。所提出方法的基本机制基于一个温和的假设，即非物理获得的 SCI 仍然遵循某些可以通过学习方式理解的统计数据。我们的经验表明，统计偏差可以在质量评估中得到有效利用，并且在不同设置下进行评估时，所提出的方法更为优越。大量的实验结果表明，与现有的 NR-IQA 模型相比，基于深度特征统计的 SCI 质量评估 (DFSS-IQA) 模型具有良好的性能，并在跨数据集设置中显示出较高的泛化能力。我们的方法的实现可在 https://github.com/Baoliang93/DFSS-IQA 上公开获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度特征统计映射的无参考屏幕内容图像质量评估方法（DFSS-IQA），通过学习屏幕内容图像（SCI）的统计特征实现质量评估。
AI.motivation: 自然图像的统计规律在传统无参考图像质量评估中效果显著，但计算机生成的屏幕内容图像（SCI）缺乏此类统计特性，现有方法难以有效评估其质量。
AI.method: 假设SCI虽非物理获取但仍遵循可学习的统计规律，通过深度学习模型提取特征统计信息，并基于统计偏差进行质量预测。
AI.result: DFSS-IQA在多种评估场景中优于现有无参考图像质量评估模型，且在跨数据集测试中表现出高泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为SCI质量评估提供了新思路，通过深度特征统计映射有效捕捉SCI特性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Gilbert Feng,Hongbo Zhang,Zhongyu Li,Xue Bin Peng,Bhuvan Basireddy,Linzhu Yue,Zhitao Song,Lizhi Yang,Yunhui Liu,Koushil Sreenath,Sergey Levine
title: GenLoco: Generalized Locomotion Controllers for Quadrupedal Robots
title_zh: GenLoco：四足机器人的通用运动控制器
comment: First two authors contributed equally
comments: First two authors contributed equally
abstract: Recent years have seen a surge in commercially-available and affordable quadrupedal robots, with many of these platforms being actively used in research and industry. As the availability of legged robots grows, so does the need for controllers that enable these robots to perform useful skills. However, most learning-based frameworks for controller development focus on training robot-specific controllers, a process that needs to be repeated for every new robot. In this work, we introduce a framework for training generalized locomotion (GenLoco) controllers for quadrupedal robots. Our framework synthesizes general-purpose locomotion controllers that can be deployed on a large variety of quadrupedal robots with similar morphologies. We present a simple but effective morphology randomization method that procedurally generates a diverse set of simulated robots for training. We show that by training a controller on this large set of simulated robots, our models acquire more general control strategies that can be directly transferred to novel simulated and real-world robots with diverse morphologies, which were not observed during training.
summary: Recent years have seen a surge in commercially-available and affordable quadrupedal robots, with many of these platforms being actively used in research and industry. As the availability of legged robots grows, so does the need for controllers that enable these robots to perform useful skills. However, most learning-based frameworks for controller development focus on training robot-specific controllers, a process that needs to be repeated for every new robot. In this work, we introduce a framework for training generalized locomotion (GenLoco) controllers for quadrupedal robots. Our framework synthesizes general-purpose locomotion controllers that can be deployed on a large variety of quadrupedal robots with similar morphologies. We present a simple but effective morphology randomization method that procedurally generates a diverse set of simulated robots for training. We show that by training a controller on this large set of simulated robots, our models acquire more general control strategies that can be directly transferred to novel simulated and real-world robots with diverse morphologies, which were not observed during training.
abstract_zh: 近年来，商用且价格实惠的四足机器人激增，其中许多平台被积极用于研究和工业领域。随着腿式机器人的可用性不断增加，对使这些机器人能够执行有用技能的控制器的需求也在增加。然而，大多数基于学习的控制器开发框架都侧重于训练特定于机器人的控制器，这个过程需要为每个新机器人重复。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一个用于训练四足机器人广义运动（GenLoco）控制器的框架。我们的框架综合了通用运动控制器，可以部署在各种具有相似形态的四足机器人上。我们提出了一种简单但有效的形态随机化方法，可以按程序生成一组不同的模拟机器人进行训练。我们表明，通过在这一大组模拟机器人上训练控制器，我们的模型获得了更通用的控制策略，这些策略可以直接转移到具有不同形态的新型模拟和现实机器人上，而这些在训练期间是没有观察到的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用四足机器人运动控制器框架GenLoco，通过形态随机化训练实现跨形态机器人控制策略的迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有控制器需针对每个新机器人重复训练，效率低下。随着四足机器人形态多样化，亟需通用控制方案以降低开发成本。
AI.method: 设计形态随机化方法生成多样化模拟机器人，通过大规模模拟训练获得通用控制策略，实现跨形态迁移。
AI.result: 训练出的控制器可成功部署于未见过的模拟和真实机器人，验证了其跨形态适应能力。
AI.conclusion: GenLoco框架证明了通过形态随机化训练可获得通用控制策略，为四足机器人控制提供了高效解决方案。

Our framework synthesizes general-purpose locomotion controllers that can be deployed on a large variety of quadrupedal robots with similar morphologies. We present a simple but effective morphology randomization method that procedurally generates a diverse set of simulated robots for training. We show that by training a controller on this large set of simulated robots, our models acquire more general control strategies that can be directly transferred to novel simulated and real-world robots with diverse morphologies, which were not observed during training. 近年来，商用且价格实惠的四足机器人激增，其中许多平台被积极用于研究和工业领域。随着腿式机器人的可用性不断增加，对使这些机器人能够执行有用技能的控制器的需求也在增加。然而，大多数基于学习的控制器开发框架都侧重于训练特定于机器人的控制器，这个过程需要为每个新机器人重复。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一个用于训练四足机器人广义运动（GenLoco）控制器的框架。我们的框架综合了通用运动控制器，可以部署在各种具有相似形态的四足机器人上。我们提出了一种简单但有效的形态随机化方法，可以按程序生成一组不同的模拟机器人进行训练。我们表明，通过在这一大组模拟机器人上训练控制器，我们的模型获得了更通用的控制策略，这些策略可以直接转移到具有不同形态的新型模拟和现实机器人上，而这些在训练期间是没有观察到的。 本文提出一种通用四足机器人运动控制器框架GenLoco，通过形态随机化训练实现跨形态机器人控制策略的迁移。 Gilbert Feng,Hongbo Zhang,Zhongyu Li,Xue Bin Peng,Bhuvan Basireddy,Linzhu Yue,Zhitao Song,Lizhi Yang,Yunhui Liu,Koushil Sreenath,Sergey Levine cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Taylor Hearn,Sravan Jayanthi,Sehoon Ha
title: Unified State Representation Learning under Data Augmentation
title_zh: 数据增强下的统一状态表示学习
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 1 table, Georgia Tech CS 8803: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Intelligent Control
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, 1 table, Georgia Tech CS 8803: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Intelligent Control
abstract: The capacity for rapid domain adaptation is important to increasing the applicability of reinforcement learning (RL) to real world problems. Generalization of RL agents is critical to success in the real world, yet zero-shot policy transfer is a challenging problem since even minor visual changes could make the trained agent completely fail in the new task. We propose USRA: Unified State Representation Learning under Data Augmentation, a representation learning framework that learns a latent unified state representation by performing data augmentations on its observations to improve its ability to generalize to unseen target domains. We showcase the success of our approach on the DeepMind Control Generalization Benchmark for the Walker environment and find that USRA achieves higher sample efficiency and 14.3% better domain adaptation performance compared to the best baseline results.
summary: The capacity for rapid domain adaptation is important to increasing the applicability of reinforcement learning (RL) to real world problems. Generalization of RL agents is critical to success in the real world, yet zero-shot policy transfer is a challenging problem since even minor visual changes could make the trained agent completely fail in the new task. We propose USRA: Unified State Representation Learning under Data Augmentation, a representation learning framework that learns a latent unified state representation by performing data augmentations on its observations to improve its ability to generalize to unseen target domains. We showcase the success of our approach on the DeepMind Control Generalization Benchmark for the Walker environment and find that USRA achieves higher sample efficiency and 14.3% better domain adaptation performance compared to the best baseline results.
abstract_zh: 快速领域适应能力对于提高强化学习（RL）对现实世界问题的适用性非常重要。强化学习智能体的泛化对于现实世界中的成功至关重要，但零样本策略迁移是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为即使是微小的视觉变化也可能使经过训练的智能体在新任务中完全失败。我们提出 USRA：数据增强下的统一状态表示学习，这是一种表示学习框架，通过对其观察进行数据增强来学习潜在的统一状态表示，以提高其泛化到看不见的目标域的能力。我们在 Walker 环境的 DeepMind 控制泛化基准测试中展示了我们的方法的成功，并发现与最佳基准结果相比，USRA 实现了更高的样本效率和 14.3% 的更好的域适应性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据增强的统一状态表示学习框架USRA，以提升强化学习代理在未见过的目标领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 强化学习代理在现实世界中面临零样本策略迁移的挑战，微小的视觉变化可能导致训练好的智能体完全失效，亟需提升其领域适应能力。
AI.method: 通过数据增强技术对观测进行变换，学习一个能够捕捉跨领域不变特征的统一潜在状态表示，从而增强模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在DeepMind控制泛化基准测试的Walker环境中，USRA相比最佳基线方法提升了14.3%的领域适应性能，并表现出更高的样本效率。
AI.conclusion: USRA验证了数据增强驱动的统一状态表示学习在提升强化学习领域适应性方面的有效性，为现实场景应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Tianyi Wang,Harry Cheng,Kam Pui Chow,Liqiang Nie
title: Deep Convolutional Pooling Transformer for Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 用于 Deepfake 检测的深度卷积池化变压器
comment: Accepted to be published in ACM TOMM
comments: Accepted to be published in ACM TOMM
abstract: Recently, Deepfake has drawn considerable public attention due to security and privacy concerns in social media digital forensics. As the wildly spreading Deepfake videos on the Internet become more realistic, traditional detection techniques have failed in distinguishing between real and fake. Most existing deep learning methods mainly focus on local features and relations within the face image using convolutional neural networks as a backbone. However, local features and relations are insufficient for model training to learn enough general information for Deepfake detection. Therefore, the existing Deepfake detection methods have reached a bottleneck to further improve the detection performance. To address this issue, we propose a deep convolutional Transformer to incorporate the decisive image features both locally and globally. Specifically, we apply convolutional pooling and re-attention to enrich the extracted features and enhance efficacy. Moreover, we employ the barely discussed image keyframes in model training for performance improvement and visualize the feature quantity gap between the key and normal image frames caused by video compression. We finally illustrate the transferability with extensive experiments on several Deepfake benchmark datasets. The proposed solution consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art baselines on both within- and cross-dataset experiments.
summary: Recently, Deepfake has drawn considerable public attention due to security and privacy concerns in social media digital forensics. As the wildly spreading Deepfake videos on the Internet become more realistic, traditional detection techniques have failed in distinguishing between real and fake. Most existing deep learning methods mainly focus on local features and relations within the face image using convolutional neural networks as a backbone. However, local features and relations are insufficient for model training to learn enough general information for Deepfake detection. Therefore, the existing Deepfake detection methods have reached a bottleneck to further improve the detection performance. To address this issue, we propose a deep convolutional Transformer to incorporate the decisive image features both locally and globally. Specifically, we apply convolutional pooling and re-attention to enrich the extracted features and enhance efficacy. Moreover, we employ the barely discussed image keyframes in model training for performance improvement and visualize the feature quantity gap between the key and normal image frames caused by video compression. We finally illustrate the transferability with extensive experiments on several Deepfake benchmark datasets. The proposed solution consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art baselines on both within- and cross-dataset experiments.
abstract_zh: 最近，由于社交媒体数字取证的安全和隐私问题，Deepfake 引起了公众的广泛关注。随着网络上广泛传播的Deepfake视频变得越来越真实，传统的检测技术已经无法区分真假。大多数现有的深度学习方法主要关注使用卷积神经网络作为骨干的人脸图像中的局部特征和关系。然而，局部特征和关系不足以让模型训练学习足够的一般信息来进行 Deepfake 检测。因此，现有的Deepfake检测方法已经达到了进一步提高检测性能的瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种深度卷积 Transformer 来整合局部和全局的决定性图像特征。具体来说，我们应用卷积池和重新注意来丰富提取的特征并提高效率。此外，我们在模型训练中采用了很少讨论的图像关键帧来提高性能，并将视频压缩引起的关键图像帧和正常图像帧之间的特征量差距可视化。最后，我们通过在几个 Deepfake 基准数据集上进行的大量实验来说明可转移性。所提出的解决方案在数据集内和跨数据集实验中始终优于几个最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度卷积池化Transformer模型，用于提高Deepfake检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于Deepfake视频在互联网上日益逼真，传统检测技术已无法有效区分真实与虚假内容，现有方法主要依赖局部特征，难以获取足够的通用信息，因此需要改进检测方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种深度卷积Transformer模型，结合局部和全局图像特征，通过卷积池化和重新注意力机制增强特征提取效果，并利用视频关键帧进行模型训练，同时可视化了视频压缩导致的特征差异。
AI.result: 在多个Deepfake基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，所提方法在内部和跨数据集实验中均优于多种先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的深度卷积池化Transformer模型在Deepfake检测任务中表现出色，有效提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Mitchell Usayiwevu,Fouad Sukkar,Chanyeol Yoo,Robert Fitch,Teresa Vidal-Calleja
title: Continuous Planning for Inertial-Aided Systems
title_zh: 惯性辅助系统的连续规划
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures,1 table, Letter
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures,1 table, Letter
abstract: Inertial-aided systems require continuous motion excitation among other reasons to characterize the measurement biases that will enable accurate integration required for localization frameworks. This paper proposes the use of informative path planning to find the best trajectory for minimizing the uncertainty of IMU biases and an adaptive traces method to guide the planner towards trajectories which aid convergence. The key contribution is a novel regression method based on Gaussian Process (GP) to enforce continuity and differentiability between waypoints from a variant of the RRT* planning algorithm. We employ linear operators applied to the GP kernel function to infer not only continuous position trajectories, but also velocities and accelerations. The use of linear functionals enable velocity and acceleration constraints given by the IMU measurements to be imposed on the position GP model. The results from both simulation and real world experiments show that planning for IMU bias convergence helps minimize localization errors in state estimation frameworks.
summary: Inertial-aided systems require continuous motion excitation among other reasons to characterize the measurement biases that will enable accurate integration required for localization frameworks. This paper proposes the use of informative path planning to find the best trajectory for minimizing the uncertainty of IMU biases and an adaptive traces method to guide the planner towards trajectories which aid convergence. The key contribution is a novel regression method based on Gaussian Process (GP) to enforce continuity and differentiability between waypoints from a variant of the RRT* planning algorithm. We employ linear operators applied to the GP kernel function to infer not only continuous position trajectories, but also velocities and accelerations. The use of linear functionals enable velocity and acceleration constraints given by the IMU measurements to be imposed on the position GP model. The results from both simulation and real world experiments show that planning for IMU bias convergence helps minimize localization errors in state estimation frameworks.
abstract_zh: 除其他原因外，惯性辅助系统需要连续运动激励来表征测量偏差，从而实现定位框架所需的精确集成。本文提出使用信息路径规划来寻找最佳轨迹，以最小化 IMU 偏差的不确定性，并使用自适应轨迹方法来引导规划器走向有助于收敛的轨迹。关键贡献是一种基于高斯过程 (GP) 的新颖回归方法，可通过 RRT* 规划算法的变体增强航路点之间的连续性和可微性。我们采用应用于 GP 核函数的线性算子不仅可以推断连续的位置轨迹，还可以推断速度和加速度。使用线性函数可以将 IMU 测量给出的速度和加速度约束施加到位置 GP 模型上。仿真和现实实验的结果表明，规划 IMU 偏差收敛有助于最大限度地减少状态估计框架中的定位误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程回归的连续路径规划方法，用于惯性测量单元（IMU）辅助系统的偏差收敛，以提高定位精度。
AI.motivation: 惯性辅助系统需要持续运动激励以表征测量偏差，现有方法在偏差收敛和轨迹连续性方面存在不足，导致定位误差。
AI.method: 结合信息路径规划与自适应轨迹方法，利用高斯过程（GP）回归和改进的RRT*算法，通过线性算子确保轨迹连续性、可微性，并将IMU测量约束融入位置模型。
AI.result: 仿真和实际实验表明，该方法有效降低了状态估计框架中的定位误差，提升了IMU偏差收敛效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过连续规划和约束优化，本文方法显著改善了惯性辅助系统的定位性能，为偏差估计提供了新思路。

search_text: Continuous Planning for Inertial-Aided Systems 惯性辅助系统的连续规划 Inertial-aided systems require continuous motion excitation among other reasons to characterize the measurement biases that will enable accurate integration required for localization frameworks. This paper proposes the use of informative path planning to find the best trajectory for minimizing the uncertainty of IMU biases and an adaptive traces method to guide the planner towards trajectories which aid convergence. The key contribution is a novel regression method based on Gaussian Process (GP) to enforce continuity and differentiability between waypoints from a variant of the RRT* planning algorithm. We employ linear operators applied to the GP kernel function to infer not only continuous position trajectories, but also velocities and accelerations. The use of linear functionals enable velocity and acceleration constraints given by the IMU measurements to be imposed on the position GP model. The results from both simulation and real world experiments show that planning for IMU bias convergence helps minimize localization errors in state estimation frameworks. 除其他原因外，惯性辅助系统需要连续运动激励来表征测量偏差，从而实现定位框架所需的精确集成。本文提出使用信息路径规划来寻找最佳轨迹，以最小化 IMU 偏差的不确定性，并使用自适应轨迹方法来引导规划器走向有助于收敛的轨迹。关键贡献是一种基于高斯过程 (GP) 的新颖回归方法，可通过 RRT* 规划算法的变体增强航路点之间的连续性和可微性。我们采用应用于 GP 核函数的线性算子不仅可以推断连续的位置轨迹，还可以推断速度和加速度。使用线性函数可以将 IMU 测量给出的速度和加速度约束施加到位置 GP 模型上。仿真和现实实验的结果表明，规划 IMU 偏差收敛有助于最大限度地减少状态估计框架中的定位误差。 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程回归的连续路径规划方法，用于惯性测量单元（IMU）辅助系统的偏差收敛，以提高定位精度。 Mitchell Usayiwevu,Fouad Sukkar,Chanyeol Yoo,Robert Fitch,Teresa Vidal-Calleja cs.RO

authors_text: Alysson Ribeiro da Silva
title: Solving the Job Shop Scheduling Problem with Ant Colony Optimization
title_zh: 用蚁群优化解决作业车间调度问题
comment: Technical Report on Solving the Job Shop Scheduling Problem with Ant Colony Optimization
comments: Technical Report on Solving the Job Shop Scheduling Problem with Ant Colony Optimization
abstract: The Job Shop Schedule Problem (JSSP) refers to the ability of an agent to allocate tasks that should be executed in a specified time in a machine from a cluster. The task allocation can be achieved from several methods, however, this report it is explored the ability of the Ant Colony Optimization to generate feasible solutions for several JSSP instances. This proposal models the JSSP as a complete graph since disjunct models can prevent the ACO from exploring all the search space. Several instances of the JSSP were used to evaluate the proposal. Results suggest that the algorithm can reach optimum solutions for easy and harder instances with a selection of parameters.
summary: The Job Shop Schedule Problem (JSSP) refers to the ability of an agent to allocate tasks that should be executed in a specified time in a machine from a cluster. The task allocation can be achieved from several methods, however, this report it is explored the ability of the Ant Colony Optimization to generate feasible solutions for several JSSP instances. This proposal models the JSSP as a complete graph since disjunct models can prevent the ACO from exploring all the search space. Several instances of the JSSP were used to evaluate the proposal. Results suggest that the algorithm can reach optimum solutions for easy and harder instances with a selection of parameters.
abstract_zh: 作业车间调度问题（JSSP）是指代理从集群中的机器中分配应在指定时间执行的任务的能力。任务分配可以通过多种方法来实现，但是，本报告探讨了蚁群优化为多个 JSSP 实例生成可行解决方案的能力。该提案将 JSSP 建模为完整图，因为分离模型会阻止 ACO 探索所有搜索空间。使用 JSSP 的多个实例来评估该提案。结果表明，该算法可以通过选择参数来针对简单和困难的情况得出最佳解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用蚁群优化算法（ACO）解决作业车间调度问题（JSSP），探索其在不同实例中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在解决JSSP时可能存在搜索空间利用不足的问题，而ACO能够有效探索复杂问题的解空间，因此本文旨在验证其有效性。
AI.method: 将JSSP建模为完全图以避免离散模型的限制，并通过选择合适的参数来应用ACO算法进行求解。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该算法在参数选择合适的情况下，能够有效找到易处理和较难JSSP实例的最优解。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明，蚁群优化算法在解决JSSP中具有潜力，特别是在参数优化后能够达到较高解的质量。

authors_text: Yosra Hajjaji,Wadii Boulila,Imed Riadh Farah
title: Leveraging Artificial Intelligence Techniques for Smart Palm Tree Detection: A Decade Systematic Review
title_zh: 利用人工智能技术进行智能棕榈树检测：十年系统回顾
abstract: Over the past few years, total financial investment in the agricultural sector has increased substantially. Palm tree is important for many countries' economies, particularly in northern Africa and the Middle East. Monitoring in terms of detection and counting palm trees provides useful information for various stakeholders; it helps in yield estimation and examination to ensure better crop quality and prevent pests, diseases, better irrigation, and other potential threats. Despite their importance, this information is still challenging to obtain. This study systematically reviews research articles between 2011 and 2021 on artificial intelligence (AI) technology for smart palm tree detection. A systematic review (SR) was performed using the PRISMA approach based on a four-stage selection process. Twenty-two articles were included for the synthesis activity reached from the search strategy alongside the inclusion criteria in order to answer to two main research questions. The study's findings reveal patterns, relationships, networks, and trends in applying artificial intelligence in palm tree detection over the last decade. Despite the good results in most of the studies, the effective and efficient management of large-scale palm plantations is still a challenge. In addition, countries whose economies strongly related to intelligent palm services, especially in North Africa, should give more attention to this kind of study. The results of this research could benefit both the research community and stakeholders.

abstract_zh: 近年来，农业财政投入总量大幅增长。棕榈树对许多国家的经济都很重要，特别是在北非和中东。棕榈树检测和计数方面的监测为各利益攸关方提供了有用的信息；它有助于产量估算和检查，以确保更好的作物质量并预防害虫、疾病、更好的灌溉和其他潜在威胁。尽管这些信息很重要，但获取这些信息仍然具有挑战性。本研究系统回顾了 2011 年至 2021 年关于智能棕榈树检测的人工智能 (AI) 技术的研究文章。使用基于四阶段选择过程的 PRISMA 方法进行了系统评价 (SR)。根据搜索策略和纳入标准进行的综合活动纳入了 22 篇文章，以回答两个主要研究问题。该研究的结果揭示了过去十年人工智能在棕榈树检测中应用的模式、关系、网络和趋势。尽管大多数研究取得了良好的结果，但大规模棕榈种植园的有效和高效管理仍然是一个挑战。此外，经济与智能掌上服务密切相关的国家，特别是北非国家，应该更加重视此类研究。这项研究的结果可以使研究界和利益相关者受益。

AI.tldr: 该论文系统回顾了2011年至2021年间利用人工智能技术进行智能棕榈树检测的研究。
AI.motivation: 由于棕榈树在许多国家经济中的重要性，特别是北非和中东地区，棕榈树的检测和计数对提高产量、确保作物质量及防止病虫害等具有重要意义，但相关信息的获取仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 该研究采用PRISMA方法，通过四阶段选择过程系统回顾了相关文献，并选取了22篇文章进行综合分析。
AI.result: 研究发现过去十年中人工智能在棕榈树检测中的应用趋势和模式，尽管大多数研究取得了良好结果，但大规模棕榈种植园的有效管理仍是挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该研究结果可为研究社区和相关利益方提供参考，特别是北非等经济高度依赖智能棕榈服务的国家应更加关注此类研究。

search_text: Leveraging Artificial Intelligence Techniques for Smart Palm Tree Detection: A Decade Systematic Review 利用人工智能技术进行智能棕榈树检测：十年系统回顾 Over the past few years, total financial investment in the agricultural sector has increased substantially. Palm tree is important for many countries' economies, particularly in northern Africa and the Middle East. Monitoring in terms of detection and counting palm trees provides useful information for various stakeholders; it helps in yield estimation and examination to ensure better crop quality and prevent pests, diseases, better irrigation, and other potential threats. Despite their importance, this information is still challenging to obtain. This study systematically reviews research articles between 2011 and 2021 on artificial intelligence (AI) technology for smart palm tree detection. A systematic review (SR) was performed using the PRISMA approach based on a four-stage selection process. Twenty-two articles were included for the synthesis activity reached from the search strategy alongside the inclusion criteria in order to answer to two main research questions. The study's findings reveal patterns, relationships, networks, and trends in applying artificial intelligence in palm tree detection over the last decade. Despite the good results in most of the studies, the effective and efficient management of large-scale palm plantations is still a challenge. In addition, countries whose economies strongly related to intelligent palm services, especially in North Africa, should give more attention to this kind of study. The results of this research could benefit both the research community and stakeholders. 近年来，农业财政投入总量大幅增长。棕榈树对许多国家的经济都很重要，特别是在北非和中东。棕榈树检测和计数方面的监测为各利益攸关方提供了有用的信息；它有助于产量估算和检查，以确保更好的作物质量并预防害虫、疾病、更好的灌溉和其他潜在威胁。尽管这些信息很重要，但获取这些信息仍然具有挑战性。本研究系统回顾了 2011 年至 2021 年关于智能棕榈树检测的人工智能 (AI) 技术的研究文章。使用基于四阶段选择过程的 PRISMA 方法进行了系统评价 (SR)。根据搜索策略和纳入标准进行的综合活动纳入了 22 篇文章，以回答两个主要研究问题。该研究的结果揭示了过去十年人工智能在棕榈树检测中应用的模式、关系、网络和趋势。尽管大多数研究取得了良好的结果，但大规模棕榈种植园的有效和高效管理仍然是一个挑战。此外，经济与智能掌上服务密切相关的国家，特别是北非国家，应该更加重视此类研究。这项研究的结果可以使研究界和利益相关者受益。 该论文系统回顾了2011年至2021年间利用人工智能技术进行智能棕榈树检测的研究。 Yosra Hajjaji,Wadii Boulila,Imed Riadh Farah cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhe Liu,Fuchun Peng
title: Modeling Dependent Structure for Utterances in ASR Evaluation
title_zh: ASR 评估中话语的依赖结构建模
abstract: The bootstrap resampling method has been popular for performing significance analysis on word error rate (WER) in automatic speech recognition (ASR) evaluation. To deal with dependent speech data, the blockwise bootstrap approach is also introduced. By dividing utterances into uncorrelated blocks, this approach resamples these blocks instead of original data. However, it is typically nontrivial to uncover the dependent structure among utterances and identify the blocks, which might lead to subjective conclusions in statistical testing. In this paper, we present graphical lasso based methods to explicitly model such dependency and estimate uncorrelated blocks of utterances in a rigorous way, after which blockwise bootstrap is applied on top of the inferred blocks. We show the resulting variance estimator of WER in ASR evaluation is statistically consistent under mild conditions. We also demonstrate the validity of proposed approach on LibriSpeech dataset.
summary: The bootstrap resampling method has been popular for performing significance analysis on word error rate (WER) in automatic speech recognition (ASR) evaluation. To deal with dependent speech data, the blockwise bootstrap approach is also introduced. By dividing utterances into uncorrelated blocks, this approach resamples these blocks instead of original data. However, it is typically nontrivial to uncover the dependent structure among utterances and identify the blocks, which might lead to subjective conclusions in statistical testing. In this paper, we present graphical lasso based methods to explicitly model such dependency and estimate uncorrelated blocks of utterances in a rigorous way, after which blockwise bootstrap is applied on top of the inferred blocks. We show the resulting variance estimator of WER in ASR evaluation is statistically consistent under mild conditions. We also demonstrate the validity of proposed approach on LibriSpeech dataset.
abstract_zh: 自举重采样方法在自动语音识别（ASR）评估中广泛用于对词错误率（WER）进行显着性分析。为了处理相关语音数据，还引入了分块引导方法。通过将话语划分为不相关的块，该方法对这些块而不是原始数据进行重新采样。然而，揭示话语之间的依赖结构并识别块通常并非易事，这可能会导致统计测试中的主观结论。在本文中，我们提出了基于图形套索的方法来显式地建模这种依赖性，并以严格的方式估计不相关的话语块，然后在推断的块之上应用块式引导。我们表明，在温和条件下，ASR 评估中 WER 的方差估计在统计上是一致的。我们还在 LibriSpeech 数据集上证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图lasso方法建模话语依赖结构，改进ASR评估中的块bootstrap方法。
AI.motivation: 传统块bootstrap方法依赖主观划分不相关块，可能导致统计检验结论偏差。
AI.method: 使用图lasso显式建模话语间依赖关系，估计不相关块后应用块bootstrap。
AI.result: 证明WER方差估计器在温和条件下统计一致，并在LibriSpeech数据集验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供客观的块划分方式，提升ASR评估统计检验的可靠性。

authors_text: Zheng Chen,Chen Wang,Yuan-Chen Guo,Song-Hai Zhang
title: StructNeRF: Neural Radiance Fields for Indoor Scenes with Structural Hints
title_zh: StructNeRF：带有结构提示的室内场景的神经辐射场
abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieve photo-realistic view synthesis with densely captured input images. However, the geometry of NeRF is extremely under-constrained given sparse views, resulting in significant degradation of novel view synthesis quality. Inspired by self-supervised depth estimation methods, we propose StructNeRF, a solution to novel view synthesis for indoor scenes with sparse inputs. StructNeRF leverages the structural hints naturally embedded in multi-view inputs to handle the unconstrained geometry issue in NeRF. Specifically, it tackles the texture and non-texture regions respectively: a patch-based multi-view consistent photometric loss is proposed to constrain the geometry of textured regions; for non-textured ones, we explicitly restrict them to be 3D consistent planes. Through the dense self-supervised depth constraints, our method improves both the geometry and the view synthesis performance of NeRF without any additional training on external data. Extensive experiments on several real-world datasets demonstrate that StructNeRF surpasses state-of-the-art methods for indoor scenes with sparse inputs both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieve photo-realistic view synthesis with densely captured input images. However, the geometry of NeRF is extremely under-constrained given sparse views, resulting in significant degradation of novel view synthesis quality. Inspired by self-supervised depth estimation methods, we propose StructNeRF, a solution to novel view synthesis for indoor scenes with sparse inputs. StructNeRF leverages the structural hints naturally embedded in multi-view inputs to handle the unconstrained geometry issue in NeRF. Specifically, it tackles the texture and non-texture regions respectively: a patch-based multi-view consistent photometric loss is proposed to constrain the geometry of textured regions; for non-textured ones, we explicitly restrict them to be 3D consistent planes. Through the dense self-supervised depth constraints, our method improves both the geometry and the view synthesis performance of NeRF without any additional training on external data. Extensive experiments on several real-world datasets demonstrate that StructNeRF surpasses state-of-the-art methods for indoor scenes with sparse inputs both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 通过密集捕获的输入图像实现逼真的视图合成。然而，鉴于稀疏视图，NeRF 的几何结构受到极大限制，导致新颖视图合成质量显着下降。受自监督深度估计方法的启发，我们提出了 StructNeRF，一种针对稀疏输入的室内场景的新颖视图合成的解决方案。 StructNeRF 利用多视图输入中自然嵌入的结构提示来处理 NeRF 中的无约束几何问题。具体来说，它分别处理纹理和非纹理区域：提出了基于补丁的多视图一致光度损失来约束纹理区域的几何形状；对于无纹理的平面，我们明确将它们限制为 3D 一致的平面。通过密集的自监督深度约束，我们的方法提高了 NeRF 的几何和视图合成性能，而无需对外部数据进行任何额外的训练。对多个真实世界数据集的大量实验表明，StructNeRF 在数量和质量上都超越了稀疏输入室内场景的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StructNeRF方法，通过利用室内场景多视角输入中的结构提示，解决神经辐射场（NeRF）在稀疏输入下几何约束不足导致的新视角合成质量下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF在稀疏视角输入时因几何约束不足导致新视角合成效果显著退化，而现有方法依赖额外训练数据或无法有效处理室内场景的结构特性。
AI.method: 提出基于结构提示的双路径约束：对纹理区域采用多视角一致的光度损失约束几何，对非纹理区域强制其为3D平面，并通过密集自监督深度约束优化模型，无需外部数据训练。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上实验表明，StructNeRF在稀疏输入条件下同时优于现有方法的定量指标（如PSNR）和定性效果，显著提升几何重建与视角合成质量。
AI.conclusion: StructNeRF通过有效利用场景结构先验，解决了NeRF在稀疏输入下的几何退化问题，为室内场景的新视角合成提供了无需额外训练的高效解决方案。

authors_text: Gülin Tüfekci,Alper Kayabaşi,Erdem Akagündüz,İlkay Ulusoy
title: Detecting Driver Drowsiness as an Anomaly Using LSTM Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用 LSTM 自动编码器将驾驶员困倦检测为异常
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022 In-Vehicle Sensing and Monitorization (ISM) Workshop
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022 In-Vehicle Sensing and Monitorization (ISM) Workshop
abstract: In this paper, an LSTM autoencoder-based architecture is utilized for drowsiness detection with ResNet-34 as feature extractor. The problem is considered as anomaly detection for a single subject; therefore, only the normal driving representations are learned and it is expected that drowsiness representations, yielding higher reconstruction losses, are to be distinguished according to the knowledge of the network. In our study, the confidence levels of normal and anomaly clips are investigated through the methodology of label assignment such that training performance of LSTM autoencoder and interpretation of anomalies encountered during testing are analyzed under varying confidence rates. Our method is experimented on NTHU-DDD and benchmarked with a state-of-the-art anomaly detection method for driver drowsiness. Results show that the proposed model achieves detection rate of 0.8740 area under curve (AUC) and is able to provide significant improvements on certain scenarios.
summary: In this paper, an LSTM autoencoder-based architecture is utilized for drowsiness detection with ResNet-34 as feature extractor. The problem is considered as anomaly detection for a single subject; therefore, only the normal driving representations are learned and it is expected that drowsiness representations, yielding higher reconstruction losses, are to be distinguished according to the knowledge of the network. In our study, the confidence levels of normal and anomaly clips are investigated through the methodology of label assignment such that training performance of LSTM autoencoder and interpretation of anomalies encountered during testing are analyzed under varying confidence rates. Our method is experimented on NTHU-DDD and benchmarked with a state-of-the-art anomaly detection method for driver drowsiness. Results show that the proposed model achieves detection rate of 0.8740 area under curve (AUC) and is able to provide significant improvements on certain scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，基于 LSTM 自动编码器的架构用于以 ResNet-34 作为特征提取器的睡意检测。该问题被视为针对单个主体的异常检测；因此，仅学习正常驾驶表示，并且预计会根据网络的知识来区分产生更高重建损失的困倦表示。在我们的研究中，通过标签分配的方法研究正常和异常剪辑的置信水平，以便在不同的置信率下分析 LSTM 自动编码器的训练性能和测试过程中遇到的异常的解释。我们的方法在 NTHU-DDD 上进行了实验，并以最先进的驾驶员困倦异常检测方法为基准。结果表明，所提出的模型实现了 0.8740 曲线下面积 (AUC) 的检测率，并且能够在某些场景下提供显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于LSTM自编码器的驾驶员嗜睡检测方法，将问题视为异常检测任务，利用ResNet-34提取特征并分析不同置信度下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 驾驶员嗜睡检测对交通安全至关重要，传统方法存在检测精度不足的问题，需探索更有效的异常检测框架以提升识别能力。
AI.method: 结合ResNet-34提取驾驶行为特征，采用LSTM自编码器学习正常驾驶模式，通过重构损失区分异常（嗜睡）状态，并基于置信度分析训练与测试表现。
AI.result: 在NTHU-DDD数据集上达到0.8740的AUC值，在特定场景下较现有方法有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效实现了驾驶员嗜睡的异常检测，通过置信度分析优化了检测性能，为相关安全应用提供了新思路。
