search_text: Detecting Driver Drowsiness as an Anomaly Using LSTM Autoencoders 使用 LSTM 自动编码器将驾驶员困倦检测为异常 In this paper, an LSTM autoencoder-based architecture is utilized for drowsiness detection with ResNet-34 as feature extractor. The problem is considered as anomaly detection for a single subject; therefore, only the normal driving representations are learned and it is expected that drowsiness representations, yielding higher reconstruction losses, are to be distinguished according to the knowledge of the network. In our study, the confidence levels of normal and anomaly clips are investigated through the methodology of label assignment such that training performance of LSTM autoencoder and interpretation of anomalies encountered during testing are analyzed under varying confidence rates. Our method is experimented on NTHU-DDD and benchmarked with a state-of-the-art anomaly detection method for driver drowsiness. Results show that the proposed model achieves detection rate of 0.8740 area under curve (AUC) and is able to provide significant improvements on certain scenarios. 在本文中，基于 LSTM 自动编码器的架构用于以 ResNet-34 作为特征提取器的睡意检测。该问题被视为针对单个主体的异常检测；因此，仅学习正常驾驶表示，并且预计会根据网络的知识来区分产生更高重建损失的困倦表示。在我们的研究中，通过标签分配的方法研究正常和异常剪辑的置信水平，以便在不同的置信率下分析 LSTM 自动编码器的训练性能和测试过程中遇到的异常的解释。我们的方法在 NTHU-DDD 上进行了实验，并以最先进的驾驶员困倦异常检测方法为基准。结果表明，所提出的模型实现了 0.8740 曲线下面积 (AUC) 的检测率，并且能够在某些场景下提供显着的改进。 本文提出基于LSTM自编码器的驾驶员嗜睡检测方法，将问题视为异常检测任务，利用ResNet-34提取特征并分析不同置信度下的检测性能。 Gülin Tüfekci,Alper Kayabaşi,Erdem Akagündüz,İlkay Ulusoy cs.CV

authors_text: Ripan Kumar Kundu,Rifatul Islam,Prasad Calyam,Khaza Anuarul Hoque
title: TruVR: Trustworthy Cybersickness Detection using Explainable Machine Learning
title_zh: TruVR：使用可解释的机器学习进行值得信赖的晕眩检测
comment: Accepted copy, to be published in ISAMR 2022
comments: Accepted copy, to be published in ISAMR 2022
abstract: Cybersickness can be characterized by nausea, vertigo, headache, eye strain, and other discomforts when using virtual reality (VR) systems. The previously reported machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) algorithms for detecting (classification) and predicting (regression) VR cybersickness use black-box models; thus, they lack explainability. Moreover, VR sensors generate a massive amount of data, resulting in complex and large models. Therefore, having inherent explainability in cybersickness detection models can significantly improve the model's trustworthiness and provide insight into why and how the ML/DL model arrived at a specific decision. To address this issue, we present three explainable machine learning (xML) models to detect and predict cybersickness: 1) explainable boosting machine (EBM), 2) decision tree (DT), and 3) logistic regression (LR). We evaluate xML-based models with publicly available physiological and gameplay datasets for cybersickness. The results show that the EBM can detect cybersickness with an accuracy of 99.75% and 94.10% for the physiological and gameplay datasets, respectively. On the other hand, while predicting the cybersickness, EBM resulted in a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 0.071 for the physiological dataset and 0.27 for the gameplay dataset. Furthermore, the EBM-based global explanation reveals exposure length, rotation, and acceleration as key features causing cybersickness in the gameplay dataset. In contrast, galvanic skin responses and heart rate are most significant in the physiological dataset. Our results also suggest that EBM-based local explanation can identify cybersickness-causing factors for individual samples. We believe the proposed xML-based cybersickness detection method can help future researchers understand, analyze, and design simpler cybersickness detection and reduction models.

abstract_zh: 使用虚拟现实 (VR) 系统时，晕机症的特点是恶心、眩晕、头痛、眼睛疲劳和其他不适。之前报道的用于检测（分类）和预测（回归）VR晕眩症的机器学习（ML）和深度学习（DL）算法使用黑盒模型；因此，它们缺乏可解释性。此外，VR传感器会生成大量数据，导致模型复杂且庞大。因此，晕眩检测模型具有固有的可解释性可以显着提高模型的可信度，并深入了解 ML/DL 模型为何以及如何做出特定决策。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了三种可解释的机器学习 (xML) 模型来检测和预测晕眩症：1) 可解释的提升机 (EBM)、2) 决策树 (DT) 和 3) 逻辑回归 (LR)。我们使用公开可用的生理和游戏数据集来评估基于 xML 的模型，以应对网络眩晕症。结果表明，EBM 对生理和游戏数据集的晕眩检测准确率分别为 99.75% 和 94.10%。另一方面，在预测晕眩症时，EBM 导致生理数据集的均方根误差 (RMSE) 为 0.071，游戏数据集的均方根误差为 0.27。此外，基于 EBM 的全局解释揭示了曝光长度、旋转和加速度是导致游戏数据集中晕眩症的关键特征。相反，皮肤电反应和心率在生理数据集中最重要。我们的结果还表明，基于 EBM 的本地解释可以识别单个样本的晕机引起因素。我们相信所提出的基于 xML 的晕眩检测方法可以帮助未来的研究人员理解、分析和设计更简单的晕眩检测和减少模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种可解释机器学习模型（EBM、DT、LR）用于检测和预测虚拟现实（VR）诱发的晕动症，并通过公开数据集验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有VR晕动症检测模型多为黑箱模型，缺乏可解释性，且VR传感器数据量大导致模型复杂，难以提升可信度与决策透明度。
AI.method: 采用可解释机器学习（xML）方法，基于生理数据和游戏行为数据集，评估EBM、决策树和逻辑回归模型的分类与回归性能，并分析全局与局部特征解释。
AI.result: EBM在生理数据集上检测准确率达99.75%，游戏数据集达94.10%；预测RMSE分别为0.071和0.27。全局解释显示游戏数据中暴露时长、旋转和加速度是关键因素，生理数据中皮肤电反应和心率更重要。
AI.conclusion: EBM方法可有效提升晕动症检测的可信度，通过可解释性分析帮助未来研究设计更简洁的检测与缓解模型。

authors_text: Maximilian Diehl,Karinne Ramirez-Amaro
title: A Causal-based Approach to Explain, Predict and Prevent Failures in Robotic Tasks
title_zh: 基于因果的方法来解释、预测和预防机器人任务失败
comment: Under review at Robotics and Autonomous Systems (RAS) - Special issue: Semantic Policy and Action Representations for Autonomous Robots (SPAR)
comments: Under review at Robotics and Autonomous Systems (RAS) - Special issue: Semantic Policy and Action Representations for Autonomous Robots (SPAR)
abstract: Robots working in real environments need to adapt to unexpected changes to avoid failures. This is an open and complex challenge that requires robots to timely predict and identify the causes of failures to prevent them. In this paper, we present a causal method that will enable robots to predict when errors are likely to occur and prevent them from happening by executing a corrective action. First, we propose a causal-based method to detect the cause-effect relationships between task executions and their consequences by learning a causal Bayesian network (BN). The obtained model is transferred from simulated data to real scenarios to demonstrate the robustness and generalization of the obtained models. Based on the causal BN, the robot can predict if and why the executed action will succeed or not in its current state. Then, we introduce a novel method that finds the closest state alternatives through a contrastive Breadth-First-Search if the current action was predicted to fail. We evaluate our approach for the problem of stacking cubes in two cases; a) single stacks (stacking one cube) and; b) multiple stacks (stacking three cubes). In the single-stack case, our method was able to reduce the error rate by 97%. We also show that our approach can scale to capture multiple actions in one model, allowing to measure timely shifted action effects, such as the impact of an imprecise stack of the first cube on the stacking success of the third cube. For these complex situations, our model was able to prevent around 75% of the stacking errors, even for the challenging multiple-stack scenario. Thus, demonstrating that our method is able to explain, predict, and prevent execution failures, which even scales to complex scenarios that require an understanding of how the action history impacts future actions.

We evaluate our approach for the problem of stacking cubes in two cases; a) single stacks (stacking one cube) and; b) multiple stacks (stacking three cubes). In the single-stack case, our method was able to reduce the error rate by 97%. We also show that our approach can scale to capture multiple actions in one model, allowing to measure timely shifted action effects, such as the impact of an imprecise stack of the first cube on the stacking success of the third cube. For these complex situations, our model was able to prevent around 75% of the stacking errors, even for the challenging multiple-stack scenario. Thus, demonstrating that our method is able to explain, predict, and prevent execution failures, which even scales to complex scenarios that require an understanding of how the action history impacts future actions.
abstract_zh: 在真实环境中工作的机器人需要适应意外的变化以避免失败。这是一个开放而复杂的挑战，需要机器人及时预测和识别故障原因以预防故障发生。在本文中，我们提出了一种因果方法，使机器人能够预测何时可能发生错误，并通过执行纠正措施来防止错误发生。首先，我们提出了一种基于因果关系的方法，通过学习因果贝叶斯网络（BN）来检测任务执行及其后果之间的因果关系。将获得的模型从模拟数据转移到真实场景中，以证明所获得模型的鲁棒性和泛化性。基于因果 BN，机器人可以预测执行的动作在当前状态下是否成功以及为何成功。然后，我们引入了一种新颖的方法，如果预测当前操作失败，则通过对比广度优先搜索找到最接近的状态替代方案。我们在两种情况下评估我们解决堆叠立方体问题的方法； a) 单堆（堆叠一个立方体）； b) 多个堆叠（堆叠三个立方体）。在单堆栈情况下，我们的方法能够将错误率降低 97%。我们还表明，我们的方法可以扩展以捕获一个模型中的多个动作，从而可以测量及时转移的动作效果，例如第一个立方体的不精确堆叠对第三个立方体堆叠成功的影响。对于这些复杂的情况，我们的模型能够防止大约 75% 的堆叠错误，即使对于具有挑战性的多堆栈场景也是如此。因此，证明我们的方法能够解释、预测和防止执行失败，甚至可以扩展到需要了解操作历史如何影响未来操作的复杂场景。

AI.motivation: 机器人在真实环境中需要适应意外变化以避免失败，但现有方法难以及时预测和识别失败原因。
AI.method: 通过学习因果贝叶斯网络（BN）建立任务执行与结果的因果关系模型，并利用对比广度优先搜索（BFS）寻找替代状态以预防失败。
AI.result: 在单层立方体堆叠任务中错误率降低97%，多层任务中预防约75%的堆叠错误。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效解释、预测并防止机器人任务失败，且适用于复杂场景中动作历史对未来的多步影响分析。

search_text: A Causal-based Approach to Explain, Predict and Prevent Failures in Robotic Tasks 基于因果的方法来解释、预测和预防机器人任务失败 Robots working in real environments need to adapt to unexpected changes to avoid failures. This is an open and complex challenge that requires robots to timely predict and identify the causes of failures to prevent them. In this paper, we present a causal method that will enable robots to predict when errors are likely to occur and prevent them from happening by executing a corrective action. First, we propose a causal-based method to detect the cause-effect relationships between task executions and their consequences by learning a causal Bayesian network (BN). The obtained model is transferred from simulated data to real scenarios to demonstrate the robustness and generalization of the obtained models. Based on the causal BN, the robot can predict if and why the executed action will succeed or not in its current state. Then, we introduce a novel method that finds the closest state alternatives through a contrastive Breadth-First-Search if the current action was predicted to fail. We evaluate our approach for the problem of stacking cubes in two cases; a) single stacks (stacking one cube) and; b) multiple stacks (stacking three cubes). In the single-stack case, our method was able to reduce the error rate by 97%. We also show that our approach can scale to capture multiple actions in one model, allowing to measure timely shifted action effects, such as the impact of an imprecise stack of the first cube on the stacking success of the third cube. For these complex situations, our model was able to prevent around 75% of the stacking errors, even for the challenging multiple-stack scenario. Thus, demonstrating that our method is able to explain, predict, and prevent execution failures, which even scales to complex scenarios that require an understanding of how the action history impacts future actions. 在真实环境中工作的机器人需要适应意外的变化以避免失败。这是一个开放而复杂的挑战，需要机器人及时预测和识别故障原因以预防故障发生。在本文中，我们提出了一种因果方法，使机器人能够预测何时可能发生错误，并通过执行纠正措施来防止错误发生。首先，我们提出了一种基于因果关系的方法，通过学习因果贝叶斯网络（BN）来检测任务执行及其后果之间的因果关系。将获得的模型从模拟数据转移到真实场景中，以证明所获得模型的鲁棒性和泛化性。基于因果 BN，机器人可以预测执行的动作在当前状态下是否成功以及为何成功。然后，我们引入了一种新颖的方法，如果预测当前操作失败，则通过对比广度优先搜索找到最接近的状态替代方案。我们在两种情况下评估我们解决堆叠立方体问题的方法； a) 单堆（堆叠一个立方体）； b) 多个堆叠（堆叠三个立方体）。在单堆栈情况下，我们的方法能够将错误率降低 97%。我们还表明，我们的方法可以扩展以捕获一个模型中的多个动作，从而可以测量及时转移的动作效果，例如第一个立方体的不精确堆叠对第三个立方体堆叠成功的影响。对于这些复杂的情况，我们的模型能够防止大约 75% 的堆叠错误，即使对于具有挑战性的多堆栈场景也是如此。因此，证明我们的方法能够解释、预测和防止执行失败，甚至可以扩展到需要了解操作历史如何影响未来操作的复杂场景。 本文提出了一种基于因果关系的方法，用于解释、预测和防止机器人任务中的失败。 Maximilian Diehl,Karinne Ramirez-Amaro cs.RO

authors_text: Pengyu Fu,Liang Chu,Zhuoran Hou,Jincheng Hu,Yanjun Huang,Yuanjian Zhang
title: Transfer Learning and Vision Transformer based State-of-Health prediction of Lithium-Ion Batteries
title_zh: 基于迁移学习和 Vision Transformer 的锂离子电池健康状态预测
comment: 13 pages,15 figures,13 equations
comments: 13 pages,15 figures,13 equations
abstract: In recent years, significant progress has been made in transportation electrification. And lithium-ion batteries (LIB), as the main energy storage devices, have received widespread attention. Accurately predicting the state of health (SOH) can not only ease the anxiety of users about the battery life but also provide important information for the management of the battery. This paper presents a prediction method for SOH based on Vision Transformer (ViT) model. First, discrete charging data of a predefined voltage range is used as an input data matrix. Then, the cycle features of the battery are captured by the ViT which can obtain the global features, and the SOH is obtained by combining the cycle features with the full connection (FC) layer. At the same time, transfer learning (TL) is introduced, and the prediction model based on source task battery training is further fine-tuned according to the early cycle data of the target task battery to provide an accurate prediction. Experiments show that our method can obtain better feature expression compared with existing deep learning methods so that better prediction effect and transfer effect can be achieved.
summary: In recent years, significant progress has been made in transportation electrification. And lithium-ion batteries (LIB), as the main energy storage devices, have received widespread attention. Accurately predicting the state of health (SOH) can not only ease the anxiety of users about the battery life but also provide important information for the management of the battery. This paper presents a prediction method for SOH based on Vision Transformer (ViT) model. First, discrete charging data of a predefined voltage range is used as an input data matrix. Then, the cycle features of the battery are captured by the ViT which can obtain the global features, and the SOH is obtained by combining the cycle features with the full connection (FC) layer. At the same time, transfer learning (TL) is introduced, and the prediction model based on source task battery training is further fine-tuned according to the early cycle data of the target task battery to provide an accurate prediction. Experiments show that our method can obtain better feature expression compared with existing deep learning methods so that better prediction effect and transfer effect can be achieved.
abstract_zh: 近年来，交通电气化取得重大进展。而锂离子电池（LIB）作为主要的储能装置，受到了广泛的关注。准确预测健康状态（SOH）不仅可以缓解用户对电池寿命的焦虑，还可以为电池的管理提供重要信息。本文提出了一种基于Vision Transformer (ViT)模型的SOH预测方法。首先，使用预定义电压范围的离散充电数据作为输入数据矩阵。然后，ViT捕获电池的循环特征，获得全局特征，并将循环特征与全连接（FC）层相结合获得SOH。同时引入迁移学习（TL），根据目标任务电池的早期周期数据进一步微调基于源任务电池训练的预测模型，以提供准确的预测。实验表明，与现有的深度学习方法相比，我们的方法可以获得更好的特征表达，从而达到更好的预测效果和迁移效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）和迁移学习的锂离子电池健康状态（SOH）预测方法。
AI.motivation: 准确预测电池健康状态有助于缓解用户对电池寿命的担忧并优化电池管理，而现有深度学习方法在特征表达和迁移能力上仍有不足。
AI.method: 以预设电压范围的离散充电数据为输入矩阵，利用ViT提取电池循环全局特征，并通过全连接层输出SOH；引入迁移学习，基于源任务电池训练的模型通过目标电池早期循环数据微调实现精准预测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法相比现有深度学习方法具有更优的特征表达能力，实现了更准确的预测效果和迁移效果。
AI.conclusion: 融合视觉Transformer与迁移学习的SOH预测方法能有效提升电池健康状态预测的准确性和模型迁移能力。

authors_text: Manlio Massiris Fernández,Sanjin Radoš,Krešimir Matković,M. Eduard Gröller,Claudio Delrieux
title: ErgoExplorer: Interactive Ergonomic Risk Assessment from Video Collections
title_zh: ErgoExplorer：来自视频集的交互式人体工学风险评估
comment: Accepted for IEEE VIS 2022 and IEEE TVCG
comments: Accepted for IEEE VIS 2022 and IEEE TVCG
abstract: Ergonomic risk assessment is now, due to an increased awareness, carried out more often than in the past. The conventional risk assessment evaluation, based on expert-assisted observation of the workplaces and manually filling in score tables, is still predominant. Data analysis is usually done with a focus on critical moments, although without the support of contextual information and changes over time. In this paper we introduce ErgoExplorer, a system for the interactive visual analysis of risk assessment data. In contrast to the current practice, we focus on data that span across multiple actions and multiple workers while keeping all contextual information. Data is automatically extracted from video streams. Based on carefully investigated analysis tasks, we introduce new views and their corresponding interactions. These views also incorporate domain-specific score tables to guarantee an easy adoption by domain experts. All views are integrated into ErgoExplorer, which relies on coordinated multiple views to facilitate analysis through interaction. ErgoExplorer makes it possible for the first time to examine complex relationships between risk assessments of individual body parts over long sessions that span multiple operations. The newly introduced approach supports analysis and exploration at several levels of detail, ranging from a general overview, down to inspecting individual frames in the video stream, if necessary. We illustrate the usefulness of the newly proposed approach applying it to several datasets.
summary: Ergonomic risk assessment is now, due to an increased awareness, carried out more often than in the past. The conventional risk assessment evaluation, based on expert-assisted observation of the workplaces and manually filling in score tables, is still predominant. Data analysis is usually done with a focus on critical moments, although without the support of contextual information and changes over time. In this paper we introduce ErgoExplorer, a system for the interactive visual analysis of risk assessment data. In contrast to the current practice, we focus on data that span across multiple actions and multiple workers while keeping all contextual information. Data is automatically extracted from video streams. Based on carefully investigated analysis tasks, we introduce new views and their corresponding interactions. These views also incorporate domain-specific score tables to guarantee an easy adoption by domain experts. All views are integrated into ErgoExplorer, which relies on coordinated multiple views to facilitate analysis through interaction. ErgoExplorer makes it possible for the first time to examine complex relationships between risk assessments of individual body parts over long sessions that span multiple operations. The newly introduced approach supports analysis and exploration at several levels of detail, ranging from a general overview, down to inspecting individual frames in the video stream, if necessary. We illustrate the usefulness of the newly proposed approach applying it to several datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于人们认识的提高，现在比过去更频繁地进行人体工程学风险评估。基于专家辅助观察工作场所并手动填写评分表的传统风险评估仍然占主导地位。数据分析通常侧重于关键时刻，尽管没有上下文信息和随时间变化的支持。在本文中，我们介绍了 ErgoExplorer，一个用于风险评估数据交互式可视化分析的系统。与当前的实践相反，我们专注于跨越多个操作和多个工作人员的数据，同时保留所有上下文信息。从视频流中自动提取数据。基于仔细研究的分析任务，我们引入了新的观点及其相应的相互作用。这些视图还包含特定于领域的评分表，以保证领域专家可以轻松采用。所有视图都集成到 ErgoExplorer 中，ErgoExplorer 依靠协调的多个视图来促进交互分析。 ErgoExplorer 首次使得在跨越多个操作的长时间会话中检查各个身体部位的风险评估之间的复杂关系成为可能。新引入的方法支持多个细节级别的分析和探索，从总体概述到检查视频流中的各个帧（如有必要）。我们说明了新提出的方法将其应用于多个数据集的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ErgoExplorer系统，通过视频数据进行交互式人体工程学风险评估，分析多工人、多动作的长期作业风险关联。
AI.motivation: 传统人体工程学评估依赖专家人工观察和手动打分，缺乏对时间变化和上下文信息的分析，难以处理多工人、多动作的复杂场景。
AI.method: 从视频流中自动提取数据，设计包含领域特定评分表的交互式多视图系统，通过协调多个视图支持从整体到细节的多层级分析。
AI.result: 首次实现对跨长时间段、多操作环节的个体身体部位风险评估关联分析，支持从宏观概览到单帧视频的多粒度探索。
AI.conclusion: ErgoExplorer通过视频数据驱动的交互式分析方法，显著提升了人体工程学风险评估的效率和深度，便于领域专家应用。

search_text: ErgoExplorer: Interactive Ergonomic Risk Assessment from Video Collections ErgoExplorer：来自视频集的交互式人体工学风险评估 Ergonomic risk assessment is now, due to an increased awareness, carried out more often than in the past. The conventional risk assessment evaluation, based on expert-assisted observation of the workplaces and manually filling in score tables, is still predominant. Data analysis is usually done with a focus on critical moments, although without the support of contextual information and changes over time. In this paper we introduce ErgoExplorer, a system for the interactive visual analysis of risk assessment data. In contrast to the current practice, we focus on data that span across multiple actions and multiple workers while keeping all contextual information. Data is automatically extracted from video streams. Based on carefully investigated analysis tasks, we introduce new views and their corresponding interactions. These views also incorporate domain-specific score tables to guarantee an easy adoption by domain experts. All views are integrated into ErgoExplorer, which relies on coordinated multiple views to facilitate analysis through interaction. ErgoExplorer makes it possible for the first time to examine complex relationships between risk assessments of individual body parts over long sessions that span multiple operations. The newly introduced approach supports analysis and exploration at several levels of detail, ranging from a general overview, down to inspecting individual frames in the video stream, if necessary. We illustrate the usefulness of the newly proposed approach applying it to several datasets. 由于人们认识的提高，现在比过去更频繁地进行人体工程学风险评估。基于专家辅助观察工作场所并手动填写评分表的传统风险评估仍然占主导地位。数据分析通常侧重于关键时刻，尽管没有上下文信息和随时间变化的支持。在本文中，我们介绍了 ErgoExplorer，一个用于风险评估数据交互式可视化分析的系统。与当前的实践相反，我们专注于跨越多个操作和多个工作人员的数据，同时保留所有上下文信息。从视频流中自动提取数据。基于仔细研究的分析任务，我们引入了新的观点及其相应的相互作用。这些视图还包含特定于领域的评分表，以保证领域专家可以轻松采用。所有视图都集成到 ErgoExplorer 中，ErgoExplorer 依靠协调的多个视图来促进交互分析。 ErgoExplorer 首次使得在跨越多个操作的长时间会话中检查各个身体部位的风险评估之间的复杂关系成为可能。新引入的方法支持多个细节级别的分析和探索，从总体概述到检查视频流中的各个帧（如有必要）。我们说明了新提出的方法将其应用于多个数据集的有用性。 本文提出ErgoExplorer系统，通过视频数据进行交互式人体工程学风险评估，分析多工人、多动作的长期作业风险关联。 Manlio Massiris Fernández,Sanjin Radoš,Krešimir Matković,M. authors_text: Lorenzo Bonicelli,Angelo Porrello,Stefano Vincenzi,Carla Ippoliti,Federica Iapaolo,Annamaria Conte,Simone Calderara
title: Spotting Virus from Satellites: Modeling the Circulation of West Nile Virus Through Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 从卫星发现病毒：通过图神经网络模拟西尼罗河病毒的传播
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the IEEE Transactions On Geoscience And Remote Sensing
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the IEEE Transactions On Geoscience And Remote Sensing
abstract: The occurrence of West Nile Virus (WNV) represents one of the most common mosquito-borne zoonosis viral infections. Its circulation is usually associated with climatic and environmental conditions suitable for vector proliferation and virus replication. On top of that, several statistical models have been developed to shape and forecast WNV circulation: in particular, the recent massive availability of Earth Observation (EO) data, coupled with the continuous advances in the field of Artificial Intelligence, offer valuable opportunities. In this paper, we seek to predict WNV circulation by feeding Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) with satellite images, which have been extensively shown to hold environmental and climatic features. Notably, while previous approaches analyze each geographical site independently, we propose a spatial-aware approach that considers also the characteristics of close sites. Specifically, we build upon Graph Neural Networks (GNN) to aggregate features from neighbouring places, and further extend these modules to consider multiple relations, such as the difference in temperature and soil moisture between two sites, as well as the geographical distance. Moreover, we inject time-related information directly into the model to take into account the seasonality of virus spread. We design an experimental setting that combines satellite images - from Landsat and Sentinel missions - with ground truth observations of WNV circulation in Italy. We show that our proposed Multi-Adjacency Graph Attention Network (MAGAT) consistently leads to higher performance when paired with an appropriate pre-training stage. Finally, we assess the importance of each component of MAGAT in our ablation studies.
summary: The occurrence of West Nile Virus (WNV) represents one of the most common mosquito-borne zoonosis viral infections. Its circulation is usually associated with climatic and environmental conditions suitable for vector proliferation and virus replication. On top of that, several statistical models have been developed to shape and forecast WNV circulation: in particular, the recent massive availability of Earth Observation (EO) data, coupled with the continuous advances in the field of Artificial Intelligence, offer valuable opportunities. In this paper, we seek to predict WNV circulation by feeding Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) with satellite images, which have been extensively shown to hold environmental and climatic features. Notably, while previous approaches analyze each geographical site independently, we propose a spatial-aware approach that considers also the characteristics of close sites. Specifically, we build upon Graph Neural Networks (GNN) to aggregate features from neighbouring places, and further extend these modules to consider multiple relations, such as the difference in temperature and soil moisture between two sites, as well as the geographical distance. Moreover, we inject time-related information directly into the model to take into account the seasonality of virus spread. We design an experimental setting that combines satellite images - from Landsat and Sentinel missions - with ground truth observations of WNV circulation in Italy. We show that our proposed Multi-Adjacency Graph Attention Network (MAGAT) consistently leads to higher performance when paired with an appropriate pre-training stage. Finally, we assess the importance of each component of MAGAT in our ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 西尼罗河病毒（WNV）的出现是最常见的蚊媒人畜共患病病毒感染之一。其循环通常与适合载体增殖和病毒复制的气候和环境条件有关。最重要的是，已经开发了几种统计模型来塑造和预测西尼罗河病毒的环流：特别是，最近大量可用的地球观测（EO）数据，加上人工智能领域的不断进步，提供了宝贵的机会。在本文中，我们试图通过向深度神经网络（DNN）提供卫星图像来预测西尼罗河病毒的环流，卫星图像已被广泛证明具有环境和气候特征。值得注意的是，虽然以前的方法独立分析每个地理位置，但我们提出了一种空间感知方法，该方法还考虑了邻近站点的特征。具体来说，我们基于图神经网络（GNN）来聚合邻近地点的特征，并进一步扩展这些模块以考虑多种关系，例如两个地点之间的温度和土壤湿度的差异以及地理距离。此外，我们将与时间相关的信息直接注入模型中，以考虑病毒传播的季节性。我们设计了一个实验设置，将来自 Landsat 和 Sentinel 任务的卫星图像与意大利西尼罗河病毒环流的地面实况观测相结合。我们表明，我们提出的多邻接图注意网络（MAGAT）在与适当的预训练阶段配合使用时始终能带来更高的性能。最后，我们评估 MAGAT 每个组件在消融研究中的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法，通过卫星图像和空间关系建模，预测西尼罗河病毒（WNV）的传播。
AI.motivation: 传统统计模型未能有效整合空间关联性和环境因素，而卫星数据与AI技术的结合为WNV传播预测提供了新机会。
AI.method: 构建多邻接图注意力网络（MAGAT），整合卫星图像特征、邻近区域的空间关系（如温度、土壤湿度差异）及时间信息，通过预训练和消融实验优化模型。
AI.result: MAGAT在意大利真实数据集上表现优于基线模型，验证了空间感知与多关系建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 空间感知的图神经网络能有效捕捉WNV传播的环境与时空特征，为传染病预测提供新范式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法，通过卫星图像和空间关系建模，预测西尼罗河病毒（WNV）的传播。

authors_text: Jannik Zürn,Sebastian Weber,Wolfram Burgard
title: TrackletMapper: Ground Surface Segmentation and Mapping from Traffic Participant Trajectories
title_zh: TrackletMapper：根据交通参与者轨迹进行地表分割和绘图
comment: 19 pages, 14 figures, CoRL 2022 v4 (updated acknowledgements)
comments: 19 pages, 14 figures, CoRL 2022 v4 (updated acknowledgements)
abstract: Robustly classifying ground infrastructure such as roads and street crossings is an essential task for mobile robots operating alongside pedestrians. While many semantic segmentation datasets are available for autonomous vehicles, models trained on such datasets exhibit a large domain gap when deployed on robots operating in pedestrian spaces. Manually annotating images recorded from pedestrian viewpoints is both expensive and time-consuming. To overcome this challenge, we propose TrackletMapper, a framework for annotating ground surface types such as sidewalks, roads, and street crossings from object tracklets without requiring human-annotated data. To this end, we project the robot ego-trajectory and the paths of other traffic participants into the ego-view camera images, creating sparse semantic annotations for multiple types of ground surfaces from which a ground segmentation model can be trained. We further show that the model can be self-distilled for additional performance benefits by aggregating a ground surface map and projecting it into the camera images, creating a denser set of training annotations compared to the sparse tracklet annotations. We qualitatively and quantitatively attest our findings on a novel large-scale dataset for mobile robots operating in pedestrian areas. Code and dataset will be made available at http://trackletmapper.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
summary: Robustly classifying ground infrastructure such as roads and street crossings is an essential task for mobile robots operating alongside pedestrians. We qualitatively and quantitatively attest our findings on a novel large-scale dataset for mobile robots operating in pedestrian areas. Code and dataset will be made available at http://trackletmapper.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
abstract_zh: 对道路和街道交叉口等地面基础设施进行可靠分类是与行人一起操作的移动机器人的一项基本任务。虽然许多语义分割数据集可用于自动驾驶车辆，但在此类数据集上训练的模型在部署到在行人空间运行的机器人上时表现出很大的域差距。手动注释从行人视角记录的图像既昂贵又耗时。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了 TrackletMapper，这是一个用于从对象轨迹注释地面类型（例如人行道、道路和街道交叉口）的框架，而无需人工注释数据。为此，我们将机器人的自我轨迹和其他交通参与者的路径投影到自我视图相机图像中，为多种类型的地面创建稀疏语义注释，从而可以训练地面分割模型。我们进一步表明，该模型可以通过聚合地面地图并将其投影到相机图像中来自我蒸馏以获得额外的性能优势，从而创建比稀疏轨迹注释更密集的训练注释集。我们定性和定量地证明了我们在步行区运行的移动机器人的新型大规模数据集上的发现。代码和数据集将在 http://trackletmapper.cs.uni-freiburg.de 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrackletMapper框架，通过交通参与者轨迹生成地面语义分割标注，解决行人区域移动机器人地面分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶语义分割数据集与行人区域机器人存在领域差异，而人工标注行人视角图像成本高昂且效率低下。
AI.method: 将机器人及交通参与者轨迹投影至摄像头图像生成稀疏语义标注，并通过自蒸馏生成密集标注训练地面分割模型。
AI.result: 在新型大规模数据集上实现定性和定量验证，证明方法有效性，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: TrackletMapper为移动机器人提供了无需人工标注的地面分割解决方案，有效缩小了领域差异带来的性能差距。

search_text: TrackletMapper: Ground Surface Segmentation and Mapping from Traffic Participant Trajectories TrackletMapper：根据交通参与者轨迹进行地表分割和绘图 Robustly classifying ground infrastructure such as roads and street crossings is an essential task for mobile robots operating alongside pedestrians. While many semantic segmentation datasets are available for autonomous vehicles, models trained on such datasets exhibit a large domain gap when deployed on robots operating in pedestrian spaces. Manually annotating images recorded from pedestrian viewpoints is both expensive and time-consuming. To overcome this challenge, we propose TrackletMapper, a framework for annotating ground surface types such as sidewalks, roads, and street crossings from object tracklets without requiring human-annotated data. To this end, we project the robot ego-trajectory and the paths of other traffic participants into the ego-view camera images, creating sparse semantic annotations for multiple types of ground surfaces from which a ground segmentation model can be trained. We further show that the model can be self-distilled for additional performance benefits by aggregating a ground surface map and projecting it into the camera images, creating a denser set of training annotations compared to the sparse tracklet annotations. We qualitatively and quantitatively attest our findings on a novel large-scale dataset for mobile robots operating in pedestrian areas. Code and dataset will be made available at http://trackletmapper.cs.uni-freiburg.de. 对道路和街道交叉口等地面基础设施进行可靠分类是与行人一起操作的移动机器人的一项基本任务。虽然许多语义分割数据集可用于自动驾驶车辆，但在此类数据集上训练的模型在部署到在行人空间运行的机器人上时表现出很大的域差距。手动注释从行人视角记录的图像既昂贵又耗时。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了 TrackletMapper，这是一个用于从对象轨迹注释地面类型（例如人行道、道路和街道交叉口）的框架，而无需人工注释数据。为此，我们将机器人的自我轨迹和其他交通参与者的路径投影到自我视图相机图像中，为多种类型的地面创建稀疏语义注释，从而可以训练地面分割模型。我们进一步表明，该模型可以通过聚合地面地图并将其投影到相机图像中来自我蒸馏以获得额外的性能优势，从而创建比稀疏轨迹注释更密集的训练注释集。我们定性和定量地证明了我们在步行区运行的移动机器人的新型大规模数据集上的发现。代码和数据集将在 http://trackletmapper.cs.uni-freiburg.de 提供。 本文提出TrackletMapper框架，通过交通参与者轨迹生成地面语义分割标注，解决行人区域移动机器人地面分类问题。 Jannik Zürn,Sebastian Weber,Wolfram Burgard cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Brian S. Robinson,Clare W. Lau,Alexander New,Shane M. Nichols,Erik C. Johnson,Michael Wolmetz,William G. Coon
title: Continual learning benefits from multiple sleep mechanisms: NREM, REM, and Synaptic Downscaling
title_zh: 持续学习受益于多种睡眠机制：NREM、REM 和突触缩减
comment: 9 pages, 12 figures, code available upon reasonable request. Corresponding author: William G. Coon (will.coon@jhuapl.edu)
comments: 9 pages, 12 figures, code available upon reasonable request. Corresponding author: William G. Coon (will.coon@jhuapl.edu)
abstract: Learning new tasks and skills in succession without losing prior learning (i.e., catastrophic forgetting) is a computational challenge for both artificial and biological neural networks, yet artificial systems struggle to achieve parity with their biological analogues. Mammalian brains employ numerous neural operations in support of continual learning during sleep. These are ripe for artificial adaptation. Here, we investigate how modeling three distinct components of mammalian sleep together affects continual learning in artificial neural networks: (1) a veridical memory replay process observed during non-rapid eye movement (NREM) sleep; (2) a generative memory replay process linked to REM sleep; and (3) a synaptic downscaling process which has been proposed to tune signal-to-noise ratios and support neural upkeep. We find benefits from the inclusion of all three sleep components when evaluating performance on a continual learning CIFAR-100 image classification benchmark. Maximum accuracy improved during training and catastrophic forgetting was reduced during later tasks. While some catastrophic forgetting persisted over the course of network training, higher levels of synaptic downscaling lead to better retention of early tasks and further facilitated the recovery of early task accuracy during subsequent training. One key takeaway is that there is a trade-off at hand when considering the level of synaptic downscaling to use - more aggressive downscaling better protects early tasks, but less downscaling enhances the ability to learn new tasks. Intermediate levels can strike a balance with the highest overall accuracies during training. Overall, our results both provide insight into how to adapt sleep components to enhance artificial continual learning systems and highlight areas for future neuroscientific sleep research to further such systems.

Mammalian brains employ numerous neural operations in support of continual learning during sleep. These are ripe for artificial adaptation. Here, we investigate how modeling three distinct components of mammalian sleep together affects continual learning in artificial neural networks: (1) a veridical memory replay process observed during non-rapid eye movement (NREM) sleep; (2) a generative memory replay process linked to REM sleep; and (3) a synaptic downscaling process which has been proposed to tune signal-to-noise ratios and support neural upkeep. We find benefits from the inclusion of all three sleep components when evaluating performance on a continual learning CIFAR-100 image classification benchmark. Maximum accuracy improved during training and catastrophic forgetting was reduced during later tasks. While some catastrophic forgetting persisted over the course of network training, higher levels of synaptic downscaling lead to better retention of early tasks and further facilitated the recovery of early task accuracy during subsequent training. One key takeaway is that there is a trade-off at hand when considering the level of synaptic downscaling to use - more aggressive downscaling better protects early tasks, but less downscaling enhances the ability to learn new tasks. Intermediate levels can strike a balance with the highest overall accuracies during training. Overall, our results both provide insight into how to adapt sleep components to enhance artificial continual learning systems and highlight areas for future neuroscientific sleep research to further such systems.
abstract_zh: 对于人工神经网络和生物神经网络来说，连续学习新的任务和技能而不丢失先前的学习（即灾难性遗忘）是一个计算挑战，但人工系统很难达到与生物类似物的同等水平。哺乳动物的大脑采用大量的神经操作来支持睡眠期间的持续学习。这些已经适合人工适应。在这里，我们研究了对哺乳动物睡眠的三个不同组成部分进行建模如何影响人工神经网络的持续学习：（1）在非快速眼动（NREM）睡眠期间观察到的真实记忆重放过程； (2) 与快速眼动睡眠相关的生成记忆重放过程； （3）突触缩减过程，已被提出用于调整信噪比并支持神经维持。在评估持续学习 CIFAR-100 图像分类基准的性能时，我们发现包含所有三个睡眠组件的好处。在训练期间最大准确度得到提高，而在后续任务中灾难性遗忘则减少。虽然在网络训练过程中仍然存在一些灾难性遗忘，但更高水平的突触缩减可以更好地保留早期任务，并进一步促进在后续训练中恢复早期任务准确性。一个关键的结论是，在考虑要使用的突触缩减水平时，需要进行权衡——更积极的缩减可以更好地保护早期任务，但较少的缩减可以增强学习新任务的能力。中级水平可以在训练过程中与最高的整体准确度取得平衡。总的来说，我们的结果既提供了关于如何调整睡眠组成部分以增强人工持续学习系统的见解，也突出了未来神经科学睡眠研究进一步发展此类系统的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将哺乳动物睡眠的三种机制（NREM、REM和突触下调）整合到人工神经网络中，以提升连续学习能力，减少灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 人工神经网络在连续学习新任务时易发生灾难性遗忘，而生物大脑通过睡眠机制实现学习保留，启发了对睡眠机制的仿生应用。
AI.method: 构建包含NREM记忆回放、REM生成性回放及突触下调的模型，在CIFAR-100图像分类基准上评估连续学习性能。
AI.result: 整合三种睡眠机制显著提升训练准确率并减少遗忘，突触下调强度与早期任务保留及新任务学习存在权衡关系，中等强度效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 睡眠机制的多组件协同可优化人工连续学习系统，同时为神经科学睡眠研究提供新方向。

search_text: Continual learning benefits from multiple sleep mechanisms: NREM, REM, and Synaptic Downscaling 持续学习受益于多种睡眠机制：NREM、REM 和突触缩减 Learning new tasks and skills in succession without losing prior learning (i.e., catastrophic forgetting) is a computational challenge for both artificial and biological neural networks, yet artificial systems struggle to achieve parity with their biological analogues. One key takeaway is that there is a trade-off at hand when considering the level of synaptic downscaling to use - more aggressive downscaling better protects early tasks, but less downscaling enhances the ability to learn new tasks. Intermediate levels can strike a balance with the highest overall accuracies during training. authors_text: Yuhang Wang,Huafeng Shi,Rui Min,Ruijia Wu,Siyuan Liang,Yichao Wu,Ding Liang,Aishan Liu
title: Universal Backdoor Attacks Detection via Adaptive Adversarial Probe
title_zh: 通过自适应对抗探针检测通用后门攻击
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Extensive evidence has demonstrated that deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, which motivates the development of backdoor attacks detection. Most detection methods are designed to verify whether a model is infected with presumed types of backdoor attacks, yet the adversary is likely to generate diverse backdoor attacks in practice that are unforeseen to defenders, which challenge current detection strategies. In this paper, we focus on this more challenging scenario and propose a universal backdoor attacks detection method named Adaptive Adversarial Probe (A2P). Specifically, we posit that the challenge of universal backdoor attacks detection lies in the fact that different backdoor attacks often exhibit diverse characteristics in trigger patterns (i.e., sizes and transparencies). Therefore, our A2P adopts a global-to-local probing framework, which adversarially probes images with adaptive regions/budgets to fit various backdoor triggers of different sizes/transparencies. Regarding the probing region, we propose the attention-guided region generation strategy that generates region proposals with different sizes/locations based on the attention of the target model, since trigger regions often manifest higher model activation. Considering the attack budget, we introduce the box-to-sparsity scheduling that iteratively increases the perturbation budget from box to sparse constraint, so that we could better activate different latent backdoors with different transparencies. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets (CIFAR-10, GTSRB, Tiny-ImageNet) demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by large margins (+12%).
summary: Extensive evidence has demonstrated that deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, which motivates the development of backdoor attacks detection. Most detection methods are designed to verify whether a model is infected with presumed types of backdoor attacks, yet the adversary is likely to generate diverse backdoor attacks in practice that are unforeseen to defenders, which challenge current detection strategies. In this paper, we focus on this more challenging scenario and propose a universal backdoor attacks detection method named Adaptive Adversarial Probe (A2P). Specifically, we posit that the challenge of universal backdoor attacks detection lies in the fact that different backdoor attacks often exhibit diverse characteristics in trigger patterns (i.e., sizes and transparencies). Therefore, our A2P adopts a global-to-local probing framework, which adversarially probes images with adaptive regions/budgets to fit various backdoor triggers of different sizes/transparencies. Regarding the probing region, we propose the attention-guided region generation strategy that generates region proposals with different sizes/locations based on the attention of the target model, since trigger regions often manifest higher model activation. Considering the attack budget, we introduce the box-to-sparsity scheduling that iteratively increases the perturbation budget from box to sparse constraint, so that we could better activate different latent backdoors with different transparencies. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets (CIFAR-10, GTSRB, Tiny-ImageNet) demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by large margins (+12%).
abstract_zh: 大量证据表明深度神经网络（DNN）容易受到后门攻击，这推动了后门攻击检测的发展。大多数检测方法旨在验证模型是否感染了假定类型的后门攻击，但对手在实践中可能会产生防御者无法预见的多种后门攻击，这对当前的检测策略提出了挑战。在本文中，我们专注于这种更具挑战性的场景，并提出了一种名为自适应对抗探针（A2P）的通用后门攻击检测方法。具体来说，我们认为通用后门攻击检测的挑战在于不同的后门攻击通常在触发模式中表现出不同的特征（即大小和透明度）。因此，我们的 A2P 采用全局到局部的探测框架，该框架以自适应区域/预算对抗性地探测图像，以适应不同大小/透明度的各种后门触发器。关于探测区域，我们提出了注意力引导区域生成策略，该策略根据目标模型的注意力生成不同大小/位置的区域建议，因为触发区域通常表现出更高的模型激活。考虑到攻击预算，我们引入了框到稀疏调度，迭代地增加从框到稀疏约束的扰动预算，以便我们可以更好地激活具有不同透明度的不同潜在后门。对多个数据集（CIFAR-10、GTSRB、Tiny-ImageNet）的广泛实验表明，我们的方法大幅优于最先进的基线（+12%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为A2P的通用后门攻击检测方法，旨在应对实际中多样化的后门攻击类型。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法仅针对预设类型的后门攻击，而攻击者可能生成多样且未预见的后门攻击，现有策略难以应对这一挑战。
AI.method: A2P采用全局到局部的探测框架，通过注意力引导的区域生成策略和盒到稀疏度调度机制，自适应调整探测区域和扰动预算以适配不同尺寸/透明度的触发器。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、GTSRB和Tiny-ImageNet等多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法较现有最佳方法性能提升12%。
AI.conclusion: A2P通过自适应探测机制有效识别多样化后门攻击，为通用后门检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Universal Backdoor Attacks Detection via Adaptive Adversarial Probe 通过自适应对抗探针检测通用后门攻击 Extensive evidence has demonstrated that deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, which motivates the development of backdoor attacks detection. Most detection methods are designed to verify whether a model is infected with presumed types of backdoor attacks, yet the adversary is likely to generate diverse backdoor attacks in practice that are unforeseen to defenders, which challenge current detection strategies. In this paper, we focus on this more challenging scenario and propose a universal backdoor attacks detection method named Adaptive Adversarial Probe (A2P). Specifically, we posit that the challenge of universal backdoor attacks detection lies in the fact that different backdoor attacks often exhibit diverse characteristics in trigger patterns (i.e., sizes and transparencies). Therefore, our A2P adopts a global-to-local probing framework, which adversarially probes images with adaptive regions/budgets to fit various backdoor triggers of different sizes/transparencies. Regarding the probing region, we propose the attention-guided region generation strategy that generates region proposals with different sizes/locations based on the attention of the target model, since trigger regions often manifest higher model activation. Considering the attack budget, we introduce the box-to-sparsity scheduling that iteratively increases the perturbation budget from box to sparse constraint, so that we could better activate different latent backdoors with different transparencies. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets (CIFAR-10, GTSRB, Tiny-ImageNet) demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by large margins (+12%). 大量证据表明深度神经网络（DNN）容易受到后门攻击，这推动了后门攻击检测的发展。大多数检测方法旨在验证模型是否感染了假定类型的后门攻击，但对手在实践中可能会产生防御者无法预见的多种后门攻击，这对当前的检测策略提出了挑战。在本文中，我们专注于这种更具挑战性的场景，并提出了一种名为自适应对抗探针（A2P）的通用后门攻击检测方法。具体来说，我们认为通用后门攻击检测的挑战在于不同的后门攻击通常在触发模式中表现出不同的特征（即大小和透明度）。因此，我们的 A2P 采用全局到局部的探测框架，该框架以自适应区域/预算对抗性地探测图像，以适应不同大小/透明度的各种后门触发器。关于探测区域，我们提出了注意力引导区域生成策略，该策略根据目标模型的注意力生成不同大小/位置的区域建议，因为触发区域通常表现出更高的模型激活。考虑到攻击预算，我们引入了框到稀疏调度，迭代地增加从框到稀疏约束的扰动预算，以便我们可以更好地激活具有不同透明度的不同潜在后门。对多个数据集（CIFAR-10、GTSRB、Tiny-ImageNet）的广泛实验表明，我们的方法大幅优于最先进的基线（+12%）。 本文提出一种名为A2P的通用后门攻击检测方法，旨在应对实际中多样化的后门攻击类型。 Yuhang Wang,Huafeng Shi,Rui Min,Ruijia Wu,Siyuan Liang,Yichao Wu,Ding Liang,Aishan Liu cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Ming-fei Hu,Jian-wei Liu
title: $β$-CapsNet: Learning Disentangled Representation for CapsNet by Information Bottleneck
title_zh: $β$-CapsNet：通过信息瓶颈学习 CapsNet 的解缠表示
comment: 31 pages
comments: 31 pages
abstract: We present a framework for learning disentangled representation of CapsNet by information bottleneck constraint that distills information into a compact form and motivates to learn an interpretable factorized capsule. In our $β$-CapsNet framework, hyperparameter $β$ is utilized to trade-off disentanglement and other tasks, variational inference is utilized to convert the information bottleneck term into a KL divergence that is approximated as a constraint on the mean of the capsule. For supervised learning, class independent mask vector is used for understanding the types of variations synthetically irrespective of the image class, we carry out extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments by tuning the parameter $β$ to figure out the relationship between disentanglement, reconstruction and classfication performance. Furthermore, the unsupervised $β$-CapsNet and the corresponding dynamic routing algorithm is proposed for learning disentangled capsule in an unsupervised manner, extensive empirical evaluations suggest that our $β$-CapsNet achieves state-of-the-art disentanglement performance compared to CapsNet and various baselines on several complex datasets both in supervision and unsupervised scenes.
summary: We present a framework for learning disentangled representation of CapsNet by information bottleneck constraint that distills information into a compact form and motivates to learn an interpretable factorized capsule. In our $β$-CapsNet framework, hyperparameter $β$ is utilized to trade-off disentanglement and other tasks, variational inference is utilized to convert the information bottleneck term into a KL divergence that is approximated as a constraint on the mean of the capsule. For supervised learning, class independent mask vector is used for understanding the types of variations synthetically irrespective of the image class, we carry out extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments by tuning the parameter $β$ to figure out the relationship between disentanglement, reconstruction and classfication performance. Furthermore, the unsupervised $β$-CapsNet and the corresponding dynamic routing algorithm is proposed for learning disentangled capsule in an unsupervised manner, extensive empirical evaluations suggest that our $β$-CapsNet achieves state-of-the-art disentanglement performance compared to CapsNet and various baselines on several complex datasets both in supervision and unsupervised scenes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个通过信息瓶颈约束来学习 CapsNet 解缠结表示的框架，该框架将信息提炼成紧凑的形式，并激励学习可解释的分解胶囊。在我们的 $β$-CapsNet 框架中，超参数 $β$ 用于权衡解缠结和其他任务，利用变分推理将信息瓶颈项转换为 KL 散度，该散度近似为对胶囊均值的约束。对于监督学习，类独立掩模向量用于综合理解变化的类型，而与图像类别无关，我们通过调整参数$β$进行广泛的定量和定性实验，以找出解开、重建和分类性能之间的关系。此外，提出了无监督的 $β$-CapsNet 和相应的动态路由算法，用于以无监督的方式学习解缠结胶囊，广泛的实证评估表明，与 CapsNet 和多个复杂数据集上的监督和无监督场景中的各种基线相比，我们的 $β$-CapsNet 实现了最先进的解缠结性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为β-CapsNet的框架，通过信息瓶颈约束学习CapsNet的解耦表示。
AI.motivation: 现有的CapsNet在学习解耦表示方面存在局限，因此需要一种新的方法来提升解耦能力并实现更优的性能。
AI.method: β-CapsNet通过引入超参数β来平衡解耦与其他任务，并利用变分推断将信息瓶颈项转化为KL散度，以约束胶囊的均值。此外，还提出了一种无监督的β-CapsNet和动态路由算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，β-CapsNet在多个复杂数据集上实现了最先进的解耦性能，无论是在监督还是无监督场景下都优于CapsNet及其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: β-CapsNet通过信息瓶颈约束有效提升了CapsNet的解耦表示能力，且在监督和无监督场景下均表现优异。

authors_text: Haobo Chen,Chuyang Zhao,Kai Tu,Junru Chen,Yadong Li,Boxun Li
title: Style Variable and Irrelevant Learning for Generalizable Person Re-identification
title_zh: 可推广的人物重新识别的风格变量和无关学习
comment: 12pages, 5 figures;
comments: 12pages, 5 figures;
abstract: Recently, due to the poor performance of supervised person re-identification (ReID) to an unseen domain, Domain Generalization (DG) person ReID has attracted a lot of attention which aims to learn a domain-insensitive model and can resist the influence of domain bias. In this paper, we first verify through an experiment that style factors are a vital part of domain bias. Base on this conclusion, we propose a Style Variable and Irrelevant Learning (SVIL) method to eliminate the effect of style factors on the model. Specifically, we design a Style Jitter Module (SJM) in SVIL. The SJM module can enrich the style diversity of the specific source domain and reduce the style differences of various source domains. This leads to the model focusing on identity-relevant information and being insensitive to the style changes. Besides, we organically combine the SJM module with a meta-learning algorithm, maximizing the benefits and further improving the generalization ability of the model. Note that our SJM module is plug-and-play and inference cost-free. Extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of our SVIL and our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on DG-ReID benchmarks by a large margin.
summary: Recently, due to the poor performance of supervised person re-identification (ReID) to an unseen domain, Domain Generalization (DG) person ReID has attracted a lot of attention which aims to learn a domain-insensitive model and can resist the influence of domain bias. In this paper, we first verify through an experiment that style factors are a vital part of domain bias. Base on this conclusion, we propose a Style Variable and Irrelevant Learning (SVIL) method to eliminate the effect of style factors on the model. Specifically, we design a Style Jitter Module (SJM) in SVIL. The SJM module can enrich the style diversity of the specific source domain and reduce the style differences of various source domains. This leads to the model focusing on identity-relevant information and being insensitive to the style changes. Besides, we organically combine the SJM module with a meta-learning algorithm, maximizing the benefits and further improving the generalization ability of the model. Note that our SJM module is plug-and-play and inference cost-free. Extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of our SVIL and our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on DG-ReID benchmarks by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 最近，由于有监督的行人重识别（ReID）对未见过的域的性能较差，域泛化（DG）行人ReID引起了很多关注，其目的是学习域不敏感模型并可以抵抗域偏差的影响。在本文中，我们首先通过实验验证风格因素是领域偏见的重要组成部分。基于这个结论，我们提出了风格变量和无关学习（SVIL）方法来消除风格因素对模型的影响。具体来说，我们在 SVIL 中设计了风格抖动模块（SJM）。 SJM模块可以丰富特定源域的风格多样性，减少各个源域的风格差异。这导致模型专注于身份相关信息并对风格变化不敏感。此外，我们将SJM模块与元学习算法有机结合，最大化收益并进一步提高模型的泛化能力。请注意，我们的 SJM 模块是即插即用且推理免费的。大量的实验证实了我们的 SVIL 的有效性，并且我们的方法在 DG-ReID 基准上大大优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过消除风格因素的影响，提升跨域行人重识别（ReID）模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 监督式ReID在未见域上表现不佳，主要受域偏差影响，而风格因素是域偏差的关键部分，需设计方法消除其干扰。
AI.method: 提出风格变量与无关学习（SVIL）方法，包含风格抖动模块（SJM）以增强源域风格多样性并减少域间风格差异，结合元学习算法优化模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在DG-ReID基准测试中，SVIL方法显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SVIL通过聚焦身份相关特征并消除风格偏差，有效提升了跨域ReID的泛化性能，且推理成本为零。

search_text: Style Variable and Irrelevant Learning for Generalizable Person Re-identification 可推广的人物重新识别的风格变量和无关学习 Recently, due to the poor performance of supervised person re-identification (ReID) to an unseen domain, Domain Generalization (DG) person ReID has attracted a lot of attention which aims to learn a domain-insensitive model and can resist the influence of domain bias. In this paper, we first verify through an experiment that style factors are a vital part of domain bias. Base on this conclusion, we propose a Style Variable and Irrelevant Learning (SVIL) method to eliminate the effect of style factors on the model. Specifically, we design a Style Jitter Module (SJM) in SVIL. The SJM module can enrich the style diversity of the specific source domain and reduce the style differences of various source domains. This leads to the model focusing on identity-relevant information and being insensitive to the style changes. Besides, we organically combine the SJM module with a meta-learning algorithm, maximizing the benefits and further improving the generalization ability of the model. Note that our SJM module is plug-and-play and inference cost-free. Extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of our SVIL and our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on DG-ReID benchmarks by a large margin. 最近，由于有监督的行人重识别（ReID）对未见过的域的性能较差，域泛化（DG）行人ReID引起了很多关注，其目的是学习域不敏感模型并可以抵抗域偏差的影响。在本文中，我们首先通过实验验证风格因素是领域偏见的重要组成部分。基于这个结论，我们提出了风格变量和无关学习（SVIL）方法来消除风格因素对模型的影响。具体来说，我们在 SVIL 中设计了风格抖动模块（SJM）。 SJM模块可以丰富特定源域的风格多样性，减少各个源域的风格差异。这导致模型专注于身份相关信息并对风格变化不敏感。此外，我们将SJM模块与元学习算法有机结合，最大化收益并进一步提高模型的泛化能力。请注意，我们的 SJM 模块是即插即用且推理免费的。大量的实验证实了我们的 SVIL 的有效性，并且我们的方法在 DG-ReID 基准上大大优于最先进的方法。 本文旨在通过消除风格因素的影响，提升跨域行人重识别（ReID）模型的泛化能力。 Haobo Chen,Chuyang Zhao,Kai Tu,Junru Chen,Yadong Li,Boxun Li cs.CV

authors_text: Haijuan Hu
title: Low rank prior and l0 norm to remove impulse noise in images
title_zh: 低秩先验和 l0 范数可消除图像中的脉冲噪声
abstract: Patch-based low rank is an important prior assumption for image processing. Moreover, according to our calculation, the optimization of l0 norm corresponds to the maximum likelihood estimation under random-valued impulse noise. In this article, we thus combine exact rank and l0 norm for removing the noise. It is solved formally using the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM), with our previous patch-based weighted filter (PWMF) producing initial images. Since this model is not convex, we consider it as a Plug-and-Play ADMM, and do not discuss theoretical convergence properties. Experiments show that this method has very good performance, especially for weak or medium contrast images.
summary: Patch-based low rank is an important prior assumption for image processing. Moreover, according to our calculation, the optimization of l0 norm corresponds to the maximum likelihood estimation under random-valued impulse noise. In this article, we thus combine exact rank and l0 norm for removing the noise. It is solved formally using the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM), with our previous patch-based weighted filter (PWMF) producing initial images. Since this model is not convex, we consider it as a Plug-and-Play ADMM, and do not discuss theoretical convergence properties. Experiments show that this method has very good performance, especially for weak or medium contrast images.
abstract_zh: 基于补丁的低秩是图像处理的重要先验假设。此外，根据我们的计算，l0范数的优化对应于随机值脉冲噪声下的最大似然估计。因此，在本文中，我们结合精确秩和 l0 范数来消除噪声。使用乘法器交替方向法 (ADMM) 正式求解，并使用我们之前的基于块的加权滤波器 (PWMF) 生成初始图像。由于该模型不是凸的，因此我们将其视为即插即用的 ADMM，并且不讨论理论收敛特性。实验表明，该方法具有非常好的性能，特别是对于弱或中等对比度的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合低秩先验与l0范数的方法，用于去除图像中的脉冲噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理弱或中对比度图像时存在局限性，需结合低秩先验与l0范数优化以提升去噪效果。
AI.method: 采用ADMM算法求解非凸模型，结合低秩先验与l0范数，并利用PWMF生成初始图像，通过Plug-and-Play ADMM框架实现。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在弱或中对比度图像上表现优异，但未分析理论收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效去除脉冲噪声，尤其适用于特定对比度图像，但需进一步研究收敛性理论。

authors_text: Zheqi Lv,Wenqiao Zhang,Shengyu Zhang,Kun Kuang,Feng Wang,Yongwei Wang,Zhengyu Chen,Tao Shen,Hongxia Yang,Beng Chin Ooi,Fei Wu
title: DUET: A Tuning-Free Device-Cloud Collaborative Parameters Generation Framework for Efficient Device Model Generalization
title_zh: DUET：一种无需调优的设备云协作参数生成框架，可实现高效设备模型泛化
comment: Published on WWW'23: Proceedings of the ACM on Web Conference 2023 (pp. 3077 - 3085)
comments: Published on WWW'23: Proceedings of the ACM on Web Conference 2023 (pp. 3077 - 3085)
abstract: Device Model Generalization (DMG) is a practical yet under-investigated research topic for on-device machine learning applications. It aims to improve the generalization ability of pre-trained models when deployed on resource-constrained devices, such as improving the performance of pre-trained cloud models on smart mobiles. While quite a lot of works have investigated the data distribution shift across clouds and devices, most of them focus on model fine-tuning on personalized data for individual devices to facilitate DMG. Despite their promising, these approaches require on-device re-training, which is practically infeasible due to the overfitting problem and high time delay when performing gradient calculation on real-time data. In this paper, we argue that the computational cost brought by fine-tuning can be rather unnecessary. We consequently present a novel perspective to improving DMG without increasing computational cost, i.e., device-specific parameter generation which directly maps data distribution to parameters. Specifically, we propose an efficient Device-cloUd collaborative parametErs generaTion framework DUET. DUET is deployed on a powerful cloud server that only requires the low cost of forwarding propagation and low time delay of data transmission between the device and the cloud. By doing so, DUET can rehearse the device-specific model weight realizations conditioned on the personalized real-time data for an individual device. Importantly, our DUET elegantly connects the cloud and device as a 'duet' collaboration, frees the DMG from fine-tuning, and enables a faster and more accurate DMG paradigm. We conduct an extensive experimental study of DUET on three public datasets, and the experimental results confirm our framework's effectiveness and generalisability for different DMG tasks.

It aims to improve the generalization ability of pre-trained models when deployed on resource-constrained devices, such as improving the performance of pre-trained cloud models on smart mobiles. While quite a lot of works have investigated the data distribution shift across clouds and devices, most of them focus on model fine-tuning on personalized data for individual devices to facilitate DMG. DUET is deployed on a powerful cloud server that only requires the low cost of forwarding propagation and low time delay of data transmission between the device and the cloud. By doing so, DUET can rehearse the device-specific model weight realizations conditioned on the personalized real-time data for an individual device. Importantly, our DUET elegantly connects the cloud and device as a 'duet' collaboration, frees the DMG from fine-tuning, and enables a faster and more accurate DMG paradigm. abstract_zh: 设备模型泛化（DMG）是设备上机器学习应用程序的一个实用但尚未得到充分研究的研究主题。它旨在提高预训练模型在资源受限设备上部署时的泛化能力，例如提高预训练云模型在智能手机上的性能。虽然相当多的工作研究了跨云和设备的数据分布变化，但大多数都侧重于对单个设备的个性化数据进行模型微调以促进 DMG。尽管前景广阔，但这些方法需要在设备上重新训练，但由于在实时数据上执行梯度计算时存在过拟合问题和高时延，这实际上是不可行的。在本文中，我们认为微调带来的计算成本可能是不必要的。因此，我们提出了一种在不增加计算成本的情况下改进 DMG 的新视角，即直接将数据分布映射到参数的设备特定参数生成。具体来说，我们提出了一种高效的设备云协作参数生成框架 DUET。 DUET部署在强大的云服务器上，只需要设备与云端之间的低转发传播成本和低时延的数据传输。通过这样做，DUET 可以根据单个设备的个性化实时数据来演练特定于设备的模型权重实现。重要的是，我们的 DUET 以“二重奏”协作方式优雅地连接云和设备，使 DMG 免于微调，并实现更快、更准确的 DMG 范式。我们在三个公共数据集上对 DUET 进行了广泛的实验研究，实验结果证实了我们的框架对于不同 DMG 任务的有效性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DUET框架，通过设备与云端协作生成设备特定参数，无需微调即可提升边缘设备模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有设备模型泛化方法依赖设备端微调，但面临过拟合、计算延迟等问题，而直接映射数据分布到参数可避免这些成本。
AI.method: DUET利用云端服务器进行前向传播和数据传输，根据设备实时数据生成个性化模型参数，实现设备与云端的协同参数生成。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验验证了DUET在不同任务中的有效性与泛化能力，证明其优于传统微调方法。
AI.conclusion: DUET通过设备-云端协作无需微调即可实现高效模型泛化，为资源受限设备提供了更快速准确的解决方案。

By doing so, DUET can rehearse the device-specific model weight realizations conditioned on the personalized real-time data for an individual device. Importantly, our DUET elegantly connects the cloud and device as a 'duet' collaboration, frees the DMG from fine-tuning, and enables a faster and more accurate DMG paradigm. We conduct an extensive experimental study of DUET on three public datasets, and the experimental results confirm our framework's effectiveness and generalisability for different DMG tasks. 设备模型泛化（DMG）是设备上机器学习应用程序的一个实用但尚未得到充分研究的研究主题。它旨在提高预训练模型在资源受限设备上部署时的泛化能力，例如提高预训练云模型在智能手机上的性能。虽然相当多的工作研究了跨云和设备的数据分布变化，但大多数都侧重于对单个设备的个性化数据进行模型微调以促进 DMG。尽管前景广阔，但这些方法需要在设备上重新训练，但由于在实时数据上执行梯度计算时存在过拟合问题和高时延，这实际上是不可行的。在本文中，我们认为微调带来的计算成本可能是不必要的。因此，我们提出了一种在不增加计算成本的情况下改进 DMG 的新视角，即直接将数据分布映射到参数的设备特定参数生成。具体来说，我们提出了一种高效的设备云协作参数生成框架 DUET。 DUET部署在强大的云服务器上，只需要设备与云端之间的低转发传播成本和低时延的数据传输。通过这样做，DUET 可以根据单个设备的个性化实时数据来演练特定于设备的模型权重实现。重要的是，我们的 DUET 以“二重奏”协作方式优雅地连接云和设备，使 DMG 免于微调，并实现更快、更准确的 DMG 范式。我们在三个公共数据集上对 DUET 进行了广泛的实验研究，实验结果证实了我们的框架对于不同 DMG 任务的有效性和通用性。 本文提出DUET框架，通过设备与云端协作生成设备特定参数，无需微调即可提升边缘设备模型的泛化能力。 Zheqi Lv,Wenqiao Zhang,Shengyu Zhang,Kun Kuang,Feng Wang,Yongwei Wang,Zhengyu Chen,Tao Shen,Hongxia Yang,Beng Chin Ooi,Fei Wu cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.IR

authors_text: Yaniv Oshrat,Yonatan Aumann,Tal Hollander,Oleg Maksimov,Anita Ostroumov,Natali Shechtman,Sarit Kraus
title: Efficient Customer Service Combining Human Operators and Virtual Agents
title_zh: 结合人工操作员和虚拟代理的高效客户服务
abstract: The prospect of combining human operators and virtual agents (bots) into an effective hybrid system that provides proper customer service to clients is promising yet challenging. The hybrid system decreases the customers' frustration when bots are unable to provide appropriate service and increases their satisfaction when they prefer to interact with human operators. Furthermore, we show that it is possible to decrease the cost and efforts of building and maintaining such virtual agents by enabling the virtual agent to incrementally learn from the human operators. We employ queuing theory to identify the key parameters that govern the behavior and efficiency of such hybrid systems and determine the main parameters that should be optimized in order to improve the service. We formally prove, and demonstrate in extensive simulations and in a user study, that with the proper choice of parameters, such hybrid systems are able to increase the number of served clients while simultaneously decreasing their expected waiting time and increasing satisfaction.
summary: The prospect of combining human operators and virtual agents (bots) into an effective hybrid system that provides proper customer service to clients is promising yet challenging. The hybrid system decreases the customers' frustration when bots are unable to provide appropriate service and increases their satisfaction when they prefer to interact with human operators. Furthermore, we show that it is possible to decrease the cost and efforts of building and maintaining such virtual agents by enabling the virtual agent to incrementally learn from the human operators. We employ queuing theory to identify the key parameters that govern the behavior and efficiency of such hybrid systems and determine the main parameters that should be optimized in order to improve the service. We formally prove, and demonstrate in extensive simulations and in a user study, that with the proper choice of parameters, such hybrid systems are able to increase the number of served clients while simultaneously decreasing their expected waiting time and increasing satisfaction.
abstract_zh: 将人类操作员和虚拟代理（机器人）结合成一个有效的混合系统，为客户提供适当的客户服务，其前景充满希望，但也充满挑战。当机器人无法提供适当的服务时，混合系统减少了客户的挫败感，并在他们更愿意与人类操作员交互时提高了他们的满​​意度。此外，我们表明，通过使虚拟代理能够逐步向人类操作员学习，可以减少构建和维护此类虚拟代理的成本和工作量。我们利用排队论来识别控制此类混合系统的行为和效率的关键参数，并确定应优化的主要参数以改进服务。我们在广泛的模拟和用户研究中正式证明和证明，通过正确选择参数，这种混合系统能够增加服务客户的数量，同时减少他们的预期等待时间并提高满意度。

AI.tldr: 设计结合人工客服与虚拟代理的混合系统以提升客户服务效率
AI.motivation: 现有客服系统在机器人处理能力不足或客户偏好人工交互时易引发挫败感，且虚拟代理的开发维护成本较高
AI.method: 基于排队论分析系统关键参数，通过模拟实验与用户研究验证参数优化效果
AI.result: 优化后的混合系统可提升服务客户数量，同时降低客户等待时长并提高满意度
AI.conclusion: 合理配置参数的混合系统能有效平衡服务效率与用户体验，降低运营成本

authors_text: Katrin Angerbauer,Michael Sedlmair
title: Toward Inclusion and Accessibility in Visualization Research: Speculations on Challenges, Solution Strategies, and Calls for Action (Position Paper)
title_zh: 实现可视化研究的包容性和可访问性：对挑战的推测、解决方案策略和行动呼吁（立场文件）
comment: 8 pages, IEEE VIS BELIV 2022 workshop, preprint
comments: 8 pages, IEEE VIS BELIV 2022 workshop, preprint
abstract: Inclusion and accessibility in visualization research have gained increasing attention in recent years. However, many challenges still remain to be solved on the road toward a more inclusive, shared-experience-driven visualization design and evaluation process. In this position paper, we discuss challenges and speculate about potential solutions, based on related work, our own research, as well as personal experiences. The goal of this paper is to start discussions on the role of accessibility and inclusion in visualization design and evaluation.
summary: Inclusion and accessibility in visualization research have gained increasing attention in recent years. However, many challenges still remain to be solved on the road toward a more inclusive, shared-experience-driven visualization design and evaluation process. In this position paper, we discuss challenges and speculate about potential solutions, based on related work, our own research, as well as personal experiences. The goal of this paper is to start discussions on the role of accessibility and inclusion in visualization design and evaluation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，可视化研究的包容性和可访问性受到越来越多的关注。然而，在走向更具包容性、共享体验驱动的可视化设计和评估过程的道路上，仍有许多挑战有待解决。在这篇立场文件中，我们根据相关工作、我们自己的研究以及个人经验，讨论了挑战并推测了潜在的解决方案。本文的目的是开始讨论可访问性和包容性在可视化设计和评估中的作用。

AI.tldr: 探讨可视化研究中包容性与无障碍设计的挑战及解决方案，推动相关讨论
AI.motivation: 近年来可视化研究中包容性与无障碍设计的重要性日益凸显，但实现包容性可视化设计与评估仍面临诸多挑战，亟需系统性解决方案与学术讨论
AI.method: 通过分析现有研究、结合自身研究成果与个人经验，探讨挑战并提出潜在解决方案
AI.result: 提出了一系列关于包容性与无障碍设计的挑战及可能的解决策略，旨在引发学术界对这一领域的进一步讨论与行动
AI.conclusion: 论文强调了包容性与无障碍在可视化设计中的重要性，呼吁学术界加强相关研究与实践，推动更公平、可及的可视化技术发展

authors_text: Tin Lai
title: A Review on Visual-SLAM: Advancements from Geometric Modelling to Learning-based Semantic Scene Understanding
title_zh: Visual-SLAM 综述：从几何建模到基于学习的语义场景理解的进展
abstract: Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM) is one of the fundamental problems in autonomous mobile robots where a robot needs to reconstruct a previously unseen environment while simultaneously localising itself with respect to the map. In particular, Visual-SLAM uses various sensors from the mobile robot for collecting and sensing a representation of the map. Traditionally, geometric model-based techniques were used to tackle the SLAM problem, which tends to be error-prone under challenging environments. Recent advancements in computer vision, such as deep learning techniques, have provided a data-driven approach to tackle the Visual-SLAM problem. This review summarises recent advancements in the Visual-SLAM domain using various learning-based methods. We begin by providing a concise overview of the geometric model-based approaches, followed by technical reviews on the current paradigms in SLAM. Then, we present the various learning-based approaches to collecting sensory inputs from mobile robots and performing scene understanding. The current paradigms in deep-learning-based semantic understanding are discussed and placed under the context of Visual-SLAM. Finally, we discuss challenges and further opportunities in the direction of learning-based approaches in Visual-SLAM.
summary: Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM) is one of the fundamental problems in autonomous mobile robots where a robot needs to reconstruct a previously unseen environment while simultaneously localising itself with respect to the map. In particular, Visual-SLAM uses various sensors from the mobile robot for collecting and sensing a representation of the map. Traditionally, geometric model-based techniques were used to tackle the SLAM problem, which tends to be error-prone under challenging environments. Recent advancements in computer vision, such as deep learning techniques, have provided a data-driven approach to tackle the Visual-SLAM problem. This review summarises recent advancements in the Visual-SLAM domain using various learning-based methods. We begin by providing a concise overview of the geometric model-based approaches, followed by technical reviews on the current paradigms in SLAM. Then, we present the various learning-based approaches to collecting sensory inputs from mobile robots and performing scene understanding. The current paradigms in deep-learning-based semantic understanding are discussed and placed under the context of Visual-SLAM. Finally, we discuss challenges and further opportunities in the direction of learning-based approaches in Visual-SLAM.
abstract_zh: 同时定位和建图（SLAM）是自主移动机器人的基本问题之一，其中机器人需要重建以前未见过的环境，同时根据地图进行自身定位。特别是，视觉 SLAM 使用移动机器人的各种传感器来收集和感测地图的表示。传统上，基于几何模型的技术被用来解决 SLAM 问题，但在具有挑战性的环境下往往容易出错。计算机视觉的最新进展（例如深度学习技术）提供了一种数据驱动的方法来解决视觉 SLAM 问题。这篇综述总结了 Visual-SLAM 领域使用各种基于学习的方法取得的最新进展。我们首先对基于几何模型的方法进行简要概述，然后对当前 SLAM 范式进行技术回顾。然后，我们提出了各种基于学习的方法来收集移动机器人的感官输入并执行场景理解。在 Visual-SLAM 的背景下讨论并放置了当前基于深度学习的语义理解范例。最后，我们讨论了 Visual-SLAM 中基于学习的方法方向的挑战和进一步的机遇。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了视觉SLAM领域从几何建模到基于学习的语义场景理解的最新进展。
AI.motivation: 传统几何模型在复杂环境下易出错，需探索基于深度学习的数据驱动方法提升视觉SLAM的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过系统梳理几何模型方法、当前SLAM范式及学习驱动的感知与语义理解技术，结合深度学习在语义理解中的应用进行分析。
AI.result: 总结了基于学习的视觉SLAM技术进展，明确了当前挑战并提出未来研究方向，如多模态融合与实时性优化。
AI.conclusion: 学习驱动方法为视觉SLAM带来新机遇，但需解决动态场景适应性、计算效率及语义-几何一致性等核心问题。

tldr: 本文综述了视觉SLAM领域从几何建模到基于学习的语义场景理解的最新进展。
motivation: 传统几何模型在复杂环境下易出错，需探索基于深度学习的数据驱动方法提升视觉SLAM的鲁棒性。
method: 通过系统梳理几何模型方法、当前SLAM范式及学习驱动的感知与语义理解技术，结合深度学习在语义理解中的应用进行分析。
result: 总结了基于学习的视觉SLAM技术进展，明确了当前挑战并提出未来研究方向，如多模态融合与实时性优化。
conclusion: 学习驱动方法为视觉SLAM带来新机遇，但需解决动态场景适应性、计算效率及语义-几何一致性等核心问题。
search_text: A Review on Visual-SLAM: Advancements from Geometric Modelling to Learning-based Semantic Scene Understanding Visual-SLAM 综述：从几何建模到基于学习的语义场景理解的进展 Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM) is one of the fundamental problems in autonomous mobile robots where a robot needs to reconstruct a previously unseen environment while simultaneously localising itself with respect to the map. In particular, Visual-SLAM uses various sensors from the mobile robot for collecting and sensing a representation of the map. Traditionally, geometric model-based techniques were used to tackle the SLAM problem, which tends to be error-prone under challenging environments. Recent advancements in computer vision, such as deep learning techniques, have provided a data-driven approach to tackle the Visual-SLAM problem. This review summarises recent advancements in the Visual-SLAM domain using various learning-based methods. We begin by providing a concise overview of the geometric model-based approaches, followed by technical reviews on the current paradigms in SLAM. Then, we present the various learning-based approaches to collecting sensory inputs from mobile robots and performing scene understanding. The current paradigms in deep-learning-based semantic understanding are discussed and placed under the context of Visual-SLAM. Finally, we discuss challenges and further opportunities in the direction of learning-based approaches in Visual-SLAM. 同时定位和建图（SLAM）是自主移动机器人的基本问题之一，其中机器人需要重建以前未见过的环境，同时根据地图进行自身定位。特别是，视觉 SLAM 使用移动机器人的各种传感器来收集和感测地图的表示。传统上，基于几何模型的技术被用来解决 SLAM 问题，但在具有挑战性的环境下往往容易出错。计算机视觉的最新进展（例如深度学习技术）提供了一种数据驱动的方法来解决视觉 SLAM 问题。这篇综述总结了 Visual-SLAM 领域使用各种基于学习的方法取得的最新进展。我们首先对基于几何模型的方法进行简要概述，然后对当前 SLAM 范式进行技术回顾。然后，我们提出了各种基于学习的方法来收集移动机器人的感官输入并执行场景理解。在 Visual-SLAM 的背景下讨论并放置了当前基于深度学习的语义理解范例。最后，我们讨论了 Visual-SLAM 中基于学习的方法方向的挑战和进一步的机遇。 本文综述了视觉SLAM领域从几何建模到基于学习的语义场景理解的最新进展。 Tin Lai cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Christian Graf,David B. Adrian,Joshua Weil,Miroslav Gabriel,Philipp Schillinger,Markus Spies,Heiko Neumann,Andras Kupcsik
title: Learning Dense Visual Descriptors using Image Augmentations for Robot Manipulation Tasks
title_zh: 使用图像增强来学习密集视觉描述符以执行机器人操作任务
comment: 20 pages, 14 figures
comments: 20 pages, 14 figures
abstract: We propose a self-supervised training approach for learning view-invariant dense visual descriptors using image augmentations. Unlike existing works, which often require complex datasets, such as registered RGBD sequences, we train on an unordered set of RGB images. This allows for learning from a single camera view, e.g., in an existing robotic cell with a fix-mounted camera. We create synthetic views and dense pixel correspondences using data augmentations. We find our descriptors are competitive to the existing methods, despite the simpler data recording and setup requirements. We show that training on synthetic correspondences provides descriptor consistency across a broad range of camera views. We compare against training with geometric correspondence from multiple views and provide ablation studies. We also show a robotic bin-picking experiment using descriptors learned from a fix-mounted camera for defining grasp preferences.
summary: We propose a self-supervised training approach for learning view-invariant dense visual descriptors using image augmentations. Unlike existing works, which often require complex datasets, such as registered RGBD sequences, we train on an unordered set of RGB images. This allows for learning from a single camera view, e.g., in an existing robotic cell with a fix-mounted camera. We create synthetic views and dense pixel correspondences using data augmentations. We find our descriptors are competitive to the existing methods, despite the simpler data recording and setup requirements. We show that training on synthetic correspondences provides descriptor consistency across a broad range of camera views. We compare against training with geometric correspondence from multiple views and provide ablation studies. We also show a robotic bin-picking experiment using descriptors learned from a fix-mounted camera for defining grasp preferences.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种自监督训练方法，用于使用图像增强学习视图不变的密集视觉描述符。与通常需要复杂数据集（例如注册的 RGBD 序列）的现有作品不同，我们在一组无序的 RGB 图像上进行训练。这允许从单个摄像机视图进行学习，例如在具有固定安装摄像机的现有机器人单元中。我们使用数据增强创建合成视图和密集像素对应。我们发现我们的描述符与现有方法相比具有竞争力，尽管数据记录和设置要求更简单。我们表明，对合成对应的训练可以在广泛的相机视图中提供描述符一致性。我们将训练与多个视图的几何对应进行比较，并提供消融研究。我们还展示了一个机器人垃圾箱拾取实验，该实验使用从固定安装的相机中学习的描述符来定义抓取偏好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像增强的自监督训练方法，用于学习视图不变的密集视觉描述符，以应用于机器人操作任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要复杂的数据集（如注册的RGBD序列），而本文旨在通过单目相机采集的简单RGB图像实现更便捷的视觉描述符学习。
AI.method: 利用图像增强生成合成视角和密集像素对应关系，在无序RGB图像集合上进行自监督训练，替代传统几何对应关系。
AI.result: 描述符在简单数据条件下表现与现有方法相当，且在多视角下保持一致性，并成功应用于固定相机的机械臂分拣实验。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化数据采集要求和训练流程，为机器人操作任务提供了实用的视觉描述符学习方案。

authors_text: Victor-Alexandru Darvariu,Stephen Hailes,Mirco Musolesi
title: Graph Neural Modeling of Network Flows
title_zh: 网络流的图神经建模
abstract: Network flow problems, which involve distributing traffic such that the underlying infrastructure is used effectively, are ubiquitous in transportation and logistics. Among them, the general Multi-Commodity Network Flow (MCNF) problem concerns the distribution of multiple flows of different sizes between several sources and sinks, while achieving effective utilization of the links. Due to the appeal of data-driven optimization, these problems have increasingly been approached using graph learning methods. In this paper, we propose a novel graph learning architecture for network flow problems called Per-Edge Weights (PEW). This method builds on a Graph Attention Network and uses distinctly parametrized message functions along each link. We extensively evaluate the proposed solution through an Internet flow routing case study using $17$ Service Provider topologies and $2$ routing schemes. We show that PEW yields substantial gains over architectures whose global message function constrains the routing unnecessarily. We also find that an MLP is competitive with other standard architectures. Furthermore, we analyze the relationship between graph structure and predictive performance for data-driven routing of flows, an aspect that has not been considered by existing work in the area.
summary: Network flow problems, which involve distributing traffic such that the underlying infrastructure is used effectively, are ubiquitous in transportation and logistics. Among them, the general Multi-Commodity Network Flow (MCNF) problem concerns the distribution of multiple flows of different sizes between several sources and sinks, while achieving effective utilization of the links. Due to the appeal of data-driven optimization, these problems have increasingly been approached using graph learning methods. In this paper, we propose a novel graph learning architecture for network flow problems called Per-Edge Weights (PEW). This method builds on a Graph Attention Network and uses distinctly parametrized message functions along each link. We extensively evaluate the proposed solution through an Internet flow routing case study using $17$ Service Provider topologies and $2$ routing schemes. We show that PEW yields substantial gains over architectures whose global message function constrains the routing unnecessarily. We also find that an MLP is competitive with other standard architectures. Furthermore, we analyze the relationship between graph structure and predictive performance for data-driven routing of flows, an aspect that has not been considered by existing work in the area.
abstract_zh: 网络流问题在运输和物流中普遍存在，涉及分配流量以有效利用底层基础设施。其中，一般的多商品网络流（MCNF）问题涉及在多个源和宿之间分配不同大小的多个流，同时实现链路的有效利用。由于数据驱动优化的吸引力，这些问题越来越多地使用图学习方法来解决。在本文中，我们针对网络流问题提出了一种新颖的图学习架构，称为每边权重（PEW）。该方法建立在图注意力网络的基础上，并在每个链接上使用明显参数化的消息函数。我们通过使用 17 美元服务提供商拓扑和 2 美元路由方案的互联网流路由案例研究广泛评估了所提出的解决方案。我们表明，与全局消息功能不必要地限制路由的架构相比，PEW 产生了显着的收益。我们还发现 MLP 与其他标准架构相比具有竞争力。此外，我们分析了数据驱动的流路由的图结构和预测性能之间的关系，这是该领域现有工作尚未考虑的一个方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络的新型架构PEW，用于解决多商品网络流问题，通过参数化每条链路的消息函数优化流量路由。
AI.motivation: 传统网络流优化方法存在全局消息函数限制路由灵活性的问题，而数据驱动方法能更有效利用基础设施，需探索更适应网络结构的图学习模型。
AI.method: 基于图注意力网络（GAT），设计名为PEW的架构，为每条链路单独参数化消息函数，结合互联网流量路由案例进行验证。
AI.result: PEW在17个服务提供商拓扑和2种路由方案中表现优于全局消息函数架构，MLP模型也具备竞争力，且发现图结构与预测性能存在关联。
AI.conclusion: PEW通过局部参数化提升路由效率，MLP可作为替代方案，图结构对数据驱动路由的影响是先前研究未涉及的关键因素。

authors_text: Leah Chrestien,Tomas Pevny,Antonin Komenda,Stefan Edelkamp
title: A Differentiable Loss Function for Learning Heuristics in A*
title_zh: A* 中学习启发式的可微损失函数
comment: 10 pages
comments: 10 pages
abstract: Optimization of heuristic functions for the A* algorithm, realized by deep neural networks, is usually done by minimizing square root loss of estimate of the cost to goal values. This paper argues that this does not necessarily lead to a faster search of A* algorithm since its execution relies on relative values instead of absolute ones. As a mitigation, we propose a L* loss, which upper-bounds the number of excessively expanded states inside the A* search. The L* loss, when used in the optimization of state-of-the-art deep neural networks for automated planning in maze domains like Sokoban and maze with teleports, significantly improves the fraction of solved problems, the quality of founded plans, and reduces the number of expanded states to approximately 50%
summary: Optimization of heuristic functions for the A* algorithm, realized by deep neural networks, is usually done by minimizing square root loss of estimate of the cost to goal values. This paper argues that this does not necessarily lead to a faster search of A* algorithm since its execution relies on relative values instead of absolute ones. As a mitigation, we propose a L* loss, which upper-bounds the number of excessively expanded states inside the A* search. The L* loss, when used in the optimization of state-of-the-art deep neural networks for automated planning in maze domains like Sokoban and maze with teleports, significantly improves the fraction of solved problems, the quality of founded plans, and reduces the number of expanded states to approximately 50%
abstract_zh: 由深度神经网络实现的 A* 算法的启发式函数的优化通常是通过最小化目标值成本估计的平方根损失来完成的。本文认为，这并不一定会导致 A* 算法的搜索速度更快，因为它的执行依赖于相对值而不是绝对值。作为缓解措施，我们提出了 L* 损失，它限制了 A* 搜索内过度扩展状态的数量。当 L* 损失用于优化最先进的深度神经网络以在推箱子和传送迷宫等迷宫领域进行自动规划时，可以显着提高已解决问题的比例、建立计划的质量，并将扩展状态的数量减少到大约 50%

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可微分的L*损失函数，用于优化A*算法中的启发式函数，以提升搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过最小化成本估计的平方根损失优化启发式函数，但A*算法依赖相对值而非绝对值，导致搜索效率提升有限。
AI.method: 设计L*损失函数，通过上界约束A*搜索中过度扩展的状态数，并在迷宫类领域（如Sokoban）中使用深度神经网络进行优化。
AI.result: 实验显示，L*损失显著提高求解率和计划质量，扩展状态数减少约50%。
AI.conclusion: L*损失函数有效优化启发式函数，为自动规划任务中的A*算法提供了更高效的解决方案。
