authors_text: Victoria Manousaki,Konstantinos Papoutsakis,Antonis Argyros
title: Graphing the Future: Activity and Next Active Object Prediction using Graph-based Activity Representations
title_zh: 绘制未来图：使用基于图的活动表示来预测活动和下一个活动对象
comment: 13 pages, Conference: In Advances in Visual Computing (ISVC 2022), Springer, San Diego, USA, October 2022
comments: 13 pages, Conference: In Advances in Visual Computing (ISVC 2022), Springer, San Diego, USA, October 2022
abstract: We present a novel approach for the visual prediction of human-object interactions in videos. Rather than forecasting the human and object motion or the future hand-object contact points, we aim at predicting (a)the class of the on-going human-object interaction and (b) the class(es) of the next active object(s) (NAOs), i.e., the object(s) that will be involved in the interaction in the near future as well as the time the interaction will occur. Graph matching relies on the efficient Graph Edit distance (GED) method. The experimental evaluation of the proposed approach was conducted using two well-established video datasets that contain human-object interactions, namely the MSR Daily Activities and the CAD120. High prediction accuracy was obtained for both action prediction and NAO forecasting.
summary: We present a novel approach for the visual prediction of human-object interactions in videos. Rather than forecasting the human and object motion or the future hand-object contact points, we aim at predicting (a)the class of the on-going human-object interaction and (b) the class(es) of the next active object(s) (NAOs), i.e., the object(s) that will be involved in the interaction in the near future as well as the time the interaction will occur. Graph matching relies on the efficient Graph Edit distance (GED) method. The experimental evaluation of the proposed approach was conducted using two well-established video datasets that contain human-object interactions, namely the MSR Daily Activities and the CAD120. High prediction accuracy was obtained for both action prediction and NAO forecasting.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种对视频中人与物体交互进行视觉预测的新颖方法。我们的目标不是预测人和物体的运动或未来的手部物体接触点，而是预测（a）正在进行的人与物体交互的类别和（b）下一个活动物体（NAO）的类别，即在不久的将来将参与交互的物体以及交互发生的时间。图匹配依赖于高效的图编辑距离（GED）方法。使用两个包含人机交互的成熟视频数据集（即 MSR 日常活动和 CAD120）对所提出的方法进行了实验评估。动作预测和 NAO 预测均获得了较高的预测精度。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于图表示的视频中人-物交互及未来活跃物体预测方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法侧重预测运动轨迹或接触点，而该研究旨在更准确预测交互类型及未来参与物体，提升预测实用性。
AI.method: 采用图匹配技术，结合高效图编辑距离（GED）计算，通过图结构建模活动特征进行预测。
AI.result: 在MSR Daily Activities和CAD120数据集上均取得较高预测准确率，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于图表示的方法能有效提升人-物交互及未来物体预测准确性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Victor Parque
title: Learning Obstacle-Avoiding Lattice Paths using Swarm Heuristics: Exploring the Bijection to Ordered Trees
title_zh: 使用群体启发式学习避障格路径：探索有序树的双射
comment: 2022 IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC)
comments: 2022 IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC)
abstract: Lattice paths are functional entities that model efficient navigation in discrete/grid maps. This paper presents a new scheme to generate collision-free lattice paths with utmost efficiency using the bijective property to rooted ordered trees, rendering a one-dimensional search problem. Our computational studies using ten state-of-the-art and relevant nature-inspired swarm heuristics in navigation scenarios with obstacles with convex and non-convex geometry show the practical feasibility and efficiency in rendering collision-free lattice paths. We believe our scheme may find use in devising fast algorithms for planning and combinatorial optimization in discrete maps.
summary: Lattice paths are functional entities that model efficient navigation in discrete/grid maps. This paper presents a new scheme to generate collision-free lattice paths with utmost efficiency using the bijective property to rooted ordered trees, rendering a one-dimensional search problem. Our computational studies using ten state-of-the-art and relevant nature-inspired swarm heuristics in navigation scenarios with obstacles with convex and non-convex geometry show the practical feasibility and efficiency in rendering collision-free lattice paths. We believe our scheme may find use in devising fast algorithms for planning and combinatorial optimization in discrete maps.
abstract_zh: 格子路径是在离散/网格地图中模拟有效导航的功能实体。本文提出了一种新方案，利用有根有序树的双射性质，以最高效率生成无碰撞格路径，从而呈现一维搜索问题。我们在具有凸和非凸几何形状的障碍物的导航场景中使用十种最先进的和相关的自然启发式群体启发法进行计算研究，显示了渲染无碰撞晶格路径的实际可行性和效率。我们相信我们的方案可以用于设计离散地图中的规划和组合优化的快速算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于群启发式算法和有序树双射性质的高效无碰撞格路径生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有路径规划方法在复杂障碍物环境中效率不足，需更高效的离散地图导航方案。
AI.method: 通过根有序树双射性质将二维格路径问题转化为一维搜索，并应用十种群启发式算法进行优化。
AI.result: 计算实验验证了该方法在凸/非凸障碍物场景中生成无碰撞路径的可行性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为离散地图路径规划和组合优化提供了新的快速算法设计思路。

authors_text: Yohai Trabelsi,Abhijin Adiga,Sarit Kraus,S. S. Ravi
title: Resource Allocation to Agents with Restrictions: Maximizing Likelihood with Minimum Compromise
title_zh: 向有限制的代理进行资源分配：以最小的妥协最大化可能性
abstract: Many scenarios where agents with restrictions compete for resources can be cast as maximum matching problems on bipartite graphs. Our focus is on resource allocation problems where agents may have restrictions that make them incompatible with some resources. We assume that a Principle chooses a maximum matching randomly so that each agent is matched to a resource with some probability. Agents would like to improve their chances of being matched by modifying their restrictions within certain limits. The Principle's goal is to advise an unsatisfied agent to relax its restrictions so that the total cost of relaxation is within a budget (chosen by the agent) and the increase in the probability of being assigned a resource is maximized. We establish hardness results for some variants of this budget-constrained maximization problem and present algorithmic results for other variants. We experimentally evaluate our methods on synthetic datasets as well as on two novel real-world datasets: a vacation activities dataset and a classrooms dataset.
summary: Many scenarios where agents with restrictions compete for resources can be cast as maximum matching problems on bipartite graphs. Our focus is on resource allocation problems where agents may have restrictions that make them incompatible with some resources. We assume that a Principle chooses a maximum matching randomly so that each agent is matched to a resource with some probability. Agents would like to improve their chances of being matched by modifying their restrictions within certain limits. The Principle's goal is to advise an unsatisfied agent to relax its restrictions so that the total cost of relaxation is within a budget (chosen by the agent) and the increase in the probability of being assigned a resource is maximized. We establish hardness results for some variants of this budget-constrained maximization problem and present algorithmic results for other variants. We experimentally evaluate our methods on synthetic datasets as well as on two novel real-world datasets: a vacation activities dataset and a classrooms dataset.
abstract_zh: 许多具有限制的代理竞争资源的场景可以转化为二分图上的最大匹配问题。我们的重点是资源分配问题，其中代理可能受到限制，导致它们与某些资源不兼容。我们假设原理随机选择最大匹配，以便每个代理以一定的概率与资源匹配。代理商希望通过在一定限度内修改其限制来提高匹配的机会。该原则的目标是建议不满意的代理放宽其限制，以便放宽的总成本在预算（由代理选择）内，并且被分配资源的概率的增加最大化。我们为这个预算受限的最大化问题的一些变体建立了硬度结果，并为其他变体提供了算法结果。我们在合成数据集以及两个新颖的现实数据集：假期活动数据集和教室数据集上实验评估了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在资源分配问题中，如何通过调整代理的限制条件以最大化匹配概率，同时满足预算约束。
AI.motivation: 在资源分配场景中，代理因限制条件无法匹配到资源，需在预算内调整限制以提高匹配概率，但该问题的复杂性和计算难度尚未明确。
AI.method: 将问题建模为二分图最大匹配，分析预算约束下的优化问题复杂性，提出算法解决部分变体，并在合成数据及现实数据集（如假期活动、教室分配）上验证方法。
AI.result: 证明了某些问题变体的计算难度，提出了针对其他变体的算法，并通过实验验证了方法在预算约束下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为资源分配问题提供了理论分析和算法解决方案，证明了问题的复杂性并展示了实际应用效果，为类似场景提供了参考。

search_text: Resource Allocation to Agents with Restrictions: Maximizing Likelihood with Minimum Compromise 向有限制的代理进行资源分配：以最小的妥协最大化可能性 Many scenarios where agents with restrictions compete for resources can be cast as maximum matching problems on bipartite graphs. Our focus is on resource allocation problems where agents may have restrictions that make them incompatible with some resources. We assume that a Principle chooses a maximum matching randomly so that each agent is matched to a resource with some probability. Agents would like to improve their chances of being matched by modifying their restrictions within certain limits. The Principle's goal is to advise an unsatisfied agent to relax its restrictions so that the total cost of relaxation is within a budget (chosen by the agent) and the increase in the probability of being assigned a resource is maximized. We establish hardness results for some variants of this budget-constrained maximization problem and present algorithmic results for other variants. We experimentally evaluate our methods on synthetic datasets as well as on two novel real-world datasets: a vacation activities dataset and a classrooms dataset. 许多具有限制的代理竞争资源的场景可以转化为二分图上的最大匹配问题。我们的重点是资源分配问题，其中代理可能受到限制，导致它们与某些资源不兼容。我们假设原理随机选择最大匹配，以便每个代理以一定的概率与资源匹配。代理商希望通过在一定限度内修改其限制来提高匹配的机会。该原则的目标是建议不满意的代理放宽其限制，以便放宽的总成本在预算（由代理选择）内，并且被分配资源的概率的增加最大化。我们为这个预算受限的最大化问题的一些变体建立了硬度结果，并为其他变体提供了算法结果。我们在合成数据集以及两个新颖的现实数据集：假期活动数据集和教室数据集上实验评估了我们的方法。 本文研究在资源分配问题中，如何通过调整代理的限制条件以最大化匹配概率，同时满足预算约束。 Yohai Trabelsi,Abhijin Adiga,Sarit Kraus,S. authors_text: Ze Wang,Kailun Yang,Hao Shi,Peng Li,Fei Gao,Jian Bai,Kaiwei Wang
title: LF-VISLAM: A SLAM Framework for Large Field-of-View Cameras with Negative Imaging Plane on Mobile Agents
title_zh: LF-VISLAM：移动代理上具有负成像平面的大视场相机的 SLAM 框架
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering (T-ASE). Extended version of IROS2022 paper arXiv:2202.12613. Code and dataset will be open-sourced at https://github.com/flysoaryun/LF-SLAM
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering (T-ASE). Extended version of IROS2022 paper arXiv:2202.12613. Code and dataset will be open-sourced at https://github.com/flysoaryun/LF-SLAM
abstract: Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) has become a crucial aspect in the fields of autonomous driving and robotics. One crucial component of visual SLAM is the Field-of-View (FoV) of the camera, as a larger FoV allows for a wider range of surrounding elements and features to be perceived. However, when the FoV of the camera reaches the negative half-plane, traditional methods for representing image feature points using [u,v,1]^T become ineffective. While the panoramic FoV is advantageous for loop closure, its benefits are not easily realized under large-attitude-angle differences where loop-closure frames cannot be easily matched by existing methods. As loop closure on wide-FoV panoramic data further comes with a large number of outliers, traditional outlier rejection methods are not directly applicable. To address these issues, we propose LF-VISLAM, a Visual Inertial SLAM framework for cameras with extremely Large FoV with loop closure. A three-dimensional vector with unit length is introduced to effectively represent feature points even on the negative half-plane. The attitude information of the SLAM system is leveraged to guide the feature point detection of the loop closure. Additionally, a new outlier rejection method based on the unit length representation is integrated into the loop closure module. We collect the PALVIO dataset using a Panoramic Annular Lens (PAL) system with an entire FoV of 360°x(40°~120°) and an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) for Visual Inertial Odometry (VIO) to address the lack of panoramic SLAM datasets. Experiments on the established PALVIO and public datasets show that the proposed LF-VISLAM outperforms state-of-the-art SLAM methods. Our code will be open-sourced at https://github.com/flysoaryun/LF-VISLAM.

One crucial component of visual SLAM is the Field-of-View (FoV) of the camera, as a larger FoV allows for a wider range of surrounding elements and features to be perceived. However, when the FoV of the camera reaches the negative half-plane, traditional methods for representing image feature points using [u,v,1]^T become ineffective. While the panoramic FoV is advantageous for loop closure, its benefits are not easily realized under large-attitude-angle differences where loop-closure frames cannot be easily matched by existing methods. As loop closure on wide-FoV panoramic data further comes with a large number of outliers, traditional outlier rejection methods are not directly applicable. To address these issues, we propose LF-VISLAM, a Visual Inertial SLAM framework for cameras with extremely Large FoV with loop closure. A three-dimensional vector with unit length is introduced to effectively represent feature points even on the negative half-plane. The attitude information of the SLAM system is leveraged to guide the feature point detection of the loop closure. Additionally, a new outlier rejection method based on the unit length representation is integrated into the loop closure module. We collect the PALVIO dataset using a Panoramic Annular Lens (PAL) system with an entire FoV of 360°x(40°~120°) and an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) for Visual Inertial Odometry (VIO) to address the lack of panoramic SLAM datasets. Experiments on the established PALVIO and public datasets show that the proposed LF-VISLAM outperforms state-of-the-art SLAM methods. Our code will be open-sourced at https://github.com/flysoaryun/LF-VISLAM.
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图（SLAM）已成为自动驾驶和机器人领域的一个重要方面。视觉 SLAM 的一个关键组成部分是相机的视场 (FoV)，因为更大的 FoV 可以感知更广泛的周围元素和特征。然而，当相机的 FoV 达到负半平面时，传统的使用 [u,v,1]^T 表示图像特征点的方法就变得无效了。虽然全景视场有利于环路闭合，但在大姿态角差异下，其优势并不容易实现，因为现有方法无法轻松匹配环路闭合帧。由于宽视场全景数据的闭环还存在大量异常值，传统的异常值剔除方法无法直接适用。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 LF-VISLAM，这是一种视觉惯性 SLAM 框架，适用于具有闭环功能的超大 FoV 相机。引入单位长度的三维向量，即使在负半平面上也能有效地表示特征点。利用SLAM系统的姿态信息来指导闭环的特征点检测。此外，基于单位长度表示的新异常值拒绝方法被集成到回环模块中。我们使用整个 FoV 为 360°x（40°~120°）的全景环形镜头（PAL）系统和用于视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的惯性测量单元（IMU）来收集 PALVIO 数据集，以解决全景 SLAM 数据集的缺乏。在已建立的 PALVIO 和公共数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的 LF-VISLAM 优于最先进的 SLAM 方法。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/flysoaryun/LF-VISLAM 开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LF-VISLAM，一种针对大视场角相机（包含负成像平面）的视觉惯性SLAM框架，解决传统方法在全景数据下的特征表示、回环检测和异常值剔除问题。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM方法在处理包含负成像平面的大视场角（如全景相机）时，特征点表示失效，回环匹配困难且异常值多，缺乏全景SLAM数据集制约算法验证。
AI.method: 引入单位长度三维向量表示负成像平面特征点，利用系统姿态引导回环特征检测，设计基于单位长度表示的异常值剔除方法，并构建包含360°×(40°~120°)视场的PALVIO数据集。
AI.result: 在PALVIO和公开数据集上实验表明，LF-VISLAM在定位精度和回环闭合成功率上优于现有先进SLAM方法。
AI.conclusion: LF-VISLAM通过创新特征表示和回环机制，有效解决了大视场角SLAM的关键问题，代码已开源。

search_text: LF-VISLAM: A SLAM Framework for Large Field-of-View Cameras with Negative Imaging Plane on Mobile Agents LF-VISLAM：移动代理上具有负成像平面的大视场相机的 SLAM 框架 Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) has become a crucial aspect in the fields of autonomous driving and robotics. One crucial component of visual SLAM is the Field-of-View (FoV) of the camera, as a larger FoV allows for a wider range of surrounding elements and features to be perceived. However, when the FoV of the camera reaches the negative half-plane, traditional methods for representing image feature points using [u,v,1]^T become ineffective. Experiments on the established PALVIO and public datasets show that the proposed LF-VISLAM outperforms state-of-the-art SLAM methods. authors_text: Sen Pei,Shixiong Xu,Xiaojie Jin
title: Exploring Domain Incremental Video Highlights Detection with the LiveFood Benchmark
title_zh: 使用 LiveFood 基准探索域增量视频亮点检测
comment: AAAI 2024
comments: AAAI 2024
abstract: Video highlights detection (VHD) is an active research field in computer vision, aiming to locate the most user-appealing clips given raw video inputs. However, most VHD methods are based on the closed world assumption, i.e., a fixed number of highlight categories is defined in advance and all training data are available beforehand. Consequently, existing methods have poor scalability with respect to increasing highlight domains and training data. To address above issues, we propose a novel video highlights detection method named Global Prototype Encoding (GPE) to learn incrementally for adapting to new domains via parameterized prototypes. To facilitate this new research direction, we collect a finely annotated dataset termed LiveFood, including over 5,100 live gourmet videos that consist of four domains: ingredients, cooking, presentation, and eating. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore video highlights detection in the incremental learning setting, opening up new land to apply VHD for practical scenarios where both the concerned highlight domains and training data increase over time. We demonstrate the effectiveness of GPE through extensive experiments. Notably, GPE surpasses popular domain incremental learning methods on LiveFood, achieving significant mAP improvements on all domains. Concerning the classic datasets, GPE also yields comparable performance as previous arts. The code is available at: https://github.com/ForeverPs/IncrementalVHD_GPE.
summary: Video highlights detection (VHD) is an active research field in computer vision, aiming to locate the most user-appealing clips given raw video inputs. However, most VHD methods are based on the closed world assumption, i.e., a fixed number of highlight categories is defined in advance and all training data are available beforehand. Consequently, existing methods have poor scalability with respect to increasing highlight domains and training data. To address above issues, we propose a novel video highlights detection method named Global Prototype Encoding (GPE) to learn incrementally for adapting to new domains via parameterized prototypes. To facilitate this new research direction, we collect a finely annotated dataset termed LiveFood, including over 5,100 live gourmet videos that consist of four domains: ingredients, cooking, presentation, and eating. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore video highlights detection in the incremental learning setting, opening up new land to apply VHD for practical scenarios where both the concerned highlight domains and training data increase over time. We demonstrate the effectiveness of GPE through extensive experiments. Notably, GPE surpasses popular domain incremental learning methods on LiveFood, achieving significant mAP improvements on all domains. Concerning the classic datasets, GPE also yields comparable performance as previous arts. The code is available at: https://github.com/ForeverPs/IncrementalVHD_GPE.
abstract_zh: 视频亮点检测 (VHD) 是计算机视觉领域的一个活跃研究领域，旨在根据原始视频输入找到最吸引用户的剪辑。然而，大多数VHD方法都是基于封闭世界假设，即预先定义固定数量的高光类别，并且所有训练数据都是预先可用的。因此，现有方法对于增加亮点域和训练数据而言可扩展性较差。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种名为全局原型编码（GPE）的新型视频亮点检测方法，通过参数化原型增量学习以适应新领域。为了促进这一新的研究方向，我们收集了一个名为 LiveFood 的精细注释数据集，其中包括超过 5,100 个实时美食视频，涵盖四个领域：食材、烹饪、演示和饮食。据我们所知，这是第一个在增量学习环境中探索视频亮点检测的工作，为将 VHD 应用到相关亮点域和训练数据随着时间推移而增加的实际场景中开辟了新的领域。我们通过大量实验证明了 GPE 的有效性。值得注意的是，GPE 超越了 LiveFood 上流行的领域增量学习方法，在所有领域上实现了显着的 mAP 改进。关于经典数据集，GPE 也产生了与以前的技术相当的性能。该代码位于：https://github.com/ForeverPs/IncrementalVHD_GPE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增量学习的视频高光检测方法GPE，并构建了LiveFood数据集以应对新领域和数据增长的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有VHD方法基于封闭世界假设，预定义固定类别且训练数据有限，难以适应新增领域和持续增长的数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出全局原型编码（GPE）方法，利用参数化原型实现增量学习，并构建包含四个领域的LiveFood数据集（5100个视频）以支持增量学习研究。
AI.result: 实验表明，GPE在LiveFood数据集上所有领域均显著提升mAP，且在经典数据集上表现与现有方法相当。
AI.conclusion: GPE方法有效解决了增量学习中的领域扩展问题，为实际场景中动态增长的高光检测需求提供了新方向。

search_text: Exploring Domain Incremental Video Highlights Detection with the LiveFood Benchmark 使用 LiveFood 基准探索域增量视频亮点检测 Video highlights detection (VHD) is an active research field in computer vision, aiming to locate the most user-appealing clips given raw video inputs. However, most VHD methods are based on the closed world assumption, i.e., a fixed number of highlight categories is defined in advance and all training data are available beforehand. Consequently, existing methods have poor scalability with respect to increasing highlight domains and training data. To address above issues, we propose a novel video highlights detection method named Global Prototype Encoding (GPE) to learn incrementally for adapting to new domains via parameterized prototypes. To facilitate this new research direction, we collect a finely annotated dataset termed LiveFood, including over 5,100 live gourmet videos that consist of four domains: ingredients, cooking, presentation, and eating. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore video highlights detection in the incremental learning setting, opening up new land to apply VHD for practical scenarios where both the concerned highlight domains and training data increase over time. We demonstrate the effectiveness of GPE through extensive experiments. Notably, GPE surpasses popular domain incremental learning methods on LiveFood, achieving significant mAP improvements on all domains. Concerning the classic datasets, GPE also yields comparable performance as previous arts. The code is available at: https://github.com/ForeverPs/IncrementalVHD_GPE. 视频亮点检测 (VHD) 是计算机视觉领域的一个活跃研究领域，旨在根据原始视频输入找到最吸引用户的剪辑。然而，大多数VHD方法都是基于封闭世界假设，即预先定义固定数量的高光类别，并且所有训练数据都是预先可用的。因此，现有方法对于增加亮点域和训练数据而言可扩展性较差。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种名为全局原型编码（GPE）的新型视频亮点检测方法，通过参数化原型增量学习以适应新领域。为了促进这一新的研究方向，我们收集了一个名为 LiveFood 的精细注释数据集，其中包括超过 5,100 个实时美食视频，涵盖四个领域：食材、烹饪、演示和饮食。据我们所知，这是第一个在增量学习环境中探索视频亮点检测的工作，为将 VHD 应用到相关亮点域和训练数据随着时间推移而增加的实际场景中开辟了新的领域。我们通过大量实验证明了 GPE 的有效性。值得注意的是，GPE 超越了 LiveFood 上流行的领域增量学习方法，在所有领域上实现了显着的 mAP 改进。关于经典数据集，GPE 也产生了与以前的技术相当的性能。该代码位于：https://github.com/ForeverPs/IncrementalVHD_GPE。 本文提出了一种增量学习的视频高光检测方法GPE，并构建了LiveFood数据集以应对新领域和数据增长的挑战。 Sen Pei,Shixiong Xu,Xiaojie Jin cs.CV

authors_text: Yiwen Li,Yunguan Fu,Iani Gayo,Qianye Yang,Zhe Min,Shaheer Saeed,Wen Yan,Yipei Wang,J. Alison Noble,Mark Emberton,Matthew J. Clarkson,Henkjan Huisman,Dean Barratt,Victor Adrian Prisacariu,Yipeng Hu
title: Prototypical few-shot segmentation for cross-institution male pelvic structures with spatial registration
title_zh: 具有空间配准的跨机构男性骨盆结构的原型少镜头分割
comment: accepted by Medical Image Analysis
comments: accepted by Medical Image Analysis
abstract: The prowess that makes few-shot learning desirable in medical image analysis is the efficient use of the support image data, which are labelled to classify or segment new classes, a task that otherwise requires substantially more training images and expert annotations. This work describes a fully 3D prototypical few-shot segmentation algorithm, such that the trained networks can be effectively adapted to clinically interesting structures that are absent in training, using only a few labelled images from a different institute. First, to compensate for the widely recognised spatial variability between institutions in episodic adaptation of novel classes, a novel spatial registration mechanism is integrated into prototypical learning, consisting of a segmentation head and an spatial alignment module. Second, to assist the training with observed imperfect alignment, support mask conditioning module is proposed to further utilise the annotation available from the support images. Extensive experiments are presented in an application of segmenting eight anatomical structures important for interventional planning, using a data set of 589 pelvic T2-weighted MR images, acquired at seven institutes. The results demonstrate the efficacy in each of the 3D formulation, the spatial registration, and the support mask conditioning, all of which made positive contributions independently or collectively. Compared with the previously proposed 2D alternatives, the few-shot segmentation performance was improved with statistical significance, regardless whether the support data come from the same or different institutes.
summary: The prowess that makes few-shot learning desirable in medical image analysis is the efficient use of the support image data, which are labelled to classify or segment new classes, a task that otherwise requires substantially more training images and expert annotations. This work describes a fully 3D prototypical few-shot segmentation algorithm, such that the trained networks can be effectively adapted to clinically interesting structures that are absent in training, using only a few labelled images from a different institute. First, to compensate for the widely recognised spatial variability between institutions in episodic adaptation of novel classes, a novel spatial registration mechanism is integrated into prototypical learning, consisting of a segmentation head and an spatial alignment module. Second, to assist the training with observed imperfect alignment, support mask conditioning module is proposed to further utilise the annotation available from the support images. Extensive experiments are presented in an application of segmenting eight anatomical structures important for interventional planning, using a data set of 589 pelvic T2-weighted MR images, acquired at seven institutes. The results demonstrate the efficacy in each of the 3D formulation, the spatial registration, and the support mask conditioning, all of which made positive contributions independently or collectively. Compared with the previously proposed 2D alternatives, the few-shot segmentation performance was improved with statistical significance, regardless whether the support data come from the same or different institutes.
abstract_zh: 在医学图像分析中，少样本学习的优势在于有效利用支持图像数据，这些数据被标记以对新类别进行分类或分割，否则这项任务需要更多的训练图像和专家注释。这项工作描述了一种完全 3D 原型的少镜头分割算法，这样训练后的网络可以有效地适应训练中缺乏的临床有趣的结构，仅使用来自不同机构的一些标记图像。首先，为了补偿新类别的情景适应中机构之间广泛认可的空间变异性，将一种新颖的空间配准机制集成到原型学习中，该机制由分割头和空间对齐模块组成。其次，为了协助训练观察到的不完美对齐，提出了支持掩模调节模块以进一步利用支持图像中可用的注释。使用在 7 个研究所采集的 589 张骨盆 T2 加权 MR 图像数据集，在分割对介入计划至关重要的 8 个解剖结构的应用中进行了广泛的实验。结果证明了 3D 配方、空间配准和支撑掩模调节中每项的功效，所有这些都独立或共同做出了积极贡献。与之前提出的 2D 替代方案相比，无论支持数据来自相同还是不同的机构，少镜头分割性能都有统计显着性的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合空间配准的全3D原型少样本分割算法，用于跨机构男性骨盆结构的医学图像分割。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像分割需要大量标注数据，而少样本学习可利用少量支持图像适应新结构。跨机构数据存在空间差异，需解决配准问题以提高分割效果。
AI.method: 设计包含分割头与空间对齐模块的3D原型网络，并引入支持掩码条件模块以利用支持图像标注信息，解决跨机构数据配准与标注不完善问题。
AI.result: 在7个机构的589例骨盆MRI数据上分割8个解剖结构，3D结构、空间配准和支持掩码条件均显著提升性能，优于2D方法且支持数据来源无关。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过空间配准与支持掩码条件模块有效提升少样本分割性能，为跨机构医学图像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: El Houcine Bergou,Konstantin Burlachenko,Aritra Dutta,Peter Richtárik
title: Personalized Federated Learning with Communication Compression
title_zh: 具有通信压缩的个性化联邦学习
comment: 19 pages, 11 figure, federate learning
comments: 19 pages, 11 figure, federate learning
abstract: In contrast to training traditional machine learning (ML) models in data centers, federated learning (FL) trains ML models over local datasets contained on resource-constrained heterogeneous edge devices. Existing FL algorithms aim to learn a single global model for all participating devices, which may not be helpful to all devices participating in the training due to the heterogeneity of the data across the devices. Recently, Hanzely and Richtárik (2020) proposed a new formulation for training personalized FL models aimed at balancing the trade-off between the traditional global model and the local models that could be trained by individual devices using their private data only. They derived a new algorithm, called Loopless Gradient Descent (L2GD), to solve it and showed that this algorithms leads to improved communication complexity guarantees in regimes when more personalization is required. In this paper, we equip their L2GD algorithm with a bidirectional compression mechanism to further reduce the communication bottleneck between the local devices and the server. Unlike other compression-based algorithms used in the FL-setting, our compressed L2GD algorithm operates on a probabilistic communication protocol, where communication does not happen on a fixed schedule. Moreover, our compressed L2GD algorithm maintains a similar convergence rate as vanilla SGD without compression. To empirically validate the efficiency of our algorithm, we perform diverse numerical experiments on both convex and non-convex problems and using various compression techniques.
summary: In contrast to training traditional machine learning (ML) models in data centers, federated learning (FL) trains ML models over local datasets contained on resource-constrained heterogeneous edge devices. Existing FL algorithms aim to learn a single global model for all participating devices, which may not be helpful to all devices participating in the training due to the heterogeneity of the data across the devices. Recently, Hanzely and Richtárik (2020) proposed a new formulation for training personalized FL models aimed at balancing the trade-off between the traditional global model and the local models that could be trained by individual devices using their private data only. They derived a new algorithm, called Loopless Gradient Descent (L2GD), to solve it and showed that this algorithms leads to improved communication complexity guarantees in regimes when more personalization is required. In this paper, we equip their L2GD algorithm with a bidirectional compression mechanism to further reduce the communication bottleneck between the local devices and the server. Unlike other compression-based algorithms used in the FL-setting, our compressed L2GD algorithm operates on a probabilistic communication protocol, where communication does not happen on a fixed schedule. Moreover, our compressed L2GD algorithm maintains a similar convergence rate as vanilla SGD without compression. To empirically validate the efficiency of our algorithm, we perform diverse numerical experiments on both convex and non-convex problems and using various compression techniques.
abstract_zh: 与在数据中心训练传统机器学习 (ML) 模型相比，联邦学习 (FL) 在资源受限的异构边缘设备上包含的本地数据集上训练 ML 模型。现有的 FL 算法旨在为所有参与设备学习单一全局模型，由于跨设备数据的异构性，这可能对所有参与训练的设备没有帮助。最近，Hanzely 和 Richtárik（2020）提出了一种用于训练个性化 FL 模型的新公式，旨在平衡传统全局模型和可由单个设备仅使用其私有数据进行训练的本地模型之间的权衡。他们导出了一种称为无环梯度下降（L2GD）的新算法来解决这个问题，并表明，当需要更多个性化时，该算法可以提高制度中的通信复杂性保证。在本文中，我们为他们的L2GD算法配备了双向压缩机制，以进一步减少本地设备和服务器之间的通信瓶颈。与 FL 设置中使用的其他基于压缩的算法不同，我们的压缩 L2GD 算法在概率通信协议上运行，其中通信不会按固定时间表进行。此外，我们的压缩 L2GD 算法保持了与未压缩的普通 SGD 相似的收敛速度。为了凭经验验证我们算法的效率，我们对凸问题和非凸问题进行了不同的数值实验，并使用了各种压缩技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合双向通信压缩机制的无循环梯度下降算法（L2GD），以解决个性化联邦学习中的通信瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习训练单一全局模型无法适应设备间数据异构性，而现有个性化方法在需要高个性化时通信开销过大。
AI.method: 在L2GD算法中引入双向压缩机制，采用概率通信协议替代固定通信计划，同时保持与标准SGD相近的收敛速度。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在凸和非凸问题上均能有效降低通信成本，且兼容多种压缩技术。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保证收敛效率的同时显著优化了个性化联邦学习的通信性能。

search_text: Personalized Federated Learning with Communication Compression 具有通信压缩的个性化联邦学习 In contrast to training traditional machine learning (ML) models in data centers, federated learning (FL) trains ML models over local datasets contained on resource-constrained heterogeneous edge devices. Existing FL algorithms aim to learn a single global model for all participating devices, which may not be helpful to all devices participating in the training due to the heterogeneity of the data across the devices. Recently, Hanzely and Richtárik (2020) proposed a new formulation for training personalized FL models aimed at balancing the trade-off between the traditional global model and the local models that could be trained by individual devices using their private data only. They derived a new algorithm, called Loopless Gradient Descent (L2GD), to solve it and showed that this algorithms leads to improved communication complexity guarantees in regimes when more personalization is required. In this paper, we equip their L2GD algorithm with a bidirectional compression mechanism to further reduce the communication bottleneck between the local devices and the server. Unlike other compression-based algorithms used in the FL-setting, our compressed L2GD algorithm operates on a probabilistic communication protocol, where communication does not happen on a fixed schedule. Moreover, our compressed L2GD algorithm maintains a similar convergence rate as vanilla SGD without compression. To empirically validate the efficiency of our algorithm, we perform diverse numerical experiments on both convex and non-convex problems and using various compression techniques. 与在数据中心训练传统机器学习 (ML) 模型相比，联邦学习 (FL) 在资源受限的异构边缘设备上包含的本地数据集上训练 ML 模型。现有的 FL 算法旨在为所有参与设备学习单一全局模型，由于跨设备数据的异构性，这可能对所有参与训练的设备没有帮助。最近，Hanzely 和 Richtárik（2020）提出了一种用于训练个性化 FL 模型的新公式，旨在平衡传统全局模型和可由单个设备仅使用其私有数据进行训练的本地模型之间的权衡。他们导出了一种称为无环梯度下降（L2GD）的新算法来解决这个问题，并表明，当需要更多个性化时，该算法可以提高制度中的通信复杂性保证。在本文中，我们为他们的L2GD算法配备了双向压缩机制，以进一步减少本地设备和服务器之间的通信瓶颈。与 FL 设置中使用的其他基于压缩的算法不同，我们的压缩 L2GD 算法在概率通信协议上运行，其中通信不会按固定时间表进行。此外，我们的压缩 L2GD 算法保持了与未压缩的普通 SGD 相似的收敛速度。为了凭经验验证我们算法的效率，我们对凸问题和非凸问题进行了不同的数值实验，并使用了各种压缩技术。 本文提出一种结合双向通信压缩机制的无循环梯度下降算法（L2GD），以解决个性化联邦学习中的通信瓶颈问题。 El Houcine Bergou,Konstantin Burlachenko,Aritra Dutta,Peter Richtárik cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC,math.OC

authors_text: Akanksha Agrawal,Soumita Hait,Amer E. Mouawad
title: On finding short reconfiguration sequences between independent sets
title_zh: 关于寻找独立集之间的短重配置序列
abstract: Assume we are given a graph $G$, two independent sets $S$ and $T$ in $G$ of size $k \geq 1$, and a positive integer $\ell \geq 1$. The goal is to decide whether there exists a sequence $\langle I_0, I_1, ..., I_\ell \rangle$ of independent sets such that for all $j \in \{0,\ldots,\ell-1\}$ the set $I_j$ is an independent set of size $k$, $I_0 = S$, $I_\ell = T$, and $I_{j+1}$ is obtained from $I_j$ by a predetermined reconfiguration rule. We consider two reconfiguration rules. Intuitively, we view each independent set as a collection of tokens placed on the vertices of the graph. Then, the Token Sliding Optimization (TSO) problem asks whether there exists a sequence of at most $\ell$ steps that transforms $S$ into $T$, where at each step we are allowed to slide one token from a vertex to an unoccupied neighboring vertex. In the Token Jumping Optimization (TJO) problem, at each step, we are allowed to jump one token from a vertex to any other unoccupied vertex of the graph. Both TSO and TJO are known to be fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by $\ell$ on nowhere dense classes of graphs. In this work, we show that both problems are fixed-parameter tractable for parameter $k + \ell + d$ on $d$-degenerate graphs as well as for parameter $|M| + \ell + Δ$ on graphs having a modulator $M$ whose deletion leaves a graph of maximum degree $Δ$. We complement these result by showing that for parameter $\ell$ alone both problems become W[1]-hard already on $2$-degenerate graphs. Our positive result makes use of the notion of independence covering families introduced by Lokshtanov et al. Finally, we show that using such families one can obtain a simpler and unified algorithm for the standard Token Jumping Reachability problem parameterized by $k$ on both degenerate and nowhere dense classes of graphs.

The goal is to decide whether there exists a sequence $\langle I_0, I_1, ..., I_\ell \rangle$ of independent sets such that for all $j \in \{0,\ldots,\ell-1\}$ the set $I_j$ is an independent set of size $k$, $I_0 = S$, $I_\ell = T$, and $I_{j+1}$ is obtained from $I_j$ by a predetermined reconfiguration rule. We consider two reconfiguration rules. Intuitively, we view each independent set as a collection of tokens placed on the vertices of the graph. Then, the Token Sliding Optimization (TSO) problem asks whether there exists a sequence of at most $\ell$ steps that transforms $S$ into $T$, where at each step we are allowed to slide one token from a vertex to an unoccupied neighboring vertex. In the Token Jumping Optimization (TJO) problem, at each step, we are allowed to jump one token from a vertex to any other unoccupied vertex of the graph. Both TSO and TJO are known to be fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by $\ell$ on nowhere dense classes of graphs. In this work, we show that both problems are fixed-parameter tractable for parameter $k + \ell + d$ on $d$-degenerate graphs as well as for parameter $|M| + \ell + Δ$ on graphs having a modulator $M$ whose deletion leaves a graph of maximum degree $Δ$. We complement these result by showing that for parameter $\ell$ alone both problems become W[1]-hard already on $2$-degenerate graphs. Finally, we show that using such families one can obtain a simpler and unified algorithm for the standard Token Jumping Reachability problem parameterized by $k$ on both degenerate and nowhere dense classes of graphs.
abstract_zh: 假设给定一个图 $G$、$G$ 中大小为 $k \geq 1$ 的两个独立集合 $S$ 和 $T$，以及一个正整数 $\ell \geq 1$。目标是确定是否存在独立集合的序列$\langle I_0, I_1, ..., I_\ell \rangle$，使得对于\{0,\ldots,\ell-1\}$中的所有$j \in，集合$I_j$是大小为$k$的独立集合，$I_0 = S$，$I_\ell = T$，并且$I_{j+1}$是通过预定的重新配置从$I_j$获得的规则。我们考虑两个重新配置规则。直观上，我们将每个独立集视为放置在图的顶点上的标记的集合。然后，令牌滑动优化（TSO）问题询问是否存在一系列最多 $\ell$ 步骤将 $S$ 转换为 $T$，其中每一步我们都允许将一个令牌从一个顶点滑动到一个未占用的相邻顶点。在令牌跳跃优化（TJO）问题中，在每一步，我们都可以将一个令牌从一个顶点跳跃到图的任何其他未占用的顶点。众所周知，当在无密集图类上通过 $\ell$ 进行参数化时，TSO 和 TJO 都是固定参数易于处理的。在这项工作中，我们证明对于 $d$ 退化图上的参数 $k + \ell + d$ 以及参数 $|M| 来说，这两个问题都是固定参数可处理的。 + \ell + Δ$ 在具有调制器 $M$ 的图上，其删除留下最大度 $Δ$ 的图。我们通过表明仅对于参数 $\ell$ 来说，这两个问题在 $2$ 退化图上就已经成为 W[1]-hard 问题来补充这些结果。我们的积极结果利用了 Lokshtanov 等人提出的涵盖家庭的独立概念。最后，我们表明，使用这样的族，我们可以获得一种更简单且统一的算法，用于在退化和无处稠密类图上由 $k$ 参数化的标准令牌跳跃可达性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在给定图的两个独立集之间是否存在符合特定重配置规则的短序列转换问题。
AI.motivation: 探索独立集重配置问题的参数化复杂性，为实际应用提供高效算法框架。
AI.method: 采用参数化复杂性分析，结合独立覆盖族技术，针对不同图类设计固定参数可解算法。
AI.result: 证明TSO和TJO问题在d-退化图及含模数器的图上参数k+ℓ+d/|M|+ℓ+Δ可解，且仅参数ℓ时在2-退化图上W[1]-难。
AI.conclusion: 提出统一算法框架，简化标准Token Jumping可达性问题求解，并揭示参数选择对问题复杂性的影响。

authors_text: Federico Tavella,Aphrodite Galata,Angelo Cangelosi
title: Signs of Language: Embodied Sign Language Fingerspelling Acquisition from Demonstrations for Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: 语言符号：从人机交互演示中获取具身手语手指拼写
abstract: Learning fine-grained movements is a challenging topic in robotics, particularly in the context of robotic hands. One specific instance of this challenge is the acquisition of fingerspelling sign language in robots. In this paper, we propose an approach for learning dexterous motor imitation from video examples without additional information. To achieve this, we first build a URDF model of a robotic hand with a single actuator for each joint. We then leverage pre-trained deep vision models to extract the 3D pose of the hand from RGB videos. Next, using state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms for motion imitation (namely, proximal policy optimization and soft actor-critic), we train a policy to reproduce the movement extracted from the demonstrations. We identify the optimal set of hyperparameters for imitation based on a reference motion. Finally, we demonstrate the generalizability of our approach by testing it on six different tasks, corresponding to fingerspelled letters. Our results show that our approach is able to successfully imitate these fine-grained movements without additional information, highlighting its potential for real-world applications in robotics.
summary: Learning fine-grained movements is a challenging topic in robotics, particularly in the context of robotic hands. One specific instance of this challenge is the acquisition of fingerspelling sign language in robots. In this paper, we propose an approach for learning dexterous motor imitation from video examples without additional information. To achieve this, we first build a URDF model of a robotic hand with a single actuator for each joint. We then leverage pre-trained deep vision models to extract the 3D pose of the hand from RGB videos. Next, using state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms for motion imitation (namely, proximal policy optimization and soft actor-critic), we train a policy to reproduce the movement extracted from the demonstrations. We identify the optimal set of hyperparameters for imitation based on a reference motion. Finally, we demonstrate the generalizability of our approach by testing it on six different tasks, corresponding to fingerspelled letters. Our results show that our approach is able to successfully imitate these fine-grained movements without additional information, highlighting its potential for real-world applications in robotics.
abstract_zh: 学习细粒度的运动是机器人技术中的一个具有挑战性的话题，特别是在机器人手的背景下。这一挑战的一个具体例子是机器人掌握手指拼写手语。在本文中，我们提出了一种在没有附加信息的情况下从视频示例中学习灵巧运动模仿的方法。为了实现这一目标，我们首先构建一个机器人手的 URDF 模型，每个关节都有一个执行器。然后，我们利用预先训练的深度视觉模型从 RGB 视频中提取手部的 3D 姿势。接下来，使用最先进的运动模仿强化学习算法（即近端策略优化和软演员批评家），我们训练一个策略来重现从演示中提取的运动。我们根据参考运动确定用于模仿的最佳超参数集。最后，我们通过在对应于手写字母的六个不同任务上进行测试来证明我们的方法的普遍性。我们的结果表明，我们的方法能够在没有额外信息的情况下成功模仿这些细粒度的运动，突显了其在机器人技术中实际应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种通过视频示例学习手语手指拼写的机器人模仿学习方法，无需额外信息。
AI.motivation: 精细动作学习在机器人中具有挑战性，尤其在手语拼写任务中，传统方法依赖额外传感器数据，而本文旨在开发无需额外信息的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建单执行器关节的机械手URDF模型，利用预训练视觉模型从RGB视频中提取3D手部姿势，采用PPO和SAC强化学习算法训练模仿策略，并基于参考动作优化超参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能在六个手指拼写任务中成功模仿精细动作，无需额外信息，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了在真实场景中应用的潜力，为机器人的人机交互提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Signs of Language: Embodied Sign Language Fingerspelling Acquisition from Demonstrations for Human-Robot Interaction 语言符号：从人机交互演示中获取具身手语手指拼写 Learning fine-grained movements is a challenging topic in robotics, particularly in the context of robotic hands. One specific instance of this challenge is the acquisition of fingerspelling sign language in robots. In this paper, we propose an approach for learning dexterous motor imitation from video examples without additional information. To achieve this, we first build a URDF model of a robotic hand with a single actuator for each joint. We then leverage pre-trained deep vision models to extract the 3D pose of the hand from RGB videos. Next, using state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms for motion imitation (namely, proximal policy optimization and soft actor-critic), we train a policy to reproduce the movement extracted from the demonstrations. We identify the optimal set of hyperparameters for imitation based on a reference motion. Finally, we demonstrate the generalizability of our approach by testing it on six different tasks, corresponding to fingerspelled letters. Our results show that our approach is able to successfully imitate these fine-grained movements without additional information, highlighting its potential for real-world applications in robotics. 学习细粒度的运动是机器人技术中的一个具有挑战性的话题，特别是在机器人手的背景下。这一挑战的一个具体例子是机器人掌握手指拼写手语。在本文中，我们提出了一种在没有附加信息的情况下从视频示例中学习灵巧运动模仿的方法。为了实现这一目标，我们首先构建一个机器人手的 URDF 模型，每个关节都有一个执行器。然后，我们利用预先训练的深度视觉模型从 RGB 视频中提取手部的 3D 姿势。接下来，使用最先进的运动模仿强化学习算法（即近端策略优化和软演员批评家），我们训练一个策略来重现从演示中提取的运动。我们根据参考运动确定用于模仿的最佳超参数集。最后，我们通过在对应于手写字母的六个不同任务上进行测试来证明我们的方法的普遍性。我们的结果表明，我们的方法能够在没有额外信息的情况下成功模仿这些细粒度的运动，突显了其在机器人技术中实际应用的潜力。 本论文提出了一种通过视频示例学习手语手指拼写的机器人模仿学习方法，无需额外信息。 Federico Tavella,Aphrodite Galata,Angelo Cangelosi cs.RO,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Daniel Lizzit,David Esseni
title: Operation and Design of Ferroelectric FETs for a BEOL Compatible Device Implementation
title_zh: 用于 BEOL 兼容器件实现的铁电 FET 的操作和设计
comment: ef:ESSDERC 2021 - IEEE 51st European Solid-State Device Research Conference (ESSDERC), 2021, pp. 215-218
comments: ef:ESSDERC 2021 - IEEE 51st European Solid-State Device Research Conference (ESSDERC), 2021, pp. 215-218
abstract: We present a study based on numerical simulations and comparative analysis of recent experimental data concerning the operation and design of FeFETs. Our results show that a proper consideration of charge trapping in the ferroelectric-dielectric stack is indispensable to reconcile simulations with experiments, and to attain the desired hysteretic behavior of the current-voltage characteristics. Then we analyze a few design options for polysilicon channel FeFETs and, in particular, we study the influence of the channel thickness and doping concentration on the memory window, and on the ratio between the polarization dependent, high and low resistance state.
summary: We present a study based on numerical simulations and comparative analysis of recent experimental data concerning the operation and design of FeFETs. Our results show that a proper consideration of charge trapping in the ferroelectric-dielectric stack is indispensable to reconcile simulations with experiments, and to attain the desired hysteretic behavior of the current-voltage characteristics. Then we analyze a few design options for polysilicon channel FeFETs and, in particular, we study the influence of the channel thickness and doping concentration on the memory window, and on the ratio between the polarization dependent, high and low resistance state.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项基于数值模拟和对有关 FeFET 操作和设计的最新实验数据的比较分析的研究。我们的结果表明，为了协调模拟与实验以及获得所需的电流-电压特性的滞后行为，正确考虑铁电-电介质堆栈中的电荷俘获是必不可少的。然后，我们分析了多晶硅沟道 FeFET 的一些设计方案，特别是，我们研究了沟道厚度和掺杂浓度对存储窗口的影响，以及对极化相关、高电阻状态和低电阻状态之间的比率的影响。

AI.tldr: 研究铁电场效应晶体管（FeFETs）的操作与设计，以实现与后端工艺（BEOL）兼容的器件。
AI.motivation: 为了解决模拟与实验结果不一致的问题，并优化FeFETs的性能以满足BEOL工艺要求。
AI.method: 通过数值模拟和实验数据对比分析，研究FeFETs的电荷捕获效应及设计参数的影响。
AI.result: 发现电荷捕获对滞后行为至关重要，并确定了沟道厚度和掺杂浓度对记忆窗口及电阻态比的影响。
AI.conclusion: 需综合考虑电荷捕获效应以优化FeFETs设计，实现与BEOL工艺兼容的高性能器件。

authors_text: Sabrina Guastavino,Francesco Marchetti,Federico Benvenuto,Cristina Campi,Michele Piana
title: Operational solar flare forecasting via video-based deep learning
title_zh: 通过基于视频的深度学习进行可操作的太阳耀斑预测
abstract: Operational flare forecasting aims at providing predictions that can be used to make decisions, typically at a daily scale, about the space weather impacts of flare occurrence. This study shows that video-based deep learning can be used for operational purposes when the training and validation sets used for the network optimization are generated while accounting for the periodicity of the solar cycle. Specifically, the paper describes an algorithm that can be applied to build up sets of active regions that are balanced according to the flare class rates associated to a specific cycle phase. These sets are used to train and validate a Long-term Recurrent Convolutional Network made of a combination of a convolutional neural network and a Long-Short Memory network. The reliability of this approach is assessed in the case of two prediction windows containing the solar storm of March 2015 and September 2017, respectively.
summary: Operational flare forecasting aims at providing predictions that can be used to make decisions, typically at a daily scale, about the space weather impacts of flare occurrence. This study shows that video-based deep learning can be used for operational purposes when the training and validation sets used for the network optimization are generated while accounting for the periodicity of the solar cycle. Specifically, the paper describes an algorithm that can be applied to build up sets of active regions that are balanced according to the flare class rates associated to a specific cycle phase. These sets are used to train and validate a Long-term Recurrent Convolutional Network made of a combination of a convolutional neural network and a Long-Short Memory network. The reliability of this approach is assessed in the case of two prediction windows containing the solar storm of March 2015 and September 2017, respectively.
abstract_zh: 业务耀斑预报旨在提供可用于做出有关耀斑发生的空间天气影响的决策（通常是每日规模）的预测。这项研究表明，当生成用于网络优化的训练和验证集并考虑太阳周期的周期性时，基于视频的深度学习可用于操作目的。具体来说，本文描述了一种算法，该算法可用于构建根据与特定周期阶段相关的耀斑类别率进行平衡的活动区域组。这些集合用于训练和验证由卷积神经网络和长短期记忆网络组合而成的长期循环卷积网络。该方法的可靠性在分别包含 2015 年 3 月和 2017 年 9 月太阳风暴的两个预测窗口的情况下进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视频的深度学习方法用于操作性太阳耀斑预测，通过考虑太阳周期性生成训练数据集，并采用结合卷积神经网络与长短期记忆网络的长期递归卷积网络进行建模。
AI.motivation: 传统太阳耀斑预测方法在考虑太阳周期变化时存在不足，需开发更可靠的操作性预测模型以支持空间天气决策。
AI.method: 构建基于太阳周期相位平衡的活动区域数据集，利用包含卷积神经网络和长短期记忆网络的长期递归卷积网络进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 该方法在2015年3月和2017年9月两次太阳风暴预测中展现出可靠性，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合太阳周期特征与深度学习模型，提出的视频分析方法为操作性耀斑预测提供了可行方案。

Specifically, the paper describes an algorithm that can be applied to build up sets of active regions that are balanced according to the flare class rates associated to a specific cycle phase. These sets are used to train and validate a Long-term Recurrent Convolutional Network made of a combination of a convolutional neural network and a Long-Short Memory network. The reliability of this approach is assessed in the case of two prediction windows containing the solar storm of March 2015 and September 2017, respectively. 业务耀斑预报旨在提供可用于做出有关耀斑发生的空间天气影响的决策（通常是每日规模）的预测。这项研究表明，当生成用于网络优化的训练和验证集并考虑太阳周期的周期性时，基于视频的深度学习可用于操作目的。具体来说，本文描述了一种算法，该算法可用于构建根据与特定周期阶段相关的耀斑类别率进行平衡的活动区域组。这些集合用于训练和验证由卷积神经网络和长短期记忆网络组合而成的长期循环卷积网络。该方法的可靠性在分别包含 2015 年 3 月和 2017 年 9 月太阳风暴的两个预测窗口的情况下进行了评估。 本文提出基于视频的深度学习方法用于操作性太阳耀斑预测，通过考虑太阳周期性生成训练数据集，并采用结合卷积神经网络与长短期记忆网络的长期递归卷积网络进行建模。 Sabrina Guastavino,Francesco Marchetti,Federico Benvenuto,Cristina Campi,Michele Piana astro-ph.SR,cs.AI

authors_text: Shungo Fujii,Yasunori Ishii,Kazuki Kozuka,Tsubasa Hirakawa,Takayoshi Yamashita,Hironobu Fujiyoshi
title: Data Augmentation by Selecting Mixed Classes Considering Distance Between Classes
title_zh: 通过考虑类之间的距离选择混合类来增强数据
abstract: Data augmentation is an essential technique for improving recognition accuracy in object recognition using deep learning. Methods that generate mixed data from multiple data sets, such as mixup, can acquire new diversity that is not included in the training data, and thus contribute significantly to accuracy improvement. However, since the data selected for mixing are randomly sampled throughout the training process, there are cases where appropriate classes or data are not selected. In this study, we propose a data augmentation method that calculates the distance between classes based on class probabilities and can select data from suitable classes to be mixed in the training process. Mixture data is dynamically adjusted according to the training trend of each class to facilitate training. The proposed method is applied in combination with conventional methods for generating mixed data. Evaluation experiments show that the proposed method improves recognition performance on general and long-tailed image recognition datasets.
summary: Data augmentation is an essential technique for improving recognition accuracy in object recognition using deep learning. Methods that generate mixed data from multiple data sets, such as mixup, can acquire new diversity that is not included in the training data, and thus contribute significantly to accuracy improvement. However, since the data selected for mixing are randomly sampled throughout the training process, there are cases where appropriate classes or data are not selected. In this study, we propose a data augmentation method that calculates the distance between classes based on class probabilities and can select data from suitable classes to be mixed in the training process. Mixture data is dynamically adjusted according to the training trend of each class to facilitate training. The proposed method is applied in combination with conventional methods for generating mixed data. Evaluation experiments show that the proposed method improves recognition performance on general and long-tailed image recognition datasets.
abstract_zh: 数据增强是使用深度学习提高对象识别精度的一项重要技术。从多个数据集生成混合数据的方法（例如 mixup）可以获得训练数据中未包含的新多样性，从而对准确性的提高做出显着贡献。然而，由于选择用于混合的数据是在整个训练过程中随机采样的，因此存在未选择适当的类或数据的情况。在本研究中，我们提出了一种数据增强方法，该方法根据类别概率计算类别之间的距离，并可以从合适的类别中选择数据在训练过程中进行混合。根据各班级的训练趋势动态调整混合数据，方便训练。所提出的方法与生成混合数据的传统方法结合应用。评估实验表明，该方法提高了在通用和长尾图像识别数据集上的识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类别间距离计算的数据增强方法，通过动态选择合适类别进行混合以提升图像识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统混合数据方法随机采样易导致无效混合，无法适应不同类别训练趋势，影响模型性能提升。
AI.method: 计算类别概率分布间的距离指标，根据训练动态选择相似度较低的类别进行数据混合，并与传统方法结合使用。
AI.result: 在通用和长尾分布图像数据集上均取得优于基线方法的识别准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过考虑类别间距离的动态混合策略能有效优化数据增强过程，尤其对长尾分布数据集具有显著性能提升效果。

authors_text: Adam Szwajcowski
title: Continuous head-related transfer function representation based on hyperspherical harmonics
title_zh: 基于超球面谐波的连续头部相关传递函数表示
comment: Submitted to Archives of Acoustics 4.06.2022
comments: Submitted to Archives of Acoustics 4.06.2022
abstract: Expressing head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) in spherical harmonic (SH) domain has been thoroughly studied as a method of obtaining continuity over space. However, HRTFs are functions not only of direction but also of frequency. This paper presents an extension of the SH-based method, utilizing hyperspherical harmonics (HSHs) to obtain an HRTF representation that is continuous over both space and frequency. The application of the HSH approximation results in a relatively small set of coefficients which can be decoded into HRTF values at any direction and frequency. The paper discusses results obtained by applying the method to magnitude spectra extracted from exemplary HRTF measurements. The HRTF representations based on SHs and HSHs exhibit similar reproduction accuracy, with the latter one featuring continuity over both space and frequency and requiring much lower number of coefficients. The developed HSH-based continuous functional model can serve multiple purposes, such as interpolation, compression or parametrization for machine-learning applications.
summary: Expressing head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) in spherical harmonic (SH) domain has been thoroughly studied as a method of obtaining continuity over space. However, HRTFs are functions not only of direction but also of frequency. This paper presents an extension of the SH-based method, utilizing hyperspherical harmonics (HSHs) to obtain an HRTF representation that is continuous over both space and frequency. The application of the HSH approximation results in a relatively small set of coefficients which can be decoded into HRTF values at any direction and frequency. The paper discusses results obtained by applying the method to magnitude spectra extracted from exemplary HRTF measurements. The HRTF representations based on SHs and HSHs exhibit similar reproduction accuracy, with the latter one featuring continuity over both space and frequency and requiring much lower number of coefficients. The developed HSH-based continuous functional model can serve multiple purposes, such as interpolation, compression or parametrization for machine-learning applications.
abstract_zh: 作为一种获得空间连续性的方法，在球谐 (SH) 域中表达头部相关传递函数 (HRTF) 已得到深入研究。然而，HRTF 不仅是方向的函数，也是频率的函数。本文提出了基于 SH 的方法的扩展，利用超球面谐波 (HSH) 来获得在空间和频率上连续的 HRTF 表示。 HSH 近似的应用产生了相对较小的系数集，可以将其解码为任何方向和频率的 HRTF 值。本文讨论了将该方法应用于从示例性 HRTF 测量中提取的幅度谱所获得的结果。基于 SH 和 HSH 的 HRTF 表示表现出相似的再现精度，后者具有空间和频率上的连续性，并且需要的系数数量要少得多。开发的基于 HSH 的连续函数模型可用于多种用途，例如机器学习应用的插值、压缩或参数化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于超球谐函数（HSH）的连续头相关传递函数（HRTF）表示方法，以实现空间和频率的双重连续性。
AI.motivation: 传统球谐函数（SH）方法仅能实现HRTF在空间方向的连续性，但HRTF同时依赖于方向和频率，需进一步扩展方法以兼顾频率连续性。
AI.method: 利用超球谐函数（HSH）扩展SH方法，将HRTF表示为同时连续于空间和频率的函数，通过系数编码实现任意方向和频率的HRTF解码。
AI.result: HSH方法在保持与SH方法相似重现精度的同时，显著减少系数数量，并实现空间与频率双重连续性，适用于插值、压缩及机器学习参数化。
AI.conclusion: HSH方法为HRTF提供了更紧凑且连续的函数模型，在多个应用场景中展现出优于传统SH方法的潜力。

authors_text: Sören Dittmer,David Erzmann,Henrik Harms,Peter Maass
title: SELTO: Sample-Efficient Learned Topology Optimization
title_zh: SELTO：样本高效的学习拓扑优化
comment: 25 pages, 10 figures, submitted to the International Journal for Numerical Methods in Engineering
comments: 25 pages, 10 figures, submitted to the International Journal for Numerical Methods in Engineering
abstract: Recent developments in Deep Learning (DL) suggest a vast potential for Topology Optimization (TO). However, while there are some promising attempts, the subfield still lacks a firm footing regarding basic methods and datasets. We aim to address both points. First, we explore physics-based preprocessing and equivariant networks to create sample-efficient components for TO DL pipelines. We evaluate them in a large-scale ablation study using end-to-end supervised training. The results demonstrate a drastic improvement in sample efficiency and the predictions' physical correctness. Second, to improve comparability and future progress, we publish the two first TO datasets containing problems and corresponding ground truth solutions.
summary: Recent developments in Deep Learning (DL) suggest a vast potential for Topology Optimization (TO). However, while there are some promising attempts, the subfield still lacks a firm footing regarding basic methods and datasets. We aim to address both points. First, we explore physics-based preprocessing and equivariant networks to create sample-efficient components for TO DL pipelines. We evaluate them in a large-scale ablation study using end-to-end supervised training. The results demonstrate a drastic improvement in sample efficiency and the predictions' physical correctness. Second, to improve comparability and future progress, we publish the two first TO datasets containing problems and corresponding ground truth solutions.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 的最新发展表明拓扑优化 (TO) 具有巨大潜力。然而，尽管有一些有希望的尝试，但该子领域在基本方法和数据集方面仍然缺乏坚实的基础。我们的目标是解决这两点。首先，我们探索基于物理的预处理和等变网络，为 TO DL 管道创建样本高效组件。我们使用端到端监督训练在大规模消融研究中评估它们。结果表明样本效率和预测的物理正确性有了显着提高。其次，为了提高可比性和未来的进展，我们发布了两个第一个 TO 数据集，其中包含问题和相应的地面实况解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SELTO方法，通过物理预处理和等变网络提升拓扑优化的样本效率，并发布首个拓扑优化数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习在拓扑优化中的应用缺乏成熟方法和标准化数据集，导致研究可比性差且进展受限。
AI.method: 结合物理预处理与等变神经网络设计样本高效组件，通过端到端监督训练进行大规模消融实验，并发布两个包含问题及真解的拓扑优化数据集。
AI.result: 实验显示样本效率显著提升，预测结果物理正确性增强，数据集为后续研究提供基准。
AI.conclusion: SELTO方法有效提升了深度学习在拓扑优化中的性能，数据集的发布将推动该领域标准化发展。

search_text: SELTO: Sample-Efficient Learned Topology Optimization SELTO：样本高效的学习拓扑优化 Recent developments in Deep Learning (DL) suggest a vast potential for Topology Optimization (TO). However, while there are some promising attempts, the subfield still lacks a firm footing regarding basic methods and datasets. We aim to address both points. First, we explore physics-based preprocessing and equivariant networks to create sample-efficient components for TO DL pipelines. We evaluate them in a large-scale ablation study using end-to-end supervised training. The results demonstrate a drastic improvement in sample efficiency and the predictions' physical correctness. Second, to improve comparability and future progress, we publish the two first TO datasets containing problems and corresponding ground truth solutions. 深度学习 (DL) 的最新发展表明拓扑优化 (TO) 具有巨大潜力。然而，尽管有一些有希望的尝试，但该子领域在基本方法和数据集方面仍然缺乏坚实的基础。我们的目标是解决这两点。首先，我们探索基于物理的预处理和等变网络，为 TO DL 管道创建样本高效组件。我们使用端到端监督训练在大规模消融研究中评估它们。结果表明样本效率和预测的物理正确性有了显着提高。其次，为了提高可比性和未来的进展，我们发布了两个第一个 TO 数据集，其中包含问题和相应的地面实况解决方案。 本文提出SELTO方法，通过物理预处理和等变网络提升拓扑优化的样本效率，并发布首个拓扑优化数据集。 Sören Dittmer,David Erzmann,Henrik Harms,Peter Maass cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Olivier Colliot,Elina Thibeau-Sutre,Ninon Burgos
title: Reproducibility in machine learning for medical imaging
title_zh: 医学成像机器学习的可重复性
abstract: Reproducibility is a cornerstone of science, as the replication of findings is the process through which they become knowledge. It is widely considered that many fields of science are undergoing a reproducibility crisis. This has led to the publications of various guidelines in order to improve research reproducibility. This didactic chapter intends at being an introduction to reproducibility for researchers in the field of machine learning for medical imaging. We first distinguish between different types of reproducibility. For each of them, we aim at defining it, at describing the requirements to achieve it and at discussing its utility. The chapter ends with a discussion on the benefits of reproducibility and with a plea for a non-dogmatic approach to this concept and its implementation in research practice.
summary: Reproducibility is a cornerstone of science, as the replication of findings is the process through which they become knowledge. It is widely considered that many fields of science are undergoing a reproducibility crisis. This has led to the publications of various guidelines in order to improve research reproducibility. This didactic chapter intends at being an introduction to reproducibility for researchers in the field of machine learning for medical imaging. We first distinguish between different types of reproducibility. For each of them, we aim at defining it, at describing the requirements to achieve it and at discussing its utility. The chapter ends with a discussion on the benefits of reproducibility and with a plea for a non-dogmatic approach to this concept and its implementation in research practice.
abstract_zh: 可重复性是科学的基石，因为研究结果的复制是它们成为知识的过程。人们普遍认为许多科学领域正在经历可重复性危机。这导致了各种指南的出版，以提高研究的可重复性。本教学章节旨在为医学成像机器学习领域的研究人员介绍可重复性。我们首先区分不同类型的再现性。对于它们中的每一个，我们的目标是定义它，描述实现它的要求并讨论它的实用性。本章最后讨论了可重复性的好处，并呼吁对这一概念及其在研究实践中的实施采取非教条的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为医学影像机器学习领域的研究者介绍可重复性概念，区分不同类型并探讨其实施要求和益处。
AI.motivation: 科学界面临可重复性危机，需通过指南和规范提升研究可信度，尤其在医学影像机器学习领域亟需明确可重复性标准。
AI.method: 通过区分可重复性的不同类型，逐一定义其内涵、实施条件及应用价值，结合案例分析与理论探讨。
AI.result: 系统梳理了可重复性的分类框架，明确了实现路径，并强调非教条化实践对提升研究质量的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁研究者以灵活务实的态度落实可重复性原则，推动医学影像机器学习领域的科学进步与成果验证。

authors_text: Yiang Lu,Wei Chen,Bo Lu,Jianshu Zhou,Zhi Chen,Qi Dou,Yun-Hui Liu
title: FBG-Based Online Learning and 3-D Shape Control of Unmodeled Continuum and Soft Robots in Unstructured Environments
title_zh: 非结构化环境中未建模连续体和软体机器人基于 FBG 的在线学习和 3D 形状控制
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel and generic data-driven method to servo-control the 3-D shape of continuum and soft robots embedded with fiber Bragg grating (FBG) sensors. Developments of 3-D shape perception and control technologies are crucial for continuum robots to perform the tasks autonomously in surgical interventions. However, owing to the nonlinear properties of continuum robots, one main difficulty lies in the modeling of them, especially for soft robots with variable stiffness. To address this problem, we propose a versatile learning-based adaptive controller by leveraging FBG shape feedback that can online estimate the unknown model of continuum robot against unexpected disturbances and exhibit an adaptive behavior to the unmodeled system without priori data exploration. Based on a new composite adaptation algorithm, the asymptotic convergences of the closed-loop system with learning parameters have been proven by Lyapunov theory. To validate the proposed method, we present a comprehensive experimental study by using two continuum robots both integrated with multi-core FBGs, including a robotic-assisted colonoscope and multi-section extensible soft manipulators. The results demonstrate the feasibility, adaptability, and superiority of our controller in various unstructured environments as well as phantom experiments.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel and generic data-driven method to servo-control the 3-D shape of continuum and soft robots embedded with fiber Bragg grating (FBG) sensors. Developments of 3-D shape perception and control technologies are crucial for continuum robots to perform the tasks autonomously in surgical interventions. However, owing to the nonlinear properties of continuum robots, one main difficulty lies in the modeling of them, especially for soft robots with variable stiffness. To address this problem, we propose a versatile learning-based adaptive controller by leveraging FBG shape feedback that can online estimate the unknown model of continuum robot against unexpected disturbances and exhibit an adaptive behavior to the unmodeled system without priori data exploration. Based on a new composite adaptation algorithm, the asymptotic convergences of the closed-loop system with learning parameters have been proven by Lyapunov theory. To validate the proposed method, we present a comprehensive experimental study by using two continuum robots both integrated with multi-core FBGs, including a robotic-assisted colonoscope and multi-section extensible soft manipulators. The results demonstrate the feasibility, adaptability, and superiority of our controller in various unstructured environments as well as phantom experiments.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且通用的数据驱动方法，用于伺服控制嵌入光纤布拉格光栅 (FBG) 传感器的连续体和软体机器人的 3D 形状。 3D 形状感知和控制技术的发展对于连续体机器人在外科手术中自主执行任务至关重要。然而，由于连续体机器人的非线性特性，一个主要困难在于它们的建模，特别是对于具有可变刚度的软体机器人。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于FBG形状反馈的多功能基于学习的自适应控制器，它可以在线估计连续体机器人的未知模型以应对意外的干扰，并在无需先验数据探索的情况下对未建模的系统表现出自适应行为。基于一种新的复合自适应算法，利用Lyapunov理论证明了带学习参数的闭环系统的渐近收敛性。为了验证所提出的方法，我们使用两个集成了多核光纤光栅的连续机器人（包括机器人辅助结肠镜和多部分可扩展软机械手）进行了全面的实验研究。结果证明了我们的控制器在各种非结构化环境以及仿真实验中的可行性、适应性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光纤光栅（FBG）传感器的数据驱动方法，用于在非结构化环境中实现未建模的连续体和软机器人的三维形状控制。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人因非线性特性及软体机器人变刚度问题，传统建模方法难以实现精确控制，尤其在非结构化环境中需自主适应未知干扰。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于FBG形状反馈的自适应学习控制器，结合复合自适应算法与李雅普诺夫理论证明闭环系统收敛性，并通过多核FBG集成的实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该控制器在结肠镜机器人和多节软体机械臂上均能实现高适应性控制，验证了其在非结构化环境和仿真实验中的可行性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的在线学习控制方法有效解决了未建模连续体机器人的三维形状控制问题，为复杂环境下的自主手术操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alexander Steen,David Fuenmayor
title: Bridging between LegalRuleML and TPTP for Automated Normative Reasoning (extended version)
title_zh: 用于自动规范推理的 LegalRuleML 和 TPTP 之间的桥梁（扩展版）
comment: 19 pages, 1 figure
comments: 19 pages, 1 figure
abstract: LegalRuleML is a comprehensive XML-based representation framework for modeling and exchanging normative rules. The TPTP input and output formats, on the other hand, are general-purpose standards for the interaction with automated reasoning systems. In this paper we provide a bridge between the two communities by (i) defining a logic-pluralistic normative reasoning language based on the TPTP format, (ii) providing a translation scheme between relevant fragments of LegalRuleML and this language, and (iii) proposing a flexible architecture for automated normative reasoning based on this translation. We exemplarily instantiate and demonstrate the approach with three different normative logics.
summary: LegalRuleML is a comprehensive XML-based representation framework for modeling and exchanging normative rules. The TPTP input and output formats, on the other hand, are general-purpose standards for the interaction with automated reasoning systems. In this paper we provide a bridge between the two communities by (i) defining a logic-pluralistic normative reasoning language based on the TPTP format, (ii) providing a translation scheme between relevant fragments of LegalRuleML and this language, and (iii) proposing a flexible architecture for automated normative reasoning based on this translation. We exemplarily instantiate and demonstrate the approach with three different normative logics.
abstract_zh: LegalRuleML 是一个基于 XML 的综合表示框架，用于建模和交换规范规则。另一方面，TPTP 输入和输出格式是与自动推理系统交互的通用标准。在本文中，我们通过（i）定义基于 TPTP 格式的逻辑多元规范推理语言，（ii）提供 LegalRuleML 相关片段与该语言之间的翻译方案，以及（iii）提出基于该翻译的自动规范推理的灵活架构，在两个社区之间架起一座桥梁。我们用三种不同的规范逻辑示例性地实例化和演示了该方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立LegalRuleML与TPTP之间的桥梁，实现自动化规范推理。
AI.motivation: LegalRuleML用于规范规则建模，TPTP用于自动推理，但二者缺乏直接接口，需通过转换实现协同。
AI.method: 定义基于TPTP的逻辑多元推理语言，构建LegalRuleML与该语言的转换方案，并提出灵活推理架构。
AI.result: 通过三种规范逻辑实例验证了方法的有效性，展示了跨格式推理的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的桥梁方法促进了规范规则与自动推理系统的整合，为实际应用提供了技术基础。

In this paper we provide a bridge between the two communities by (i) defining a logic-pluralistic normative reasoning language based on the TPTP format, (ii) providing a translation scheme between relevant fragments of LegalRuleML and this language, and (iii) proposing a flexible architecture for automated normative reasoning based on this translation. authors_text: Laurent Valentin Jospin,Hamid Laga,Farid Boussaid,Mohammed Bennamoun
title: Bayesian Learning for Disparity Map Refinement for Semi-Dense Active Stereo Vision
title_zh: 用于半密集主动立体视觉视差图细化的贝叶斯学习
comment: 15 pages, 15 figures
comments: 15 pages, 15 figures
abstract: A major focus of recent developments in stereo vision has been on how to obtain accurate dense disparity maps in passive stereo vision. Active vision systems enable more accurate estimations of dense disparity compared to passive stereo. However, subpixel-accurate disparity estimation remains an open problem that has received little attention. In this paper, we propose a new learning strategy to train neural networks to estimate high-quality subpixel disparity maps for semi-dense active stereo vision. The key insight is that neural networks can double their accuracy if they are able to jointly learn how to refine the disparity map while invalidating the pixels where there is insufficient information to correct the disparity estimate. Our approach is based on Bayesian modeling where validated and invalidated pixels are defined by their stochastic properties, allowing the model to learn how to choose by itself which pixels are worth its attention. Using active stereo datasets such as Active-Passive SimStereo, we demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the current state-of-the-art active stereo models. We also demonstrate that the proposed approach compares favorably with state-of-the-art passive stereo models on the Middlebury dataset.
summary: A major focus of recent developments in stereo vision has been on how to obtain accurate dense disparity maps in passive stereo vision. Active vision systems enable more accurate estimations of dense disparity compared to passive stereo. However, subpixel-accurate disparity estimation remains an open problem that has received little attention. In this paper, we propose a new learning strategy to train neural networks to estimate high-quality subpixel disparity maps for semi-dense active stereo vision. The key insight is that neural networks can double their accuracy if they are able to jointly learn how to refine the disparity map while invalidating the pixels where there is insufficient information to correct the disparity estimate. Our approach is based on Bayesian modeling where validated and invalidated pixels are defined by their stochastic properties, allowing the model to learn how to choose by itself which pixels are worth its attention. Using active stereo datasets such as Active-Passive SimStereo, we demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the current state-of-the-art active stereo models. We also demonstrate that the proposed approach compares favorably with state-of-the-art passive stereo models on the Middlebury dataset.
abstract_zh: 立体视觉最近发展的一个主要焦点是如何在被动立体视觉中获得准确的密集视差图。与被动立体视觉相比，主动视觉系统能够更准确地估计密集视差。然而，亚像素精确的视差估计仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，很少受到关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的学习策略来训练神经网络来估计半密集主动立体视觉的高质量子像素视差图。关键的见解是，如果神经网络能够共同学习如何细化视差图，同时使没有足够信息来校正视差估计的像素无效，那么它们的准确性可以加倍。我们的方法基于贝叶斯建模，其中有效和无效的像素由其随机属性定义，允许模型学习如何自行选择哪些像素值得关注。使用 Active-Passive SimStereo 等主动立体数据集，我们证明所提出的方法优于当前最先进的主动立体模型。我们还证明，所提出的方法与 Middlebury 数据集上最先进的被动立体模型相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯学习的策略，用于改进半稠密主动立体视觉中的视差图。
AI.motivation: 尽管主动视觉系统比被动立体视觉系统能更准确地估计稠密视差，但亚像素精度的视差估计仍是一个未被充分研究的问题。
AI.method: 本文方法基于贝叶斯建模，通过定义验证和无效像素的随机特性，使神经网络能够自主选择值得关注的像素以提高视差估计的精度。
AI.result: 在Active-Passive SimStereo等主动立体数据集上，所提出的方法优于当前最先进的主动立体模型，并且在Middlebury数据集上与最先进的被动立体模型相比表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合贝叶斯学习和神经网络，成功提升了半稠密主动立体视觉中视差图的估计精度。

authors_text: Girmaw Abebe Tadesse,Oliver Bent,Komminist Weldemariam,Md. Abrar Istiak,Taufiq Hasan,Andrea Cavallaro
title: BON: An extended public domain dataset for human activity recognition
title_zh: BON：用于人类活动识别的扩展公共领域数据集
abstract: Body-worn first-person vision (FPV) camera enables to extract a rich source of information on the environment from the subject's viewpoint. However, the research progress in wearable camera-based egocentric office activity understanding is slow compared to other activity environments (e.g., kitchen and outdoor ambulatory), mainly due to the lack of adequate datasets to train more sophisticated (e.g., deep learning) models for human activity recognition in office environments. This paper provides details of a large and publicly available office activity dataset (BON) collected in different office settings across three geographical locations: Barcelona (Spain), Oxford (UK) and Nairobi (Kenya), using a chest-mounted GoPro Hero camera. The BON dataset contains eighteen common office activities that can be categorised into person-to-person interactions (e.g., Chat with colleagues), person-to-object (e.g., Writing on a whiteboard), and proprioceptive (e.g., Walking). Annotation is provided for each segment of video with 5-seconds duration. Generally, BON contains 25 subjects and 2639 total segments. In order to facilitate further research in the sub-domain, we have also provided results that could be used as baselines for future studies.
summary: Body-worn first-person vision (FPV) camera enables to extract a rich source of information on the environment from the subject's viewpoint. However, the research progress in wearable camera-based egocentric office activity understanding is slow compared to other activity environments (e.g., kitchen and outdoor ambulatory), mainly due to the lack of adequate datasets to train more sophisticated (e.g., deep learning) models for human activity recognition in office environments. This paper provides details of a large and publicly available office activity dataset (BON) collected in different office settings across three geographical locations: Barcelona (Spain), Oxford (UK) and Nairobi (Kenya), using a chest-mounted GoPro Hero camera. The BON dataset contains eighteen common office activities that can be categorised into person-to-person interactions (e.g., Chat with colleagues), person-to-object (e.g., Writing on a whiteboard), and proprioceptive (e.g., Walking). Annotation is provided for each segment of video with 5-seconds duration. Generally, BON contains 25 subjects and 2639 total segments. In order to facilitate further research in the sub-domain, we have also provided results that could be used as baselines for future studies.
abstract_zh: 体戴式第一人称视觉 (FPV) 相机能够从拍摄对象的角度提取丰富的环境信息。然而，与其他活动环境（例如厨房和户外流动）相比，基于可穿戴相机的以自我为中心的办公室活动理解的研究进展缓慢，主要是由于缺乏足够的数据集来训练更复杂的（例如深度学习）模型来识别办公环境中的人类活动。本文提供了使用胸前安装的 GoPro Hero 相机在巴塞罗那（西班牙）、牛津（英国）和内罗毕（肯尼亚）这三个地理位置的不同办公室环境中收集的大型公开办公活动数据集 (BON) 的详细信息。 BON 数据集包含 18 种常见的办公活动，可分为人与人交互（例如与同事聊天）、人与对象交互（例如在白板上书写）和本体感受交互（例如行走）。每个时长为 5 秒的视频片段均提供注释。一般来说，BON包含25个主题和2639个总段。为了促进该子领域的进一步研究，我们还提供了可用作未来研究基线的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为BON的公开办公场景人类活动识别数据集，包含来自三个不同地理位置的25名受试者的2639个5秒视频片段。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴摄像头在办公场景的人类活动理解研究进展缓慢，主要原因是缺乏用于训练深度学习模型的高质量办公环境数据集。
AI.method: 使用胸部佩戴的GoPro Hero相机，在巴塞罗那、牛津和内罗毕三个地点采集数据，将活动分为人际互动、人与物体互动和本体感觉三类，并对每个5秒视频片段进行标注。
AI.result: 构建了包含18种常见办公活动的BON数据集，提供基线实验结果以支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: BON数据集填补了办公场景活动识别领域的数据空白，为未来研究提供了标准化基准。

search_text: BON: An extended public domain dataset for human activity recognition BON：用于人类活动识别的扩展公共领域数据集 Body-worn first-person vision (FPV) camera enables to extract a rich source of information on the environment from the subject's viewpoint. However, the research progress in wearable camera-based egocentric office activity understanding is slow compared to other activity environments (e.g., kitchen and outdoor ambulatory), mainly due to the lack of adequate datasets to train more sophisticated (e.g., deep learning) models for human activity recognition in office environments. This paper provides details of a large and publicly available office activity dataset (BON) collected in different office settings across three geographical locations: Barcelona (Spain), Oxford (UK) and Nairobi (Kenya), using a chest-mounted GoPro Hero camera. The BON dataset contains eighteen common office activities that can be categorised into person-to-person interactions (e.g., Chat with colleagues), person-to-object (e.g., Writing on a whiteboard), and proprioceptive (e.g., Walking). Annotation is provided for each segment of video with 5-seconds duration. Generally, BON contains 25 subjects and 2639 total segments. In order to facilitate further research in the sub-domain, we have also provided results that could be used as baselines for future studies. 体戴式第一人称视觉 (FPV) 相机能够从拍摄对象的角度提取丰富的环境信息。然而，与其他活动环境（例如厨房和户外流动）相比，基于可穿戴相机的以自我为中心的办公室活动理解的研究进展缓慢，主要是由于缺乏足够的数据集来训练更复杂的（例如深度学习）模型来识别办公环境中的人类活动。本文提供了使用胸前安装的 GoPro Hero 相机在巴塞罗那（西班牙）、牛津（英国）和内罗毕（肯尼亚）这三个地理位置的不同办公室环境中收集的大型公开办公活动数据集 (BON) 的详细信息。 BON 数据集包含 18 种常见的办公活动，可分为人与人交互（例如与同事聊天）、人与对象交互（例如在白板上书写）和本体感受交互（例如行走）。每个时长为 5 秒的视频片段均提供注释。一般来说，BON包含25个主题和2639个总段。为了促进该子领域的进一步研究，我们还提供了可用作未来研究基线的结果。 本文介绍了一个名为BON的公开办公场景人类活动识别数据集，包含来自三个不同地理位置的25名受试者的2639个5秒视频片段。 Girmaw Abebe Tadesse,Oliver Bent,Komminist Weldemariam,Md. Abrar Istiak,Taufiq Hasan,Andrea Cavallaro cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Anjun Chen,Xiangyu Wang,Shaohao Zhu,Yanxu Li,Jiming Chen,Qi Ye
title: mmBody Benchmark: 3D Body Reconstruction Dataset and Analysis for Millimeter Wave Radar
title_zh: mmBody Benchmark：毫米波雷达的 3D 人体重建数据集和分析
comment: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2022, Project Page: https://chen3110.github.io/mmbody/index.html
comments: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2022, Project Page: https://chen3110.github.io/mmbody/index.html
abstract: Millimeter Wave (mmWave) Radar is gaining popularity as it can work in adverse environments like smoke, rain, snow, poor lighting, etc. Prior work has explored the possibility of reconstructing 3D skeletons or meshes from the noisy and sparse mmWave Radar signals. However, it is unclear how accurately we can reconstruct the 3D body from the mmWave signals across scenes and how it performs compared with cameras, which are important aspects needed to be considered when either using mmWave radars alone or combining them with cameras. To answer these questions, an automatic 3D body annotation system is first designed and built up with multiple sensors to collect a large-scale dataset. The dataset consists of synchronized and calibrated mmWave radar point clouds and RGB(D) images in different scenes and skeleton/mesh annotations for humans in the scenes. With this dataset, we train state-of-the-art methods with inputs from different sensors and test them in various scenarios. The results demonstrate that 1) despite the noise and sparsity of the generated point clouds, the mmWave radar can achieve better reconstruction accuracy than the RGB camera but worse than the depth camera; 2) the reconstruction from the mmWave radar is affected by adverse weather conditions moderately while the RGB(D) camera is severely affected. Further, analysis of the dataset and the results shadow insights on improving the reconstruction from the mmWave radar and the combination of signals from different sensors.
summary: Millimeter Wave (mmWave) Radar is gaining popularity as it can work in adverse environments like smoke, rain, snow, poor lighting, etc. Prior work has explored the possibility of reconstructing 3D skeletons or meshes from the noisy and sparse mmWave Radar signals. However, it is unclear how accurately we can reconstruct the 3D body from the mmWave signals across scenes and how it performs compared with cameras, which are important aspects needed to be considered when either using mmWave radars alone or combining them with cameras. To answer these questions, an automatic 3D body annotation system is first designed and built up with multiple sensors to collect a large-scale dataset. The dataset consists of synchronized and calibrated mmWave radar point clouds and RGB(D) images in different scenes and skeleton/mesh annotations for humans in the scenes. With this dataset, we train state-of-the-art methods with inputs from different sensors and test them in various scenarios. The results demonstrate that 1) despite the noise and sparsity of the generated point clouds, the mmWave radar can achieve better reconstruction accuracy than the RGB camera but worse than the depth camera; 2) the reconstruction from the mmWave radar is affected by adverse weather conditions moderately while the RGB(D) camera is severely affected. Further, analysis of the dataset and the results shadow insights on improving the reconstruction from the mmWave radar and the combination of signals from different sensors.
abstract_zh: 毫米波 (mmWave) 雷达越来越受欢迎，因为它可以在烟雾、雨、雪、照明不良等不利环境中工作。之前的工作已经探索了从嘈杂且稀疏的毫米波雷达信号重建 3D 骨架或网格的可能性。然而，目前尚不清楚我们能够如何准确地从跨场景的毫米波信号重建 3D 身体，以及它与相机相比的表现如何，这些都是单独使用毫米波雷达或将其与相机结合使用时需要考虑的重要方面。为了回答这些问题，首先设计并构建了一个自动 3D 身体注释系统，并使用多个传感器来收集大规模数据集。该数据集由同步和校准的毫米波雷达点云和不同场景中的 RGB(D) 图像以及场景中人类的骨架/网格注释组成。借助该数据集，我们使用来自不同传感器的输入来训练最先进的方法，并在各种场景中对其进行测试。结果表明：1）尽管生成的点云存在噪声和稀疏性，毫米波雷达仍能实现比 RGB 相机更好的重建精度，但比深度相机差； 2）毫米波雷达的重建受到恶劣天气条件的影响中等，而RGB（D）相机的重建受到严重影响。此外，对数据集和结果的分析影响了改进毫米波雷达重建和不同传感器信号组合的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并构建了一个名为mmBody的基准数据集，用于评估毫米波雷达在不同场景下进行3D人体重建的性能。
AI.motivation: 毫米波雷达在恶劣环境中具有优势，但其在3D人体重建中的准确性和与其他传感器（如RGB和深度相机）的比较尚不明确，因此需要一个大规模数据集来评估其性能。
AI.method: 作者设计并构建了一个多传感器系统，收集了不同场景下的同步校准毫米波雷达点云和RGB(D)图像，并标注了人体的骨骼和网格信息。随后，使用这些数据训练和测试了最先进的方法。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，毫米波雷达在噪声和稀疏点云条件下，重建精度优于RGB相机但不如深度相机；同时，毫米波雷达受恶劣天气影响较小，而RGB(D)相机则受影响较大。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为毫米波雷达的3D人体重建提供了深入分析，并为未来改进毫米波雷达重建和多传感器信号融合提供了见解。
